Friend, Mississippi has a _HUGE_ Election _THIS NOVEMBER_ , and we are proud to lead the charge for conservative solutions and policies here in Mississippi. Across the country, we have watched as the Blue States have seen people leave in massive numbers, crime increase, and their schools flooded by woke ideology. **NOT IN MISSISSIPPI.** We are the MODEL for true and strong conservative policies where we give our citizens FREEDOM and their constitutional RIGHTS. We face stiff competition from the Democrats, and we need to know who has our back. Will you endorse us for the 2023 Election? [**Join our movement and stand with Republicans across Mississippi.**](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=05eba882e14846bc9bc4c012fdcb50bc&_e=XDwV4Ok-OqfwGCSpG-b_kgCgj5tKn-39oLHEe0mzeUDWNPXBO1bdq2aKa_lTgPmCslvKf1snvnOCqfFVlFpx-Jc7uWvHTeoJeP5zI7ejJBuzRtFNc5xmieafUmg5WSbYBvgdHBYZNHvcv36sfxho-ZPkKxVLoZcSt77Z3xmIdkbfrfmU2Jt625dvkwPpNhHPjKyZapSG00OGu7_0242O7NOVkTaleTq7BeNRtt_0zlIEjm464QlkDDxpSl4LknCznOZ6ZHEkT-GvbAsEqeXLDwrGgWyP0WGESEb61SpUmKQlqdNUY7rPu-cAw7BIme6g)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: This is why I’m running for President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I am ready to lead our Great American Comeback.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f1258934e3ba47629aa9c2b22263b57b&_e=yqMCtOrJ3rVDuGYPFNbgO9FXz-1Igb_rt-N8wGhkeQuyKoN9VhAwnYu240qL0ewfIG01ffy1QEH0qh8maPP70f0AMrjVjQ23zkFo9aQRtpoYttvHa5MALSb1ZHIsRcHx2zx0YmhunojmqfQiMH6CSbP91BdfgYbRARmIi9Ck2QR6L3h3EDPn_CzHrec2nIQ2QF4XxQUj-vCpzfOL37C9ibWr2dbKh2V21P6YV9jT7l2AyzXNl4hYwa4eTTt5KwwVJYEXSmLCMEqoE--l2V_Gimq1QfmdCnRUrn8Rz3vBVasZXGW2-lTbtgbz3HwlWRF2UiqIg01-veQwL53AXnBTg3RZsxB8UHmmf6vV1JhtqSF4XctsiN9wo-R5MC4BkuZUX5uvgmC2nU9m21ot02fbsnADqPnnsngeWRWTKM7heV1J5fj4M2fAe0vE2PlJpiAO4zMP_9sHKi4v1jEyTsEaMg%3D%3D)
---

Friend,
You know that I am running for President of the United States to lead our Great American Comeback.**I 'm here to tell you why**.

In Florida, we went out and led when it mattered. _**We chose facts over fear**_. We chose education over indoctrination. We chose Law and Order over rioting and disorder to make our state a citadel of freedom.

Over the years, I've watched the Left chip away at the freedom of our great nation. I am not happy with the state of this country, and I won't let it stand. We've got a lot of work to do. **Decline is a choice**. **Success is attainable**. **And freedom is worth fighting for**.

That's exactly what I'm doing. I am standing up against the woke mob's radical indoctrination of your children, Biden's disastrous economic policies that are crippling average Americans, and the invasion of our border that has allowed Mexican drug cartels to murder American children and adults.
---
| | [Stand with me today!](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f1258934e3ba47629aa9c2b22263b57b&_e=yqMCtOrJ3rVDuGYPFNbgO9FXz-1Igb_rt-N8wGhkeQuyKoN9VhAwnYu240qL0ewfIG01ffy1QEH0qh8maPP70f0AMrjVjQ23zkFo9aQRtpoYttvHa5MALSb1ZHIsRcHx2zx0YmhunojmqfQiMH6CSbP91BdfgYbRARmIi9Ck2QR6L3h3EDPn_CzHrec2nIQ2QF4XxQUj-vCpzfOL37C9ibWr2dbKh2V21P6YV9jT7l2AyzXNl4hYwa4eTTt5KwwVJYEXSmLCMEqoE--l2V_Gimq1QfmdCnRUrn8Rz3vBVasZXGW2-lTbtgbz3HwlWRF2eao_Ida1ZmnaYhSeF0me6TWDEzmjV0PAFI0xtDfTy4xX8r_KqChKz7gokfjsObYVXMQbH9I8h3TMzils1gtJh4UseoIsMBJhGSdhiA_qL3nw2sD00xKKbDL4SR_VjEZeIoSKQvSDi1HLEbmrOqlxxg%3D%3D)
---
It's time to get this country to start working again--not just for the well-connected in Washington DC, but for working families, children under attack, veterans, and seniors. I use every ounce of my executive power to serve the people I represent, and when I am President, that will be ALL Americans. We will restore a sense of normalcy to our American communities and ensure that common sense is no longer an uncommon virtue in this country. There's a lot out there that needs to be fixed.
Friend--we will get it done. No excuses.

I am running a fully transparent campaign--meaning you're involved at every step, I keep you informed on where your every dollar goes, and I treat you like the member of my team that you are, NOT my personal piggy bank--and I want you to be a part of it. If you're ready to join me in fighting for freedom, **I am humbly asking you to donate any amount you can afford to help out**.
---

Ron DeSantis

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f1258934e3ba47629aa9c2b22263b57b&_e=yqMCtOrJ3rVDuGYPFNbgO9FXz-1Igb_rt-N8wGhkeQuyKoN9VhAwnYu240qL0ewfIG01ffy1QEH0qh8maPP70f0AMrjVjQ23zkFo9aQRtpoYttvHa5MALSb1ZHIsRcHx2zx0YmhunojmqfQiMH6CSbP91BdfgYbRARmIi9Ck2QR6L3h3EDPn_CzHrec2nIQ2QF4XxQUj-vCpzfOL37C9ibWr2dbKh2V21P6YV9jT7l2AyzXNl4hYwa4eTTt5KwwVJYEXSmLCMEqoE--l2V_Gimq1QfmdCnRUrn8Rz3vBVasZXGW2-lTbtgbz3HwlWRF2Ow22vlfgG9QyJX1-xOcjytrZOGJJYYPXJ3N0G6LS9jLHRTSQe-4Cc64GDnqoVFgdJta5spUDUb5quPT3wc9E_W2wB0oyjK_h505VODCX3EtYbqvVZLwr_2ltmvbUYsrUmPrHTN0J_Yxwmk9w747isA%3D%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: I am ready to lead our Great American Comeback. | | | | | | | | | | Friend, You know that I am running for President of the United States to lead our Great American Comeback.I 'm here to tell you why. In Florida, we went out and led when it mattered. We chose facts over fear. We chose education over indoctrination. We chose Law and Order over rioting and disorder to make our state a citadel of freedom. Over the years, I've watched the Left chip away at the freedom of our great nation. I am not happy with the state of this country, and I won't let it stand. We've got a lot of work to do. Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. That's exactly what I'm doing. I am standing up against the woke mob's radical indoctrination of your children, Biden's disastrous economic policies that are crippling average Americans, and the invasion of our border that has allowed Mexican drug cartels to murder American children and adults. | | It's time to get this country to start working again--not just for the well-connected in Washington DC, but for working families, children under attack, veterans, and seniors. I use every ounce of my executive power to serve the people I represent, and when I am President, that will be ALL Americans. We will restore a sense of normalcy to our American communities and ensure that common sense is no longer an uncommon virtue in this country. There's a lot out there that needs to be fixed. Friend--we will get it done. No excuses. I am running a fully transparent campaign--meaning you're involved at every step, I keep you informed on where your every dollar goes, and I treat you like the member of my team that you are, NOT my personal piggy bank--and I want you to be a part of it. If you're ready to join me in fighting for freedom, I am humbly asking you to donate any amount you can afford to help out. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | We will get it done, Friend. I promise you that, and I have the track record to back it up. Yours in Freedom, | Ron DeSantis Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315

I’m hoping you’ll read this all the way through.
| |

| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=980f7f23d17e4c39b0c3e11b69daa620&_t=sYrv5C67WfXa6QlWMLRoTNJB7q1ma2ItVciX3MAVFQg6ecYUn5MdF4BlNUewInTD5bolf7SrOSi1fsYvi3DGcpChaEAI_w0-kWdCTNuDZPM%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=980f7f23d17e4c39b0c3e11b69daa620&_t=sYrv5C67WfXa6QlWMLRoTNJB7q1ma2ItVciX3MAVFQg6ecYUn5MdF4BlNUewInTD5bolf7SrOSi1fsYvi3DGcpChaEAI_w0-kWdCTNuDZPM%3D)

| This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. I wanted to take a few minutes today to share something personal with you, but it's going to take a bit of explaining. **If you get to the end and still don 't understand my commitment to America, then I'm just appreciative that you took the time to read this in its entirety.**

I wanted to take some time to discuss my background so you understand where I'm coming from when I'm fighting for the American people.
| | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=980f7f23d17e4c39b0c3e11b69daa620&_e=Qa4PkzWuaW5Ph8GZ9u7BoEwrWuhd3syOzzM7HeoqACP6uwrLE_a_Eltoa3TD8178ikP-l25WTFFzItfC130g9r-zFshidRRSLxVOD2zwjumOfVeGhw308GaUXJtZVWZnZmIptjl6UvF8WCZo6S7hs8Qab_B9ukJiRryyOab7oWUFoW6grakWoKCbeuxU2k9W8QKTR3NN90_rkLkBBWWIL-SmXfZdFg696130DfqgpnxAVxPelvboUOwB5D-LynWe3ivV8VcG-LFMQgZBQJPZi3ewVUzTnoxolgRoFx3y3pkkYbX99HY3kZfA6SAjgK-9NPy-3HV5R7FPIGNmo7-1aHqPo-t4RYvi-gxrUXoVhT86rmgrFek4cEa3Ixzgr8oe "Kevin as a baby with his dad")
---
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=980f7f23d17e4c39b0c3e11b69daa620&_e=Qa4PkzWuaW5Ph8GZ9u7BoEwrWuhd3syOzzM7HeoqACP6uwrLE_a_Eltoa3TD8178ikP-l25WTFFzItfC130g9r-zFshidRRSLxVOD2zwjumOfVeGhw308GaUXJtZVWZnZmIptjl6UvF8WCZo6S7hs8Qab_B9ukJiRryyOab7oWUFoW6grakWoKCbeuxU2k9W8QKTR3NN90_rkLkBBWWIL-SmXfZdFg696130DfqgpnwYogGwL5dlu7cxpEl1ji5cSlSDId_MzPXrSHp0rGN49x6Rzz4Pt1qplkcUc7cKh0YQK1u6pB2Fl6s81il1gxITl9DC8fiWXzgA3-VMsrOMUxCX6XHPqMWjQE91mn2B82LEqMBinpVLIHniG9YV8NoX "Kevin with his siblings in 1968")
---
_My dad and I, circa 1966._| _My siblings, Shelly and Mark, and I, circa 1968._

I come from a working-class background. My grandparents were immigrants. My mom, Roberta, was a homemaker. My dad, Owen, was an assistant city fire chief. **They instilled a strong work ethic in me that I carry with me every day.**
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=980f7f23d17e4c39b0c3e11b69daa620&_e=Qa4PkzWuaW5Ph8GZ9u7BoEwrWuhd3syOzzM7HeoqACP6uwrLE_a_Eltoa3TD8178ikP-l25WTFFzItfC130g9r-zFshidRRSLxVOD2zwjumOfVeGhw308GaUXJtZVWZnZmIptjl6UvF8WCZo6S7hs8Qab_B9ukJiRryyOab7oWUFoW6grakWoKCbeuxU2k9W8QKTR3NN90_rkLkBBWWIL-SmXfZdFg696130DfqgpnyJmTIwDkfLxbIqNlh-ETYKXmoHUL_EysIag2wENDeAjmmDg4BFIO0q_wjKEMJAiAFFyYeXcL1RHS-MmfRFIw75jnyOi82BnVZhtL8FFJF0cacdNdNyRJC509NyEKwVSe9lJHCOZwmNOPgKBk2NG2Xf "Kevin working the counter at Kevin O's Deli & McCarthy's Yogurt.")
---
_Working the counter at Kevin O's Deli & McCarthy's Yogurt. (Sorry for the image quality, but at least you'll know it's authentic!)_

When I was 19, I ran my first business, Kevin O's Deli, selling sandwiches out of the back of my uncle's yogurt shop. Eventually, I sold the deli to pay my way through college. It taught me a lot about personal responsibility, and **I quickly learned how overregulation by the government affects small businesses. **
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=980f7f23d17e4c39b0c3e11b69daa620&_e=Qa4PkzWuaW5Ph8GZ9u7BoEwrWuhd3syOzzM7HeoqACP6uwrLE_a_Eltoa3TD8178ikP-l25WTFFzItfC130g9r-zFshidRRSLxVOD2zwjumOfVeGhw308GaUXJtZVWZnZmIptjl6UvF8WCZo6S7hs8Qab_B9ukJiRryyOab7oWUFoW6grakWoKCbeuxU2k9W8QKTR3NN90_rkLkBBWWIL-SmXfZdFg696130Dfqgpnz15T3xIDhaoDzOzFwZ2sJuGHTwO6ERWhKszu2NNbbQMwH22BGXMm76bBds5NnYC1IQRRQD9CUqGQuChhrjW1k2M_yfFtVqKUCqASONU2PEzpxLlMua6W6f5WbYbKI3xAUrK-VtFCJp9nsMvN-oky8x "Kevin speaking with a farmer on the campaign trail in 2010")
---
_Speaking with a farmer on the campaign trail in 2010._

After Kevin O's Deli and my experience with government overreach, I decided it was time to make a change. I knew public service would be a positive way for me to channel my frustration as a former small business owner, while also helping others in similar situations. Little did I know that working in the California State Assembly would pave the way to holding one of the most prestigious roles in our country: _**Speaker of the House of Representatives.**_
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=980f7f23d17e4c39b0c3e11b69daa620&_e=Qa4PkzWuaW5Ph8GZ9u7BoEwrWuhd3syOzzM7HeoqACP6uwrLE_a_Eltoa3TD8178ikP-l25WTFFzItfC130g9r-zFshidRRSLxVOD2zwjumOfVeGhw308GaUXJtZVWZnZmIptjl6UvF8WCZo6S7hs8Qab_B9ukJiRryyOab7oWUFoW6grakWoKCbeuxU2k9W8QKTR3NN90_rkLkBBWWIL-SmXfZdFg696130DfqgpnyZbvnJ-WoqDwnoc6sIn6zyLx51zEOqaK6DCexiW12Cxw0y906Qqe-biEbCDWTxL5XOt86-JyuggMxxn6O_TTr9iyX8rpwOiEQJzs6f8iksnze2he09oHy0yYn-yamAZVJLdgYUneHAfE7g1TzFcwnt "Celebrating Republicans’ success in taking back the House in 2022.")
---
_Celebrating Republicans ' success in taking back the House in 2022_

This brings me to my main point: **my Commitment to America isn 't some political ploy - _it 's deeply personal._**

**As Speaker of the House, I promise to deliver on our commitment to America and the American people.

[If you support my efforts as Speaker, please chip in whatever you can afford - $5, $10, even $25 if you can - to help me continue this fight.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=980f7f23d17e4c39b0c3e11b69daa620&_e=Qa4PkzWuaW5Ph8GZ9u7BoEwrWuhd3syOzzM7HeoqACP6uwrLE_a_Eltoa3TD8178ikP-l25WTFFzItfC130g9r-zFshidRRSLxVOD2zwjumOfVeGhw308GaUXJtZVWZnZmIptjl6UvF8WCZo6S7hs8Qab_B9ukJiRryyOab7oWUFoW6grakWoKCbeuxU2k9W8QKTR3NN90_rkLkBBWWIL-SmXfZdFg696130Dfqgpnw8fSi2Y9YqHe2vWY_J_9y5v3d_K5wjYhwTfHzmahT23Fl5O2y07hIOahbeNOows-e2gHIvjJ79PbnMeVWYytC8_8HSq9SLUANn3k4R0n7-lMQOF4wdkd2tATrFMhZTwP6GKUx2paUHF5H9C69GixqY "If you support my efforts as Speaker, please chip in whatever you can afford – $5, $10, even $25 if you can – to help me continue this fight.")**

| | [STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=980f7f23d17e4c39b0c3e11b69daa620&_e=Qa4PkzWuaW5Ph8GZ9u7BoEwrWuhd3syOzzM7HeoqACP6uwrLE_a_Eltoa3TD8178ikP-l25WTFFzItfC130g9r-zFshidRRSLxVOD2zwjumOfVeGhw308GaUXJtZVWZnZmIptjl6UvF8WCZo6S7hs8Qab_B9ukJiRryyOab7oWUFoW6grakWoKCbeuxU2k9W8QKTR3NN90_rkLkBBWWIL-SmXfZdFg696130Dfqgpny2v-UbYuTsvZxZDtbIGhPl29KjAvh0PjFAuf4aglUjfKU9MoPHwYa3ekS0nDfiGe8Thvju72SLh6z-Ww3PUnHBpbDFDntVejoiAsLPumRirIEPJUUrjctCZWvbTS-LsXzXzAFzJcb1vtcmuL9J_0Ir "STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY")
---

If you've read this through to the end, thank you so much for your time. I hope you understand why our commitment to America is so important. I'm so grateful to have your support.

Thank you,

---
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=980f7f23d17e4c39b0c3e11b69daa620&_e=Qa4PkzWuaW5Ph8GZ9u7BoEwrWuhd3syOzzM7HeoqACP6uwrLE_a_Eltoa3TD8178ikP-l25WTFFzItfC130g9r-zFshidRRSLxVOD2zwjumOfVeGhw308GaUXJtZVWZnZmIptjl6UvF8WCZo6S7hs8Qab_B9ukJiRryyOab7oWUFoW6grakWoKCbeuxU2k9W8QKTR3NN90_rkLkBBWWIL-SmXfZdFg696130DfqgpnwBPtL9CBS5BFMsVb3LZTQyjwFVjxf4SaGmq2_cvmjwCNY_q3sWARKlA8QFbfivgY_CTbMeSxoSF0HymcT-_9OPzcjk95XPr94hx2-kvw__HK9_Y6HTZqxDnEOfgm16XIiKbBjbGHqwXRdNDK-AjUZK "KOM Signature")

body:
something big is happening in Texas

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ac577cbccb6948ada1c3582132cc44b4&_e=83--D44x-5I0EEeUYV4uXeqH8IWkoQ_akQU9oV3LCdaKBLppWAg49ITQh2s8VBAgO0Wn9rT3EHNIk2x9n0_yhUV5SphDRHzh1OzuXXTttIcUWili7fLWxo6pwvl91PlExkwhu6X5S4SgGcC4xErfbqk-Qj6gGaA2CbNXNuppAegpg1Ide8hQZCo4iDQSpNtPZaldbm5bZ96oLhPTsYJFQkdDTHkXf-VUODJPSFuq_QNTgKw8b4aqhHQhqRCirsMS7iOSEjRkuQ14d-911MjZuLDGJJ-GsvWaoneefqZ8GGESJuE2ZQd634gj8Jk18BewzJcmTPFfMxUgtF1H7XnHB-Xtxbj6AHlRfHPbRmn5st35cDmzf7luKCyn4kTfeX6n9k-E1Gg1EQuu0NLQj7--0HG4IuSHirZc5uL0gw602k0%3D)

Peter,

I’m grateful for the opportunities that our nation has given me. With hard work, I was able to start my own business, employ other veterans just like me, and live the American dream with my family.

But I felt the pull to serve again - this time in the United States Senate. **That’s why I am running. **

[**WATCH NOW
**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ac577cbccb6948ada1c3582132cc44b4&_e=83--D44x-5I0EEeUYV4uXeqH8IWkoQ_akQU9oV3LCdaKBLppWAg49ITQh2s8VBAgO0Wn9rT3EHNIk2x9n0_yhUV5SphDRHzh1OzuXXTttIcUWili7fLWxo6pwvl91PlExkwhu6X5S4SgGcC4xErfbqk-Qj6gGaA2CbNXNuppAegpg1Ide8hQZCo4iDQSpNtPZaldbm5bZ96oLhPTsYJFQkdDTHkXf-VUODJPSFuq_QNTgKw8b4aqhHQhqRCirsMS7iOSEjRkuQ14d-911MjZuP40nkMWR1Smfy6ItFUCkX4hqgLEROHMfuhsSpkV2Z6dDcQtoOfe4sm-y21UcDkaAWbNpSxvhMqm0vPj0i7BUSdpOL1bAh3j_nNi_HiBcTVBbJrzKZ6KJiQsqp1adLUI1lSMeC7tRyvJEjcsIBoYQ_I%3D)
As a leader on the field of battle, you need to think about the greatest impact you can make. During my military career, it was defending and protecting our great nation. **Now, I want to represent YOU in the United States Senate.**

[**JOIN THE MISSION
**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ac577cbccb6948ada1c3582132cc44b4&_e=83--D44x-5I0EEeUYV4uXeqH8IWkoQ_akQU9oV3LCdaKBLppWAg49ITQh2s8VBAgO0Wn9rT3EHNIk2x9n0_yhUV5SphDRHzh1OzuXXTttIcUWili7fLWxo6pwvl91PlExkwhu6X5S4SgGcC4xErfbqk-Qj6gGaA2CbNXNuppAegpg1Ide8hQZCo4iDQSpNtPZaldbm5bZ96oLhPTsYJFQkdDTHkXf-VUODJPSFuq_QNTgKw8b4aqhHQhqRCirsMS7iOSEjRkuQ14d-911MjZuA-nhivGdQIw5UdWl584tP6L6zbT8NjF3alO9LjeFRf-ByxLHX3k7tlTg3cw5Vfmtr-a4DsN1eXbz1QG4NzdawVHfXEobVq77YWWvU29HwNn9Snyn0tSLSnOnCsw_A4-Nj6Ouj51fII0HM8BtqoMxA0%3D)

American citizens are facing tough decisions right now. We’re dealing with a crisis at our border, inflation has a stranglehold on our families, and we must fix our education system.

**We have some serious challenges facing our nation. We need serious people to solve them.**

When I was asked to serve - it was a serious decision to do so - **but when your country calls and needs you, you MUST answer. **

Peter,**[now I ask you to join this fight with me.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ac577cbccb6948ada1c3582132cc44b4&_e=83--D44x-5I0EEeUYV4uXeqH8IWkoQ_akQU9oV3LCdaKBLppWAg49ITQh2s8VBAgO0Wn9rT3EHNIk2x9n0_yhUV5SphDRHzh1OzuXXTttIcUWili7fLWxo6pwvl91PlExkwhu6X5S4SgGcC4xErfbqk-Qj6gGaA2CbNXNuppAegpg1Ide8hQZCo4iDQSpNtPZaldbm5bZ96oLhPTsYJFQkdDTHkXf-VUODJPSFuq_QNTgKw8b4aqhHQhqRCirsMS7iOSEjRkuQ14d-911MjZuA7QC4QFv_MdjJk-by-jWkOCONU-7x-LPkR6tlqm1YUNXOTrrPX8Uwswy4V2776tQ0p-ZCJ3G_7Vps_bftz2GAEKr0GzQICWD3ms6NZnDztzDMfQT0vnC1ihoEXZuL7l2G6c1TrrJhoWeSbFnsQF7Uc%3D) **

Hooyah,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican for U.S. Senate

[**SEND IN THE SEAL
CHIP IN TODAY **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ac577cbccb6948ada1c3582132cc44b4&_e=83--D44x-5I0EEeUYV4uXeqH8IWkoQ_akQU9oV3LCdaKBLppWAg49ITQh2s8VBAgO0Wn9rT3EHNIk2x9n0_yhUV5SphDRHzh1OzuXXTttIcUWili7fLWxo6pwvl91PlExkwhu6X5S4SgGcC4xErfbqk-Qj6gGaA2CbNXNuppAegpg1Ide8hQZCo4iDQSpNtPZaldbm5bZ96oLhPTsYJFQkdDTHkXf-VUODJPSFuq_QNTgKw8b4aqhHQhqRCirsMS7iOSEjRkuQ14d-911MjZuIcBsYrNGOZgonqb-szJSHqyYdWe31heAXhND2F7afUTi7tcob2OYvFVGWJRR52AD-bEMUUww3MC_nh2FnFS3rWGqP3JAh7Rrpw3AdjW5jnsIBSU8SSh9khOdPSKBtI4fnE_-Y9DzAJ0Ta-SzmKqFIQ%3D)

"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

name: Hilary Franz
subject: common ground
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz (D)
body:
We have a lot in common, and I am determined to find those common grounds to deliver for the people of Washington.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66793449/417626616/759276572?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20230720-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzExNjdhMDAtNjAyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6ch5mEA09DHLmKk8rU8VOra9EgfG3xhYiPGdwgGku2Q=)
---
| Peter,

I am a proud Democrat. My biggest inspiration and influence was my father, a proud union man who spent his whole life serving his community, first as a budget analyst for the City of Portland and then for the fire department. He believed that if you worked hard, you shouldn’t have to worry about having a roof over your head or putting food on the table. The funny thing is, my grandfather, a steadfast Republican believed the same exact thing. My father and grandfather would sit at family dinners arguing for hours over politics, and I would just sit listening. You always learn more when you listen.

During these dinners, I learned that although my father and grandfather had completely different political affiliations, they agreed on so much. They could never see that, though, blinded by their stubbornness and the party labels they wore like badges of honor.

I think about their arguments all the time, how I would sit there hoping one day they would finally listen to each other, really listen, because they could have learned so much.

But I have spent the last seven years traveling to every corner of Washington, talking to people of all political affiliations. I’ve talked to a lot of people who did not vote for me but were ultimately supportive of the results I delivered for their communities and the lands where they live. We have a lot in common, and I am determined to find those common grounds to deliver for the people of Washington.

[_**If you believe in progressive values but want a governor who can be a leader to every single Washingtonian and who is willing to listen and learn, I hope you will consider contributing to my campaign today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66793450/417626623/-165497492?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20230720-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzExNjdhMDAtNjAyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6ch5mEA09DHLmKk8rU8VOra9EgfG3xhYiPGdwgGku2Q=) | [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66793451/417626628/-165497492?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20230720-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzExNjdhMDAtNjAyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6ch5mEA09DHLmKk8rU8VOra9EgfG3xhYiPGdwgGku2Q=)
---
All together,
Hilary

* * *

I’m grateful for the opportunities that our nation has given me. With hard work, I was able to start my own business, employ other veterans just like me, and live the American dream with my family.

But I felt the pull to serve again - this time in the United States Senate. **That’s why I am running. **

[**JOIN THE MISSION
**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=994df94e887b49f78ae9b52a3599278d&_e=Ki8_ijeqqRx565q4r5HwQSQPp0OEXg3mtqx4n8cLdiy2P66b2Di51S4p3gCxeTSyQlGmuK8nRzRciTuCiPqIX514pyn6C1PBtvky4SERzhbSv4Og2OeZUwDXtFo0vkjqUqFeZEcIcwfLsgDmDEUnzSCyxSQGCJZngzaWfkanwYFRMd-uf24Y3Ax3nMPl5ZowX7HpwNlBIOIlwGU2hJ3Mh48q_o2w-nHK2YBdiW_L_AcT4J2QbF9g70SQd_0ZG4NKmtq3Ymt4BNkktGcJahvi2Iu7oLZout3Jh0TkbS-cqAnmcAZikbANXi9kC1mxl22rpEGgARTQJskA4Z7xhWGMDTJSozbMoM5rYe-qWKoIaCQFhgHm-L24UE5wezKVswR1Tk2jVwi1VVysEkfrH4rLJA%3D%3D)

| Hi there,

I wanted to give you an update on some great news. _**I recently secured Grand Rapids $6.2 million for West Michigan’s public transportation system.**_ This investment will allow us to invest in new buses, provide cleaner transportation to the community, and protect the environment.

I know it can feel like the federal government doesn’t deliver for you and your family. But this is the sort of investment in our community that I advocate for every day in the House. [_**If you believe in my work, I hope you will consider chipping in today to my reelection campaign.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66794024/417641294/1237824078?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230720-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzgxMDQ2Mi02NzI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aLuJ5yI-2oq4DrJJgTQ0qKFle_bZEhbhN7BCXxHjars=)

* A message from our partners

**JUST** REAL **NEWS**

---

The corporate news media wants your attention, and they'll do unscrupulous things to get it.

We don't work for them. We work for you (for free*).

^ more on that in a minute

**First, Ask yourself:**
1. | Wouldn't it be nice to trust the news I'm reading?
---|---
2. | Wouldn't it be even better if trustworthy news came straight to me instead of sifting the internet for a nugget or two of un-biased information??
3. | How much time have I wasted digging through an avalanche of stories across the Internet to figure out what's true and important?

[There is a better way!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aahkld-trhiujldw-j/)

Instead of being a Fake News victim — sign up today for a **FREE** newsletter called [_The Flyover_](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aahkld-trhiujldw-t/). Without the hidden agenda, slant, or bias, our talented team of editors dig through hundreds of sources and pull out the most important news of the day - so you don't have to. Get informed on breaking news, politics, business, sports, world affairs, science, technology, and many other topics with a single email - a 5-minute read, once-a-day - delivered directly to your email inbox.

You know it's bad when half of the American people decided national news organizations simply want to mislead, misinform, and push biased opinions on the American public.

This massive shift happening in the American Media is a good thing. The corporate elite news media has lost the trust of the American people.

Don't don't get left behind & miss this EXCLUSIVE opportunity to sign up for FREE today.

name: Sepi Shyne
subject: The only country with more guns than people
body:
We’re the only country that treats near daily gun violence as “normal.
_Content warning: This email talks about deaths caused by gun violence and the gun violence epidemic in our country._

Team,

Let’s go back 11 years: Nearly 400 people walked into theater nine at the Century 16 movie theater to see the premiere of _The Dark Knight Rises._ Midway through the movie, a gunman opened fire and 12 people were murdered and 70 more were injured.

Instead of swift, sweeping reform, Congress offered “thoughts and prayers,” and moved on until the cycle repeated itself.

Today, we remember the innocent people who lost their lives, and the 70 more who were injured. But we must do more than remember, we must use our pain and channel it into action to stop gun violence from destroying our communities once and for all. **And we don’t stop until Congress takes action – or we replace every ineffective member who refuses to address the gun violence epidemic.**

[**We need change and we need it now. Honor the victims of the Aurora shooting and the thousands of lives taken far too soon and demand Congress finally take action to end senseless acts of gun violence in our country.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66794461/417642037/-476367146?ms=em23_230720_gunref_adv_gq_act___SS_ettx&refcode=em23_230720_gunref_adv_gq_act___SS_ettx&source=em23_230720_gunref_adv_gq_act___SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230720_gunref_adv_gq_act___SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sepi-shyne&contactdata=+eE4RjooQ7IuCZbEFXSKJwgnRA9QQeovnMcGYoRXWTsjIclLCGNgUR86AIj4Ull9cfboy8cWIQqWcFmGsjxOO6vcgc1KOk5CT0/3tNlf8p4xz9YT/Cd4D7Wd7Drtn/cGvDe0ITn3yv8PvtFq8Swo8w==&refcode2=c85e7ba6-6e27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzg1ZTdiYTYtNmUyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=57CIPsgmfhRkr04EAx7lHiOyr0eHh2-iEoPopM1gNyU=&emci=108f7e31-6b27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=c85e7ba6-6e27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=13528480)
[ADD YOU NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66794462/417642038/-476367146?ms=em23_230720_gunref_adv_gq_act___SS_ettx&refcode=em23_230720_gunref_adv_gq_act___SS_ettx&source=em23_230720_gunref_adv_gq_act___SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230720_gunref_adv_gq_act___SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sepi-shyne&contactdata=+eE4RjooQ7IuCZbEFXSKJwgnRA9QQeovnMcGYoRXWTsjIclLCGNgUR86AIj4Ull9cfboy8cWIQqWcFmGsjxOO6vcgc1KOk5CT0/3tNlf8p4xz9YT/Cd4D7Wd7Drtn/cGvDe0ITn3yv8PvtFq8Swo8w==&refcode2=c85e7ba6-6e27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzg1ZTdiYTYtNmUyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=57CIPsgmfhRkr04EAx7lHiOyr0eHh2-iEoPopM1gNyU=&emci=108f7e31-6b27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=c85e7ba6-6e27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=13528480)
From movie theaters and grocery stores, to concerts, and — horrifically — elementary schools, **there is no place in this country that is safe from gun violence.**

Republicans — beholden to the greed and power of the gun lobby — would have us believe that this is normal. As a result, we've turned our country's public spaces into scenes of war.

The U.S. death rate from gun violence is 18 times higher than that of other countries and the only country in the world where there are more guns than people. There is absolutely something we can do, we just need leaders in office brave enough to go up against the gun lobby.

[**We can ban assault weapons, implement universal background checks, and limit the types and number of firearms one person can have, for a start. Add your name to the petition to demand Congress put lives ahead of the interests of the gun lobby NOW. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66794463/417642039/-476367146?ms=em23_230720_gunref_adv_gq_act___SS_ettx&refcode=em23_230720_gunref_adv_gq_act___SS_ettx&source=em23_230720_gunref_adv_gq_act___SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230720_gunref_adv_gq_act___SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sepi-shyne&contactdata=+eE4RjooQ7IuCZbEFXSKJwgnRA9QQeovnMcGYoRXWTsjIclLCGNgUR86AIj4Ull9cfboy8cWIQqWcFmGsjxOO6vcgc1KOk5CT0/3tNlf8p4xz9YT/Cd4D7Wd7Drtn/cGvDe0ITn3yv8PvtFq8Swo8w==&refcode2=c85e7ba6-6e27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzg1ZTdiYTYtNmUyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=57CIPsgmfhRkr04EAx7lHiOyr0eHh2-iEoPopM1gNyU=&emci=108f7e31-6b27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=c85e7ba6-6e27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=13528480)

clean_body: We’re the only country that treats near daily gun violence as “normal. Content warning: This email talks about deaths caused by gun violence and the gun violence epidemic in our country. Team, Let’s go back 11 years: Nearly 400 people walked into theater nine at the Century 16 movie theater to see the premiere of The Dark Knight Rises. Midway through the movie, a gunman opened fire and 12 people were murdered and 70 more were injured. Instead of swift, sweeping reform, Congress offered “thoughts and prayers,” and moved on until the cycle repeated itself. Today, we remember the innocent people who lost their lives, and the 70 more who were injured. But we must do more than remember, we must use our pain and channel it into action to stop gun violence from destroying our communities once and for all. And we don’t stop until Congress takes action – or we replace every ineffective member who refuses to address the gun violence epidemic. From movie theaters and grocery stores, to concerts, and — horrifically — elementary schools, there is no place in this country that is safe from gun violence. Republicans — beholden to the greed and power of the gun lobby — would have us believe that this is normal. As a result, we've turned our country's public spaces into scenes of war. The U.S. death rate from gun violence is 18 times higher than that of other countries and the only country in the world where there are more guns than people. There is absolutely something we can do, we just need leaders in office brave enough to go up against the gun lobby. Our communities can’t wait. With gratitude, Sepi Shyne Sepi Shyne For Congress 8149 Santa Monica Blvd #280 West Hollywood, CA 90046 United States

| | Dear friend:

💪 This past weekend, we joined the picket line and stood in solidarity with SAG-AFTRA and the WGA, demonstrating our commitment to protecting the rights of all workers and creatives. **Once elected, I promise to tirelessly champion the basic needs of all people. And, to make sure all individuals and families across the country are empowered with future negotiating power, I will advocate for life empowering policies like Universal Basic Income and Guaranteed Healthcare for All.**

🌟 We’ve been hard at work building upon the momentum we've created together. We have a BIG fundraising goal of $50,000 for our launch month and we need your help. We pride ourselves on being a 100% clean money campaign, refusing any Corporate PAC money. **To kick start our journey, we depend on dedicated donors like you!** 🌟

body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=eea36cdd208b4931a7937fd1c08ba15d&_e=TZKIEO7dbzKHzN8rWfEo4sVGZRRqZJE083l2gmVOhIoPkdjQZYymEnHZyGQbEY-X4tPFMdk422Hj-nNqoU-4UfEnsZxKc6ezC3R_F5zTHtP5B9xtbPgeWP3eMzFgObAXyDS-CduuaHY5ZIzCJKlN0IICgxR2lrfEJwhh3zKzqIrBHhdzQSiuvwy0WD7qthKrmiACgmaMtRJjrXVZoJ6LDlJ7TgbUBpmNtshLZwLkWT4uX8qA8wnHpZkuywCJc79Y)
---
What are you fighting for, my friend? _**An America United**_ has spent the last few years fighting for better politics and a better way forward for our great nation because the way Washington is working now _ isn't working for us._ A massive chasm of division has been growing within our political arena for decades but was accelerated by Donald Trump and the extremes of both sides. Despite this bleak picture, _**the heart of America is still a nation of hope**_. _**An America United**_ is working with former MD Governor Larry Hogan and other common sense leaders to refocus efforts on building a big-tent Republican Party and reconstruct bridges between our two leading parties. Governor Hogan was able to win statewide TWICE in deep-blue Maryland and work across the aisle to provide tax relief eight years in a row, lead his state through crisis after crisis, and take Maryland from the bottom to one of the top economies of our country. _**If he could do that in Maryland, we can do it ANYWHERE!**_ _Ronald Reagan once said,_
_“Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction. It must be fought for, protected, and handed on for them (our children) to do the same.”_ [**Join us in the fight to protect our freedoms, put an end to toxic politics, and support leaders who believe in America as a whole, not a fractured nation.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=eea36cdd208b4931a7937fd1c08ba15d&_e=TZKIEO7dbzKHzN8rWfEo4i8qF5Xz9he5m8M0_wk6giMZwrPE0MnIA1wBvXCPQ0wUnVM5DI-_RkvK1_WAlnfb5UbSX0asKZbPByGR8SBuXwtNikrJLYHfygPvXHXqcrPyw8n7h2Nw-Dhk9Q14h91yHTyP7uUw6YKQkIEPtlMEQBw8wUT27sAwZPiFV_BI1IQnNvgXzoA5iBHkj5PgzyXSObgoYdsY1gJRGq8nKy6blsqKQxWhpwlO2KiNz5qOk98qSL8eSAqEBd7Egon3Y7fmUSI5pgXVbLx6L0F1TI1rSj85_JH5GMqVO37wliZI1YYMvQbEZAdNbvJI1JO6OQ-4r4fkkAACxsDyYYz4nSwYgoq7mSjDyNA3FwKB2RdcdUFgb0KIrTi0ouq1G-vmE7zBgToEe2I88ypXQef40YsYyteMjuvInRUQC3h7PB2IcJvorE1MlbXiiMVOMZ8wE6PA3m3bvDj6-E3cCDr8RV-iLElpepZf4oDhuatROsVSQLlUbaDfCvHaB9YTuA0woxlDZ1hXcp8hH-2TGpjvZLeHtwUMnWlsg3PXO3aUQKOrzx0tN9StxubO0GOh5kYDiAlwNVAPhdd7Kf-94aS1BS2iNa3idCo8cPlqlELOnw_lCS0COgfbGDA7Z7fSad0kIioBfw%3D%3D) Thank you,_**An America United**_

name: CPT Sam Brown
subject: Time is of the essence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
Every single minute could be the difference between success and failure

| | |
---
Friend, If there’s one thing I’ve learned on the battlefield, it’s the **value of time.**
---
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zcuc5rghpnk41j82bqceblta5iks2mqe2u33bkro_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjj6aob0cth2bs)
---
Timing is everything. In combat, it can be the difference between victory and defeat – between life and death. **Timing is everything in elections too.** Let me explain: Early fundraising is **CRUCIAL** to a strong campaign. Everything we do, from winning votes at the doors to putting out ads on TV costs money. Campaigns aren’t cheap, Friend, especially this highly competitive campaign for Nevada’s Senate seat. My opponent has already started out with a multimillion-dollar war chest and she’s enlisted the help of her left-wing D.C. friends like Hillary Clinton VP pick Tim Kaine. If I want to compete against her, I have no time to waste. That’s why I’m asking you, Friend. **[Can you please chip in anything you can to help me fight back against the D.C. establishment?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z92ckr9h5majm9h3094m9d1bre7putvmk6l3b9v8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjj6aob0cth2bs)** I knew from the get-go that this would be tough, but nothing worthwhile ever comes easy. Can I count on you to have my back? Duty First, CPT Sam BrownU.S. Army (Ret.)
---
[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkn0i2hmjsv376m4vgdpqu33qtpbhohf1k9pthj0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjj6aob0cth2bs)

body:
Only 37% of Americans approve of President Biden’s handling of the economy, despite months of campaigning on “Bidenomics,” as the White House calls it. That’s up only 3 points from two months ago.

# FRIday, JULY 21, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** Today is the anniversary of the opening battle of the Civil War, fought in 1861 near Manassas, Va., but often called the Battle of Bull Run. The Confederates won, but the lesson for both armies was how bloody a long war would be.

In today's edition, we're discussing the $2 billion Americana theme park coming to Oklahoma, a Burger King worker arrested for serving french fries dug from the trash, and the fastest wiener dog in the West.

Think we could improve something? [Please send us a note](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover)**** and let us know. We appreciate hearing from our readers! If this is your first time reading _The Flyover_ , [sign up here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwyAQQL8GtkT4zhxmYKhUeUvXjhaFI74Kh8ilsfr3VTtnfk9Peu-X5RKlyu36FjcOvbQlpi4PXow7wXACXEDnUJiBUXMYaPIenSWv1xB9LtbmCT9cAXI2Zs52omTckH2KpCWAATQOBuORRnv24AkJkiOyYNykRsNZetvPn01ufeVSf9qD93Nqm65h7f2u8EXBrGA-juOJ9cdw_u6bwtfR6D3k-yG1yhc5NZrrFqX-x_rzt98AAAD__7BZTrk) and make sure you don't miss our next edition. ## Polls Show Voters Not Buying 'Bidenomics'
Only [37% of Americans approve](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOpDAQBNCvMVkj0wZ7HRBcQraXXoiMaaBXBiPcM2j-_jQTb1ZSSU-l-vc9fgdOfKx_w069LHkMUfhJo3aADaAZsZr7hQjJVNQ39st74zrrq63Hbmm9t94FR2TnKbZtM0VqQrd03aKp4h41Gu2w0d7Ytqs9emssRmdth9p9qVbTzJKv-ifzIRst6ZWfdNUx71XqN5GzKPNH4aBwuO-7jscU36XC4U0rHLT7ZIXDxDMdBSjmI-8cIZznlZ8hwRWEjxUuLlSgJF43SS-YHgJcoAinBD-PImDcSVekQ2CmcrIQfMg3VuB8lK3eZE_V1c_nzSlxsU61et0Dp89g-f2__wEAAP__joxy4g) of President Biden's handling of the economy, despite months of campaigning on "Bidenomics," as the White House calls it. That's up only 3 points from two months ago. The CNBC All-American Economic Survey shows that only 20 percent of Americans think the economy is good or excellent. The survey also asked about expectations for the coming year, and [70 percent](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0D2PozAQxvFPYzpHZgBjFxTX0OXaK9FgD2FOfkHYIcq3X2W33fqvn_To-Xdf7siB0-MvRprqlhd0lS9a1CihldAt0PhpIwLqGppabaztxkHbZp9Q4Qpk-3YzMDiDbmsdmnHdyK_G96bhCRR0aoRW2U73w82C1Z0GN2o9gBqN6BV5rvm8_c-c6k5beOeLzpvLsQnTXutRRPdHwCxgrjvtHMKnCZj3HCnRqwiY0UdOXOqJlXMSMPetMtYaubKnJAtRkSViCPLkQpKTJJdTjuwkHseZLwzyY9NDYmT_wz65yONZdlme50VvAXNzTv54cQhc9Ch69YjI33ua-vt1XwEAAP__w3Zyfg) said they think the economy will stay the same or get worse.

## 'Barbie,' 'Oppenheimer' Set for Big Weekend
The [two most anticipated movies](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu9CAQBOCnsTufYIHFFBR_c939bUoLw_q8ETYWRnfK20dOkSrlN9OM5uMxPQJn3p__w0a-LWUKsfGLJmEHkAOoCfrkFyIg1ZOXODqnrEHXrx51CosYEaWQIenRORiNtaijJglEPXsQoIQFKZxCbW4OHCqEaBENCDt2WlDiVurts_DeVlryV3lRvcWy9dmvrR1np_51cO_gHo6d3udVXaiNY6YO7nOoM-0r8UZ1uMA0vM6hHMdvijIgRYxolXHzaGRKFGPChMbMJsx99el4c858ou20eG6B88-G9vcl3wEAAP__FvNgoQ) of the summer open tonight, going head to head: the pink fantasy world of Barbie vs. the darkness of the first atomic bomb test. "Barbie" and "Oppenheimer" could have a [combined opening of over $200 million,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2unDAQRp_GdLMyY7DXBcWmoLtpUyIDY5iVf5BxIHn7aFPf6vuk0xydX1_Tl-PAafvpIg3V58ktlS-apAFsAdWEzTp4IiTV0NDqp7XK9No2-7B6r3tUan3SovRqTOeotb5rrbWdmmXDA0pU0mArrdJd_7BotdK4GK17lOYpOkkr11we78yp7uTD33xReSw5NmHYaz1OoV4CR4Hjfd-PeKYPEzhSgt-nwDHmi-lzEt2fmV2ZmSAfB6WdOFKBmqG4WgNB3Qm2kGeCm-sOS44zJ1oBtYyQD0qcNpjzH8je80JwFLqYboGjK_B6tYTvH2NThvW4OQQ-tRGd3KLj8N-4fh_wXwAAAP__IFNyZw) a bonanza for theater owners starved for blockbusters this summer. Not surprisingly, "Barbie" is expected to be the bigger hit, earning double her darker competition. The two films aren't actually seen as direct competitors. Movie fans filled social media with their plans for seeing the two films as a [double feature on the same day](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu9CAQBOCnsTufYIHFFBR_c939bUoLw_q8ETYWRnfK20dOkSrlN9OM5uMxPQJn3p__w0a-LWUKsfGLJmEHkAOoCfrkFyIg1ZOXODqnrEHXrx51CosYEaWQIenRORiNtaijJglEPXsQoIQFKZxCbW4OHCqEaBENCDt2WlDiVurts_DeVlryV3lRvcWy9dmvrR1np_51cO_gHo6d3udVXaiNY6YO7nOoM-0r8UZ1uMA0vM6hHMdvijIgRYxolXHzaGRKFGPChMbMJsx99el4c858ou20eG6B88-G9vcl3wEAAP__FvNgoQ): the more serious "Oppenheimer" first, then "Barbie" for dessert.

That’s up only 3 points from two months ago. | | | | | | FRIday, JULY 21, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today is the anniversary of the opening battle of the Civil War, fought in 1861 near Manassas, Va., but often called the Battle of Bull Run. The Confederates won, but the lesson for both armies was how bloody a long war would be. In today's edition, we're discussing the $2 billion Americana theme park coming to Oklahoma, a Burger King worker arrested for serving french fries dug from the trash, and the fastest wiener dog in the West. Think we could improve something? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover** and let us know. We appreciate hearing from our readers! If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying The Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, . | Polls Show Voters Not Buying 'Bidenomics' Only of President Biden's handling of the economy, despite months of campaigning on "Bidenomics," as the White House calls it. That's up only 3 points from two months ago. The CNBC All-American Economic Survey shows that only 20 percent of Americans think the economy is good or excellent. The survey also asked about expectations for the coming year, and said they think the economy will stay the same or get worse. $2 Billion Theme Park Planned For Route 66 Oklahoma officials announced a $2 billion plan to partner with developers to build a Disney World-sized on Route 66 near Vinita, OK, about 170 miles from Oklahoma City. The developers are affiliated with Branson, Missouri-based Mansion Entertainment Group and plan to build the project in phases. The first to open will be a large RV park with cabins in Spring 2025. ) The ultimate goal is including rides, live shows, family attractions, and a "top-tier" 300-room hotel and water park. 'Barbie,' 'Oppenheimer' Set for Big Weekend The of the summer open tonight, going head to head: the pink fantasy world of Barbie vs. the darkness of the first atomic bomb test. "Barbie" and "Oppenheimer" could have a a bonanza for theater owners starved for blockbusters this summer. Not surprisingly, "Barbie" is expected to be the bigger hit, earning double her darker competition. The two films aren't actually seen as direct competitors. Movie fans filled social media with their plans for seeing the two films as a : the more serious "Oppenheimer" first, then "Barbie" for dessert. name: Captain Sam Brown
subject: I thought I was dead. But God had other plans.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
I survived this for a reason, Friend

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cb8df2e5e95f43ff84041316ae740e7b&_e=8pKq8ZVcq-hD5sbgZ2R9EbvtONWeAqfuC2UsVnQMGd6bSzXYTio6au0zraToke1sHoN15hlBkVBKhgwCWTNT1f1YKxUFmpc9ohzSE7sjQ9fbCiTG6wCKnwgPMZm3j_Kfjfp84YKVAk1TuOZo1ahoqFH4etGmfnrbi3vT97NKV6l4kHIP91tS9GHn0RONFgIXz1EqPn9oeqgsfY7ASFiOH7bNDGKuujJx-vpLYDbnLwdDMaNG04QbUAzUGPQ-G79HPClOL-B4c1qTdlkK0F-WGwal-StHZx3WPZYwvJvRF5V-HJDTfvUefhTC4Or-L7II6_td62AHqtxzUzcc48z4kArC71S7fwSkzWAeNv92wu5e7otF9snWZ2_sX0fhVASh_Myb99cRZnA58aIziVRK-1NN3BvyQsKRsc8fa1G8R1Vk7BKgUWdh-6KJMOqFsSpY)
---
Even 15 years after the bomb went off - it's hard to believe that I survived. While serving in Afghanistan, a roadside bomb exploded under the gas tank of my vehicle. The explosion drenched me in diesel and covered my body in flames. **_I thought I was done for. But God had other plans._** A fellow soldier, who had also been injured by our attackers, rushed to extinguish the fire on my body. But, I don't remember that day as the day I nearly died. **I remember it as the day I was given a new life.** A life that would be totally dedicated to the service of my country, and my family for the glory of God. **_The life I live is not my own, and I intend to give my whole life up in service. _** **[That 's why I'm running for the U.S. Senate.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cb8df2e5e95f43ff84041316ae740e7b&_e=8pKq8ZVcq-hD5sbgZ2R9EbvtONWeAqfuC2UsVnQMGd6bSzXYTio6au0zraToke1sHoN15hlBkVBKhgwCWTNT1f1YKxUFmpc9ohzSE7sjQ9fbCiTG6wCKnwgPMZm3j_Kfjfp84YKVAk1TuOZo1ahoqFH4etGmfnrbi3vT97NKV6l4kHIP91tS9GHn0RONFgIXz1EqPn9oeqgsfY7ASFiOH7bNDGKuujJx-vpLYDbnLwdDMaNG04QbUAzUGPQ-G79HPClOL-B4c1qTdlkK0F-WGwal-StHZx3WPZYwvJvRF5UIIruDe6onLe6aKZbI4CJu5N8oVWZQTQh5wr_3yT7x2rZI9YNKMqXmLwPXb2kU1-NkFAp2OvS_nQ4-iWpT3pvCyBrs-xFLd4H3wg3IENVGNsQB2vC-G228uNV5D07OEGW8sY_Ij5muUvD_E_HqeFuG)** I always knew that God's calling for my life would lead me to service for my country. What I didn't know is that this path would lead me to run for public office. But the mission I'm setting off on today is not one I can complete on my own. [**That 's why I am asking for your support today.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cb8df2e5e95f43ff84041316ae740e7b&_e=8pKq8ZVcq-hD5sbgZ2R9EbvtONWeAqfuC2UsVnQMGd6bSzXYTio6au0zraToke1sHoN15hlBkVBKhgwCWTNT1f1YKxUFmpc9ohzSE7sjQ9fbCiTG6wCKnwgPMZm3j_Kfjfp84YKVAk1TuOZo1ahoqFH4etGmfnrbi3vT97NKV6l4kHIP91tS9GHn0RONFgIXz1EqPn9oeqgsfY7ASFiOH7bNDGKuujJx-vpLYDbnLwdDMaNG04QbUAzUGPQ-G79HPClOL-B4c1qTdlkK0F-WGwal-StHZx3WPZYwvJvRF5XuEO1RPi76sbNJtD3pJXKzWBzFSiHQG73IlMuucrCpMNyn9mSB64QgQDRsSkxQswjSDmd943zGnFoegIL6CRRsm_7DhpY2LEd_UUjreAL2YfIsuWw9hAiaKmHs7bL4bBnqDRJDqPNzEWhY7FmbFJbm) Friend, the fight to defend America is fundamentally not about me. It's about protecting the greatest country in the history of mankind and ensuring the longevity of the American experiment for you, your children, and your children's children. **But the American experiment has never been in greater peril than it is right now.** Just look at where our country is right now. Since Joe Biden took office, we've faced unprecedented threats from adversaries like China, our economy has fallen to shambles, our southern border has deteriorated. We've allowed a full scale invasion to occur, and the radical left's agenda has torn our nation apart bit by bit. The mission to take back the Senate and restore our nation is going to require all of us, working together as a team, to complete. **[I 'm relying on patriots like you to join me. Help me make this mission possible NOW! >>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cb8df2e5e95f43ff84041316ae740e7b&_e=8pKq8ZVcq-hD5sbgZ2R9EbvtONWeAqfuC2UsVnQMGd6bSzXYTio6au0zraToke1sHoN15hlBkVBKhgwCWTNT1f1YKxUFmpc9ohzSE7sjQ9fbCiTG6wCKnwgPMZm3j_Kfjfp84YKVAk1TuOZo1ahoqFH4etGmfnrbi3vT97NKV6l4kHIP91tS9GHn0RONFgIXz1EqPn9oeqgsfY7ASFiOH7bNDGKuujJx-vpLYDbnLwdDMaNG04QbUAzUGPQ-G79HPClOL-B4c1qTdlkK0F-WGwal-StHZx3WPZYwvJvRF5UkN1xBtU6sbHRV_LAZmj3DOai_Rk7Tz1xrIk2UlYI30x0b0Xk8QpmAcC40xCbWlXeQdiIqB6PWeDMmC4rkfJfZXNUGnBBU-e5E8A6zIwqmsB0bAG8O-NJBkLZtLkqiepIBAdMaXxtmJfXxmqBrByJf)** Duty First,

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cb8df2e5e95f43ff84041316ae740e7b&_e=8pKq8ZVcq-hD5sbgZ2R9EbvtONWeAqfuC2UsVnQMGd6bSzXYTio6au0zraToke1sHoN15hlBkVBKhgwCWTNT1f1YKxUFmpc9ohzSE7sjQ9fbCiTG6wCKnwgPMZm3j_Kfjfp84YKVAk1TuOZo1ahoqFH4etGmfnrbi3vT97NKV6l4kHIP91tS9GHn0RONFgIXz1EqPn9oeqgsfY7ASFiOH7bNDGKuujJx-vpLYDbnLwdDMaNG04QbUAzUGPQ-G79HPClOL-B4c1qTdlkK0F-WGwal-StHZx3WPZYwvJvRF5UuKcC8xyFQdJILSDr2TNUOfiSUL1epReY7--ePqPAE19IN3DdRpjRKGBb8-xgwZnAmOANJwJxSvX7cldtppwfrI0QJmtPStL3edCm6ox6iDEfiU6c-R5YyiBJX_jq4FJBk5-x7xZF0AChIGVdOl4_-)

Dear Friend,
This is NOT a drill, America. This is **Christopher Coyne** from Lear Capital, and we're in a **crucial phase**.
You've heard our warnings, our urgent calls to action.
The financial hurricane we feared? It's not looming on the horizon any longer - **it's HERE, ripping through the fabric of our economy.**

This wasn't a contingency - it was a **grim necessity**. This guide isn't available for sale anywhere - Amazon, eBay, you name it, they don't have it. Why? Because this isn't about profit - it's about **RESPONSIBILITY**.
We're on a mission, folks. A **mission** to arm every true American with this guide - for **FREE**. Every single American deserves to know how to **defend their financial stability.**
**Here's where YOU come in:** We've got a **FREE copy** of our 2023 Wealth Survival Guide reserved under your name. It's **locked, loaded,** and waiting for your go-signal.
[**CLICK HERE TO SECURE YOUR FREE GUIDE**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec2299f3712f4df0a0feb6c46f70014c&_e=I5yJ1PwBkw97SDRUSoLjRaWuRsGX0Yji13Q60R3XF0Us574L_12-VvMI01aLdHVCgvyMyNOREY5fFrsikrFH6mfSra5ozm8AJ6w8L38VrIRriQKCgLwIRgpGo-aGpXAXPyzBKFclbecVg6hlX_dSwu9zOSYehexbO_RZanDZW8l9On1CVe5NZKJJQ-SIE4UajPgchRvICAqS47j_Pbzr_mmVRozRanuYb8UArBruWp4dnEbBvhGIVG0AtzTtNJua-a7rXtORc-g2_WRCYbc1tj2fKYFOOaIW00GjdhfxrZVTMfV1oo38DAEy9YL9Z9ZHrflJSb4HXoeMIyee81IMGRYqEXVv4F0s1BrSdoVcHvs%3D)

Stay strong, stay vigilant,
Christopher Coyne

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb9e1693581545aa90b95dd3751eeded&_e=L4x7oh86ADCEsLXuEdJmlDFAxnsgEd2l2qynJpUQaS-fu2_QsEFeIR1QlCaU81eCoag3okEoD7VdddJeBHuLNluQUqnKNubTt2zYgLJiaMI9IDyZUri5eXddZmoD4fmQxPoA8cW-DFUnyoO4dN8fR-nS46_GAhq4efH3YxoGJtZ5pSyQzB7eo5jqQoD1STuAHrVdCfqv2SXnLCP_dUN2sB0xpGh4q6pj1fIfLVIK4AHF8UfpD6Z28o9Nyk9Gu-8iWnQBk3pu1qIXwkH5xh7PsP9LrbfHkbI2cvYYNrWBC6M9MGj4YAYC85doGR_d7UYPQzSxXdrp0xnN3blgMshS8nPqrmetncTma1jx6MtLSbBGGP8C7DfGGpEsNFu7daYS_I3_mAjWeE2aRfFwHAdhhCdlXu8cA6mbh-MnRYkD9XBlgcHVv7nATl2VYjI5YSJvTuDnsHIQQg1AClRRvSh_Dw%3D%3D)
---
Timing is everything. In combat, it can be the difference between victory and defeat - between life and death. **Timing is everything in elections too.** Let me explain: Early fundraising is **CRUCIAL** to a strong campaign. Everything we do, from winning votes at the doors to putting out ads on TV costs money. Campaigns aren't cheap, Friend, especially this highly competitive campaign for Nevada's Senate seat. My opponent has already started out with a multimillion-dollar war chest and she's enlisted the help of her left-wing D.C. friends like Hillary Clinton VP pick Tim Kaine. If I want to compete against her, I have no time to waste. That's why I'm asking you, Friend. **[Can you please chip in anything you can to help me fight back against the D.C. establishment?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb9e1693581545aa90b95dd3751eeded&_e=L4x7oh86ADCEsLXuEdJmlDFAxnsgEd2l2qynJpUQaS-fu2_QsEFeIR1QlCaU81eCoag3okEoD7VdddJeBHuLNluQUqnKNubTt2zYgLJiaMI9IDyZUri5eXddZmoD4fmQxPoA8cW-DFUnyoO4dN8fR-nS46_GAhq4efH3YxoGJtZ5pSyQzB7eo5jqQoD1STuAHrVdCfqv2SXnLCP_dUN2sB0xpGh4q6pj1fIfLVIK4AHF8UfpD6Z28o9Nyk9Gu-8iWnQBk3pu1qIXwkH5xh7PsP9LrbfHkbI2cvYYNrWBC6M9MGj4YAYC85doGR_d7UYPBaCRxnlILwXEe00z14B9hlOG2dopiMujLNCPYbKUi9ijX-HFicF1FFm-aymEKrTsTqNAX6mDhANgqLU_lJNgbmk9IdgXtHWeMG6AbiCzqOY94bnflM6r4TH7xRH9jw-jge3T4B-fO92H4N50AbeJ_w%3D%3D)** I knew from the get-go that this would be tough, but nothing worthwhile ever comes easy. Can I count on you to have my back? Duty First, CPT Sam Brown U.S. Army (Ret.)

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Tell President Biden to restore Endangered Species Act protections DESTROYED by the Trump Administration!** **[Send your message now!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1888289?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** The Endangered Species Act is bedrock environmental law. Some of the most beloved animals in the world -- **bright-eyed sea turtles, fluffy grizzly bears, and loveable manatees** \-- are still around in part to these critical protections. But **_the Trump administration weakened protections_** for these critters and their habitats, making it easier for greedy corporations to **destroy their homes and push them even further toward extinction!** **[Please, Friend, urge President Biden to restore ALL protections to endangered species that Trump reversed!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1888290?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ** ***372 SIGNATURES MISSING FROM YOUR AREA** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1888291?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The Endangered Species Act doesn’t just help some of your favorite animals survive. It also protects our nation’s precious public lands from greedy fossil fuel companies. Without protections, many habitats are left open for polluters to _**FRACK**_ and _**DRILL**_ away. That could mean **contaminated drinking water** for nearby communities and **climate-warming emissions** for the entire world!
**Fossil fuel companies are RACING to get their grubby hands on public lands right now.** Every second that ESA protections are not restored, they’re getting closer to DESTROYING our lands and raking in the profits at our expense. **President Biden could STOP them – but we need YOUR help to convince him!** **[Help PROTECT people, public lands, and wildlife from greedy fossil fuel companies! Send your message by 11:59pm TONIGHT!>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1888292?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1888291?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Raena Garcia
Fossil Fuel and Lands Campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: A self-audit of the 2022 governor's race
body:
please listen to this | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/podcast-2023?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

I have always wanted to have a conversation. This past November in Minnesota did not go the way many of us wanted to. I sat down on a podcast recently called [The Break Down with Brodkorb and Becky](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=1b26f75764&e=9828080a05) and I really want you to listen to it. One of the hosts of the podcast was one of my biggest critics during the campaign. We cannot be afraid to self-audit, take accountability, and course correct. Please take a listen by [clicking here](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=43245bcfbc&e=9828080a05) or the thumbnail below:
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=def8d336ad&e=9828080a05)
---
| I care deeply about Minnesota and the success of Republicans here. I still believe our freedom is at stake and the conservative movement must save it. It is my prayer that this [reflective conversation](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=169a9dfeef&e=9828080a05) provokes thought, dialogue, and course correction for us all.

[We discuss](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=e8920031f4&e=9828080a05) the abortion issue, the endorsement process, and so much more. Do not miss this and please do not hesitate to reach out if you have questions about any of it. It's time to start a healing and reclaiming process, so that we can win again in Minnesota.

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor
---
|
---

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: Get “The Federalist Papers” course DVD
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, "The Constitution is kind of trash." That's what a guest-with an Ivy League degree-said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You've likely seen how "progressives" in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation's principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like "The Constitution is kind of trash." And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution-Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison-gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we're serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn't run from them. We should embrace them. **That's why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course,["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](http://trk.libertyledger.-qLw-Uw)**** on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](http://trk.libertyledger.-o6mN0yVQFWAU9VAP9RQ)
---
| | _**"The Federalist Papers"**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale's faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation's founding principles-maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**"The Federalist Papers"**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won't last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of _**"The Federalist Papers"**_ right now: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://trk.libertyledger._6v_wA1TIq-Ue4O3NxULQ) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01Vice PresidentNational Donor OutreachHillsdale College
---
Liberty Ledger P.O. Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.libertyledger.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjAyLTRmN2YyY2I2MjE0YzQ1MjRiNTRlOTkzZDEwMDczODZiIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/gethoD__Tf5eQGqRxFq4ug) to unsubscribe.
---

Friend,

You are the source of my courage, my hope, and my resolution. You are the reason I will never give up our mission to save America.

| **Weekly Newsletter**
---
| | Derek,

What a big week in New Hampshire politics!

On Wednesday, Governor Chris Sununu announced that he would not be running for re-election in 2024. After 8 years of leading our state towards lower taxes and more personal responsibility, I want to thank Governor Chris Sununu for the leadership and steady hand with which he has delivered the Granite State. I trust he will continue to be a voice for fiscal responsibility and I look forward to continuing to work with Governor Sununu for the remaining 18 months of his fourth term.

We need to continue delivering real results for the Granite State and we need to keep Republicans in the drivers' seat in the New Hampshire State House after the 2024 election.

In 2024 when we'll elect 240 House Republicans, 16 State Senators, and 1 Republican Governor we'll be able to expand educational freedom, enshrine parental rights, and lower taxes for all in 2025.

**I know you hear this every two years, but for our State Government, the 2024 Election will be the most important election in state history.
**
That's why Granite Solutions is going to continue to fight to reach new voters, expand the base of the Republican Party, and grow our network to build the largest grassroots operation New Hampshire has ever seen.

But in order to do that, I need your help. Please go to [www.GraniteSolutions.org](http://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/http:%2F%2Fwww.GraniteSolutions.org/2/010001897854292e-c72da074-d0c5-4d1f-a5f5-d5e630f735a6-000000/xNbKil4aircyWdt7LvCwBVq9ruA=331) today to sign up to volunteer or donate. I know that together we can make a big difference.

**Don't Mass Up New Hampshire****
**
While Governor Chris Sununu announced he wouldn't run for re-election, Massachusetts Governor Maura Healey formally endorsed Manchester Mayor Joyce Craig.

We've all seen what Joyce Craig has done to Manchester - but we cannot give her the opportunity to Mass Up New Hampshire.

[Read my statement about Joyce Craig's effort to Mass Up New Hampshire and the questions the New Hampshire media should ask her here.
](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2F20_questions_for_joyce_craig_after_accepting_maura_healey_s_endorsement/1/010001897854292e-c72da074-d0c5-4d1f-a5f5-d5e630f735a6-000000/i8BZOKqzTpAiYgkei0im_1Odu9g=331)
**New Hampshire Democrats Don't Support FITN**

In a recently release UNH Survey, only 38% (!) of New Hampshire Democrats actually say they support our New Hampshire First in the Nation Presidential Primary.

[I don't have to tell you what this means for New Hampshire's future, but you can read my whole statement about the development here. ](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Fonly_38_of_new_hampshire_democrats_support_our_fitn_primary/1/010001897854292e-c72da074-d0c5-4d1f-a5f5-d5e630f735a6-000000/QaRVn7FJQ4wNZ_fCE9VrUIAUfB8=331)

**Get Involved****
**
Remember, there are numerous ways to get involved with Granite Solutions. Whether it's knocking on doors, making phone calls, or becoming a Town/Ward Captain, we need you on our team. To find out more, visit our website at[www.GraniteSolutions.org/volunteer](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Fvolunteer/1/010001897854292e-c72da074-d0c5-4d1f-a5f5-d5e630f735a6-000000/0TaBBXQBomM_iluBqgndYyq590k=331).

As always, I'm humbled by your support and commitment to our shared values. Together, we are making a difference for New Hampshire. Let's keep the momentum going!

Best,

Rep. Joe Sweeney
Chairman, Granite Solutions
