disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson
body:
I wasn’t born with a silver spoon in my mouth.

| |
---
| | | | | I grew up as the 9th of 10 children in Greensboro. My father was an alcoholic who beat my mother. He died when I was in the fifth grade, and I was terrified. He had been the sole provider for our household. I remember sitting on the porch wondering where I'd be in five years.

Would I be in a shelter?

In foster care?

Would I be separated from my brothers and sisters?
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zknotkin92k72pbo9t1i4dhggulrhtqg5akgcgrg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjim6p32chh2bs)
---

A few days after my father died, my mom's friend came by. She explained that now that her husband was gone, my mother could kick her feet up and relax because the government would take care of everything.

But that wasn't my mom.

As soon as her friend left, she got up and walked over to the local university and got a job as a janitor. She had a fifth-grade education and five kids to provide for. She chose to clean up for other kids to provide for her own. **She didn 't just rise to the challenge, she excelled. **

She gave a sense of calm and purpose to us. From that point on, we always had what we needed... _very little of what we wanted, but always what we needed. _

My mother was and always will be my hero. She showed me what strength and perseverance looked like first hand, and she taught me that with faith and hard work, I could achieve anything.

Those early years of hardship were just the beginning of my struggles.

My wife and I have endured a lot. I lost not one, but two jobs due to NAFTA.

We lost homes, cars, and were even forced into bankruptcy.

I remember lying awake at night wondering how I was going to pay the bills.

_**But I never forgot what my mother taught me, and we never gave up. **_

Together, my wife of over 30 years and I persevered and raised two incredible children. Now we have two amazing grandkids.

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zojnpkopvu6b6drh91dkikpeupu3vkotdmpgt7mg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjim6p32chh2bs)
---

In 2018, my life changed when I gave a speech to the Greensboro city council that went viral.

A year later, I launched my campaign for Lieutenant Governor, and when I was elected in 2020, _**I became the first black Lieutenant Governor of North Carolina. **_

As Lieutenant Governor, I have had the privilege to work on a lot of issues, but my main focus has been on education.

It is a passion of mine, and the reason I ran for Lieutenant Governor. I have been a vocal proponent of parents knowing what their children are being taught. I have supported providing opportunities for all students to have an education that best suits them, whether that's in a private school, charter school, home school, or public school.

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze8i9rni7bq19rl9vushupcb0kpsbgbhgihbmilo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjim6p32chh2bs)
---

Now, I've thrown my hat in the ring to be the next Governor of North Carolina. Not because I want to be Governor.

My campaign for Governor is not about want. _**IT 'S ABOUT SERVICE.**_

Some day, you and I will be gone. And I don't want my family to see a picture of me and wonder why I didn't fight for them. I want my children and grandchildren to know that I did everything I could. That's what I'm fighting for. And that's why I'm running for Governor.

Now, I'm asking for your help.

_**This is going to be the most contested and most expensive governor 's race in the country.**_ As North Carolina goes, the nation goes. So I hope you will consider making a contribution to my campaign today. _**[Whether it's $500 or just $5, every single donation will get us one step closer to making history.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1m5iqna2a6t3d3dun99e7l6msvp6i151htreit8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjim6p32chh2bs "Whether it’s $500 or just $5, every single donation will get us one step closer to making history.")**_
---
| | | **[Donate Now](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z148lmkp3gnqda66glg0fiem4q806f22c9qg11mg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjim6p32chh2bs)**
---
Thanks in advance for your support, donations, and prayers.

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1bn1h0if3hkhol36c6ks99mg9fhum68e6udp9vo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjim6p32chh2bs)
---

Mark Robinson

name: Shift WA
subject: Why the high gas prices?
body:
If you ask Jay Inslee and his fellow Democrats, it's due to every reason other than the most obvious (and accurate) one - the extreme green policies they've pushed for years. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62053298:seUEOXDN_:m:1:2610672541:B781788B59C34314ED2BBE3506B079CE:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends, Washington has the highest gas tax in the nation. Let that sink in - no where else in the country are people paying more to fill up their cars than here. But - if you ask Jay Inslee and his fellow Democrats - it's due to every reason other than the most obvious (and accurate) one -the extreme green policies they've pushed for years. A recent piece in Crosscut explains how conservatives point correctly to the Democrats' cap-and-tax law as the cause. It backs up the truthful claim with insights from the Washington Policy Center's Todd Myers. The piece even points out that Yoram Bauman, a liberal economist from Salt Lake City, admits that cap-and-trade costs are "passed on to customers at the pump." At one point the article states, "Washington's most recent carbon cap-and-trade compliance costs raise gasoline prices by about 10 percent in the state," said the statement emailed from Chevron spokesman Ross Allen. "The Washington program is designed to force rapid cuts to carbon intensity in a way that requires consumers to pay higher gasoline prices." But everything takes a turn when the article turns to the Inslee administration for insights as to why our gas prices are so exceptionally high. According to the Inslee administration - not himself, of course, as he has people who answer criticism for him - possible reasons for why we are number one in gas prices include:
* Unknown "geopolitical events" driving up the price of crude oil (we presume that alludes to the ongoing war in Ukraine).
* Maintenance work at our state's refineries increasing our state's prices.
* Washington state gas station owners are greedier than those in the rest of the nation, leading them to set higher prices per gallon.

Unfortunately, Crosscut reported these ridiculous claims without even an attempt at serious rebuttals. We cannot say we are surprised. Democrats often mislead the public to divert blame away from them for their failed policies and mainstream media outlets often provide them cover. That's why outlets like Shift WA are so important. We here at Shift WA have been warning that Inslee's cap-and-tax agenda would drive up gas prices for years. For example, back in 2015, we [explained how California's cap-and-tax scheme](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62053299:seUEOXDN_:m:1:2610672541:B781788B59C34314ED2BBE3506B079CE:r) resulted in gas prices hikes - and how that result might just be the intention for our state under Jay Inslee's "leadership". We need your help to continue our work shining a light on the truth and holding Democrats accountable. **[Will you consider contributing of $100, $50, or $25 today?](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62053300:seUEOXDN_:m:1:2610672541:B781788B59C34314ED2BBE3506B079CE:r)** ** ** **[Your contribution ensures we can continue our work.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62053300:seUEOXDN_:m:1:2610672541:B781788B59C34314ED2BBE3506B079CE:r) **You cannot trust mainstream media outlets to give you the news you need to know - but you can count on us. Thank you, The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62053301:seUEOXDN_:m:1:2610672541:B781788B59C34314ED2BBE3506B079CE:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14252974&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oseUEOXDN_).
---

name: Team Brown
subject: Equal opportunity in higher education
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
The decision to prohibit affirmative action programs will only further exacerbate racial disparities in education.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66813586/417655240/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230721AffAction_N_TEAM_30DO_3_G_TESTA_logo&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTU5NmRhMC1jNDI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XwTrG3M-ptHfqrHlWmwrVy_aHpqZukqf__Xap7APJqQ=) Peter,

The Supreme Court ruling on affirmative action is a disaster for the Black and Brown kids I represent, denying many a fair chance. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66813587/417655241/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230721AffAction_N_TEAM_30DO_3_G_TESTA_logo&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTU5NmRhMC1jNDI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XwTrG3M-ptHfqrHlWmwrVy_aHpqZukqf__Xap7APJqQ=) **Justice and equal opportunity mean acknowledging how racism has shaped the America we know today.** Affirmative action has long been an important tool to address our history and ensure every student has the opportunity for success, no matter their background.

The Supreme Court's decision to prohibit affirmative action programs **_will only further exacerbate racial disparities in education._** It's up to Congress to bolster our education system to keep these disparities from widening.

[**_But, Peter, we need your help flipping the House to ensure Democrats have the support necessary to fight for equal education opportunities. body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsPbW0XD9N

Will you please watch my new ad before China does?

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osPbW0XD9N

Friend,

China is NOT going to like my new campaign ad.

I just released this 30-second video outlining how I'll stand
up to China as your Commander-in-Chief.

Will you please watch my ad before China hears the news?

I'm sharing this with you FIRST! Thanks for standing with me.

God Bless America,

Tim Scott

Candidate for President

WATCH MY NEW AD

STAND WITH ME

If you're
able-bodied, you work.
If you
take out a loan, you pay it back.
And if
you commit a violent crime, you go to jail.

America
needs more victors and less victims.

These
aren't just conservative values, they're American values. And as
President, I will defend them.

If you
agree, will you join my team?

STAND WITH ME

Democrats
have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness, and victimhood
over victory. We CANNOT let them destroy our values and destroy
our country.

I believe
that with faith and American values, our country's future can be
brighter than ever before. But this fight isn't going to be easy.

I need
your help! Will you join me in the fight for America's future?

Thank You
& God Bless
- Tim
Scott

STAND WITH ME

name: CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret)
subject: I’m not done fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
We cannot let our country slip away.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zq71e4gcpvd2vlq64gm9otufau59krkgrsv5uokg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjim1o76cjh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u5rm6dr4c4ojat5ketgj4p9jcoq30p9gmcorcs5gmlpbdd9gedoeapjkeqrb2c37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphmciqj9o3i61j7coljcjjr1db5e8iv0)
| | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zldeolriqf0igd9qsqdub4t8u37os5vo2tsrnob0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjim1o76cjh2bs)
---
**Knock, Knock, Knock. **
---
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

My name is Hung Cao, and I am here to share my family's story with you. It is a story of fear, turned into hope and gratitude for the country that saved my life - America.

My parents heard dreadful knocking at their doors. It was the sound that took away their fathers, never to be seen again. It was the sound of living in constant fear, of losing one's freedom. They vowed their children would never witness that.

We escaped Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists. America opened its arms to us, granting us a new life filled with opportunities.

I seized those opportunities, attending the renowned Thomas Jefferson High School for Science and Technology and graduating from the United States Naval Academy. I dedicated myself to service, spending 25 years in Navy Special Operations, fighting for our country in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia.
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z4kimkqomnanhfbbkl1qjfihiq3e6dlp9lj4um3o_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjim1o76cjh2bs)
---
But today, our country stands at a crossroads. We have taken a dark turn, where a knock at the door represents something entirely different...

It's the sound of Joe Biden's Justice Department sending armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist, tearing families apart before their very eyes. It's the sound of the IRS raiding gun shops, seizing the records of law-abiding gun owners - violating our privacy and trust. And shockingly, it's the sound of a former President being arrested, eroding the principles our nation was built upon.

Crime is running rampant, violating the safety of our homes and businesses, and destroying our communities. Criminals roam free while law-abiding citizens suffer. Our borders are flooded with illegal immigrants, and the dangerous influx of drugs like fentanyl threatens the lives of our loved ones.

In a democratic republic, the rules should apply to all, regardless of power or position. But the Biden family seems to operate above the law, reminding us of a dictatorship where rulers are exempt from accountability.

We cannot let our country slip away. The time for silence and forced compliance is over. We must stand up for what is right, for the truth that we are made to deny.

I have traveled the world and witnessed the consequences of failed nations. I promise you, if America falls, there is nowhere else to go. That's why I am stepping forward to fight for our shared values.
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2znt420ktcvkkvdhlltlinl2vupsfel6lv045qs5o_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjim1o76cjh2bs)
---
I believe in the American Dream, where equal opportunities are earned, not handed out. It's our duty to reclaim our dreams, protect our lives, and to safeguard the well-being of our families.

We need true fighters, not politicians and certainly not keyboard warriors. We need fearless individuals who understand the value of our freedoms and will fight tooth and nail to preserve them.

Together, we can make a difference. We can refuse to be intimidated, standing tall in the face of adversity. We can ensure that America remains the land of opportunity, where our children can thrive and our dreams can flourish.
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ziks2or80mo875vm59b2r6p6hj758nksongl2830_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjim1o76cjh2bs)
---
**I am Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I am running for the United States Senate. I am committed to being your voice, your champion, and your unwavering fighter.**

Join me in this fight for our country's future. Together, we can reclaim what we hold dear and ensure that America remains a beacon of hope and liberty for generations to come. **[https://secure.winred.com/hung-cao-for-virginia/im-running-for-senate](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zca6rgi3elmoqupoq5sekqv8sk67bm1kdnrnp7mo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjim1o76cjh2bs)**
---
I'm Hung Cao and I'm not done fighting for us.

Thank you for your support,
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3og8kjqih0q7bailpou98ihrr28bgb4fjoe0bf0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjim1o76cjh2bs)
---
CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) Former Navy Special Operations Candidate, U.S. Senate (VA)
---
|
---
[**TEXT HUNG TO 21412**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3tv3sieb4pj7stv2gkegrdpdnm6rqdr5dfmaqq0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjim1o76cjh2bs)
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zjn0v6v4r1ds3aptu56d9aatjs0aog0p20um9mr0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjim1o76cjh2bs)
---
[**JOIN TEAM CAO!**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zascr55qfovqbm1gh0rkc1687uilh0fvtcdsdoio_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjim1o76cjh2bs)
---
| | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zth47bvuqsnf44q43bhfjikarjruqfqiv21b2blg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjim1o76cjh2bs) | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z76gucnvjgvj9iqr81pmg8pc7pbqm4bn93063coo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjim1o76cjh2bs) | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z1lnpslitoc0pd2ak3gfkv9epogoose50q7ohaag_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjim1o76cjh2bs)
---|---|---

clean_body: We cannot let our country slip away. | | | Knock, Knock, Knock. This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country. My name is Hung Cao, and I am here to share my family's story with you. It is a story of fear, turned into hope and gratitude for the country that saved my life - America. My parents heard dreadful knocking at their doors. It was the sound that took away their fathers, never to be seen again. It was the sound of living in constant fear, of losing one's freedom. They vowed their children would never witness that. We escaped Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists. America opened its arms to us, granting us a new life filled with opportunities. I seized those opportunities, attending the renowned Thomas Jefferson High School for Science and Technology and graduating from the United States Naval Academy. I dedicated myself to service, spending 25 years in Navy Special Operations, fighting for our country in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia. But today, our country stands at a crossroads. We have taken a dark turn, where a knock at the door represents something entirely different... It's the sound of Joe Biden's Justice Department sending armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist, tearing families apart before their very eyes. It's the sound of the IRS raiding gun shops, seizing the records of law-abiding gun owners - violating our privacy and trust. And shockingly, it's the sound of a former President being arrested, eroding the principles our nation was built upon. Crime is running rampant, violating the safety of our homes and businesses, and destroying our communities. Criminals roam free while law-abiding citizens suffer. Our borders are flooded with illegal immigrants, and the dangerous influx of drugs like fentanyl threatens the lives of our loved ones. In a democratic republic, the rules should apply to all, regardless of power or position. But the Biden family seems to operate above the law, reminding us of a dictatorship where rulers are exempt from accountability. We cannot let our country slip away. The time for silence and forced compliance is over. We must stand up for what is right, for the truth that we are made to deny. I have traveled the world and witnessed the consequences of failed nations. I promise you, if America falls, there is nowhere else to go. That's why I am stepping forward to fight for our shared values. I believe in the American Dream, where equal opportunities are earned, not handed out. It's our duty to reclaim our dreams, protect our lives, and to safeguard the well-being of our families. We need true fighters, not politicians and certainly not keyboard warriors. We need fearless individuals who understand the value of our freedoms and will fight tooth and nail to preserve them. Together, we can make a difference. We can refuse to be intimidated, standing tall in the face of adversity. We can ensure that America remains the land of opportunity, where our children can thrive and our dreams can flourish. I am Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I am running for the United States Senate. I am committed to being your voice, your champion, and your unwavering fighter. Join me in this fight for our country's future. Together, we can reclaim what we hold dear and ensure that America remains a beacon of hope and liberty for generations to come. I'm Hung Cao and I'm not done fighting for us. Thank you for your support, CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) Former Navy Special Operations Candidate, U.S. Senate (VA) | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. name: Indiana Republican Party
subject: Fiscally Responsible Government That Delivers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter
| | |
---
|
---
# _Fiscally Responsible Government That Delivers_
---
President Joe Biden has again been stating the repeatedly debunked lie that he has cut the deficit by $1.7 trillion over the last two years. "Nobody's ever done that," he'll add. Now, that part is correct. The truth is that he hasn't reduced the deficit at all. In fact, in just a little over two years of his administration, over $6 trillion has been added to the 10-year debt projections — now that is something that nobody has ever done! And what a contrast to the state of Indiana that is. Since just 2017, Indiana — under Republican leadership — has paid down over 31 percent of our state debt and shaved off 30 years of additional pension payments. At the same time, we've cut income taxes (and accelerated cuts that will save taxpayers $360 million over the next two years and over $1.4 billion over the next seven years), eliminated other taxes like the utility service tax, and returned over $1.5 billion to Hoosiers. And last week, the state announced a healthy $2.9 billion in reserves (most of which is contained in emergency accounts) that will help us weather any economic storms that may come. And just this past session, we made historic investments in public safety, education, physical and mental health, quality of life, and more. Here in Indiana, fiscally responsible government is delivering. Sincerely,
---
---
Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
**Forwarded this newsletter from a friend? [Sign up for The Party Line here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/033198e25d396151c3d6b838967d376c/40313)**
---
|
---
| |
# **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| |
# _A New Beginning for a Century-old Building_
---
| |
---
_**Governor Eric Holcomb** helps cut the ribbon at the opening of the new Indiana Farm Bureau Fall Creek Pavilion at the state fairgrounds._**
---
**Governor Eric Holcomb** joined other state and agricultural leaders yesterday to finally cut the ribbon on the Indiana State Fairgrounds’ new Indiana Farm Bureau Fall Creek Pavillion.
* The indoor complex is the result of a multi-year renovation of the century-old swine barn.

**What he’s saying:** “This is what Indiana is all about, where so many people from walks and terrains come together and say, ‘How are we going to do the best job possible,'” said **Gov. Holcomb**. “How will we have a multiuse, world-class place that serves 92 different counties year-round?”

* “Our students are going to be able to learn and grow and develop here, and a lot of memories will be made along the way," he added.

In addition to holding livestock events, the new Pavilion will also house sporting competitions. The building will be open to the public beginning next week, at the start of the Indiana State Fair.
---
|
---
**More: Gov. Holcomb** [celebrated](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/7d4a8dca3f020174c3d6b838967d376c/40313) Nucor Chemicals Corp. expanding into Indiana.
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/2b29edfa783d238ac3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
| |
# _New York Post: Column: Joe Biden Hit Hard in Whistleblower Hearing — by Democrat Dan Goldman_
---
From the [_New York Post_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/3c1765ea238aeb59c3d6b838967d376c/40313) _:_ "One of the most basic lessons that we teach law students is that you should 'never ask a question you don’t know the answer to.' The peril of the poorly crafted question was on display in Wednesday’s hearing with two whistleblowers on political interference in the **Hunter Biden** investigation.

"Most Democrats avoided any questions on the substance of the allegations, focusing instead on everything from systemic racism to the use of the term 'two-tiered system of justice' and, of course, **Donald Trump**.

"**Rep. Dan Goldman** (D-NY) often goes where wiser members fear to tread. On this occasion, Goldman may have delivered one of the most damaging moments for the Democrats." _[Column continues](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/51349bf255575f6fc3d6b838967d376c/40313).[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/b96094506111a604c3d6b838967d376c/40313)_
---
|
---
# _Half of Indiana Democrat Congressional Delegation Votes Against Support for Israel_
---
**Half** of the Indiana Democrat Party's congressional delegation — that is, one of _just_ two — joined members of the far-left "Squad" earlier this week to vote against a one-sentence resolution in support of Israel.
* The resolution that stated Israel "is not a racist or apartheid state," "rejects all forms of antisemitism and xenophobia," and declares that the U.S. "will always be a staunch partner and supporter of Israel."

**Part of the 2%: Indiana Democrat Rep. André Carson** was one of just nine members of Congress — _all of whom were Democrats_ — to vote against the resolution.
* In 2018,**Rep. Carson**[wouldn't rule out](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/9d170156998f9fafc3d6b838967d376c/40313) future meetings with well-known antisemite Louis Farrakhan.
* **Rep. Carson's** actions and rhetoric have drawn strong [rebukes](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/cdb4673ab1a4885ac3d6b838967d376c/40313) from the Indianapolis Jewish Community Relations Council, including on this very vote, [stating](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/2bb4568ef65138d6c3d6b838967d376c/40313) they were "dismayed" by his "continued hostility toward the [s]tate of Israel."

**What we're saying:** "We are calling on the Indiana Democrat Party to denounce **Rep. André Carson’s** anti-Israel vote, and for **Rep. Carson** to explain exactly which part of the resolution he disagreed with,' stated **Luke Thomas** , press secretary for the Indiana Republican Party. "Does he believe that Israel _is_ a racist and apartheid state? Does he _not_ reject all forms of antisemitism and xenophobia? Does he _not_ want the U.S. to be a staunch partner and supporter of the homeland of the Jewish people?" Read more from _[Fox News.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/a238b8222fa5af0fc3d6b838967d376c/40313)_
---
|
---
# _Vice President Kamala Harris Makes Political Stop in Indianapolis for Luncheon, Word Salad on Menu_
---
---
**Vice President Kamala Harris** made a political stop in Indianapolis yesterday to galvanize voters ahead of the 2024 election and "continue her leadership," according to the White House.
* **Vice President Harris** is the most unpopular vice president well ... [ever](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/014d5129a1221ffbc3d6b838967d376c/40313), with a net negative rating of -17.

In response to whatever the White House meant, **Chairman Kyle Hupfer** released the below statement on the vice president's record of “leadership”: “**Vice President Kamala Harris** doesn’t just deliver word salads but failed leadership, too. “Since being named ‘border czar’ by **President Biden** over two years ago, the U.S. has seen a historic humanitarian crisis at the southern border, with a record number of encounters and more than 1.4 million illegal immigrants escaping into the country. At the same time, record amounts of fentanyl and other illicit drugs are pouring into the country, wreaking havoc on communities, including here in Indiana. “In leadership, **Vice President Harris** has failed. And her visit [yesterday was] just another reminder of that.”
---
|
---
# _Legislators Assigned to Summer Study Committees_
---
State legislators have been assigned to interim summer study committees ahead of the 2024 legislative session.
* Study committees are comprised of members of the Senate and House of Representatives and will meet over the coming months to discuss topics recently approved by the Legislative Council.

**What they're saying:** **Speaker of the House Todd Huston** and **Senate President Pro Tem Rod Bray **announced the appointments last week.
* "Whether it's continuing to bring down the costs of health care or boosting our workforce, our goal is to identify challenges and opportunities so we can hit the ground running in January," said **Speaker Huston**.
* "I'm incredibly excited at the prospect of streamlining Indiana's tax structure. At the same time, we are going to continue looking for ways to lower the cost of health care for Hoosiers, review our high Medicaid expenditures and ensure we have a road-funding system that is built for the future," noted **Pro Tem Bray**.

To see what topics will be studied, click [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/62446e308dfbd38dc3d6b838967d376c/40313). To see what committees members of the House and Senate will serve on, click [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/0d5d42d746f561d7c3d6b838967d376c/40313) and [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/1d840563b0ceac77c3d6b838967d376c/40313).
---
|
---
# _Confused, Again, President Biden Says Costs Are "Lower" _
---
From _[FactCheckBiden.com](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/bf2bdb02da86423ac3d6b838967d376c/40313)_ : Despite **President Biden's** recent claim to the contrary, costs are not “lower” under his administration. In fact, “Bidenomics” has led to a [16.6 percent](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/921932e346a6f773c3d6b838967d376c/40313) increase in everyday costs for hard working Americans. **The facts:** On a year-over-year basis, inflation under **President Biden** has [averaged 6.2 percent](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/515f6feedefe6a91c3d6b838967d376c/40313) – more than double the level of inflation seen under any of the last four presidents.
* June’s Consumer Price Index is [more than twice](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/9c247113c1cbe976c3d6b838967d376c/40313) the rate it was when he took office.

**What is true?** If **President Biden** wanted [higher costs and lower wages](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/15da7f4919fd51f3c3d6b838967d376c/40313), his "Bidenomics" is working.
---
|
---
# _Upcoming Events Across the State_

---
July 22: [Adams County Ronald Reagan Ice Cream Social](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/ecd153127da23489c3d6b838967d376c/40313) August 10: [2023 State Dinner](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/4e0b2384327298e6c3d6b838967d376c/40313) August 18: [Hancock County Elephant Open](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/0a2a0d1f6539a14ec3d6b838967d376c/40313) August 18: [IFRW Tribute to Women](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/cea82e5248867792c3d6b838967d376c/40313) _Events past these dates are available on our website and will be added to the newsletter as we get closer to them._

Todd Young** [introduces](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/73a935f34af1f31bc3d6b838967d376c/40313) legislation to help small businesses integrate digital tools **U.S. Sen. Mike Braun** [surveys](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/8eb60f90d3557248c3d6b838967d376c/40313) Indiana Donor Network transplantation center **Congressman Rudy Yakym** [praises](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/86fc364ba5165453c3d6b838967d376c/40313) $300 million Ford Meter Box expansion **Congressman Jim Banks** [proposes](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/56349cbf9411df0bc3d6b838967d376c/40313) bill to block funding from universities with ties to China and Russia **Congressman Jim Baird** [offers](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/5e8685e30cda8104c3d6b838967d376c/40313) support for Israel and condemns antisemitic comments **Congresswoman Victoria Spartz** [meets](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/61b3ccdb8606801cc3d6b838967d376c/40313) with US Helsinki Commission on money laundering and sanction evasion in Switzerland **Congressman Greg Pence** [passes](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/15ef167cab2a89f9c3d6b838967d376c/40313) bill to secure leading US position in direct foreign investments **Congressman Larry Bucshon** [defends](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/05a86d9f68a60da6c3d6b838967d376c/40313) National Defense Authorization Act passage
**Congresswoman Erin Houchin** [speaks](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/dd282297cb91e1c7/dfc8a86335d31cb8c3d6b838967d376c/40313) on House floor on use of schools as illegal immigrant housing

Does he not want the U.S. to be a staunch partner and supporter of the homeland of the Jewish people?" Read more from | Vice President Kamala Harris Makes Political Stop in Indianapolis for Luncheon, Word Salad on Menu Vice President Kamala Harris made a political stop in Indianapolis yesterday to galvanize voters ahead of the 2024 election and "continue her leadership," according to the White House. Vice President Harris is the most unpopular vice president well ... , with a net negative rating of -17. In response to whatever the White House meant, Chairman Kyle Hupfer released the below statement on the vice president's record of “leadership”: “Vice President Kamala Harris doesn’t just deliver word salads but failed leadership, too. “Since being named ‘border czar’ by President Biden over two years ago, the U.S. has seen a historic humanitarian crisis at the southern border, with a record number of encounters and more than 1.4 million illegal immigrants escaping into the country. At the same time, record amounts of fentanyl and other illicit drugs are pouring into the country, wreaking havoc on communities, including here in Indiana. “In leadership, Vice President Harris has failed. And her visit [yesterday was] just another reminder of that.” | Legislators Assigned to Summer Study Committees State legislators have been assigned to interim summer study committees ahead of the 2024 legislative session. Study committees are comprised of members of the Senate and House of Representatives and will meet over the coming months to discuss topics recently approved by the Legislative Council. What they're saying: Speaker of the House Todd Huston and Senate President Pro Tem Rod Bray announced the appointments last week. "Whether it's continuing to bring down the costs of health care or boosting our workforce, our goal is to identify challenges and opportunities so we can hit the ground running in January," said Speaker Huston. "I'm incredibly excited at the prospect of streamlining Indiana's tax structure. At the same time, we are going to continue looking for ways to lower the cost of health care for Hoosiers, review our high Medicaid expenditures and ensure we have a road-funding system that is built for the future," noted Pro Tem Bray. To see what topics will be studied, click . To see what committees members of the House and Senate will serve on, click and . | Confused, Again, President Biden Says Costs Are "Lower" From : Despite President Biden's recent claim to the contrary, costs are not “lower” under his administration. In fact, “Bidenomics” has led to a increase in everyday costs for hard working Americans. The facts: On a year-over-year basis, inflation under President Biden has – more than double the level of inflation seen under any of the last four presidents. June’s Consumer Price Index is the rate it was when he took office. What is true? If President Biden wanted , his "Bidenomics" is working. | Upcoming Events Across the State July 22: August 10: August 18: August 18: Events past these dates are available on our website and will be added to the newsletter as we get closer to them. mailto:lthomas@indiana.gop?subject=Information%20for%20Upcoming%20GOP%20Event | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb raise in starting pay for Indiana State Police Lt. name: Shamaine Daniels
subject: The most dangerous member of Congress
body:
www.danielsforcongress.org [www.danielsforcongress.org]
Dear Friend,
As part of our July fundraising challenge (details at the bottom of this message), we're trying to make sure our supporters are better informed about the threat my opponent, Scott Perry, poses to our country. We believe that when you understand what Perry has been up to in 2023, you'll see why it is so important that you support our campaign and help me defeat Perry.
If you already understand the stakes, CLICK HERE to make a contribution to our campaign and help us reach our goal before July 31st. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
For two years, we’ve been telling everyone that Scott Perry is one of the most dangerous members of Congress. You don’t need to take our word for it. Ever since he tried to help Donald Trump steal the election in 2020, and became the chair of the House Freedom Caucus, Perry has demonstrated over and over again just how dangerous he is.
In fact, beginning with the debacle over the speakership, Perry and his extremist flunkies have set out to sabotage and undermine our institutions, our economy, our national security, and the social fabric of our country. Let’s take a look at Perry’s greatest hits just since the beginning of 2023:
*
Undermined
the
power
of
the
Speaker
to
conduct
the
business
of
the
House
of
Representatives
and
the
American
people
*
Threatened
U.S.
economic
security
and
held
the
country
hostage
during
the
debt
limit
debate
*
Compromised
U.S.
national
security
and
military
readiness
by
dragging
the
Defense
Authorization
Act
into
a
made-up
culture
war
controversy
Perry has no business serving in Congress. We can defeat him in 2024, but we can’t do it without your help.
Can you make a contribution today to help us defeat the most dangerous member of Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
We are currently in the middle of a fundraising challenge, and donations made before July 31st will be matched by the generous donors who have stepped up to issue this challenge. Your contribution today will have double the impact so ACT NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Not ready to make a contribution? stay tuned to your inbox for details on each of the ways Perry has been a threat to our country over the past seven months.
With Gratitude,
Shamaine
P.S. If you missed my announcement video, you can check it out below.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lQXcyDlej8Y [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lQXcyDlej8Y]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/99379/images/PaidForByDanielsForCongressB.jpg]

Harrisburg, PA 17106

name: CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret)
subject: I’m not done fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zstn9hr57l7jh3vospbn54n3aeq78h4grkdp1sng_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm0or6c9h2bs)
---
**Knock, Knock, Knock. **
---
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

My name is Hung Cao, and I am here to share my family's story with you. It is a story of fear, turned into hope and gratitude for the country that saved my life - America.

My parents heard dreadful knocking at their doors. It was the sound that took away their fathers, never to be seen again. It was the sound of living in constant fear, of losing one's freedom. They vowed their children would never witness that.

We escaped Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists. America opened its arms to us, granting us a new life filled with opportunities.

I seized those opportunities, attending the renowned Thomas Jefferson High School for Science and Technology and graduating from the United States Naval Academy. I dedicated myself to service, spending 25 years in Navy Special Operations, fighting for our country in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia.
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4po9u5d8cuv2q13qksqpjk2ul8gi8lj6cg1ssp8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm0or6c9h2bs)
---
But today, our country stands at a crossroads. We have taken a dark turn, where a knock at the door represents something entirely different...

It's the sound of Joe Biden's Justice Department sending armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist, tearing families apart before their very eyes. It's the sound of the IRS raiding gun shops, seizing the records of law-abiding gun owners - violating our privacy and trust. And shockingly, it's the sound of a former President being arrested, eroding the principles our nation was built upon.

Crime is running rampant, violating the safety of our homes and businesses, and destroying our communities. Criminals roam free while law-abiding citizens suffer. Our borders are flooded with illegal immigrants, and the dangerous influx of drugs like fentanyl threatens the lives of our loved ones.

In a democratic republic, the rules should apply to all, regardless of power or position. But the Biden family seems to operate above the law, reminding us of a dictatorship where rulers are exempt from accountability.

We cannot let our country slip away. The time for silence and forced compliance is over. We must stand up for what is right, for the truth that we are made to deny.

I have traveled the world and witnessed the consequences of failed nations. I promise you, if America falls, there is nowhere else to go. That's why I am stepping forward to fight for our shared values.
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0q0n3mce6p59195tnvk3buq3k4pk2cflelnvhg0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm0or6c9h2bs)
---
I believe in the American Dream, where equal opportunities are earned, not handed out. It's our duty to reclaim our dreams, protect our lives, and to safeguard the well-being of our families.

We need true fighters, not politicians and certainly not keyboard warriors. We need fearless individuals who understand the value of our freedoms and will fight tooth and nail to preserve them.

Together, we can make a difference. We can refuse to be intimidated, standing tall in the face of adversity. We can ensure that America remains the land of opportunity, where our children can thrive and our dreams can flourish.
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu96loepttfp9fb2v6g440vl4rtbo5k19t2liac8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm0or6c9h2bs)
---
**I am Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I am running for the United States Senate. I am committed to being your voice, your champion, and your unwavering fighter.**

Join me in this fight for our country's future. Together, we can reclaim what we hold dear and ensure that America remains a beacon of hope and liberty for generations to come. **[https://secure.winred.com/hung-cao-for-virginia/im-running-for-senate](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zeuo3lhg7msehrbqqh0tcq24ni4sjht5fqt0qu90_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm0or6c9h2bs)**
---
I'm Hung Cao and I'm not done fighting for us.

Thank you for your support,
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zil0fr8oj2ms9i77chcbims0gmkoh7c75tm0i01g_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm0or6c9h2bs)
---
CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) Former Navy Special Operations Candidate, U.S. Senate (VA)
---
|
---
****
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn6nj40hnr3rtkshlvml30tap4dei604rpgb8rh8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm0or6c9h2bs)
---
[**JOIN TEAM CAO!**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfat0pf5rtn9rv5lgqu0h40ik3u8olm09g6j0nmo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm0or6c9h2bs)
---

body:
My name is Byron Donalds, and I was just selected by Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel to help lead the GOP effort

| |

---
| | | Friend,

My name is Byron Donalds, and I was just selected by Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel to help lead the GOP effort to BALLOT HARVEST and sweep the next election.

_**[Here’s our plan:](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29533%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2zyJaxMW5Km497zrCW1tXA&sysid=1 "Here’s our plan:")**_
✔️ **Launch our first-ever NATIONWIDE ballot harvesting operation to bank GOP votes**
✔️ Activate our voters through neighbor-to-neighbor connections
✔️ Expand GOP access to early-voting locations across the country
✔️ Invest in an 80,000-person team to protect your vote
✔️ Expand traditional media efforts into new platforms to reach young voters
✔️ Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws while making sure it’s easy to vote but hard to cheat
I am proud to lead this effort and help turn out votes for Republicans. These efforts will not only allow us to directly confront bad actors and stop cheating but allow us to appeal to younger and important swing voters.

But there's a catch: these kinds of voter contact initiatives take money... Lots of it. It won’t be cheap, **but it will be worth it when Republicans defend our House Majority, flip the Senate, and kick Joe Biden out of the White House once and for all!**

_**[With that in mind, I now humbly ask you to pitch in ten or twenty bucks to help jumpstart our voter contact efforts AND make history.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29534%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9OlE8NSaXH5IpcGPOKk4NA&sysid=1 "With that in mind, I now
humbly ask you to pitch in ten or twenty bucks to help jumpstart our voter contact
efforts AND make history.")**_
---

This is our single best moment to rack up wins up and down the ballot, but we will ONLY be possible with the help of grassroots donors.

No matter where you live in the country, this is your chance to impact whether Republicans WIN or LOSE in 2024 directly.

_So what do you say? Do you want to help Republicans BALLOT HARVEST and sweep the next election? _

|
**BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND**

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=14eb892ee33b44a59ed65bd3a55d6028&_e=w8kUBLHrVA4c9Nq_IviiG_bY9r2oLu6P-gozg4ns3DC_XgNRHMDYYrsngQ9An0mVe9FkF4_90kor5HSuq5TAoodp8JU1H3jiDd14hhblMf7Yske2DtyjJ7ypfwVMTagO9__DzqifcRw2ehsXU-vnC7BEhPUcdVaHU4_An18BEGgpIrC5dxILyCL-mmNjcXPizoTUaiOat4p85puJLqQC7L8w9kIKlckZ6_5n9SYiPI8AO1aaEPUvNaveQsYw1ta7tStJjbRNPMzyRem3XYIw8g5dxjynom6hedjkGQGtXPw7LH8qPc5pl_-AnpZGUGCKZvFwiWGIJiaz_FK3SJu6xtdCV5FMKV_FEUpnUUSxM5myqLkthLRLayI9i4EoVFOuOwCGrVlXl5JZMEaE_8lYmw%3D%3D)

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=14eb892ee33b44a59ed65bd3a55d6028&_e=w8kUBLHrVA4c9Nq_IviiG_bY9r2oLu6P-gozg4ns3DC_XgNRHMDYYrsngQ9An0mVe9FkF4_90kor5HSuq5TAoodp8JU1H3jiDd14hhblMf7Yske2DtyjJ7ypfwVMTagO9__DzqifcRw2ehsXU-vnC7BEhPUcdVaHU4_An18BEGgpIrC5dxILyCL-mmNjcXPizoTUaiOat4p85puJLqQC7L8w9kIKlckZ6_5n9SYiPI8AO1aaEPUvNaveQsYw1ta73o3VlnCr_q53CXWAhQDI3Tc8ln5z4Yj2wsyFW0t-zpYfug_arT-LBzlQfq4QgftH9egpZWx6MWRSCgE-5gr2ULD7gjeUiIs9JPnkm15kGB1jjRJ18dS4PPWVcKUfCMjnNaKucam46OKzNuLBTEscuQ%3D%3D)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=14eb892ee33b44a59ed65bd3a55d6028&_e=w8kUBLHrVA4c9Nq_IviiG_bY9r2oLu6P-gozg4ns3DC_XgNRHMDYYrsngQ9An0mVe9FkF4_90kor5HSuq5TAoodp8JU1H3jiDd14hhblMf7Yske2DtyjJ7ypfwVMTagO9__DzqifcRw2ehsXU-vnC7BEhPUcdVaHU4_An18BEGgpIrC5dxILyCL-mmNjcXPizoTUaiOat4p85puJLqQC7L8w9kIKlckZ6_5n9SYiPI8AO1aaEPUvNaveQsYw1ta7Upk3FjiO56RdA-dqkvBhrhNuqC09VQ0mCWxxX8Jqlmv-Hr0F0Tx2fo6pcEZGVMxtjJu5-jwgYFCoFEmZdIDrMKacF5JTkD2U1p2BCjHTJxSjve4jkUHHYdqAyzp1nZZty9TXn3eyXu53XiSRpYKrow%3D%3D)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=14eb892ee33b44a59ed65bd3a55d6028&_e=w8kUBLHrVA4c9Nq_IviiG_bY9r2oLu6P-gozg4ns3DC_XgNRHMDYYrsngQ9An0mVe9FkF4_90kor5HSuq5TAoodp8JU1H3jiDd14hhblMf7Yske2DtyjJ7ypfwVMTagO9__DzqifcRw2ehsXU-vnC7BEhPUcdVaHU4_An18BEGgpIrC5dxILyCL-mmNjcXPizoTUaiOat4p85puJLqQC7L8w9kIKlckZ6_5n9SYiPI8AO1aaEPUvNaveQsYw1ta7izEztEF1spcQjR96fWBB96XrR-RW7VFSHw6GqYLRtFczLyktbXuszj_m6XqEAF1Zm33IH-6LhrkjH3wxqtbn04venTW1Lu-EpO7GuyGkGtSIw36bnMDicLsyBJgzfktZWA0g_XXLELFwJ2MU6mFWsw%3D%3D)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling. | | BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND Vivek Ramaswamy - 12% Ron DeSantis - 12% Fellow American - people are waking up. People are hungry for a cause. People want to hear COLD HARD TRUTHS. People are ready for a REVOLUTION. I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina. But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington. I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU. With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement. I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today. But this gives me hope for our future. We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. That's what makes America itself. Peter –
This week, the Congressional Cartel Task Force - where I serve as Chairman - began its work to take on the Mexican drug cartels that are poisoning Americans and driving the illegal immigration crisis at our southern border. I also passed legislation out of my committee to prevent taxpayer dollars from going toward children's hospitals that perform transgender "care" on minors and called out Elizabeth Warren for blatantly misleading the public about the basics of economics.
If you enjoy receiving my newsletters, please consider donating to my campaign. These updates, along with my entire operation, take a team of writers, editors, and content creators. I am only able to continue providing these free, regular updates with the resources provided from patriots like you. [Any amount is greatly appreciated, and you can help me grow our conservative movement by donating to my campaign here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k8VIDE5meZT_2hH2a_nahLocbg1SKcnOIWmGXs8bGkaH3_LHmU4qdY2rKnbx3ttfBchYOTI9AyfIE4mrRMKr6vPdGGjou6fLxvESL9EsFTCapf_lDQ4fwvJJOtdqrspN5nxuY0HxGzYeJuFgpQMk3or5vsA56dyVJ34ztuPUyrAARP9ah9hDnaC1kDEgJ5MyAwsHJ7e2rAp3mu4SoMdtNyKMiUArn2p5-EZ9jbdeCDgY7IE4ieatvN60sobcpdbnSSm8pA4O23Eofw-OHBQy1ybvwqeQrGarRMZQk0VZxtBfeIAV-JglCxpzT5RaR6_bEoIOzzf7rzQ0t-ZW4mFggO7k_fSJbjDFGgNNxGr0iSc=&c=mM5o_3DV5SYKTcQD1kIyvKb6EcWN2SOSK2txCwgneDHf7Vbn8WizZw==&ch=-bJ5_hvbvTX3ZSAxlFxme0OIwzv840fkDtnRjui1cAELIIqMgRHWCw==)

| Speaker McCarthy selected me as Chairman of the Congressional Cartel Task Force recently. That is a job I take incredibly seriously - Mexican drug cartels are poisoning Americans with deadly fentanyl and facilitating an unprecedented border crisis. They must be stopped.
As Chairman of the Cartel Task Force I have three main goals: investigate cartel activity and bring in experts who understand how to defeat them, communicate with and educate the American public on the severity of this threat, and propose comprehensive legislation that can be signed into law to destroy the cartels.
I've proposed these legislative solutions myself, such as giving the American military the authority to take action by, with, and through the Mexican government against the cartels. I've also introduced bills to target cartel finances and increase criminal penalties for anyone who aids and abets them.
I will keep you posted on my efforts throughout this process. My Task Force will not complete its work overnight, but we are finally beginning to treat this threat with the seriousness it deserves.

| This week, the Energy and Commerce Committee advanced my legislation to prevent taxpayer dollars from going toward programs at children's hospitals that perform so-called "gender affirming care" on minors. Even the term "gender affirming care" is a misnomer created by the left to hide what is really going on -- permanently changing a child's sex with puberty blockers, hormone therapy, and even surgery.
My bill is very simple -- all it says is that taxpayer dollars that support the Children's Hospital Graduate Medical Education Program cannot be used to fund facilities that engage in unproven, dangerous medical practices on our kids. When 70% of taxpayers oppose using puberty blockers on children - let alone hormone therapy or sex change surgery - they should not have to fund these programs with their tax dollars.
As usual, the left launched emotional attacks against me during debate over this issue in the Energy and Commerce Committee. They called me "cruel" for introducing this legislation, without once acknowledging the cruelty of the ramifications of permanently changing a child's sex.
My legislation will now go to the House floor for a vote, and the left will do everything in their power to defeat this common sense policy and lie about our efforts. That's why I need you to fight back. By signing the below petition, you will make clear that you do not want your tax dollars going toward the mutilation of our children. We need as many names on this petition as possible to stand up for reason and to stand up for our kids.
[SIGN THE PETITION. STOP TAXPAYER FUNDS FROM GOING TOWARD CHILD SEX CHANGES](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k8VIDE5meZT_2hH2a_nahLocbg1SKcnOIWmGXs8bGkaH3_LHmU4qdY2rKnbx3ttfYgL8MT6tynJE6MnzFIIXBQhnQBdRMoIFoXQb2t22Anb12pt4dwPueFbYZRRN5SD4DWX1aIhTDCT7s7kJpPBiLIWFKWoVwSKQg4R_WmUr8iY9vez2Kf1MLmFhZQEH3Wp3UV2MhEld-PP_GXOJu4ox7X6mA_x-OAZm9kurtKQw7XY-yUttOLWBCmlvalfhhrT_MFrSSvMDAL49yGYYV79R32AKNw9ZW6dmQ4AGMdYhTxvKdx_3DhfsmiwOLVHBtYyHyDr-nu8wIT1C1btj2SIMOp0n0oGYw9qgtoQh-nQoM1m40ub5zJ8yVg==&c=mM5o_3DV5SYKTcQD1kIyvKb6EcWN2SOSK2txCwgneDHf7Vbn8WizZw==&ch=-bJ5_hvbvTX3ZSAxlFxme0OIwzv840fkDtnRjui1cAELIIqMgRHWCw==)

| For someone who sits on the Senate Finance Committee and the Senate Banking Committee, Elizabeth Warren has zero understanding of basic economics, as is evidenced in the ridiculous tweet above.
Elizabeth Warren believes higher taxes and bigger government will grow the middle class, which is why she supports Joe Biden's economic agenda. But these proposals from the far-left will only hurt our economy and the personal finances of Americans at every economic level.
What makes this debate frustrating is the fact that the policy solutions for growing the middle class are fairly straightforward. People need three basic things to enter the middle class:
\- Safe neighborhoods to live in \- Businesses investing in their communities, which creates jobs \- Lower taxes and a regulatory environment that is friendly to small businesses and entrepreneurs
If the left really cared about the middle class, they would support these policies. But they don't really care about the middle class, which is why they push the failed economic policies of people like Elizabeth Warren and Joe Biden.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: BREAKING NEW POLL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling.

|
**BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zov5vtela2tefkdm9d8e7hpt2312850i6h5gi73o_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm4ob6c9h2bs)

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbf5qtc70auvs3rtcuv3dkai9kakhtd7uhhupnp0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm4ob6c9h2bs)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr72iah7sqfsrg7oq8umj7sg030pa7ap5k5vqiig_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm4ob6c9h2bs)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zighfun88q4mjopkairemsgqfprikfoa5ebdc0no_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm4ob6c9h2bs)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrb74vumd7qdtl7g28ejvv5s055m3u8acgddp1u8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm4ob6c9h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** BE A PART OF OUR MOVEMENT ->**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg10hct4qlq9nqrre9uf8d0jgooljdb7reir24s8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm4ob6c9h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaic8ggba03n7l3jn7dp2mrj4tvhal97u36ua7c0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm4ob6c9h2bs)

---

| |
---|---

---

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. 1600 Daily

Trust me - I wouldn’t be asking if it wasn’t truly so important. name: CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret)
subject: I’m not done fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z04d8on1tdl4n2rbg41bqkrd3vhqdofetgv0o170_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm4ob6chh2bs)
---
**Knock, Knock, Knock. **
---
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

My name is Hung Cao, and I am here to share my family's story with you. It is a story of fear, turned into hope and gratitude for the country that saved my life - America.

My parents heard dreadful knocking at their doors. It was the sound that took away their fathers, never to be seen again. It was the sound of living in constant fear, of losing one's freedom. They vowed their children would never witness that.

We escaped Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists. America opened its arms to us, granting us a new life filled with opportunities.

I seized those opportunities, attending the renowned Thomas Jefferson High School for Science and Technology and graduating from the United States Naval Academy. I dedicated myself to service, spending 25 years in Navy Special Operations, fighting for our country in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia.
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2vl2pigg41hk0sq45sojkfiquoj70cu31h6j6lg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm4ob6chh2bs)
---
But today, our country stands at a crossroads. We have taken a dark turn, where a knock at the door represents something entirely different...

It's the sound of Joe Biden's Justice Department sending armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist, tearing families apart before their very eyes. It's the sound of the IRS raiding gun shops, seizing the records of law-abiding gun owners - violating our privacy and trust. And shockingly, it's the sound of a former President being arrested, eroding the principles our nation was built upon.

Crime is running rampant, violating the safety of our homes and businesses, and destroying our communities. Criminals roam free while law-abiding citizens suffer. Our borders are flooded with illegal immigrants, and the dangerous influx of drugs like fentanyl threatens the lives of our loved ones.

In a democratic republic, the rules should apply to all, regardless of power or position. But the Biden family seems to operate above the law, reminding us of a dictatorship where rulers are exempt from accountability.

We cannot let our country slip away. The time for silence and forced compliance is over. We must stand up for what is right, for the truth that we are made to deny.

I have traveled the world and witnessed the consequences of failed nations. I promise you, if America falls, there is nowhere else to go. That's why I am stepping forward to fight for our shared values.
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi9eckn6ahf824m780f0nd7ppt5foljgk173ii2g_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm4ob6chh2bs)
---
I believe in the American Dream, where equal opportunities are earned, not handed out. It's our duty to reclaim our dreams, protect our lives, and to safeguard the well-being of our families.

We need true fighters, not politicians and certainly not keyboard warriors. We need fearless individuals who understand the value of our freedoms and will fight tooth and nail to preserve them.

Together, we can make a difference. We can refuse to be intimidated, standing tall in the face of adversity. We can ensure that America remains the land of opportunity, where our children can thrive and our dreams can flourish.
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z24ri133380k3c2hcd6f2a55q77f8r1cq6tlk340_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm4ob6chh2bs)
---
**I am Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I am running for the United States Senate. I am committed to being your voice, your champion, and your unwavering fighter.**

Join me in this fight for our country's future. Together, we can reclaim what we hold dear and ensure that America remains a beacon of hope and liberty for generations to come. **[https://secure.winred.com/hung-cao-for-virginia/im-running-for-senate](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zr9ah4mccb94da2pp0d9amtmablhk7bjv08tk4q8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm4ob6chh2bs)**
---
I'm Hung Cao and I'm not done fighting for us.

Thank you for your support,
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc84sa93q7kiv94j74p4cc7fos7tbbfqo5ma8gk0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm4ob6chh2bs)
---
CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) Former Navy Special Operations Candidate, U.S. Senate (VA)
---
|
---
****
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhm5fokj1ju08eksqaat30ng9mgc0o8p1pc4rqb0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm4ob6chh2bs)
---
[**JOIN TEAM CAO!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zutv8asifafgbc0qngq2drg097mu0jjflr23i020_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm4ob6chh2bs)
---
| | | | |
---|---|---
| | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
---

---

---

name: The GIFFORDS Team
subject: All gas, no brakes
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
That’s how we need to approach the fight to end gun violence
#

Team -
All gas, no brakes.
That’s how we need to approach the fight to end gun violence.
Each and every day in our country, far too many lives are stolen by senseless acts of violence. It doesn’t have to be this way. There are real solutions that can end this epidemic that plagues our nation—solutions that the vast majority of Americans support.
But right now, with our narrowly divided Senate, progress on gun safety will be difficult. Far too many of our elected officials care more about cozying up to the gun lobby than keeping their constituents safe.
It’s up to us to keep the pressure on and let Congress know that we will **_never**_ back down in the fight to keep our communities safe.
[**Can you contribute $3 or more to GIFFORDS PAC today? Your contribution is the best way to send a message about the strength of our movement to end gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july23.pfB_59&refcode=em230721-1-15&t=1&akid=6175%2E3935704%2EB6S35v)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---
Tucker joined our family back in February – a campaign promise Wes made to the family, and one that he now makes sure everyone knows he delivered on 😆
Fun facts about Tucker:
* He's a rescue from the SPCA #adoptdontshop
* He's hypoallergenic – an important requirement for Dawn in our search
* He's a Shoodle – part Shih Tzu, part toy Poodle, all attitude
* He is NOT impressed by the groomer, but he adores guests at Government House
* His favorite place to walk is St. John's campus, but he'll gladly visit any of Annapolis's beautiful parks
* Yes, his name is a play on Baltimore 😉

If you can't get enough Tucker content (we never can), make sure to follow us on Instagram:

clean_body: You may have already seen pictures of his cute gray face on social media or the local news. | = Hi teammates, You may have already seen pictures of his cute gray face on social media or the local news, but we still wanted to officially welcome the newest member of the Moore family: Tucker Balti Moore! | = = Tucker joined our family back in February – a campaign promise Wes made to the family, and one that he now makes sure everyone knows he delivered on 😆 Fun facts about Tucker: He's a rescue from the SPCA #adoptdontshop He's hypoallergenic – an important requirement for Dawn in our search He's a Shoodle – part Shih Tzu, part toy Poodle, all attitude He is NOT impressed by the groomer, but he adores guests at Government House His favorite place to walk is St. John's campus, but he'll gladly visit any of Annapolis's beautiful parks Yes, his name is a play on Baltimore 😉 If you can't get enough Tucker content (we never can), make sure to follow us on Instagram: Elevate, Wes and Dawn = | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, Rhodes Scholar, former small business owner and leader of one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations — and now, your governor! Thanks to supporters like you, we made history by electing Wes the 63rd Governor of Maryland. Support Wes as he works to move our state forward and leave no one behind. There, we discussed the reauthorization of the Farm Bill, a pivotal moment in shaping our nation's agricultural policies. **Friend,******** access to healthy foods is a basic human right and a crucial element in creating a thriving society. ** As I advocate for sustainable farming practices, supporting local farmers, and investing in nutrition programs, I aim to build a future where no one goes hungry and everyone can lead a healthy life. [**However, achieving these goals requires collective action and the voices of advocates like you. Your support is instrumental in ensuring that we create lasting change and make healthy food accessible to all. name: Caleb Max
subject: Reminder: We Must Win
body:
You are invited to an event with former Congressman Frank Wolf
| | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011_1BZWiQ3DupJ0cKhtuL87niux60SUlFkglTw_sncGzKSgIL5F9dXcQO5VzK7g6-_0sR51_OWq3u2zu41l17gqk5eaXC6vdqBOd7LMgVXVC42sZGbe6Wr_6NCDQyjaf6aVzXUJ9uyQXN1pbEPFMh-iOvhFx5cVm9W6i1jqECJfelV51he7mSLQ==&c=t5UqslCfMv4sJCmcOu5VtZxYdnDkooMYeUZxroNqDJoL4HuJjBrw8g==&ch=rFdPGlfkzQHbcPrJo-g_HuWLhGJ9ew3Qi56B2-Sud8gOwgvKXKV2kw==)
---
|
---
| We Must Win!
---
| Dear Peter,
Are you sick of Virginia Senate Democrats raining on Governor Youngkin's agenda?
I know I am.
All the major legislation that we need here in Virginia dies when it hits the Senate. That is because we are two seats down (21-19) and constantly hit the Democrats' "Blue Wall". The only way to fix this is to win the majority and [Senate District 31](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011_1BZWiQ3DupJ0cKhtuL87niux60SUlFkglTw_sncGzKSgIL5F9dXcQO5VzK7g6-KZNb5mA5OgroJkosU3PzCDOuGFg_R_ToUaccoulM5VJUujEsHijJlWi-KeVbY07SKr1eYmLfShcMP7qlx8ucIA==&c=t5UqslCfMv4sJCmcOu5VtZxYdnDkooMYeUZxroNqDJoL4HuJjBrw8g==&ch=rFdPGlfkzQHbcPrJo-g_HuWLhGJ9ew3Qi56B2-Sud8gOwgvKXKV2kw==) (Loudoun and Fauquier) is a must win seat.
That is why I ask you to join me in supporting Juan Pablo Segura (website [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011_1BZWiQ3DupJ0cKhtuL87niux60SUlFkglTw_sncGzKSgIL5F9dXcQO5VzK7g6-KZNb5mA5OgroJkosU3PzCDOuGFg_R_ToUaccoulM5VJUujEsHijJlWi-KeVbY07SKr1eYmLfShcMP7qlx8ucIA==&c=t5UqslCfMv4sJCmcOu5VtZxYdnDkooMYeUZxroNqDJoL4HuJjBrw8g==&ch=rFdPGlfkzQHbcPrJo-g_HuWLhGJ9ew3Qi56B2-Sud8gOwgvKXKV2kw==)). Juan Pablo is a family man, an entrepreneur, and a problem solver. He will work to relieve traffic congestion, take on the ever increasing Tolls, defend our Children in schools, protect Religious liberty, decide what happens to the 3.6 Billion dollar surplus that Democrats want to spend on Green boondoggles and much more. We need him in Richmond and in the State Senate to help pass the Governor's important legislation.
Next Thursday, July 27th, I am hosting an event for Juan Pablo with my Grandfather, former Congressman Frank Wolf, at my farm in Round Hill. Tickets start at $31 for the 31st District.
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011_1BZWiQ3DupJ0cKhtuL87niux60SUlFkglTw_sncGzKSgIL5F9dXcQO5VzK7g6-_0sR51_OWq3u2zu41l17gqk5eaXC6vdqBOd7LMgVXVC42sZGbe6Wr_6NCDQyjaf6aVzXUJ9uyQXN1pbEPFMh-iOvhFx5cVm9W6i1jqECJfelV51he7mSLQ==&c=t5UqslCfMv4sJCmcOu5VtZxYdnDkooMYeUZxroNqDJoL4HuJjBrw8g==&ch=rFdPGlfkzQHbcPrJo-g_HuWLhGJ9ew3Qi56B2-Sud8gOwgvKXKV2kw==) or below for more details and to donate.
I hope you will come meet Juan Pablo, consider becoming a sponsor of the event at $500, $1,000 or $2,500 levels and see how hard he is working to win the majority for Governor Youngkin and all Virginians.
Thank You and God Bless! Caleb
---
| | [TICKET AND SPONSORSHIP DETAILS HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011_1BZWiQ3DupJ0cKhtuL87niux60SUlFkglTw_sncGzKSgIL5F9dXcQO5VzK7g6-_0sR51_OWq3u2zu41l17gqk5eaXC6vdqBOd7LMgVXVC42sZGbe6Wr_6NCDQyjaf6aVzXUJ9uyQXN1pbEPFMh-iOvhFx5cVm9W6i1jqECJfelV51he7mSLQ==&c=t5UqslCfMv4sJCmcOu5VtZxYdnDkooMYeUZxroNqDJoL4HuJjBrw8g==&ch=rFdPGlfkzQHbcPrJo-g_HuWLhGJ9ew3Qi56B2-Sud8gOwgvKXKV2kw==)

* Recently, Abigail hosted a town hall with 5,300 people to discuss the challenges facing Virginia families, seniors, and small businesses

* Abigail knows what it’s like to travel with family, so she is spearheading an effort to make sure families can travel together without hidden fees and additional charges

* Every person deserves reliable, high-speed internet access, regardless of zip code, so Abigail secured $1.5 billion for Virginia broadband expansion and improvement thanks to the bipartisan infrastructure law

clean_body: If a piece of legislation or a pocket of funding can improve the lives of the people in Virginia, Abigail will get the job done! | = | Peter, Between stalled negotiations and extreme voices in the Republican Party blocking legislation, it can often feel like nothing gets done in Washington. But Abigail is a different kind of leader who works tirelessly on securing victories- both big and small- for her constituents. If a piece of legislation or a pocket of funding can improve the lives of the people in Virginia, Abigail will get the job done! | = Here are some of her recent efforts that will help Virginia families and communities: Recently, Abigail hosted a town hall with 5,300 people to discuss the challenges facing Virginia families, seniors, and small businesses After hearing about the struggles of dairy farmers in Virginia, Abigail introduced the bipartisan Dairy Farm Resiliency Act to help keep these family farms afloat Abigail knows what it’s like to travel with family, so she is spearheading an effort to make sure families can travel together without hidden fees and additional charges Every person deserves reliable, high-speed internet access, regardless of zip code, so Abigail secured $1.5 billion for Virginia broadband expansion and improvement thanks to the bipartisan infrastructure law = | = We appreciate your support, Team Spanberger * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. Box 3112 Fredericksburg , VA 22402 United States | | | ---|---|--- Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. Friend, did you miss our message from earlier this week? **Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand has introduced a joint resolution to _officially_ add the Equal Rights Amendment to our constitution!**
This joint resolution would finally ensure that gender-based discrimination is unconstitutional — and give us the legal framework to restore reproductive rights across the country. With the GOP targeting reproductive freedoms and civil rights more and more each day, codifying the Equal Rights Amendment has never been more important.
So much is on the line for our nation. That's why thousands of activists all across the country have added their names to tell Kirsten that they support the ERA — _but we still need your signature!_
**Please, friend, Kirsten is counting on reliable Democrats like you to have her back.[_Will you add your name before midnight tonight to show your support for the ERA and help us hit our NEW 50,000 signature goal?
