Friend, the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) would establish that our civil rights cannot be infringed upon or taken away on the basis of gender. Activists have been fighting for 100 years to add this amendment to our Constitution — and we can't wait any longer.
**When the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , they took away the right for half of the population to access the health care they need. **It's discrimination based on sex — plain and simple.
Thankfully, we're closer than ever before to certifying the ERA: 38 states have ratified it — now, it's just one signature away from being added to the Constitution. _But an arbitrary deadline is stopping us from finally certifying this amendment!_
**That's why Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand has introduced a new joint resolution that would establish that this deadline should _not_ stop us from certifying the ERA. **With bipartisan support and filibuster reform, we can pass this joint resolution and finally establish gender equality in our Constitution.
This is a crucial moment in our fight for gender equality and reproductive rights. Kirsten needs to know where grassroots activists like you stand on the ERA. **[_Please, will you add your name before midnight to show Kirsten that you support the ERA? She's counting on 20,000 signatures before midnight tonight!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66823269/417692647/1555738728?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4304-su-nd&refcode=jtk4304-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmM3NTJjNS1kMzI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KNIyW6vOUY5qhfuqdTnuUVyraGP7IMcrGnCZxC3Kg7s=&emci=f942ca05-3b26-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=5fc752c5-d327-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=7659029)**

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. Kirsten Gillibrand has introduced a new joint resolution that would establish that this deadline should not stop us from certifying the ERA. With bipartisan support and filibuster reform, we can pass this joint resolution and finally establish gender equality in our Constitution. This is a crucial moment in our fight for gender equality and reproductive rights. Kirsten needs to know where grassroots activists like you stand on the ERA. | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

---
I have today’s date (July 21, in case you’re losing track of the year) circled on my calendar almost as many times as my wedding anniversary and my grandkids’ birthdays. That’s because, 13 years ago today, President Obama signed Wall Street reform into law — including the Consumer Financial Protection (CFPB). And 12 years ago today, the CFPB opened its doors. It was a huge, hard-fought victory for working people all across this country, and it was David against Goliath the whole way. I had dedicated my career to studying why families go broke and fighting to rebuild the middle class. After Wall Street crashed our economy in 2008, I fought to create the CFPB to protect people from getting scammed by big banks and corporations. Of course, the giant financial institutions were dead set against an agency whose job was to get the tricks and traps out of the fine print of financial products. They spent millions lobbying against financial reform and the new consumer agency. But we got organized. Labor unions like the AFL-CIO and SEIU joined our fight to protect working people. Civil rights organizations like the NAACP and National Council for La Raza jumped in (Black and Latino families had been targeted with some of the very worst subprime mortgages). And groups like the AARP and Consumers Union said this was their fight, too. We came together, we built a grassroots campaign, and we won. David beat Goliath. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66844731/417753734/-1332346508?refcode=EMZ15O_BIR_E_20230721_V1S2_F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOThiOTc1YS1mNjI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zn6IoS1Mem4U8YGKmqs6jrKVnLWmH1N1TU_YwaWeFjw=)
---
_Here I am with President Obama on this day in 2010, when he signed Wall Street reform into law — including a little agency called the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau. It was an honor to fight by his side, and I’ll always look back on that day with a big smile on my face._
Since then, the CFPB has been The Little Agency That Could. **Forcing financial institutions to return $17 billion directly to the people they cheated. Issuing $4 billion in penalties against scammers. Cracking down on junk fees — like excessive credit card late fees and overdraft fees. Withstanding attack after attack after attack from big banks, payday lenders, and their buddies in Washington.**
Republicans and powerful special interests will keep trying to tear down the CFPB, with efforts like the ridiculous lawsuit in front of the Supreme Court this fall.
But we’ll keep fighting back — and persisting.
[**If you’re able to, will you celebrate the CFPB’s birthday by pitching in $20 or any amount? You’ll support our re-election campaign, and you’ll help grow our movement so we can keep making real change that puts power in the hands of consumers and working people.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66844733/417753736/-1332346508?amount=20&refcode=EMZ15O_BIR_E_20230721_V1S2_F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOThiOTc1YS1mNjI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zn6IoS1Mem4U8YGKmqs6jrKVnLWmH1N1TU_YwaWeFjw=)
The CFPB shows us that it IS possible to put our government on the side of the people. And that’s a righteous fight. Thank you for being a part of it.
-Elizabeth

[**DONATE NOW**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66844735/417753738/65265856?refcode=EMZ15O_BIR_E_20230721_V1S2_F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOThiOTc1YS1mNjI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zn6IoS1Mem4U8YGKmqs6jrKVnLWmH1N1TU_YwaWeFjw=)

name: Wiley
subject: you know the drill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
Hey there!
Mariah sent out a message yesterday letting you know just how important monthly donations are to our campaign. I’m copying her message below because it’s just that important.
Can you make a monthly donation to my campaign to help me keep fighting for fair districting, voting rights, and so much more? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2307-q3-wn-recurring?refcode=230721-email&recurring=true]
I can’t win this race without you.
Thanks,
Wiley
----- Original Message -----
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2307-q3-wn-recurring?refcode=230721-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2307-q3-wn-recurring?refcode=230721-email]Team,
I often get asked by our supporters, “What’s the most helpful thing we can do to help re-elect Wiley in 2024?”
And while there are a lot of things that make a difference in this campaign; knocking on doors, making phone calls, sending text messages, hosting events, and so on, the most helpful thing any supporter can do is commit to giving us a recurring donation.
Monthly donations help us plan ahead , and in a Congressional race like ours, being prepared is the MOST important thing. Especially when we never know what Bo Hines and the far right are planning on doing.
So, can you make a $10 recurring donation right NOW to help propel our campaign and continue strengthening our foundation? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2307-q3-wn-recurring?refcode=230721-email&amount=10&recurring=true]
DONATE $10 MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2307-q3-wn-recurring?refcode=230721-email&recurring=true&amount=10]The more we can bring in on a monthly basis at this point of the campaign will help us as we get closer and closer to the election.
Your support is what helped us win in 2022, and it’s what will help us hold this seat next year.
Thanks, team.
Mariah Morgan
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2307-q3-wn-recurring?refcode=230721-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2307-q3-wn-recurring?refcode=230721-email]
Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. His 2022 opponent, Bo Hines, has announced he'll run against Wiley in 2024. Support #TeamWiley with a monthly donation today!
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2307-q3-wn-recurring?refcode=230721-email] CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2307-q3-wn-recurring?refcode=230720-email&recurring=true]

name: Team Veronica
subject: $20.24 is all it takes!
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/61645/images/%40mx_500%40my_300.png]
Dear Friend,
I hope you saw the video of Veronica's 2024 campaign launch. She is so excited to be working for you and she's ready to fight for our country in this election. You know she needs your help to do it. Can you help Veronica build her warchest by joining our $20.24 for 2024 campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2024campaign#]
Veronica was selected by President Biden to be one of seven national co-chairs for the Biden Harris re-election campaign. Her selection acknowledges what we already know - Texas is on the frontlines and Veronica knows how to win!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/61645/images/with%20Biden.png]
Reaching across the aisle, Veronica co-authored the Dignity Act with Republican Congresswoman Maria Salazar to begin to address key immigration issues facing America. It's not perfect - there's more work to do - but it is a major first step in finding bipartisan solutions based on kindness, dignity and efficiency.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/61645/images/border.png]
After decades of fighting for Castner Range to be a protected national monument, it's official. Veronica made this a priority from day one and got it done.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/61645/images/rectangle%20castner%20range.png]
We know that you know all these amazing things Veronica does every day to help the people of El Paso and across the country. Please show your support with a contribution of $20.24 today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2024campaign#]
We know you get a lot of fundraising emails, most of which tell you the sky is falling. We aren't going to do that but we are going to say that every dollar invested in Veronica's campaign allows her expand her valuable leadership beyond El Paso, beyond Texas and across the country.
I want to join the $20.24 team! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2024campaign#]
There's a lot at stake in this election. Veronica is ready to fight and she knows how to win!
Onward Together,
Team Veronica

Veronica Escobar for Congress
P. O. Box 3961
El Paso, TX 79923
United States

name: Team URD
subject: Fwd: Critical Rural Poll
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
We wanted to make sure you saw this.

| |
---
Hey Peter, Last week, the Pew Research Center released stunning new polling data about how Republicans and Democrats are faring in rural areas. This is critical data – we needed to make sure you saw this. Team URD \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **United Rural Democrats**
Date: Mon, Jul 17, 2023 at 8:45 AM
Subject: New Rural Polling Peter, We all know that Republicans do better in rural areas, even as Democrats are the party that delivers real results for those voters. **But what’s more troubling is that Republicans continue to expand their lead in rural America.** Take a look at this graph: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66824551/417696975/1646350971?refcode=urd-em-230721-forward&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2JlMjU5YjgtZDYyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iUzsYTKoPJ53jlrmuVqoDbN_1bJHIOW-7TaaeADZMO4=) That’s right, Peter. Republicans are _**continuing**_ to gain ground in rural America, even in the most recent midterm elections. But that’s where United Rural Democrats come in. Our work is focused on organizing Democrats in rural America, building coalitions and developing candidates that will start to reverse this trend. When Democrats lead in rural areas, rural Americans win. It’s on us to make sure our government works for all of us – especially those in the valleys and heartland of our nation. [**Will you chip in to help us reverse the trend of Republican dominance in rural America? Even $5 or $10 makes a difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66824562/417696976/1646350971?refcode=urd-em-230721-forward&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2JlMjU5YjgtZDYyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iUzsYTKoPJ53jlrmuVqoDbN_1bJHIOW-7TaaeADZMO4=) | | [**_Hi there! I’m Tony’s wife, Lauren. I know you usually hear from my husband, but I thought I’d be the one to reach out today since it’s my birthday! Tony has been working night and day to earn your support since his launch, so all I want for my birthday is to be able to help him out. Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. name: Blue Amp Action
subject: Your Voice Matters: Urge the Senate to Enforce Supreme Court Ethics!
body:
Take a Stand:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb61d2812-f65d-4d2b-b94f-28711de3569c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | Peter, Our democracy demands accountability from every branch of government, including the highest court of law: the Supreme Court. Recent actions by justices have raised serious questions about their adherence to ethical standards, leaving us with concerns about the transparency and fairness of their decisions. The Supreme Court holds immense power, impacting the lives of millions of Americans with every decision. Whether it's student loan forgiveness, voting rights, LGBTQ+ rights, or abortion, these cases shape the fabric of our society. We cannot afford to have justices who are not held to the highest ethical standards It is crucial that we unite and urge the Senate to pass new ethics standards for the Supreme Court. By doing so, we can ensure transparency, integrity, and fairness in our highest court of law. [Sign the petition today to show your support for enforcing ethical conduct in the Supreme Court.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T987d4cfd-fcc6-45f9-8320-3ebba9b558ae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---

---

---
| | |

---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/baa_90do_ja_scotusethics2321114?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2597fa9a-385f-4e9f-9485-8cd83165af3c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29655%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8GN9ifQjK56vuMjK9SdVRw&sysid=1)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29655%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8GN9ifQjK56vuMjK9SdVRw&sysid=1)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29656%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bkGU9kYv17nQmjuci7qHWQ&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29657%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TrrHFcx8O%2bh5tx0BURECuw&sysid=1)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29658%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AihAMUZ%2bGAY68XxX0hN5Lw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29659%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HTvMp8KtJqwwOfMJoMiS1g&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29650%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4lB8ubPgQLdjXrlW%2b8vglQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29651%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AwNW5bwvjR%2bSABpwc0AJjg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29652%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Gk4IKJ1mrBSNnsyIkETN%2fw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29653%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ayX%2fvpL2gM8ntYNPcKZCEg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29654%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vSFIZfayrS01%2biw5nwdZuQ&sysid=1)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29665%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BpBx4zVXZmumgYdwwTWnLQ&sysid=1)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29666%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DKuw5FXGODn1gKTw9eIu7g&sysid=1)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29667%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rm088W1hdyLYtRomwyYgQQ&sysid=1)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29668%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f9600aGighKuViqGfywIwQ&sysid=1)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

Your America News

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: A movement of Mamas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs9Kkj_DN5

My wife is mobilizing parents across the country.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os9Kkj_DN5

Friend,

In
2022, my wife Casey DeSantis launched a movement in Florida of
fired-up moms, grandmas, and future moms who offered their time,
resources, and support to help ensure that I was re-elected
Governor of our state.

After watching over 1.1 million mamas come together to stand up
for their children's future last election cycle, I was blown
away.

As
Joe Biden and the woke mob continue to wage attacks against the
children of this nation by pushing a social agenda down their
throats everywhere they turn, Casey is taking this movement of
concerned parents nationwide.

She
is mobilizing what we hope to be the greatest show of support for
protecting parental rights and standing up for children that this
nation has ever seen. Will you join our fight?

JOIN OUR FIGHT

We
have skin in this game, Friend. As parents of three children
under the age of six, protecting parents, children, and families
is not something we are willing to compromise on. This battle is
personal to me, Casey, and millions of Americans.

By
coming together, this movement will make a difference for the
future of American children, and I am so excited to prove to Joe
Biden that parents across the nation are not willing to stand
idly by while he attempts to strip them of their innocence by the
first grade.

MAMAS FOR DESANTIS

During the forced lockdowns of
the COVID pandemic, the ruling class:

Forced masks and untested
mRNA vaccinations on young kids

Denied families the ability
to visit loved ones in the hospital

Shut down churches

Destroyed communities

Locked children out of their
classrooms

This same ruling class is now:

Defending sexualized content
in schools

Encouraging children to
change genders behind their parents' backs

National Democrat leaders have
adopted the notion that children belong to the government. Enough
is enough.

Mamas for DeSantis is a
nationwide movement to fight back and ensure that I am elected
president to do for America what I did for Florida: STOP the
agenda of the ruling elite from harming children.

Together, Mamas for DeSantis will make a difference in the
upcoming election, the lives of children across the nation, and
the future of ALL Americans.

Join me today in putting a permanent end to the Left's madness:
https://RonDeSantis.com/donate-today

DONATE
$25

DONATE
$47

DONATE
$75

DONATE
$100

DONATE ANY AMOUNT

Casey and I need your help in reaching as many mamas as possible
across our country.

In
Freedom,

Ron
DeSantis

Meet Ron DeSantis

A native Floridian with
blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a
nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin
High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he
was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated
with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission
in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service,
Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah,
Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military
decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service
and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron
also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child
predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a
platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits
and a balanced budget amendment.

In
Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the
weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to
hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in
manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a
veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our
country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans
and expand support for mental health.

In
2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As
governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for
the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when
the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media
united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis
stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding
principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to
transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival.
Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative
priorities:

Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine
mandates,

Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border
crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against
illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured
professors accountable,

Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital
currency,

Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

Protecting the unborn,

Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a
constitutional carry state,

Expanding education freedom,

Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and
entities,

Lowering prescription drug costs,

Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

Creating a universal school choice program,

Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme
Court,

...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout
his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of
nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the
largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than
1.5 million votes.

But
history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the
majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional
wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently
as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30
points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red,
including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties
overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor
DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics,
and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with
battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing
down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his
inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense
suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of
sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even
for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we
choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than
cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe
place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership,
Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education
opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden
Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that
seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to
the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered
the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's
history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:

Record tax relief

ESG prohibitions

Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering
transparency

Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

Improvements to our state's infrastructure

Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death
penalty for child rapists

The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border
crisis

Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward
school unions

Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No
leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor
DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country,
leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron
is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television
anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters,
Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron
DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his
military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not
imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department
of Defense.

Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President

PO Box 3696

Tallahassee, FL 32315

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 25, 2023.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/is9Kkj_DN5

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os9Kkj_DN5

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-72578289376-echo3-5A58BAB59F98A5D24C6145B7B4EDAADD@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

body:
To respond to Elise Stefanik’s massive fundraising haul, we need to ramp up our grassroots operation. |
#
---
Team — NY Republicans are already building up their efforts to hold onto their toss-up seats across the state — and no one is doing more to support them than Elise Stefanik. **She announced a massive $3 million fundraising haul so far in 2023 — money she is absolutely going to use to target Pat and support his next Republican opponent.** Part of that war chest came from a fundraiser where she raised over $150,000 in _one night_. Guess who was there? Carl Paladino, the disgraced former candidate for Congress who has made incredibly vile, racist statements — including praising Hitler. Stefanik has stood by George Santos, even when other NY Republicans called on him to resign. He is a disgrace to our country, and Elise Stefanik is enabling his reckless behavior. Because of her unending loyalty to Donald Trump and Kevin McCarthy, Elise Stefanik has access to MAGA millionaires, and they will back the far-right candidates she supports. Defeat isn’t an option. name: Sarah McBride
subject: Why I ran
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
In 2019, when I decided to run for the State Senate, I was driven by one simple reason: | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66827729/417708268/1585783201?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20230721_fr_whyiran_cand_pb_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTE1OWY0ZS1kYjI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HBuTas4H3pDokQu5MjI5FiOozOnbwygR2ob8rG2o6Ec=&emci=1daac786-d127-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=01159f4e-db27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=36397936)
---
In 2019, when I decided to run for the State Senate, I was driven by one simple reason: I had to advocate for the people who were facing life’s biggest challenges and those who love them. **People like my husband Andy.** When Andy was battling cancer, paid leave allowed him to focus on the full time job of getting care. And my employer’s flexibility allowed me to be there by his side to care for him. We were both lucky. But, through our struggle, and sharing with others, I came across so many other families who simply didn’t have that same benefit. Patients forced to choose between their job and their health care. Parents going back to work days after giving birth. Family-members who had to choose between their paycheck and their loved one’s needs. **Making paid leave possible for workers and families across Delaware was a huge part of why I ran for the State Senate.** Andy’s and my struggle shaped the very bill I introduced (and passed!) in the Senate. The Healthy Delaware Families Act provided workers with up to 12-weeks of paid leave — **the largest expansion of the social safety net in modern state history.** **Now, I’m asking for your help so we can work for those too often left out in Congress.** Paid leave, early childhood education, gun safety, health care that meets our needs, protections for members of the LGBTQ+ community, reforming our criminal justice system, and much, much more. **That’s what you can count on me to work for in Washington.** [So, if you’re able, please consider making a contribution to our campaign. Every $5, $10, and $25 goes a long way in a race like this — and we need all hands on deck.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66827730/417708269/279091928?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20230721_fr_whyiran_cand_pb_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTE1OWY0ZS1kYjI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HBuTas4H3pDokQu5MjI5FiOozOnbwygR2ob8rG2o6Ec=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

** **

clean_body: In 2019, when I decided to run for the State Senate, I was driven by one simple reason: | In 2019, when I decided to run for the State Senate, I was driven by one simple reason: I had to advocate for the people who were facing life’s biggest challenges and those who love them. People like my husband Andy. When Andy was battling cancer, paid leave allowed him to focus on the full time job of getting care. And my employer’s flexibility allowed me to be there by his side to care for him. We were both lucky. But, through our struggle, and sharing with others, I came across so many other families who simply didn’t have that same benefit. Patients forced to choose between their job and their health care. Parents going back to work days after giving birth. Family-members who had to choose between their paycheck and their loved one’s needs. Making paid leave possible for workers and families across Delaware was a huge part of why I ran for the State Senate. Andy’s and my struggle shaped the very bill I introduced (and passed!) in the Senate. The Healthy Delaware Families Act provided workers with up to 12-weeks of paid leave — the largest expansion of the social safety net in modern state history. Now, I’m asking for your help so we can work for those too often left out in Congress. Paid leave, early childhood education, gun safety, health care that meets our needs, protections for members of the LGBTQ+ community, reforming our criminal justice system, and much, much more. That’s what you can count on me to work for in Washington. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for hearing me out, Sarah | Sarah McBride serves her home state in the Delaware State Senate, where she has passed historic paid leave, gun safety, and nondiscrimination laws. If elected, Sarah will be the first openly trans member of Congress, which means extremists are lining up to attack her. She needs our help to stand up to their hatred. Can you help send Sarah to Congress by donating today? | = | Paid for by McBride for Delaware P.O. subject: Rep. Bergman spends more energy on TV than his constituents, and it shows.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Callie Barr for Congress**
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66828225/417709853/-1515957801?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20230721_na_ndaa_cand_sm_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDQzYmVhZGItZGIyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UMypccqudeP3Fa4fv-B7WLnN6hP9RH2BZMNfQg7LIrI=)

Dear Peter, A few days ago, Rep. Jack Bergman appeared on Fox News to talk about the military. **Rep. Bergman has concerns about a drop in people willing to serve our United States military,_all while supporting the blocking of hard-earned military promotions._** So from one military family to another, here’s a bit of advice to Rep. Bergman:
1. **Withholding well-deserved promotions from military personnel doesn’t help recruitment — it deters it.**

I was a military spouse for an active-duty infantry marine for 15 years, and I can tell you the excitement that comes with a hard earned promotion — a bigger paycheck and sometimes nicer housing! But who is going to want to sign up to defend our country when we can’t guarantee their representatives will have their back, regardless of the political climate?!?
2. **Prioritizing culture wars over military readiness puts military families in limbo and hurts national security.**

Our service-members and their families are doing good and hard work — it’s our job not to make it harder for them.

When you put politics over professionalism, all you’re doing is showing future officers that their careers hinge on the whims of politicians in Washington.

This is a direct threat to our national security. It’s _unbelievable_ that we do not have a confirmed Commandant of the Marine Corps for the first time in 164 years. Stop hurting _our_ military family.
3. **There are real challenges that you can focus on solving to help service members, veterans, and their families.**

If you spent _half_ as much energy listening to the service members, veterans, and their families in your own district as you do appearing on television, you’d understand the challenges they face here at home — accessing benefits and affordable healthcare, finding housing, starting a new career, etc.

I’m running for office **because out-of-touch politicians like Rep. Bergman have lost sight of how their politicking affects the rest of us.** Politics-as-usual isn’t getting us anywhere. Change starts with getting Rep. Bergman out of Congress. Let’s do this, Callie Callie Barr
Candidate for Congress in Michigan’s First District
| | Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, advocate for veterans, and lawyer. She’s running to take on extremism and do-nothing politicians in D.C. that are leaving rural America behind. Can you help send Callie to Congress by donating today?

clean_body: | = Dear Peter, A few days ago, Rep. Jack Bergman appeared on Fox News to talk about the military. Rep. Bergman has concerns about a drop in people willing to serve our United States military,all while supporting the blocking of hard-earned military promotions. So from one military family to another, here’s a bit of advice to Rep. Bergman: 1. Withholding well-deserved promotions from military personnel doesn’t help recruitment — it deters it. I was a military spouse for an active-duty infantry marine for 15 years, and I can tell you the excitement that comes with a hard earned promotion — a bigger paycheck and sometimes nicer housing! But who is going to want to sign up to defend our country when we can’t guarantee their representatives will have their back, regardless of the political climate?!? 2. Prioritizing culture wars over military readiness puts military families in limbo and hurts national security. Our service-members and their families are doing good and hard work — it’s our job not to make it harder for them. When you put politics over professionalism, all you’re doing is showing future officers that their careers hinge on the whims of politicians in Washington. This is a direct threat to our national security. It’s unbelievable that we do not have a confirmed Commandant of the Marine Corps for the first time in 164 years. Stop hurting our military family. 3. There are real challenges that you can focus on solving to help service members, veterans, and their families. If you spent half as much energy listening to the service members, veterans, and their families in your own district as you do appearing on television, you’d understand the challenges they face here at home — accessing benefits and affordable healthcare, finding housing, starting a new career, etc. I’m running for office because out-of-touch politicians like Rep. Bergman have lost sight of how their politicking affects the rest of us. Politics-as-usual isn’t getting us anywhere. Change starts with getting Rep. Bergman out of Congress. Let’s do this, Callie Callie Barr Candidate for Congress in Michigan’s First District | | Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, advocate for veterans, and lawyer. She’s running to take on extremism and do-nothing politicians in D.C. that are leaving rural America behind. Can you help send Callie to Congress by donating today? | = | Paid for by Callie Barr for Congress Callie Barr for Congress PO Box 6921 Traverse City, MI 49696 United States Callie Barr is an advocate for veterans and spouse to a former U.S. Marine. subject: I survived the fire–but I won’t stop serving my country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown
body:
https://secure.winred.com/sam-brown/duty-face2face-em-av-135/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20230721_e000127-sb_duty-face2face_av&utm_content=av&recurring=true&amount=

You see, it happened in a split second, friend — when a roadside bomb detonated under the gas tank of my vehicle in Afghanistan.

My body was instantly engulfed in flames.

The pain was unimaginable.

I thought my life was surely coming to an end, and I wondered how long it would be before I drew my last breath.

But when one of my soldiers extinguished the flames on my body, I knew God had bigger plans for me.
https://secure.winred.com/sam-brown/duty-face2face-em-av-135/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20230721_e000127-sb_duty-face2face_av&utm_content=av&recurring=true&amount=

I stared death in the face and survived.

Friend{, through the pain and years of recovery, I learned the most important lesson: Every single day is a blessing and giving your all for your country is a privilege and an honor.

My name is Captain Sam Brown, and I'm running for U.S. Senate because I believe with all my heart that the only reason I’m alive today is to serve my country to my last breath.

It’s been less than a month since I formally announced my candidacy and I would be truly honored if you chose to become one of my first 1,000 financial supporters TODAY. CPT Sam Brown, US Army (Ret.)

Republican U.S. Senate Candidate

P.S. I’m running for U.S. Senate in Nevada. Fellow Conservative, I have big news to share with you. On Wednesday, the House Oversight Committee held a six-hour hearing of monumental importance. Two brave IRS whistleblowers, high-ranking employees who serve as a supervisory special agent and a criminal investigator, blew the lid off the IRS-DOJ coverup campaign carried out to protect Joe and Hunter Biden.

**Late that night and into the early morning hours Thursday, Chairman James Comer sat down with me to record two must-listens episodes of _Verdict_.**

You need to hear our breakdown. **[You can listen to Part 1 HERE >>>](http://trk.tedcruz.)** **[SUPPORT MY EFFORTS?](http://trk.tedcruz.)** **[DONATE HERE TO MY CAMPAIGN >>](http://trk.tedcruz._bD_A)**

As Chairman Comer described them, these were the most credible witnesses that have appeared before this committee in his seven years in the U.S. House.

**What they’ve revealed is _STUNNING_ :**

* _The Bidens have committed a series of crimes_ , much more extensive than what Hunter Biden has pleaded guilty to;

* The IRS whistleblowers who investigated this for five years wanted to interview Hunter Biden and Joe Biden’s grandchildren, in cooperation with FBI agents, and _they were told to stand down by the Biden Department of Justice_ ;

* Right before Joe Biden was sworn in, when the Secret Service was notified that Hunter Biden was going to be approached, Biden lawyers tipped him off – he refused to come out of his home and _IRS agents were told to go home by their superior_.

If this was just about Hunter Biden, this wouldn’t be national news. But what they’ve alleged is criminality among Hunter Biden, Joe Biden, and Merrick Garland.

And we now know that both of these IRS whistleblowers are DEMOCRATS – I suspect neither of them voted for President Trump.

**_This is a truly majot development and we need to push for more action now!_**

**[Listen now and show urgently needed support HERE >>>](http://trk.tedcruz.)**

Please also look out for my next email, where I’ll cover the Biden family’s approximately 170 Suspicious Activity Reports and connect the dots on their money laundering operation. _**[PLEASE SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN AND EFFORTS TO EXPOSE BIDEN HERE >>](http://trk.tedcruz.)**_

subject: Knock knock knock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a96c541014224b87af4f13b3347e4762&_e=C0tTv_v9hmhDJqQ-XJVFY0jQihVvlz3rqos5iwXWJVMBH1Xd2VTGr0vtMl012U5XtOlZRISqVh8e6WQpzh3GrcL3Ofg2owHu5BeKOraIGsSNjbdbJs88nwtBaNrJQZCFkxRxdoX7kU53VJ03_xfsqZDLXqEtNXUXjDao-qgP1M9_G7LibFIPYSFrSi8UIpD4hG8v8xrQJpp1Rof3MqKkxYjYsuw5FPj2_536s934WiXqnwINvvkUWEvEOFRWewle6PYe1xPmULtiUiuvGHxlCnNhXSTudJnE-XnWcbknIMP40Gl4Z6zRvjhV3d0AqokeyqWOAvk4qYQm7m1dl78K_w%3D%3D)
---
**Knock, knock, knock.**

_It 's the scariest sound you'll hear when you live in a communist country. _

_It 's the last sound my parents heard when their fathers were taken away. _

_It 's the sound of always living in fear, and it's my family's real-life story. _

We escaped from Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists, and we were given a new life in the most generous country on Earth.

**America saved my life, and I dedicated my life to paying her back.**

I graduated from the United States Naval Academy and served for 25 years in Navy Special Operations in Iraq, Afghanistan, Somalia, and Pakistan and 40 other countries around the world.

I love this country - but right now, it's taken a dark turn.

Now, the knocks are coming from Joe Biden's Department of Justice. Sending two dozen armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist in front of his family. Raiding gun shops and seizing records from law-abiding gun owners. Arresting his challenger in the next election.

_And he 's doing it all while real criminals are free to roam our streets. _

We are losing our country. You know it. But you also know we can save it.

I've been all over the world. Believe me when I tell you, if America fails, there is nowhere else to go.

**It 's time to save America while we still have a chance. **

**I 'm Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I'm running for the United States Senate.**

**[If you 're all-in to defend the greatest country on Earth, join our team today.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a96c541014224b87af4f13b3347e4762&_e=C0tTv_v9hmhDJqQ-XJVFY0jQihVvlz3rqos5iwXWJVMBH1Xd2VTGr0vtMl012U5XtOlZRISqVh8e6WQpzh3GrcL3Ofg2owHu5BeKOraIGsSNjbdbJs88nwtBaNrJQZCFkxRxdoX7kU53VJ03_xfsqZDLXqEtNXUXjDao-qgP1M_39iC8BfEaoNqwINmu_LMBUtAHPKP4fbRARHc0cd3C7TV4bVkPE0rkJzRt4QmMpoqRB5JvFhAJniL188jjvrXbSUqeAwMw2liOVvKGNA9rgSs_kUsUEgIuBOSgxEQATYTKuszGnKXpueoJBZ22aZCtlxHSFGyMarYBb-RbrVPb7A%3D%3D)**
---
[**JOIN THE TEAM - STAND WITH ME TODAY**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a96c541014224b87af4f13b3347e4762&_e=C0tTv_v9hmhDJqQ-XJVFY0jQihVvlz3rqos5iwXWJVMBH1Xd2VTGr0vtMl012U5XtOlZRISqVh8e6WQpzh3GrcL3Ofg2owHu5BeKOraIGsSNjbdbJs88nwtBaNrJQZCFkxRxdoX7kU53VJ03_xfsqXpWnnGQ5nLzXzQtUNq9tEaRgkWd_PDOR-SgXmOKaNLkrXLAreBsTlO5twyoOGZ6qhd3_xF8XChgm24AXX4B9DwRyF1CyC-dkcy3Jd6QQCn3jCgdpgLcyUK0Df7mU3GNFm2rrc4bJoXShAyku4Qh5o-mI32HVikqbxbZS9n0ouBAYwEdfx-1BSwE6yZCyhFsPA%3D%3D)
---
I still believe America can be the land of opportunity, Fellow Patriot.

And as someone who owes their life to the American Dream, I have an obligation to fight back against those who have trampled on it.

We need REAL fighters. Not politicians, not bureaucrats, and not keyboard warriors acting tough in custom made suits.

If we're going to preserve our freedoms, we can't be intimidated. We must be fearless.

**[It 's time to fight for the American greatness that lies within us. Join our team today - because I know you haven't given up on America yet either.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a96c541014224b87af4f13b3347e4762&_e=C0tTv_v9hmhDJqQ-XJVFY0jQihVvlz3rqos5iwXWJVMBH1Xd2VTGr0vtMl012U5XtOlZRISqVh8e6WQpzh3GrcL3Ofg2owHu5BeKOraIGsSNjbdbJs88nwtBaNrJQZCFkxRxdoX7kU53VJ03_xfsqZDLXqEtNXUXjDao-qgP1M9Ih6AoFNVq7XgAs4kKuA-TAN928db2fP-WCvuu6XE3zMQsNRsSP0XEgcTGfKVPa-ut52CPOG91d-7nkMz42nehDoOGcdfq0s1rWA4xOHteglOu3PcVWkF3chcam99x8CfbrpmuPp5FEgj4I7cERcLyLivBf5cHlHjgUIbu0rpapA%3D%3D)**

clean_body: | | | Knock, knock, knock. It 's the scariest sound you'll hear when you live in a communist country. It 's the last sound my parents heard when their fathers were taken away. It 's the sound of always living in fear, and it's my family's real-life story. We escaped from Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists, and we were given a new life in the most generous country on Earth. America saved my life, and I dedicated my life to paying her back. I graduated from the United States Naval Academy and served for 25 years in Navy Special Operations in Iraq, Afghanistan, Somalia, and Pakistan and 40 other countries around the world. I love this country - but right now, it's taken a dark turn. Now, the knocks are coming from Joe Biden's Department of Justice. Sending two dozen armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist in front of his family. Raiding gun shops and seizing records from law-abiding gun owners. Arresting his challenger in the next election. And he 's doing it all while real criminals are free to roam our streets. We are losing our country. You know it. But you also know we can save it. I've been all over the world. Believe me when I tell you, if America fails, there is nowhere else to go. It 's time to save America while we still have a chance. I 'm Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I'm running for the United States Senate. I still believe America can be the land of opportunity, Fellow Patriot. And as someone who owes their life to the American Dream, I have an obligation to fight back against those who have trampled on it. We need REAL fighters. Not politicians, not bureaucrats, and not keyboard warriors acting tough in custom made suits. If we're going to preserve our freedoms, we can't be intimidated. We must be fearless. Let's win this. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) Former Navy Special Operations Candidate, U.S. Senate (VA) | TEXT HUNG TO 21412 | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing Big Tech and we need your help
body:
Right now we’re asking the Supreme Court of the United States to hear our case

| |
---
| | Fellow American, Do you trust the government to decide what information is true?_I know I don’t._ But state officials have been colluding with Big Tech companies to do exactly that.That’s why we’re suing Twitter and the California Secretary of State. Right now we’re asking the Supreme Court of the United States to hear our case and stop the unholy collusion between Big Tech and the Big Government—collusion aimed to censor American citizens.But we need your help today. **[Which is why I’m asking you to add your name to the Center for American Liberty’s Open Letter standing shoulder-to-shoulder Rogan O’Handley as his landmark First Amendment lawsuit goes before the Supreme Court.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zupddck76ppm294349p1hkbceqn575lqbj4ntk90_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm9or2c1h2bs)** For years, Big Tech giants have taken their marching orders from the radical Left.And these people think it’s up to them to decide what’s true.They think it’s up to them to decide what you are and aren’t allowed to say, to believe, and to share.And if you dare challenge what they’ve decided is true, they’ll label you an agent of “misinformation” and shut you up._That’s what happened to our client._ If you’re on Twitter or Instagram, you might have heard of him.**His name is Rogan O’Handley, but you might know him as “@DC_Draino.”** And he did what many reasonable Americans did in 2020—he questioned the 2020 presidential election results and called for an audit.That’s when then-California Secretary of State Alex Padilla’s office contacted Twitter employees instructing them to censor Rogan’s tweets.I’m writing to you today because free speech is under attack and I need your help to defend it. **[Will you add your name to the Center for American Liberty’s Open Letter of support for Rogan O’Handley and his First Amendment rights?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgvp0fu1864o25vebd8v7r2971c3u3earggfha80_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm9or2c1h2bs)** This case is bigger than Rogan and it’s bigger than Twitter. This all happened before Elon Musk bought the platform.If one political party gets to decide what information is allowed in the modern public square, free speech is dead as we know it.**And if politicians can get away with silencing Rogan, they can get away with silencing YOU.** Our attorneys are working around the clock on this case, and we’ve faced some devastating defeats.But we haven’t given up because we know what this case means to the American people.And we’re counting on patriots like you to rally around us right now and support the First Amendment. **[So please add your name to our Open Letter in support of Rogan O’Handley and together let’s put a stop to Big Tech censorship.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi6nd5t79eovfgnht5ajoi1mgrlsm5kqkfu6nlr0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm9or2c1h2bs)** It’s really quite simple:
---
| | \- If one political viewpoint dictates what’s allowed on social media, free speech ceases to exist in our country\- Without free speech, we can’t have free or fair elections \- Big Tech and Big Government colluding to censor political opponents is a direct infringement of the First Amendment.
---
America as we know it is on the line, and we need conservatives like you to make your voice heard.Thank you in advance for your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
Founder & CEO
---
|
---
| | [**SIGN THE LETTER NOW**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5kd87q92e4i93mq5fmhrhbccsob4bi21j1kqtn0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm9or2c1h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2brlhka1c4059l9rpuetaq25uojchjksgltmcpg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjhm9or2c1h2bs)
---
The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends.

name: The Courier Newsroom Team
subject: Fox News. Tucker Carlson. Charlie Kirk. Breitbart. Here’s what we can do:
body:
Disinformation is winning. It’s time for a new plan.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1266%2E120351%2EI4KXTq)
Peter — America is stuck in a dangerous information crisis.
**Fox News. Breitbart. Tucker Carlson. Charlie Kirk.** Powerful right-wing engines of misinformation are endlessly spreading lies and hate. So, why is our media landscape so broken?
First, quality local newsrooms are disappearing.
Second, powerful right-wing interests are running mass disinformation campaigns 24/7 across every platform possible — sowing doubt, inflaming divisions, and causing political violence like we saw on January 6th.
**If you feel like we’re at a perilous crossroads, you’re not alone.**
**On cable news, social media, and even the dark web, right-wing bad actors keep doubling down on propaganda and lies.** Without viable alternatives, millions of Americans find themselves trapped in an echo chamber of bad information and fake news.
**That’s where we come in.**
**Here at Courier Newsroom, we’re fighting back by** **building the largest left-leaning network of local newsrooms in America.** We neutralize bad information by reporting factual, relevant news and information, delivered directly to those who need it most.
We already have local newsrooms in 8 battleground states staffed by real journalists who live in the communities we serve, and we’re ready to expand our network.
To do that, we need your help to spread the word about the great reporting published by our talented team of journalists every day. **We know that the best antidote to disinformation is more good information** , and that’s what our newsrooms take pride in delivering at Courier Newsroom.
**Now, here’s where you come in.** We’re only able to offer free, accessible local news because grassroots supporters like you chip in what they can, when they can.
[**We have a goal of raising $6,700 today to grow our network of left-leaning local newsrooms and fight back against dangerous lies and disinformation. Can we count on your $5 to get us there?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230721?refcode=em20230721&amount=5&refcode2=1266_120351_I4KXTq&akid=1266%2E120351%2EI4KXTq)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230721?refcode=em20230721&amount=5&refcode2=1266_120351_I4KXTq&akid=1266%2E120351%2EI4KXTq)**
Thank you,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1266_120351_I4KXTq&akid=1266%2E120351%2EI4KXTq)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1266%2E120351%2EI4KXTq)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: What I’m fighting for in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We can accomplish all this and more — but only with your help.
#
Peter — I’m running for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat to defeat Josh Hawley and take back power for everyday people. Here’s what that means to me:
**Holding politicians + corporate elites accountable:** Too many of our leaders have been bought off by the same massive corporations harming the American people and stripping our communities for parts. That’s why I’m fighting to ban insider trading for members of Congress and abolish ALL corporate PAC donations to campaigns — and holding myself to that same standard.
**Investing in our communities:** DC politicians spent decades wasting trillions of dollars on pointless forever wars while neighborhoods like the one I grew up in wasted away. I want to create a Marshall Plan for the Midwest, that makes real investments into our workers and our communities so we can rebuild our forgotten towns and finally start making stuff in America again.
**Showing up for working Missourians:** Real workers are tired of corporate elites and frauds calling the shots in our country. I’ll always stand on the side of working people by continuing to fight for the right to organize and pushing back against anti-union “Right-to-Work” scams in Missouri + all across the country.
**Putting people in charge of their own lives:** Politicians like Josh Hawley have spent years using their power to control every aspect of our lives. I’m committed to overturning the filibuster so we can protect abortion access in all 50 states — and finally give people the power to make decisions about their own bodies, families, and economic opportunities.
**I’m ready to represent Missouri and stand up for everyday people in the U.S. Senate — but I need your help to get there.[So Peter, will you make your first donation of $10 or more today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35243?refcode=em20230721-3430&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3430%2E614464%2EH5GWbm)**

clean_body: We can accomplish all this and more — but only with your help. Peter — I’m running for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat to defeat Josh Hawley and take back power for everyday people. Here’s what that means to me: Holding politicians + corporate elites accountable: Too many of our leaders have been bought off by the same massive corporations harming the American people and stripping our communities for parts. That’s why I’m fighting to ban insider trading for members of Congress and abolish ALL corporate PAC donations to campaigns — and holding myself to that same standard. Investing in our communities: DC politicians spent decades wasting trillions of dollars on pointless forever wars while neighborhoods like the one I grew up in wasted away. I want to create a Marshall Plan for the Midwest, that makes real investments into our workers and our communities so we can rebuild our forgotten towns and finally start making stuff in America again. Showing up for working Missourians: Real workers are tired of corporate elites and frauds calling the shots in our country. I’ll always stand on the side of working people by continuing to fight for the right to organize and pushing back against anti-union “Right-to-Work” scams in Missouri + all across the country. Putting people in charge of their own lives: Politicians like Josh Hawley have spent years using their power to control every aspect of our lives. I’m committed to overturning the filibuster so we can protect abortion access in all 50 states — and finally give people the power to make decisions about their own bodies, families, and economic opportunities. I’m ready to represent Missouri and stand up for everyday people in the U.S. Senate — but I need your help to get there. | | Friends, What a great week! Here are some of our favorite highlights:
* The enthusiastic response for our next Lieutenant Governor Robby Mills

* Parades and more chances to meet you in your community

name: Derek Marshall for Congress
subject: SIGN to show your support for workers at UPS!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66832497/417720342/-240524824?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzdmOWQ1NC1lMDI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XxXqQ4Nrd0osLL34MU_G3UaEkuV0fHBiA4nSyyXAIBI=&emci=c2ed6753-bd27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=477f9d54-e027-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=21617867)
While experiencing exhaustion from overwork, disease and family tragedies, 340,000 UPS workers worked tirelessly to provide people across the country with life saving necessities during the COVID pandemic. And UPS saw record profits.

Despite profits in the billions last year, UPS bosses are calling for a “cost-neutral” contract which refuses to address a cost of living increase in pay as well as provide more full time opportunities and a raise in wages for part-time workers.

**The Teamsters Union at United Parcel Service (UPS) is poised to go on strike if a new contract isn’t agreed to by July 31st.

[Will you join us and sign the petition supporting the Teamsters at UPS? They are fighting against a billion dollar corporation set out to destroy the most basic labor rights won through workers’ struggle and sacrifice. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66832498/417720343/-240524824?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzdmOWQ1NC1lMDI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XxXqQ4Nrd0osLL34MU_G3UaEkuV0fHBiA4nSyyXAIBI=&emci=c2ed6753-bd27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=477f9d54-e027-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=21617867)**

Fifty-five percent of Teamster-represented workers at UPS are part-time. Their pay is lower than full time employees, and they aren’t provided benefits or vacation days.

Part-timers, who work in warehouses, out of the public eye, work shifts at all hours of the day and night, and they are plagued with managerial harassment, unsafe equipment and work paces, unbearable summer heat, and noxious truck exhaust.

**UPS’s replacement of full-time workers with part-timers is a strategy to increase profits at the expense of the workers who help contribute to the profits. Some part-timers even work full-time schedules but for no benefits and lower wages.

[A Teamsters victory will mean a victory for workers everywhere and will help revitalize the labor movement. Sign on to show your solidarity!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66832501/417720344/-240524824?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzdmOWQ1NC1lMDI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XxXqQ4Nrd0osLL34MU_G3UaEkuV0fHBiA4nSyyXAIBI=&emci=c2ed6753-bd27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=477f9d54-e027-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=21617867)**

We stand in solidarity with the Teamster union at UPS.

clean_body: While experiencing exhaustion from overwork, disease and family tragedies, 340,000 UPS workers worked tirelessly to provide people across the country with life saving necessities during the COVID pandemic. And UPS saw record profits. Despite profits in the billions last year, UPS bosses are calling for a “cost-neutral” contract which refuses to address a cost of living increase in pay as well as provide more full time opportunities and a raise in wages for part-time workers. The Teamsters Union at United Parcel Service (UPS) is poised to go on strike if a new contract isn’t agreed to by July 31st. Fifty-five percent of Teamster-represented workers at UPS are part-time. Their pay is lower than full time employees, and they aren’t provided benefits or vacation days. Part-timers, who work in warehouses, out of the public eye, work shifts at all hours of the day and night, and they are plagued with managerial harassment, unsafe equipment and work paces, unbearable summer heat, and noxious truck exhaust. UPS’s replacement of full-time workers with part-timers is a strategy to increase profits at the expense of the workers who help contribute to the profits. Some part-timers even work full-time schedules but for no benefits and lower wages. We stand in solidarity with the Teamster union at UPS. Derek Marshall for Congress = Derek Marshall is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. = To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. Box 2836 Victorville, CA 92395 (760) 486-2416 Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress | |

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Why I voted NO on the $886 billion NDAA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Hi friends, how are you?
Over the last few weeks, one of our biggest priorities in Washington has been working on the National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA) of 2024 - a routine military spending bill that sets our defense policies and funding limits for the year.
It’s an important bill for many reasons - but in short, it’s a yearly opportunity to address the needs of our service members and military families and meet the national security challenges of the 21st century with real solutions.
Republicans could have passed the bipartisan package we passed in Committee. But instead, they hijacked this bill and riddled it with extreme policies from their right-wing wish list - things like restricting abortion access, cuts to necessary transgender health care, and eliminating diversity programs.
This is serious to me - partly because I sit on the House Armed Services Committee, but also because I’m proud to represent San Diego - the largest military community in the country. I hear firsthand about their struggles to make ends meet and find affordable housing and childcare. And it’s not just our military members who suffer - when we pass laws that go against our values, we hurt our national security by making it that much harder to build international coalitions with our allies, and call out bad actors.
It’s why I voted no - and I’m hopeful that we’ll be able to reverse some of these provisions in the coming weeks.
But look, this is also another reason it’s imperative for us to retake the House in 2024 - if we had a Democratic majority, we could pass an NDAA that we’re actually proud of - one that’s not riddled with GOP culture war’s top hits.
And what’s more, we could also be doing the important work of codifying abortion rights, preventing gun violence, addressing climate change, and all the other priorities that are currently being ignored by the House’s GOP leadership.
I’ll proudly keep pushing on these issues from inside the Capitol, but I’m going to need your help if we want a shot at making real progress. Are you ready to flip the House in 2024?
If so, I hope you’ll sign your name and let me know that you’re all in to retake our Democratic majority next November. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/j6dNgia5PUml7cwOFRgGQA2]
Thanks for everything.
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m the most vulnerable Democrat running for reelection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Folks, it's official.

Roll Call just ranked me as the most vulnerable Democratic Senator running
for reelection in 2024.

That’s why Mitch McConnell has made this race his top target and national
Republicans are already hammering me with attacks. I know we can win in
Montana, but it won’t be easy.

Look—I’m not panicking, but I am sounding the alarm. A wave of outside
money and attacks are about to flood into Montana. This will be the most
important Senate election in the country, and it’s up to us to build a
team strong enough to win.

Montana is a top battleground and could decide whether or not Democrats
hold our narrow majority. That’s why I’m personally counting on you to
make a donation today.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18983?t=1001&akid=3418%2E346206%2Ektp8oL ]Split a donation of $25 or more between Charles Booker and my campaign
to help my team respond to future attacks and ensure we have the resources
to reach voters and keep Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate
majority.

CHIP IN →

So much is on the line: building an economy that works for all of us,
getting dark money out of politics, protecting a woman’s right to make her
own health care decisions, and much more.

With your help, we can get it done.

— Jon

body:
---

Friend,
You know that I am running for President of the United States to lead our Great American Comeback.**I 'm here to tell you why**.

In Florida, we went out and led when it mattered. _**We chose facts over fear**_. We chose education over indoctrination. We chose Law and Order over rioting and disorder to make our state a citadel of freedom.

Over the years, I've watched the Left chip away at the freedom of our great nation. I am not happy with the state of this country, and I won't let it stand. We've got a lot of work to do. **Decline is a choice**. **Success is attainable**. **And freedom is worth fighting for**.

That's exactly what I'm doing. I am standing up against the woke mob's radical indoctrination of your children, Biden's disastrous economic policies that are crippling average Americans, and the invasion of our border that has allowed Mexican drug cartels to murder American children and adults.

It's time to get this country to start working again--not just for the well-connected in Washington DC, but for working families, children under attack, veterans, and seniors. I use every ounce of my executive power to serve the people I represent, and when I am President, that will be ALL Americans. We will restore a sense of normalcy to our American communities and ensure that common sense is no longer an uncommon virtue in this country. There's a lot out there that needs to be fixed.
Friend--we will get it done. No excuses.

I am running a fully transparent campaign--meaning you're involved at every step, I keep you informed on where your every dollar goes, and I treat you like the member of my team that you are, NOT my personal piggy bank--and I want you to be a part of it. If you're ready to join me in fighting for freedom, **I am humbly asking you to donate any amount you can afford to help out**.
