| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Friend, You know that I am running for President of the United States to lead our Great American Comeback.I 'm here to tell you why. In Florida, we went out and led when it mattered. We chose facts over fear. We chose education over indoctrination. We chose Law and Order over rioting and disorder to make our state a citadel of freedom. Over the years, I've watched the Left chip away at the freedom of our great nation. I am not happy with the state of this country, and I won't let it stand. We've got a lot of work to do. Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. That's exactly what I'm doing. I am standing up against the woke mob's radical indoctrination of your children, Biden's disastrous economic policies that are crippling average Americans, and the invasion of our border that has allowed Mexican drug cartels to murder American children and adults. | | It's time to get this country to start working again--not just for the well-connected in Washington DC, but for working families, children under attack, veterans, and seniors. I use every ounce of my executive power to serve the people I represent, and when I am President, that will be ALL Americans. We will restore a sense of normalcy to our American communities and ensure that common sense is no longer an uncommon virtue in this country. There's a lot out there that needs to be fixed. Friend--we will get it done. No excuses. I am running a fully transparent campaign--meaning you're involved at every step, I keep you informed on where your every dollar goes, and I treat you like the member of my team that you are, NOT my personal piggy bank--and I want you to be a part of it. If you're ready to join me in fighting for freedom, I am humbly asking you to donate any amount you can afford to help out. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | We will get it done, Friend. I promise you that, and I have the track record to back it up. To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66834554/417723853/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjM4ODVhNy1lMTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eprqZEUL4fJlb-VJG7Y_5XR3JZoEPD5OtZlWxCvXL8Q=&emci=2693317d-e027-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=223885a7-e127-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=26261389)
---

**Last week, we ended with Republicans clapping and shouting on the House floor after passing a disgusting defense bill that injects the worst elements of partisanship into our national security.**
Their legislation contaminates what is traditionally a fiercely bipartisan effort.
A month ago, we passed a defense bill out of the Armed Services Committee with an overwhelming 58-1 bipartisan vote. But then Speaker McCarthy got his hands on it, and he sold it out for politics.
I've been on the Armed Services Committee since I started in Congress. I treasure this process of working to be responsible stewards of our military and national security.
Last week, that tradition was trampled by McCarthy and his caucus.
**The hypocrisy of it all is staggering as House Republicans go from "supporting our troops" to jeopardizing military health care and child care.**
I have hope that the Senate will stop this toxic effort.
**And ultimately, we all will have the power to put an end to this extremism as we head to the ballot box next Fall. We must be ready. We've seen what happens when we don't make our voices heard.**
More soon,
_Andy_

name: Deya at United We Dream Action
subject: A decision on DACA could come any day
body:
We need to build the preparations now before Judge Hanen’s ruling. | | | Peter — Remember Judge Hanen? The right-wing judge who ruled against DACA in 2021, shutting down the program for new, eligible immigrant youth applicants? That very same judge is preparing to rule on the future of DACA — _and his decision could come any day now._ **I’ll explain how UWDA is preparing to fight back in a minute, but first will you consider making a donation to help us support DACA recipients and all undocumented people before Judge Hanen’s decision?** | | [DONATE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8woUN_Ab65s2rQh9LDLPy4yw2kbh0G90EmZCal6ZYZjkkewyOxC6xHs9IZrIHsp7gxZTmNS5Kqe05XNev4lEEpYGaT9e65p7PcitjISpOa-S9E4W4tV2oK8arPpdUYRUMnzfrOYIPFLzYuAseS8SCCyHcXxztDhwnpW3qVA2DBl8Nee7TPTuTv65fsvygS9HG1g1YmU9YqyOVgB-wLw0rItR2xXyx4pzM4OEu138n3_esfQzcV-4hd3RP1MMZaMzDQzOelsYUqNHCuC908AHfzEwNzOMmpngEOTMgHmOq1eVPiPlo6wOYgQ23v7-UwAtJfbNVLJgz2iPY5c59bj61Cfcy5Ap648eNVv9LIJiWxb4/3y2/duqIIz2WRjKivpDs1VpxzA/h0/q_PoauZgpoN6npirJJ_erBDkxUBJGycr-7MBAdFAQ6A)
---
With Judge Hanen’s record of anti-immigrant decisions, we’re expecting another ruling that jeopardizes the future of DACA. So in response, our team is preparing to:
* Plan community gatherings so our members can come together in a moment's notice around the country after the decision is announced
* Hold a mass community call to share the facts and cut through alarmist headlines and misinformation about DACA
* Assemble informational resources so that DACA recipients and undocumented people know their rights and how the decision impacts them

And that’s only the beginning.
**To prepare for the DACA fights ahead, I’ll be honest with you — we will need more grassroots support on our side.**
We need to be prepared for the aftermath of Hanen’s decision and quickly ramp up our advocacy efforts to secure permanent protections before it’s too late.
**Peter, will you make a donation to fuel our fight for DACA recipients and all undocumented people? We need to build the preparations now before Judge Hanen’s ruling.**

clean_body: We need to build the preparations now before Judge Hanen’s ruling. | | | Peter — Remember Judge Hanen? The right-wing judge who ruled against DACA in 2021, shutting down the program for new, eligible immigrant youth applicants? That very same judge is preparing to rule on the future of DACA — and his decision could come any day now. I’ll explain how UWDA is preparing to fight back in a minute, but first will you consider making a donation to help us support DACA recipients and all undocumented people before Judge Hanen’s decision? | | With Judge Hanen’s record of anti-immigrant decisions, we’re expecting another ruling that jeopardizes the future of DACA. So in response, our team is preparing to: Plan community gatherings so our members can come together in a moment's notice around the country after the decision is announced Hold a mass community call to share the facts and cut through alarmist headlines and misinformation about DACA Assemble informational resources so that DACA recipients and undocumented people know their rights and how the decision impacts them And that’s only the beginning. To prepare for the DACA fights ahead, I’ll be honest with you — we will need more grassroots support on our side. We need to be prepared for the aftermath of Hanen’s decision and quickly ramp up our advocacy efforts to secure permanent protections before it’s too late. Peter, will you make a donation to fuel our fight for DACA recipients and all undocumented people? We need to build the preparations now before Judge Hanen’s ruling.** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for standing with immigrant communities, Deya, United We Dream Action

name: CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret)
subject: I’m not done fighting

body:
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31647a357bad4ba599b216c7f050fb42&_e=G5y3Gis7BDTlCmCKjvCwAA1OWkW9Zm8k6lK0tdo0uPfPQHSEvw6Zy6W2LGXNUPEuxAKus9Rwmih_u-V01nzQqaiUSF6DA92FggczNcoBwFr89RkxS0maRq8JLfpnHBaX7LCZ3BHJHKvC5n00D9P9dBUW5736_A6g3Q8MSFO_ASHXI79EQC4vD1-ArFTB6Jdr7Jd_tCeT6IQBdO5dAMOh9ibl94yYQ9Zy3bvYA_cFNFtUx_FuqwrQ4D4jPdCE1mrePT4KLqw5sDnQjuTTTApNx6-BWWNItgygDzxHQyClTvCz4UBeZdqhq0RCKLHmkDI_)
---
**Knock, Knock, Knock. **
---
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

My name is Hung Cao, and I am here to share my family's story with you. It is a story of fear, turned into hope and gratitude for the country that saved my life - America.

My parents heard dreadful knocking at their doors. It was the sound that took away their fathers, never to be seen again. It was the sound of living in constant fear, of losing one's freedom. They vowed their children would never witness that.

We escaped Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists. America opened its arms to us, granting us a new life filled with opportunities.

I seized those opportunities, attending the renowned Thomas Jefferson High School for Science and Technology and graduating from the United States Naval Academy. I dedicated myself to service, spending 25 years in Navy Special Operations, fighting for our country in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia.
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31647a357bad4ba599b216c7f050fb42&_e=G5y3Gis7BDTlCmCKjvCwAA1OWkW9Zm8k6lK0tdo0uPfPQHSEvw6Zy6W2LGXNUPEuxAKus9Rwmih_u-V01nzQqaiUSF6DA92FggczNcoBwFr89RkxS0maRq8JLfpnHBaX7LCZ3BHJHKvC5n00D9P9dBUW5736_A6g3Q8MSFO_ASH44il_O-Zhmi5fMRuKrj2hHyhOARc-KWy_m5UuRe0pnguf-Z84e6my8iYygzDbItxTMQgMU90-NNWPOl8Krs0esPsE3lPGcHWneCVjMCEDL6kG05VaBX54L5FunRFNiWeY1inoWzvxCiFbkzhFb8Z7)
---
But today, our country stands at a crossroads. We have taken a dark turn, where a knock at the door represents something entirely different...

It's the sound of Joe Biden's Justice Department sending armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist, tearing families apart before their very eyes. It's the sound of the IRS raiding gun shops, seizing the records of law-abiding gun owners - violating our privacy and trust. And shockingly, it's the sound of a former President being arrested, eroding the principles our nation was built upon.

Crime is running rampant, violating the safety of our homes and businesses, and destroying our communities. Criminals roam free while law-abiding citizens suffer. Our borders are flooded with illegal immigrants, and the dangerous influx of drugs like fentanyl threatens the lives of our loved ones.

In a democratic republic, the rules should apply to all, regardless of power or position. But the Biden family seems to operate above the law, reminding us of a dictatorship where rulers are exempt from accountability.

We cannot let our country slip away. The time for silence and forced compliance is over. We must stand up for what is right, for the truth that we are made to deny.

I have traveled the world and witnessed the consequences of failed nations. I promise you, if America falls, there is nowhere else to go. That's why I am stepping forward to fight for our shared values.
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31647a357bad4ba599b216c7f050fb42&_e=G5y3Gis7BDTlCmCKjvCwAA1OWkW9Zm8k6lK0tdo0uPfPQHSEvw6Zy6W2LGXNUPEuxAKus9Rwmih_u-V01nzQqaiUSF6DA92FggczNcoBwFr89RkxS0maRq8JLfpnHBaX7LCZ3BHJHKvC5n00D9P9dBUW5736_A6g3Q8MSFO_ASFta2xLuOXxiJxpbwVMvfVMF6MCTJE4I8XIdX_58P83BP0xiUvkEC8nvFh2k_x-9yvnw4r--GS3TMkKlhzUhaaQpbqC_EfvH_2VDJx0unj3S6I2NTYf6ejO-eNt05dBfkdHWU6NrW6chOASg1iY1Q62)
---
I believe in the American Dream, where equal opportunities are earned, not handed out. It's our duty to reclaim our dreams, protect our lives, and to safeguard the well-being of our families.

We need true fighters, not politicians and certainly not keyboard warriors. We need fearless individuals who understand the value of our freedoms and will fight tooth and nail to preserve them.

Together, we can make a difference. We can refuse to be intimidated, standing tall in the face of adversity. We can ensure that America remains the land of opportunity, where our children can thrive and our dreams can flourish.
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31647a357bad4ba599b216c7f050fb42&_e=G5y3Gis7BDTlCmCKjvCwAA1OWkW9Zm8k6lK0tdo0uPfPQHSEvw6Zy6W2LGXNUPEuxAKus9Rwmih_u-V01nzQqaiUSF6DA92FggczNcoBwFr89RkxS0maRq8JLfpnHBaX7LCZ3BHJHKvC5n00D9P9dBUW5736_A6g3Q8MSFO_ASFNMn_C5GE1_UJS6gEK8RCJhb9Zh-bXGE3b2OZOaCFfLte5mE3sO2hOVyHvzMKhsRFWBt_L026Ayyj-m8QuPdBqMTV2Z7GiLaHUnAR7sKwJENRCxdf9LcTF_cwl_BqN3gdERrFsxDKSwjeMiLfFt7PZ)
---
**I am Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I am running for the United States Senate. I am committed to being your voice, your champion, and your unwavering fighter.**

Join me in this fight for our country's future. Together, we can reclaim what we hold dear and ensure that America remains a beacon of hope and liberty for generations to come. **[https://secure.winred.com/hung-cao-for-virginia/im-running-for-senate](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31647a357bad4ba599b216c7f050fb42&_e=G5y3Gis7BDTlCmCKjvCwAA1OWkW9Zm8k6lK0tdo0uPfPQHSEvw6Zy6W2LGXNUPEuxAKus9Rwmih_u-V01nzQqaiUSF6DA92FggczNcoBwFr89RkxS0maRq8JLfpnHBaX7LCZ3BHJHKvC5n00D9P9dBUW5736_A6g3Q8MSFO_ASHbafItwatuQBQFQuW6-vVlU9vFyrBeWZZtlJzHaqXIVN-WGhbfZ3qFGKu0LeZrshB2XL0TLw60dODTWD3BH_B-bL7ZehWpJ4kX7nMZCQK6xKe66t6a_I3HgrAtipuk1eCbi-pFOMn3zgl0e10XavZp)**
---
I'm Hung Cao and I'm not done fighting for us.

Thank you for your support,
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31647a357bad4ba599b216c7f050fb42&_e=G5y3Gis7BDTlCmCKjvCwAA1OWkW9Zm8k6lK0tdo0uPfPQHSEvw6Zy6W2LGXNUPEuxAKus9Rwmih_u-V01nzQqaiUSF6DA92FggczNcoBwFr89RkxS0maRq8JLfpnHBaX7LCZ3BHJHKvC5n00D9P9dBUW5736_A6g3Q8MSFO_ASF8rM-HTBi3nKgTiYXGKLMX8pj5gMhsQI2snJN-KF-4zJng9hlD3WU8Eme0ku-r_sMvNEvtRyNIEfjbYovQrkWCWAJXlrjJ9XMcF6tpqhzVZw-ZgadndVtr3sTurJnqKgIVngWnz25SEBpMwEWSj4Lo)
---
CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) Former Navy Special Operations Candidate, U.S. Senate (VA)

body:
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38ddf65607a94dca829668e448fcd7d7&_e=mGhN5MjlyaK7TfX5Aca5s6vPSF16llrTaryyEA2O2NylE7UN6Jz5zmY4MFWb5c4RD4yded0cn6QIDJfKLGFHXVo8hqyDXPKNvJw8jGAOJUJ-pu_ZOeCSy9Wo0_U8svxMPlN2HgRkQW_BXIvT8oxlTlO0Fwiu2QkO0RuMJRqAnfP_MlLIIWc4HK7pt3mbRV_iRot1BlzrutOvxaf-sR8QGOHgsNzdouyZsq29EpVR6WBSL8LVbsUCTpEPe55v_0J8BsRIZTJJaDbjH6iDyuKmm-_CYF0YY5UFzYeAe21ZrIqcwMOtUfIHOgkeOX8cd_4h)
---
**Knock, Knock, Knock. **
---
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

My name is Hung Cao, and I am here to share my family's story with you. It is a story of fear, turned into hope and gratitude for the country that saved my life - America.

My parents heard dreadful knocking at their doors. It was the sound that took away their fathers, never to be seen again. It was the sound of living in constant fear, of losing one's freedom. They vowed their children would never witness that.

We escaped Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists. America opened its arms to us, granting us a new life filled with opportunities.

I seized those opportunities, attending the renowned Thomas Jefferson High School for Science and Technology and graduating from the United States Naval Academy. I dedicated myself to service, spending 25 years in Navy Special Operations, fighting for our country in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia.
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38ddf65607a94dca829668e448fcd7d7&_e=mGhN5MjlyaK7TfX5Aca5s6vPSF16llrTaryyEA2O2NylE7UN6Jz5zmY4MFWb5c4RD4yded0cn6QIDJfKLGFHXVo8hqyDXPKNvJw8jGAOJUJ-pu_ZOeCSy9Wo0_U8svxMPlN2HgRkQW_BXIvT8oxlTlO0Fwiu2QkO0RuMJRqAnfOLBJzNutCxQApfJ71aPGQIZYSsYZFn3gjTx-QRLdbBKYggx_NzGafcxZ6QIopSiBoY4Pbj2Id0ipt9d9QFYtRTGFI2vq1d_mB1Bxn3vUuw4aI1ubyOGWDoWeQztoXIRwxAZQgeRggjrE_aszVMjKeg)
---
But today, our country stands at a crossroads. We have taken a dark turn, where a knock at the door represents something entirely different...

It's the sound of Joe Biden's Justice Department sending armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist, tearing families apart before their very eyes. It's the sound of the IRS raiding gun shops, seizing the records of law-abiding gun owners - violating our privacy and trust. And shockingly, it's the sound of a former President being arrested, eroding the principles our nation was built upon.

Crime is running rampant, violating the safety of our homes and businesses, and destroying our communities. Criminals roam free while law-abiding citizens suffer. Our borders are flooded with illegal immigrants, and the dangerous influx of drugs like fentanyl threatens the lives of our loved ones.

In a democratic republic, the rules should apply to all, regardless of power or position. But the Biden family seems to operate above the law, reminding us of a dictatorship where rulers are exempt from accountability.

We cannot let our country slip away. The time for silence and forced compliance is over. We must stand up for what is right, for the truth that we are made to deny.

I have traveled the world and witnessed the consequences of failed nations. I promise you, if America falls, there is nowhere else to go. That's why I am stepping forward to fight for our shared values.
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38ddf65607a94dca829668e448fcd7d7&_e=mGhN5MjlyaK7TfX5Aca5s6vPSF16llrTaryyEA2O2NylE7UN6Jz5zmY4MFWb5c4RD4yded0cn6QIDJfKLGFHXVo8hqyDXPKNvJw8jGAOJUJ-pu_ZOeCSy9Wo0_U8svxMPlN2HgRkQW_BXIvT8oxlTlO0Fwiu2QkO0RuMJRqAnfPZsr2J4-q0PN1EQxTItmMnvHLZ5J5jWiG8sdzst1iErq43onHVrT0Nyrc4eIn91mGhC_7GTX5MEvFghouc2tVdX_mD65dzIRYQJy7taCjSr248vHV0UtxiHDIehhprRfP8zFOWP4bqY03WdjyXwK5j)
---
I believe in the American Dream, where equal opportunities are earned, not handed out. It's our duty to reclaim our dreams, protect our lives, and to safeguard the well-being of our families.

We need true fighters, not politicians and certainly not keyboard warriors. We need fearless individuals who understand the value of our freedoms and will fight tooth and nail to preserve them.

Together, we can make a difference. We can refuse to be intimidated, standing tall in the face of adversity. We can ensure that America remains the land of opportunity, where our children can thrive and our dreams can flourish.
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38ddf65607a94dca829668e448fcd7d7&_e=mGhN5MjlyaK7TfX5Aca5s6vPSF16llrTaryyEA2O2NylE7UN6Jz5zmY4MFWb5c4RD4yded0cn6QIDJfKLGFHXVo8hqyDXPKNvJw8jGAOJUJ-pu_ZOeCSy9Wo0_U8svxMPlN2HgRkQW_BXIvT8oxlTlO0Fwiu2QkO0RuMJRqAnfNrgp95Vji7rMXGa5hTLfyO7baltAym4sz5hRxktztpytKdEFhusm3H2dT1N1Wgsj8Fv8AuRaTuydR48IFIcZKjHIKyQF194k6ggTcjBz-utwAAvXODaT2TfTlNkU3QXId10e9nrU68sRePr6rAWoxB)
---
**I am Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I am running for the United States Senate. I am committed to being your voice, your champion, and your unwavering fighter.**

Join me in this fight for our country's future. Together, we can reclaim what we hold dear and ensure that America remains a beacon of hope and liberty for generations to come. **[https://secure.winred.com/hung-cao-for-virginia/im-running-for-senate](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38ddf65607a94dca829668e448fcd7d7&_e=mGhN5MjlyaK7TfX5Aca5s6vPSF16llrTaryyEA2O2NylE7UN6Jz5zmY4MFWb5c4RD4yded0cn6QIDJfKLGFHXVo8hqyDXPKNvJw8jGAOJUJ-pu_ZOeCSy9Wo0_U8svxMPlN2HgRkQW_BXIvT8oxlTlO0Fwiu2QkO0RuMJRqAnfPCflGBVq_AREwRXen6YnoYVNbdYOA-Nh3sdIjCaTScAz-qwAjKKL0jaOWYlblIwKpL4nSa2RAsnbj28T8vNSpQensRWHnAr6QE5MxrmL5hHyoVKD_7iYIE8zqtgRwgFWX7_ZkfQQDrdHMQ19Vk7FNH)**
---
I'm Hung Cao and I'm not done fighting for us.

Thank you for your support,
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38ddf65607a94dca829668e448fcd7d7&_e=mGhN5MjlyaK7TfX5Aca5s6vPSF16llrTaryyEA2O2NylE7UN6Jz5zmY4MFWb5c4RD4yded0cn6QIDJfKLGFHXVo8hqyDXPKNvJw8jGAOJUJ-pu_ZOeCSy9Wo0_U8svxMPlN2HgRkQW_BXIvT8oxlTlO0Fwiu2QkO0RuMJRqAnfN_itdH8KpITI6QC2rtv6evFbqv9Wkl30TRUSL5J3-PYRZ52_W7Fk6L8TERIHr8KzAaXH2ur7RYFMkjC8Z7svNkZe3ayMp2q6sfXFjdFQKMRH0fDDHSbYHUFXThH10-jMXoFuCKoL554ag32rU2ZpjJ)
---

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: SC, VA, NC, & MS
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
If Democrats did just 5% better in rural areas, we would see a huge sea change in our political outcomes and landscape.

Friends -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to DNC Chairman Jaime Harrison's Dirt Road Democrats PAC. This is an important ask, at an important moment. So please give me a chance to explain why this request matters so much.
Unless that's all you need to hear, in that case, contribute here:
[**https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/elect-dems**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-drd?refcode=em230721-1-f&refcode2=1508_4767699_ktG_02&akid=1508%2E4767699%2EktG_02)
Here is the truth:
If Democrats did just 5% better in rural areas, we would see a huge sea change in our political outcomes and landscape. But too often, those areas are written-off by Democrats. We just don't compete.
But the truth is, people in rural areas are concerned about the cost of prescription drugs, too. They want to retire with dignity. Their states have higher per-capita rates of firearm deaths. They are impacted by climate change, too.
The Dirt Road Democrats are leading the fight to persuade and turnout rural voters this cycle. So please:
Contribute $5 to help them win the mayoral race in Greenville, South Carolina where we have a popular city councilwoman running a winnable race against a 6-term Republican incumbent.
Contribute $5 to help them win in Mississippi where 65 percent of the electorate is young people or people of color. Tate Reeves is one of the most disreputable governor's in America, and we can get him out.
Contribute $5 to help in North Carolina, where Dirt Road Democrats work will stop Republicans from winning a supermajority, where they are currently one vote short.
Contribute $5 to help Dirt Road Democrats' work in rural Virginia where control of both chambers of the state legislature are up-for-grabs.
Please use this link to give. It would mean a lot to me, personally:
[**Can I count on you to contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford today to Jaime Harrison's Dirt Road Democrats PAC? It all adds up when we're all chipping-in, and some of these rural races and areas can be impacted by our collective action today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-drd?refcode=em230721-1-f&refcode2=1508_4767699_ktG_02&akid=1508%2E4767699%2EktG_02)
Or select an amount below to contribute to Jaime Harrison's Dirt Road Democrats:
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll instantly process your contribution to Dirt Road Democrats PAC:_

All my best,
Gavin Newsom

subject: They are all saying the same thing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Without your input into the 2023 Census, we WILL lose

name: Sen. Cory Booker
subject: Here’s what I believe, Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I believe we can -- and will -- reelect Joe and Kamala and win tough races all over the country. | | |
---
Peter, I want to close out this week by sharing a few things that I believe: I believe that Joe Biden and Kamala Harris will win another term in the White House. I believe that Senate Democrats can keep our majority. And I believe that the American people are ready to choose a path forward that puts love over hate, hope over fear, and generosity over greed. I believe this because I’ve seen it, Peter. I’ve seen it in the way we’ve fought together to tackle rising costs to help more folks get by. I’ve seen it in our efforts to invest in a clean energy future. I’ve seen it in the way people like you show up at the ballot box, election after election, raising your voice time and again to make sure our country reflects your values. [With that spirit, I believe we can -- and will -- reelect Joe and Kamala and win tough races all over the country. If you’re with me, I hope you’ll pitch in now to help make it happen:](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZsVrCkvzaFQObNTm3Osd-zpuFulaM8WnAzwT3mlNU-P0mEtCvxzDx41SuQp7ViRBSbYKIbSoMINtWqAjZqFa6TVNvWfQIf-9AZpw93XXIChks-qzejxr9fgkKBrAZu_IcLyW_dpoml8aE5ri5gCEq7JdH4mQ5GnF4_WIFPNKUTAICRUP5HuieSkKce5jpBwx1TjeVKdlYhVAH1FjRWmySf1m6WjwAo2Rh10u9Oa59cGfmivmWhIcsaOVt4fEt8hwkFKNtYZhptlWsCamaw1aXK5s9Z99HINq40m4cHH0S6J66MxN_9zeDm6XTJ0GhfnY8cDgeLujQJNMdWKJW07IqOYN2XzqXeLnHrUJ6gK-zgxHybCSTVz1LnBXqnxP7BGBClPjs8cEaMGRDeJ0UYyb1B9UPUl9gAUoT2ZOdxh5XlBzhHYc-s8etbGUVSTSK4y1RfPJU-1QmUA-9Y2MnJALf3qTiah-wgQlHO0ltWViK339ylCcyqfqCWXyFfsowzglyznN8Q_N6J7UQnj_z67qYg6eb6-8SQkYpAZI6yIUSppwU15riB-XjhiXPykL0MMzHBtox8x5kpQrQe0Nrp_19OA/3y2/aQSrNbHBT7GqGS5VRLZNTQ/h0/h7gqlDveIh9g1b5hnDWvNaaYr7ypZQZQFwQZfPgHlfs)

clean_body: I believe we can -- and will -- reelect Joe and Kamala and win tough races all over the country. | | | Peter, I want to close out this week by sharing a few things that I believe: I believe that Joe Biden and Kamala Harris will win another term in the White House. I believe that Senate Democrats can keep our majority. And I believe that the American people are ready to choose a path forward that puts love over hate, hope over fear, and generosity over greed. I believe this because I’ve seen it, Peter. I’ve seen it in the way we’ve fought together to tackle rising costs to help more folks get by. I’ve seen it in our efforts to invest in a clean energy future. I’ve seen it in the way people like you show up at the ballot box, election after election, raising your voice time and again to make sure our country reflects your values. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Make no mistake, Peter, any amount you’re able to pitch in makes a difference in the fights ahead. Thank you in advance for your support. With love and gratitude, Cory Cory Booker U.S. Senator, New Jersey

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Help us take on Big Tech
body:
Right now we’re asking the Supreme Court of the United States to hear our case

| |
---
| | Fellow American, Do you trust the government to decide what information is true?_I know I don’t._ But state officials have been colluding with Big Tech companies to do exactly that.That’s why we’re suing Twitter and the California Secretary of State. Right now we’re asking the Supreme Court of the United States to hear our case and stop the unholy collusion between Big Tech and the Big Government—collusion aimed to censor American citizens.But we need your help today. **[Which is why I’m asking you to add your name to the Center for American Liberty’s Open Letter standing shoulder-to-shoulder Rogan O’Handley as his landmark First Amendment lawsuit goes before the Supreme Court.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6s4eo6cm67opatq0lmppptm0o0mn2dj6111ipa8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjjm8ob2c9h2bs)** For years, Big Tech giants have taken their marching orders from the radical Left.And these people think it’s up to them to decide what’s true.They think it’s up to them to decide what you are and aren’t allowed to say, to believe, and to share.And if you dare challenge what they’ve decided is true, they’ll label you an agent of “misinformation” and shut you up._That’s what happened to our client._ If you’re on Twitter or Instagram, you might have heard of him.**His name is Rogan O’Handley, but you might know him as “@DC_Draino.”** And he did what many reasonable Americans did in 2020—he questioned the 2020 presidential election results and called for an audit.That’s when then-California Secretary of State Alex Padilla’s office contacted Twitter employees instructing them to censor Rogan’s tweets.I’m writing to you today because free speech is under attack and I need your help to defend it. **[Will you add your name to the Center for American Liberty’s Open Letter of support for Rogan O’Handley and his First Amendment rights?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztu7jlovubomju73g2oge6tk5m2n4rjf924lm4hg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjjm8ob2c9h2bs)** This case is bigger than Rogan and it’s bigger than Twitter. This all happened before Elon Musk bought the platform.If one political party gets to decide what information is allowed in the modern public square, free speech is dead as we know it.**And if politicians can get away with silencing Rogan, they can get away with silencing YOU.** Our attorneys are working around the clock on this case, and we’ve faced some devastating defeats.But we haven’t given up because we know what this case means to the American people.And we’re counting on patriots like you to rally around us right now and support the First Amendment. **[So please add your name to our Open Letter in support of Rogan O’Handley and together let’s put a stop to Big Tech censorship.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbf45ctivmdfdgdgqu7koub5ihjhlmhtkfmd8f2o_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjjm8ob2c9h2bs)** It’s really quite simple:
---
| | \- If one political viewpoint dictates what’s allowed on social media, free speech ceases to exist in our country\- Without free speech, we can’t have free or fair elections \- Big Tech and Big Government colluding to censor political opponents is a direct infringement of the First Amendment.
---
America as we know it is on the line, and we need conservatives like you to make your voice heard.Thank you in advance for your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
Founder & CEO
---
|
---

clean_body: Right now we’re asking the Supreme Court of the United States to hear our case | | | | Fellow American, Do you trust the government to decide what information is true?I know I don’t. But state officials have been colluding with Big Tech companies to do exactly that.That’s why we’re suing Twitter and the California Secretary of State. Right now we’re asking the Supreme Court of the United States to hear our case and stop the unholy collusion between Big Tech and the Big Government—collusion aimed to censor American citizens.But we need your help today. For years, Big Tech giants have taken their marching orders from the radical Left.And these people think it’s up to them to decide what’s true.They think it’s up to them to decide what you are and aren’t allowed to say, to believe, and to share.And if you dare challenge what they’ve decided is true, they’ll label you an agent of “misinformation” and shut you up.That’s what happened to our client. If you’re on Twitter or Instagram, you might have heard of him.His name is Rogan O’Handley, but you might know him as “@DCDraino.” And he did what many reasonable Americans did in 2020—he questioned the 2020 presidential election results and called for an audit.That’s when then-California Secretary of State Alex Padilla’s office contacted Twitter employees instructing them to censor Rogan’s tweets.I’m writing to you today because free speech is under attack and I need your help to defend it. This case is bigger than Rogan and it’s bigger than Twitter. This all happened before Elon Musk bought the platform.If one political party gets to decide what information is allowed in the modern public square, free speech is dead as we know it.And if politicians can get away with silencing Rogan, they can get away with silencing YOU. Our attorneys are working around the clock on this case, and we’ve faced some devastating defeats.But we haven’t given up because we know what this case means to the American people.And we’re counting on patriots like you to rally around us right now and support the First Amendment. It’s really quite simple: | | \- If one political viewpoint dictates what’s allowed on social media, free speech ceases to exist in our country\- Without free speech, we can’t have free or fair elections \- Big Tech and Big Government colluding to censor political opponents is a direct infringement of the First Amendment. America as we know it is on the line, and we need conservatives like you to make your voice heard.Thank you in advance for your support. | | Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon Founder & CEO | | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | American Action News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Darcy Draeger, Executive Director
subject: Districts for Democracy Weekly Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Districts for Democracy
body:
The deadline to submit petitions to run for school board is Monday, July 31.

| | Hello Friends,

The most important news to flag this week is that the clock has almost run out: **The deadline to submit petitions to run for school board is Monday, July 31.**

And let me assure you, MAGA extremists are very aware of this and have been [actively recruiting people to run.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66837818/417728386/1018088551?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230721_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=4795fb22-e427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Nzk1ZmIyMi1lNDI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KNAoM8ABgKvAgMPyjsVGJl4zz7crX7F1SeQD1rEwHa4=&emci=8fa84f31-4c27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=4795fb22-e427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=19214294)

We encourage everyone to be aware of your local races and candidates (or lack thereof), and help support or recruit candidates, or stand up and run if no one else can be found.

Happily, there are a lot of great resources available to school board candidates and supporters this year, including the following:

Nationally, the **Progressive Change Campaign Committee** has recently launched an effort called [Save Our School Boards](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66837820/417728388/1785808390?source=partner&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230721_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=4795fb22-e427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Nzk1ZmIyMi1lNDI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KNAoM8ABgKvAgMPyjsVGJl4zz7crX7F1SeQD1rEwHa4=&emci=8fa84f31-4c27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=4795fb22-e427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=19214294) to support school board candidates all over the country with resources, training, and fundraising.

Over the next two cycles (2023-2024), the PCCC will be working with hundreds of candidates to develop individual campaign plans, budgets, messaging, and fundraising strategies to help combat right-wing extremism on school boards. The PCCC will also be fundraising and providing polling support for the candidates who participate. [Apply to receive these resources here!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66837822/417728390/1785808390?source=partner&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230721_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=4795fb22-e427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Nzk1ZmIyMi1lNDI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KNAoM8ABgKvAgMPyjsVGJl4zz7crX7F1SeQD1rEwHa4=&emci=8fa84f31-4c27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=4795fb22-e427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=19214294)

[After signing up](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66837824/417728392/1785808390?source=partner&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230721_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=4795fb22-e427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Nzk1ZmIyMi1lNDI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KNAoM8ABgKvAgMPyjsVGJl4zz7crX7F1SeQD1rEwHa4=&emci=8fa84f31-4c27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=4795fb22-e427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=19214294), you will gain access to school board-specific resources, training, coaching sessions, polling and messaging briefings, and more. [You can see specific offerings on the sign-up page.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66837826/417728394/1785808390?source=partner&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230721_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=4795fb22-e427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Nzk1ZmIyMi1lNDI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KNAoM8ABgKvAgMPyjsVGJl4zz7crX7F1SeQD1rEwHa4=&emci=8fa84f31-4c27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=4795fb22-e427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=19214294)

PCCC is aiming to remove some of the major barriers that prevent qualified people from running for office. We hope you’ll consider taking advantage of this exciting opportunity.

In New Jersey, the non-partisan organization **BoardBOOST** will provide training for candidates and candidate supporters, as well as help with messaging, marketing, and voter outreach. You can apply here: [https://tinyurl.com/2023BOEreferral](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66837828/417728396/761046773?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230721_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=4795fb22-e427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Nzk1ZmIyMi1lNDI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KNAoM8ABgKvAgMPyjsVGJl4zz7crX7F1SeQD1rEwHa4=&emci=8fa84f31-4c27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=4795fb22-e427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=19214294)

**The New Jersey Public Education Coalition** ([NJ PEC](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66837830/417728398/528986684?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230721_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=4795fb22-e427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Nzk1ZmIyMi1lNDI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KNAoM8ABgKvAgMPyjsVGJl4zz7crX7F1SeQD1rEwHa4=&emci=8fa84f31-4c27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=4795fb22-e427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=19214294)), founded by Michael Gottesman, can provide one-on-one mentors (current and former BOE members) to candidates who will guide them through the process. Candidates/Candidate teams can request a mentor here: [https://www.njpecoalition.org/request-a-mentor](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66837832/417728400/-1020095251?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230721_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=4795fb22-e427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Nzk1ZmIyMi1lNDI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KNAoM8ABgKvAgMPyjsVGJl4zz7crX7F1SeQD1rEwHa4=&emci=8fa84f31-4c27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=4795fb22-e427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=19214294)

**NJ PEC** also works to recruit _local_ people to attend school board meetings where books, policies, and teachers are under fire. You can use this link to flag districts that need help: [https://www.njpecoalition.org/report-questionable-activity](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66837834/417728402/-1947457711?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230721_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=4795fb22-e427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Nzk1ZmIyMi1lNDI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KNAoM8ABgKvAgMPyjsVGJl4zz7crX7F1SeQD1rEwHa4=&emci=8fa84f31-4c27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=4795fb22-e427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=19214294)

NJEA’s **[Center for Honesty in Education](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66837836/417728431/176292141?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230721_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=4795fb22-e427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Nzk1ZmIyMi1lNDI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KNAoM8ABgKvAgMPyjsVGJl4zz7crX7F1SeQD1rEwHa4=&emci=8fa84f31-4c27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=4795fb22-e427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=19214294)** aims to combat disinformation, regressive policies, and dangerous rhetoric in local school districts by giving the association’s leaders the tools necessary to forge constructive partnerships with parents and other community stakeholders, keep partisan politics out of our public schools and—above all—ensure that its members can continue to support students and help them rebound from the pandemic in a safe and inclusive learning environment. You can also report local district issues (book bans, anti-inclusion actions, etc.) to the CHE [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66837838/417728433/122382828?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230721_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=4795fb22-e427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Nzk1ZmIyMi1lNDI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KNAoM8ABgKvAgMPyjsVGJl4zz7crX7F1SeQD1rEwHa4=&emci=8fa84f31-4c27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=4795fb22-e427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=19214294).

Finally, we’re stronger together! Connecting with others who are working to keep our schools focused on education and not ideology is vital. Thanks to****[**SWEEP NJ** (Suburban Women Engaged, Empowered, and Pissed)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66837839/417728435/1192238730?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230721_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=4795fb22-e427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Nzk1ZmIyMi1lNDI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KNAoM8ABgKvAgMPyjsVGJl4zz7crX7F1SeQD1rEwHa4=&emci=8fa84f31-4c27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=4795fb22-e427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=19214294), finding allies in your area and sharing ideas and information has never been easier.

A women-led group, SWEEP NJ’s mission is to use relational organizing to have important conversations with friends, family and neighbors in order to raise awareness for community advocacy and the importance of voting up and down the ballot. They are inspired and modeled after Red Wine and Blue, a grassroots community of suburban women working to break through divisiveness and right-wing extremism by forging meaningful connections in their communities. As an independent volunteer-led Facebook group, they also strive to provide resources and connections, online and in person, to encourage effective organizing and advocacy for shared social justice values. SWEEP NJ is open to all, and I encourage you to become involved in your county’s group.

Starting August 1, a new clock starts: We will have seven weeks to make sure everyone in our communities knows who is running in their school board races before vote by mail ballots drop. Every ballot returned without a vote for BOE is a terrible loss; we must work together to ensure we cross the line with wins. I know we can do it!

Thank you all again for your attention, and your time. Together we’re going to keep New Jersey public schools number one in the nation.

Sincerely,

Darcy
Executive Director
Districts for Democracy
---
* * *
| Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States.

clean_body: The deadline to submit petitions to run for school board is Monday, July 31. | | Hello Friends, The most important news to flag this week is that the clock has almost run out: The deadline to submit petitions to run for school board is Monday, July 31. And let me assure you, MAGA extremists are very aware of this and have been We encourage everyone to be aware of your local races and candidates (or lack thereof), and help support or recruit candidates, or stand up and run if no one else can be found. Happily, there are a lot of great resources available to school board candidates and supporters this year, including the following: Nationally, the Progressive Change Campaign Committee has recently launched an effort called to support school board candidates all over the country with resources, training, and fundraising. Over the next two cycles (2023-2024), the PCCC will be working with hundreds of candidates to develop individual campaign plans, budgets, messaging, and fundraising strategies to help combat right-wing extremism on school boards. The PCCC will also be fundraising and providing polling support for the candidates who participate. , you will gain access to school board-specific resources, training, coaching sessions, polling and messaging briefings, and more. PCCC is aiming to remove some of the major barriers that prevent qualified people from running for office. We hope you’ll consider taking advantage of this exciting opportunity. In New Jersey, the non-partisan organization BoardBOOST will provide training for candidates and candidate supporters, as well as help with messaging, marketing, and voter outreach. You can apply here: The New Jersey Public Education Coalition (), founded by Michael Gottesman, can provide one-on-one mentors (current and former BOE members) to candidates who will guide them through the process. Candidates/Candidate teams can request a mentor here: NJ PEC also works to recruit local people to attend school board meetings where books, policies, and teachers are under fire. You can use this link to flag districts that need help: NJEA’s aims to combat disinformation, regressive policies, and dangerous rhetoric in local school districts by giving the association’s leaders the tools necessary to forge constructive partnerships with parents and other community stakeholders, keep partisan politics out of our public schools and—above all—ensure that its members can continue to support students and help them rebound from the pandemic in a safe and inclusive learning environment. You can also report local district issues (book bans, anti-inclusion actions, etc.) to the CHE . Finally, we’re stronger together! Connecting with others who are working to keep our schools focused on education and not ideology is vital. Thanks to**, finding allies in your area and sharing ideas and information has never been easier. A women-led group, SWEEP NJ’s mission is to use relational organizing to have important conversations with friends, family and neighbors in order to raise awareness for community advocacy and the importance of voting up and down the ballot. They are inspired and modeled after Red Wine and Blue, a grassroots community of suburban women working to break through divisiveness and right-wing extremism by forging meaningful connections in their communities. As an independent volunteer-led Facebook group, they also strive to provide resources and connections, online and in person, to encourage effective organizing and advocacy for shared social justice values. SWEEP NJ is open to all, and I encourage you to become involved in your county’s group. Starting August 1, a new clock starts: We will have seven weeks to make sure everyone in our communities knows who is running in their school board races before vote by mail ballots drop. Every ballot returned without a vote for BOE is a terrible loss; we must work together to ensure we cross the line with wins. I know we can do it! Thank you all again for your attention, and your time. Together we’re going to keep New Jersey public schools number one in the nation. Sincerely, Darcy Executive Director Districts for Democracy | Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States. = = Paid for by Districts for Democracy Districts for Democracy P.O. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f290deb06b2b41e9a95016b7930d0c8e&_e=Q4eSHT9HLqWWEzmjTNfmYRUBNkXm5yLXupo04QnzBZY5PNGNmagIdC4Xss4LZNRzWtcFRSdWHJKT3AlO-GPGcFMnQtS1SGlo2srmV5Fdxb4cBa5zqyAqgKvtK3oMKMMIU4M-bYLsPI5gBgCPD4UmXFK6SUFQrbJO-wCJ025oimsjmqPVNLQ7etFlOhAdvFue2tBcdf_zsDAJqMkkGNpcXqgdOU8V9XN8zt7dhSwhnsRpnOLQq_tECQ6gMj9HKQ_RJMxOssdmSly40Y9PMVkZ_qQQqEO5Z1VjhYdf-Ty4l3PkTX9nbsq9G2fygXVL0JCz1lIQdOVRnSW_DLL520f2EGMvCPAgTvQgozFf3VCgs1dj70GwSq4iI1ZP2IP7FmVTpIm3lpq5hB-0IlT3aezU3Q%3D%3D)

---

| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f290deb06b2b41e9a95016b7930d0c8e&_e=Q4eSHT9HLqWWEzmjTNfmYeBb2vhlQX7Yf3otXKwlVrMXvTMH7xrg-iVymPaJCUEbrFlHsTotUbwpJpbTPIUhdxkbc0mrErNrjtLTorbFGlMK2J3oHcO5bqTnF-YkV_RV7H3ozSSF6TfeE9Epb27Ly6bzAlnmntwuaDJtmCeqdTEBmBZQCOeS_ipchEAxUSg7VjclSBTcEpZ4P79emmpEdqU6CFjBCHOeImcjP3tlT_U%3D)| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f290deb06b2b41e9a95016b7930d0c8e&_e=Q4eSHT9HLqWWEzmjTNfmYXXTmYF-pFxKQAAfhMjr4yseYE545j_PE9Fhss-NxIPlC3ElLnw4bWKxjxUo78XxTfrYooVrPRQPnw-KKaLQJBG550RR5rKMojDkT_naz92roTCYUCOkggEtn82HL7ppH-AZ5EBKBZOtrnew4pfj4vrAPtZDCp-iWzhHb3XrWGoHGu2poHtHZKk4ihQ2UDdW5g%3D%3D)| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f290deb06b2b41e9a95016b7930d0c8e&_e=Q4eSHT9HLqWWEzmjTNfmYdyXE4TjJxGlIQYKhl5AzIC7-lg82QmIT_z47dw6R88NqFZdw68_D2kpjvhb5pC4T_0pbi7Atb6GjOrX8OkEQNgdyLoVGZ2YY8ZbLedtX9GvbMHUa0G3RAk8VwtcEsHQnULZboOn5tu_mC0pskvXBuA6S85NBuRdmZXn1QlfMucir0dsMSOmlUjV-8lOytEdaU_uv055d6PR8OooLkuDaUY%3D)

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: I’d be really grateful if you took the time to read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I’m hoping you’ll read this all the way through.

| |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. I wanted to take a few minutes today to share something personal with you, but it’s going to take a bit of explaining. **If you get to the end and still don’t understand my commitment to America, then I’m just appreciative that you took the time to read this in its entirety.**

I wanted to take some time to discuss my background so you understand where I’m coming from when I’m fighting for the American people.
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662278%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M%2fn97U0hmNyoPFB5nkZwnw&sysid=1 "Kevin as a baby with his dad")
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662279%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LO5jtqu5t8%2byKZNK2Sxx3A&sysid=1 "Kevin with his siblings in 1968")
---
_My dad and I, circa 1966._ | _My siblings, Shelly and Mark, and I, circa 1968._

I come from a working-class background. My grandparents were immigrants. My mom, Roberta, was a homemaker. My dad, Owen, was an assistant city fire chief. **They instilled a strong work ethic in me that I carry with me every day.**
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662270%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j0YQSyvDa6q03uh9gDkhvA&sysid=1 "Kevin working the counter at Kevin O's Deli & McCarthy's Yogurt.")
---
_Working the counter at Kevin O's Deli & McCarthy's Yogurt. (Sorry for the image quality, but at least you’ll know it’s authentic!)_

When I was 19, I ran my first business, Kevin O’s Deli, selling sandwiches out of the back of my uncle's yogurt shop. Eventually, I sold the deli to pay my way through college. It taught me a lot about personal responsibility, and **I quickly learned how overregulation by the government affects small businesses. **
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662271%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OzyCQjW9c8BgERwHk0M01Q&sysid=1 "Kevin speaking with a farmer on the campaign trail in 2010")
---
_Speaking with a farmer on the campaign trail in 2010._

After Kevin O’s Deli and my experience with government overreach, I decided it was time to make a change. I knew public service would be a positive way for me to channel my frustration as a former small business owner, while also helping others in similar situations. Little did I know that working in the California State Assembly would pave the way to holding one of the most prestigious roles in our country: _**Speaker of the House of Representatives.**_
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662272%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4z%2f1KAqlSONiQFuwnJS5wA&sysid=1 "Celebrating Republicans’ success in taking back the House in 2022.")
---
_Celebrating Republicans’ success in taking back the House in 2022_

This brings me to my main point: **my Commitment to America isn’t some political ploy - _it’s deeply personal._**

**As Speaker of the House, I promise to deliver on our commitment to America and the American people.

[If you support my efforts as Speaker, please chip in whatever you can afford - $5, $10, even $25 if you can - to help me continue this fight.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662273%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I3e5c4KLfa%2bP5W6fc%2bq9aw&sysid=1 "If you support my efforts
as Speaker, please chip in whatever you can afford – $5, $10, even $25 if
you can – to help me continue this fight.")**

| | [STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662274%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=11yMeSqqW%2fxs2lz9NBwTfg&sysid=1 "STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY")
---

If you’ve read this through to the end, thank you so much for your time. I hope you understand why our commitment to America is so important. I’m so grateful to have your support.

Thank you,

clean_body: I’m hoping you’ll read this all the way through. | | | | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. I wanted to take a few minutes today to share something personal with you, but it’s going to take a bit of explaining. If you get to the end and still don’t understand my commitment to America, then I’m just appreciative that you took the time to read this in its entirety. I wanted to take some time to discuss my background so you understand where I’m coming from when I’m fighting for the American people. | | "Kevin as a baby with his dad" | "Kevin with his siblings in 1968" My dad and I, circa 1966. | My siblings, Shelly and Mark, and I, circa 1968. I come from a working-class background. My grandparents were immigrants. My mom, Roberta, was a homemaker. My dad, Owen, was an assistant city fire chief. They instilled a strong work ethic in me that I carry with me every day. | "Kevin working the counter at Kevin O's Deli & McCarthy's Yogurt." Working the counter at Kevin O's Deli & McCarthy's Yogurt. (Sorry for the image quality, but at least you’ll know it’s authentic!) When I was 19, I ran my first business, Kevin O’s Deli, selling sandwiches out of the back of my uncle's yogurt shop. Eventually, I sold the deli to pay my way through college. It taught me a lot about personal responsibility, and I quickly learned how overregulation by the government affects small businesses. | "Kevin speaking with a farmer on the campaign trail in 2010" Speaking with a farmer on the campaign trail in 2010. After Kevin O’s Deli and my experience with government overreach, I decided it was time to make a change. I knew public service would be a positive way for me to channel my frustration as a former small business owner, while also helping others in similar situations. Little did I know that working in the California State Assembly would pave the way to holding one of the most prestigious roles in our country: Speaker of the House of Representatives. | "Celebrating Republicans’ success in taking back the House in 2022." Celebrating Republicans’ success in taking back the House in 2022 This brings me to my main point: my Commitment to America isn’t some political ploy - it’s deeply personal. As Speaker of the House, I promise to deliver on our commitment to America and the American people. "If you support my efforts as Speaker, please chip in whatever you can afford – $5, $10, even $25 if you can – to help me continue this fight." | | "STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY" If you’ve read this through to the end, thank you so much for your time. I hope you understand why our commitment to America is so important. I’m so grateful to have your support. Thank you, | "KOM Signature" Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy | | "DONATE NOW" | | Paid for by McCarthy for Congress PO Box 12667 Bakersfield, CA 93389 American Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Katie Porter
subject: Wall Street & our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Silicon Valley Bank
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=26867%2E3422442%2E3NI6wq)
Today marks thirteen years since the Dodd-Frank Act was enacted. This landmark piece of legislation helped regulate and reform Wall Street following the Great Recession.
Ever since, Wall Street has been working to reverse these consumer protections, and this year we’ve seen the consequences. When Trump was elected in 2016, a group of Senators pushed to allow medium-sized banks, **like Silicon Valley Bank,** to hold onto less liquid cash. I wasn’t yet in Congress, but as a consumer protection attorney, I sounded the alarm that this was a dangerous move that put people’s money at risk. **But in the end, Congress—in a bipartisan vote—caved to Wall Street and loosened our nation’s banking laws.**
Following the bank collapses of this year, Senator Elizabeth Warren and I introduced the Secure Viable Banking Act (get it, SVB), **to repeal that law and reign in Wall Street and Big Banks by reinstating guardrails that help prevent collapses like the ones we just saw.**
**Derek, I'm the only candidate in this race rejecting contributions from Wall Street executives.** That’s because I’m running to stand up to the big corporations and their lobbyists who have rigged the rules against working people. I’d be so honored to have you on our team so I can keep holding Big Banks accountable. [**Our average donation this month is $20—can you chip in $20 today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230721-1?amount=20&refcode=EMAJ21_1_WST_20230721_V1_F&refcode2=26867_3422442_3NI6wq&akid=26867%2E3422442%2E3NI6wq)
**[Donate $20 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230721-1?amount=20&refcode=EMAJ21_1_WST_20230721_V1_F&refcode2=26867_3422442_3NI6wq&akid=26867%2E3422442%2E3NI6wq)**
Thanks a ton!
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAJ21_1_WST_20230721_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=26867_3422442_3NI6wq&akid=26867%2E3422442%2E3NI6wq)**

Fundraising has really slowed down this month and right now, we’re not on track to hit our end-of-month goal. $1 may not seem like a lot to you — especially compared to the billionaire mega donors and shady super PACs Republicans have in their corner — but we have the power of the grassroots on our side. $1 from every single person reading this email will add up quickly, and give us the kind of momentum we need to elect more women and take back the House majority in 2024. We already know that the more our government looks like us, the more it works for us. We need more women in positions of leadership in order to make sure our voices are heard, and that we have a seat at the table. Otherwise, we’ll never make progress on codifying abortion access, paid family leave, closing the gender pay gap, and more. clean_body: | = Peter, In just a moment, I’m going to ask if you can spare $1 to help fund our efforts to elect more women into Congress. =, but here’s why it’s so important. Fundraising has really slowed down this month and right now, we’re not on track to hit our end-of-month goal. $1 may not seem like a lot to you — especially compared to the billionaire mega donors and shady super PACs Republicans have in their corner — but we have the power of the grassroots on our side. $1 from every single person reading this email will add up quickly, and give us the kind of momentum we need to elect more women and take back the House majority in 2024. We already know that the more our government looks like us, the more it works for us. We need more women in positions of leadership in order to make sure our voices are heard, and that we have a seat at the table. Otherwise, we’ll never make progress on codifying abortion access, paid family leave, closing the gender pay gap, and more. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your support, Katie HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Friend,

**We need you to know what's coming on this campaign.** The Democrats will use every resource at their disposal to stop Ron DeSantis from becoming the GOP nominee. He is the ONLY candidate who will defeat Joe Biden next November; the Left knows that the numbers don't lie. If our recent fundraising haul proved one thing, it's that Ron DeSantis is the biggest threat to the radical Left in this race. _Friend_ _, we raised more --in just SIX weeks--than a former President and a SITTING President. _**_They are afraid of us, and they have every reason to be._** _Our message is out._ _Our fundraising is up._ _Our candidate is second to none._ _Help us break more records in our next fundraising quarter:**[https://RonDeSantis.com/donate-today](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1a5fc01a1e56422a84ea14bf7c98b9d8&_e=N8TZCT34LksqSBktvcfhMdK5rrnqmEvNxgJx3XOPBBMogAebPCn9ZAo7G7FZUv1jZB1-e99eWPp9WHLiAjmRbNfyRE1gAq6L2u9Aeus8fjTe0z7Muc8quR8B_1WhxVvZemTUSgmncQOvyW68o0S7Xq38Mbw_PAikzatMZvL55SLVlulc2c8SxCGGoqj98FKiHwDlUIZ0hDOOg_CGMvj9sx433uoVo15vqcbjbkcOe4dHxiQpzWnk6IwQvAjc8FXl134UT2q1bN9Y0RHGsLvx6p2HKPz1XJgtD1Xd2Zvn4xBbcZGkH59IfU36FCKjyPjyC22i5Mb5SPJoJNmCg9c3yNh6wXVK-Tp_rdI5XC_gswBC7GJ1zPRUftu7cEVYadkjaSBjg0GK54LfNncrjDedPOM5-D44fg8vpeTV6zOUL951QoYbfJeHwJbAZq9vtA79dzqIEyETcklCNhJx4B7gug%3D%3D "https://RonDeSantis.com/donate-today")**_ We're going to be hit from every angle from Democrats and the legacy media; it's already starting to happen. From here on out, it's only going to get worse as we build momentum and become an even bigger threat to the woke-mind virus. Gov. DeSantis is no stranger to getting attacked. Megacorporations like Disney have attacked him, politicians have tried pressuring him into "waiting his turn," and the legacy media has attempted to spin any story out of context to convince you that there's something wrong with our campaign. It's the same playbook we've seen run time and time again when they're afraid of a leader who will shake up the system. **_Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for._** The stakes of this fight are far too high. To say this is one of the most important elections this nation has ever faced is an understatement. Our future is on the line. We will **never back down**. _**_**_[**_Chip in to support Ron DeSantis to be your next President_**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1a5fc01a1e56422a84ea14bf7c98b9d8&_e=N8TZCT34LksqSBktvcfhMdK5rrnqmEvNxgJx3XOPBBMogAebPCn9ZAo7G7FZUv1jZB1-e99eWPp9WHLiAjmRbNfyRE1gAq6L2u9Aeus8fjTe0z7Muc8quR8B_1WhxVvZemTUSgmncQOvyW68o0S7Xq38Mbw_PAikzatMZvL55SLVlulc2c8SxCGGoqj98FKiHwDlUIZ0hDOOg_CGMvj9sx433uoVo15vqcbjbkcOe4dHxiQpzWnk6IwQvAjc8FXl134UT2q1bN9Y0RHGsLvx6p2HKPz1XJgtD1Xd2Zvn4xBbcZGkH59IfU36FCKjyPjyo6kMuFNuE8VTjj9K_s9DGFyZnhz3QkIxee-fflEZO40h7nrB7-QUBxbPorVMjP4VOpFev_XhvuqLRGCkadkXI9c0xB1VFA2ZAoeLn4-yWPxPH682vm_-pNiPtr2K-fspWpElBuf70AKG6cRGT0h3JQ%3D%3D)_**_**_**.**

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
