Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

The Democrats will use every resource at their disposal to stop Ron DeSantis from becoming the GOP nominee. He is the ONLY candidate who will defeat Joe Biden next November; the Left knows that the numbers don't lie. If our recent fundraising haul proved one thing, it's that Ron DeSantis is the biggest threat to the radical Left in this race. Friend , we raised more --in just SIX weeks--than a former President and a SITTING President. They are afraid of us, and they have every reason to be. Our message is out. Our fundraising is up. Our candidate is second to none. Help us break more records in our next fundraising quarter: "" We're going to be hit from every angle from Democrats and the legacy media; it's already starting to happen. From here on out, it's only going to get worse as we build momentum and become an even bigger threat to the woke-mind virus. Gov. DeSantis is no stranger to getting attacked. Megacorporations like Disney have attacked him, politicians have tried pressuring him into "waiting his turn," and the legacy media has attempted to spin any story out of context to convince you that there's something wrong with our campaign. It's the same playbook we've seen run time and time again when they're afraid of a leader who will shake up the system. Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. The stakes of this fight are far too high. To say this is one of the most important elections this nation has ever faced is an understatement. Our future is on the line. http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW9krQ_DsN

THOUSANDS of Americans have already gotten their copy of The
College Scam -- have you?

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW9krQ_DsN

Fellow
Patriot,

THOUSANDS
of Americans have already gotten their copy of The College Scam
-- have you?

If not, I
want to send you your very own copy when you make a gift of ANY
AMOUNT to TPUSA today.

Yes --
ANY AMOUNT! Even a gift of $5 will help us cover the cost of
shipping.

Just
click here to get your copy!

The Left
is waging an all-out war on America's colleges and universities,
brainwashing an entire generation to hate our country and our
freedom -- and subsidizing their destructive work with YOUR TAX
DOLLARS.

Turning
Point USA is fighting back -- but we need your help.

That's
why I'm offering you this special thank-you gift when you make a
donation of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA.

We want
to get this important book into the hands of as many concerned
Americans as we can!

I've
spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the biggest and most
impactful pro-America student organization with 600,000+ student
activists in all 50 states. And at Turning Point USA, I've seen
firsthand how the College Cartel is brainwashing young people
with their toxic "woke" ideology.

But we're
not giving up. We're fighting back by exposing them in The
College Scam, and I want to send you a copy as a special
thank-you for your support.

Get Your
Copy

When you
read The College Scam, you'll learn:

- My
10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the
judge of whether or not it's a good investment for students OR
taxpayers

- The
real reasons that administrators and professors attack American
Greatness

- How the
government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation
into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

And
remember -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists.
Instead, it combines frontline experience from my eleven years
criss-crossing America to speak with students, extensive research
into the dirty secrets of higher education, and a prosecutor's
intensity to present my case against the College Cartel.

This book
has a phenomenal 4.7 out of five stars on Amazon, with glowing
reviews like:

"Charlie
Kirk does a great job of exposing the craziness on contemporary
college campuses. Even for those reasonably well informed about
this, he adds more valuable information." -- Susan

"Charlie
absolutely nails the problems of the system... Thanks!! Keep
doing what you are doing!!" -- Michal

And there
are hundreds more just like these from grassroots Americans who
are ready to fight back against this rigged, bloated, and broken
college system.

Are you
one of them? Are you ready to arm yourself with the knowledge and
the strategy that will help us dismantle the College Cartel?

Then
please -- let me send you a copy of The College Scam right now.
All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of any amount, even just
a few dollars, to Turning Point USA.

Get Your
Copy

When you
claim your copy, you get the best of both worlds: You'll get a
copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point
USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the
radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!

Join the
thousands of Americans who have already taken advantage of this
limited-time offer, and learn how you can join the fight against
the College Cartel today.

Claim
your copy of The College Scam and help us defend America's
future!

Thank you
for your support,

Charlie
Kirk
Founder &
CEO
Turning
Point USA

4940 East
Beverly Road
Phoenix,
Arizona 85044

Thanks to you, we doubled his number in 48 hours.
#
We’re really proud today, Derek.
On Tuesday, Tuberville pushed out a pretty weak story about how he found 5,000 Veterans who support his blockade of senior Military promotions.
We figured we could beat his number pretty easily, so we came to you on Wednesday to help.
And boy, did we beat him.
Thanks to you, we doubled his number in 48 hours. 10,000 Veterans responded — to our ads, to our emails, and to our texts.
He had months, and we beat him in two days.
There isn’t any other organization in progressive politics that can do something like that, and the only reason we can is because you have our backs.
So today, we just wanted to let you know how appreciative we are of you.
Thank you again,
The team at VoteVets
🇺🇸 Wait! Before you go. 🇺🇸
We’ve been in the eye of the storm ever since we took on Tuberville, and we’re taking the fight to him in a way that nobody else can do. With this signature fight, our TV ads, and our ads online, we’re helping our friends in the White House and the Senate a great deal.
But all of that has put a significant strain on our resources. So if you can, please: **[Consider chipping in $3 today to support our work.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/3042?c0=vv-c4-em-july23-situation.tlwgeU&refcode=em230721-1-15&t=1&akid=12750%2E3013755%2E4kA8sT)

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: ready to make history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
Friend,
I wanted you to hear this directly from me:
**I am officially launching my campaign for the US Senate.**
[**Before I get into the details, can you chip in $10, split with The Long Run, to become a donor of my Senate campaign? It’s going to take a huge team of grassroots supporters to make me the first Black woman to represent Delaware in the Senate, so please chip in:**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-lbr-split.1yl6wL&refcode=em230721-1-t1&t=1&akid=4669%2E196590%2EtEHzu4)
[BECOME A DONOR → ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-lbr-split.1yl6wL&refcode=em230721-1-t1&t=2&akid=4669%2E196590%2EtEHzu4)
When I think about being the first woman and first person of color to represent Delaware in Congress, I think about my great-great-great grandfather. In 1867, he signed a document that afforded him the right to vote.
Fast forward to 2017, when I was being sworn in to Congress for the first time, my sister, Thea, found the document. That document has come to represent the importance of expanding rights and representation. It’s my proof of where we come from and it’s my inspiration for where we need to go.
The historic nature of our campaign is not lost on me. My family and other families of color have come so far just to be fairly represented. All the way from being enslaved, to finally getting the right to vote, to being elected to represent the First State.
[**My team and I have set a goal to earn the support of 30,000 donors, and we’re counting on generous donors like you to help get there. Can you rush anything right now to my campaign and The Long Run so we can get the ball rolling on the race of a lifetime?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-lbr-split.1yl6wL&refcode=em230721-1-t1&t=3&akid=4669%2E196590%2EtEHzu4)
[BECOME A DONOR → ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-lbr-split.1yl6wL&refcode=em230721-1-t1&t=4&akid=4669%2E196590%2EtEHzu4)
I am all in for Delaware, folks. I’ve never been more ready to continue making history as a United States Senator.
Lisa Blunt Rochester
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-lbr-split.1yl6wL&refcode=em230721-1-t1&t=5&akid=4669%2E196590%2EtEHzu4)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=4669%2E196590%2EtEHzu4). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=7&akid=4669%2E196590%2EtEHzu4)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=8&refcode2=4669_196590_tEHzu4&akid=4669%2E196590%2EtEHzu4)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=9&akid=4669%2E196590%2EtEHzu4)

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: This week's congressional resolution
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Conflating criticism of the Israeli government and their human rights violations against the Palestinian people with antisemitism is wrong.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=368%2E791427%2E5nFVIZ)

Friends -
I wanted to reach out this morning to talk about my vote this week against H.Con.Res. 57, a congressional resolution designed by MAGA Republicans to target and shame my colleague Pramila Jayapal for comments she made about Israel for which she clarified and apologized.
Anyone who knows me knows that I explicitly and affirmatively reject xenophobia and antisemitism of any kind. Which is why I want to be perfectly clear:
**Conflating criticism of the Israeli government and their human rights violations against the Palestinian people with antisemitism is _wrong_.**
This is just the latest case of the right wing doing anything and everything — including wielding the very real problem of antisemitism in bad faith — to silence the voices of women of color who fight for justice.
It has happened repeatedly to me. It has happened repeatedly to Pramila. It has happened repeatedly to our friend Rashida Tlaib, too. Countless women around the world, particularly women of color, know this feeling.
Multiple human rights organizations — including Israel’s leading group B’Tselem, Human Rights Watch, and Amnesty International — have concluded that the Israeli government’s policies and actions meet the legal definition of apartheid. And while the term may be discomforting to some, what is far more discomforting is the Israeli government's repeated crimes against the people of Palestine.
I don't believe it's appropriate for Congress to be targeting the legal findings of human rights groups the way this sham resolution sought to do. And I believe the only way we can even begin to address human rights violations around the world is if we have the courage to call them what they are.
The simple fact is that we spend far too much time policing the language of Black and Brown women who speak out against oppression, and not enough time ending the oppression of Black and Brown people.
Enough is enough. As racism, sexism, antisemitism, Islamophobia, and hate in our country and around the globe are on the rise, we must come together in solidarity and defend one another from those who seek to control us with fear.
We cannot allow for the silencing of voices supporting Palestinian human rights. Our common humanity demands it.
I know that I can speak for my sisters in service when I say that none of us — no matter what our opponents throw our way — will ever give up in our movement's collective struggle for justice.
Thank you for being a part of our fight.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

* * *

Before you go...
**[Can you make a contribution — of $3 or any amount that makes sense to you — to stand with Ilhan Omar and send her back to Congress? Your grassroots support is so important to our campaign.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july23.iXCXH5&refcode=em230721-1-t1&t=2&akid=368%2E791427%2E5nFVIZ)**

name: Terri Sewell
subject: Friend, the path to a Republican majority runs through Alabama’s 7th — unless you can help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERRI SEWELL FOR CONGRESS
body:
Terri Sewell is the proud product of Alabama's rural Black Belt and has spent her life fighting for Alabama communities. From her time as one of the only black public finance lawyers in Alabama, when she delivered financing for new campus facilities at Alabama State University, Tuskegee University, and Stillman College, to her work as Congresswoman for Alabama's 7th District, Terri Sewell has delivered results every step of the way. If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/qa6EpYti9sZxc7xSlPAzcf-EZG7rrK2ROp4vkuPRtFs=/G6XllcKaYz33zRdsJNFnqokZgjLN-UaCngDW42D0d38=)
---

| |
---
**TL;DR for YOU**

Alabama's state legislature just adopted an illegal redistricting map that suppresses the Black vote in our state. We cannot let this stand.

[**Chip in $7 to fight back >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/qa6EpYti9sZxc7xSlPAzcf-EZG7rrK2ROp4vkuPRtFs=/1ar96l8eYRXhSUExcnbRAfib2qlCPIwbJfrvNXxY5K0=?amount=7&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230721_FR_ALMaps_WL_TerriSewell_na_na_FinalV)

| [CHIP IN $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ts-july?amount=7&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230721_FR_ALMaps_WL_TerriSewell_na_na_FinalV)
---

Friend, disappointed doesn't cover how I feel right now -- disgusted, angry, hurt, scared.

I know you must be feeling all of those emotions too...

**But here 's the deal:** _I will never stop fighting for the right to vote, and I will never stop fighting for fair representation for the communities in my district and across Alabama._

[**I need your help starting right now if I 'm going to fend off the impending Republican attacks on District 7. Can you chip in just $7 right now to help? **](https://act.myngp.com/el/qa6EpYti9sZxc7xSlPAzcf-EZG7rrK2ROp4vkuPRtFs=/1ar96l8eYRXhSUExcnbRAfib2qlCPIwbJfrvNXxY5K0=?amount=7&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230721_FR_ALMaps_WL_TerriSewell_na_na_FinalV)

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:
| [DONATE $5 NOW »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ts-july?amount=5&express_lane=true&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230721_FR_ALMaps_WL_TerriSewell_na_na_FinalV)
---

---

---
| [DONATE $50 NOW »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ts-july?amount=50&express_lane=true&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230721_FR_ALMaps_WL_TerriSewell_na_na_FinalV)

| [DONATE $100 NOW »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ts-july?amount=100&express_lane=true&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230721_FR_ALMaps_WL_TerriSewell_na_na_FinalV)
---
| [DONATE OTHER »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ts-july?amount=15&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230721_FR_ALMaps_WL_TerriSewell_na_na_FinalV)
---
All eyes are on Alabama right now. All eyes are on Alabama's 7th District -- the ONLY Black-majority district in our state.

I've been a voting rights champion for my entire career -- and that doesn't stop with this decision. We are going to appeal this decision with the courts and we are going to win.

[**But we all know Republicans won 't let this lie. They are going to be coming for my seat in 2024. And I HAVE to be ready to fight back. Rush a donation of just $7 right now to help protect my seat>>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/qa6EpYti9sZxc7xSlPAzcf-EZG7rrK2ROp4vkuPRtFs=/1ar96l8eYRXhSUExcnbRAfib2qlCPIwbJfrvNXxY5K0=?amount=7&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230721_FR_ALMaps_WL_TerriSewell_na_na_FinalV) | [DONATE->](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ts-july?amount=7&source=EM_NBI_TS_20230721_FR_ALMaps_WL_TerriSewell_na_na_FinalV)

Terri

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: We need Kevin in the House
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR BY
KEVIN LINCOLN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Please send this committed servant to fight for you and join our ranks in the House. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=2bf81912b73d4053abff9c73fda481fe&_t=jODZpDwPruCnWHbFVkM3_0aM22pBp40TLCM7hP8psAZlFrGLJbsYDWe5S9FLaWpXjMsre23dYFtNPIFj7ZtEigHuuoiPuGrhR59dKneIFwQ%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=2bf81912b73d4053abff9c73fda481fe&_t=jODZpDwPruCnWHbFVkM3_0aM22pBp40TLCM7hP8psAZlFrGLJbsYDWe5S9FLaWpXjMsre23dYFtNPIFj7ZtEigHuuoiPuGrhR59dKneIFwQ%3D)
---
Fellow conservative,

You already know **Kevin Lincoln** as the current Mayor of Stockton, California, a proud Marine Corps veteran, and a loving husband and father.

The grandson of immigrants, Kevin is the embodiment of the American Dream, and he’s dedicated his life to serving his country and his community.

That’s why I’m excited that Kevin has announced his campaign for California’s 9th Congressional District. [**Kevin Lincoln has my full endorsement and support, and I’m asking you to join me in backing him with a donation to help launch his campaign.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2bf81912b73d4053abff9c73fda481fe&_e=0McmMYzeKSjx1cqBHTewIDM89YWRU5onHscR9bTu7OziVnsqsuya2rMkYtds6ZF_jip1bFceIHsWevCUCmH-jQC3QsSFLJlX4JnQew8nTO3u300zTOVA54t57Rjpbeyo7NOZA6PAqxRMEn2c-cAfxANJEnaDHJs6sg2LGWKqaYk3cqKePnvyKrY1SjQ1OjD9iVNUwX_dbvWo_d6HFrry_AxCGe1XhREdQm5hwFL8pfJb1jRy0YusLJo1ly2amjBrOAOyFM12OR4e3jNh0ohCOppjy1-WtQRz_j7Xi95jvqt0TSmSneniSv_cDNffGidd-HIjeXwHNb-rlPr00w0ROCeR0AyJwFaTPib7j7rFdSDe2ka42Fdg34rIP6kAKHLTOrmKxLhZeyq6Pgk33pG0NA%3D%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2bf81912b73d4053abff9c73fda481fe&_e=0McmMYzeKSjx1cqBHTewIDM89YWRU5onHscR9bTu7OziVnsqsuya2rMkYtds6ZF_jip1bFceIHsWevCUCmH-jQC3QsSFLJlX4JnQew8nTO3u300zTOVA54t57Rjpbeyo7NOZA6PAqxRMEn2c-cAfxANJEnaDHJs6sg2LGWKqaYk3cqKePnvyKrY1SjQ1OjD9iVNUwX_dbvWo_d6HFrry_AxCGe1XhREdQm5hwFL8pfJb1jRy0YusLJo1ly2amjBrvJugMd8EwNbGd-AoCJ6lRWhvdah5KAegxaCricXZ9_frdtRTbhY4fu1O8hNA9QUgcK_YwZx7cJG_qGRAZ2z8k_RdaAbWmZAwfmawSU01PnkhvzB_TfUJy4Aq5naAL2XQkCiFfEFQItxSivqfQGEKkA%3D%3D)
Since Kevin became Mayor of Stockton, I’ve watched him focus on fostering business growth, supporting our police force, tackling crime, and addressing homelessness. His dedicated service and track record exemplify the kind of effective leadership we need more of in Washington.

California's 9th Congressional District needs Kevin Lincoln as their voice in Congress, and the American people need his leadership and values to get our country back on track.

[**Will you help send Kevin to join us in the fight in Congress by making a donation of $10, $25, or $50 to his campaign today?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2bf81912b73d4053abff9c73fda481fe&_e=0McmMYzeKSjx1cqBHTewIDM89YWRU5onHscR9bTu7OziVnsqsuya2rMkYtds6ZF_jip1bFceIHsWevCUCmH-jQC3QsSFLJlX4JnQew8nTO3u300zTOVA54t57Rjpbeyo7NOZA6PAqxRMEn2c-cAfxANJEnaDHJs6sg2LGWKqaYk3cqKePnvyKrY1SjQ1OjD9iVNUwX_dbvWo_d6HFrry_AxCGe1XhREdQm5hwFL8pfJb1jRy0YusLJo1ly2amjBrI6TmVbcz1WMcbqV5rdrcrbLzMA-de2q5RLAgdIOMtSRmfBU0qiQk0Tk8spvkwYOv59ehrAWUsZX0ENhOhpM1JAHLDlkvp7aJGujKp1KE5phrzegH_8w4yAvEAxYCbp-7J0tVsvNPB_SDrgxwvsk3PQ%3D%3D)

[ ** Send Kevin Lincoln to Congress ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2bf81912b73d4053abff9c73fda481fe&_e=0McmMYzeKSjx1cqBHTewIDM89YWRU5onHscR9bTu7OziVnsqsuya2rMkYtds6ZF_jip1bFceIHsWevCUCmH-jQC3QsSFLJlX4JnQew8nTO3u300zTOVA54t57Rjpbeyo7NOZA6PAqxRMEn2c-cAfxANJEnaDHJs6sg2LGWKqaYk3cqKePnvyKrY1SjQ1OjD9iVNUwX_dbvWo_d6HFrry_AxCGe1XhREdQm5hwFL8pfJb1jRy0YusLJo1ly2amjBrYb6kXG3ExkJZ_KBOuzL_tiz-lCmVghvHuTV4D7kAsjE1_czga8vyTC5VZ9MmYu889vsRwPglc64SpreCCsXPQr0WQiLTc7n0Lg52B41szufqgMRcDYdgFEeqr4KCDvea3yvmEUIXl--p5WTu9-TqLg%3D%3D)
Democrat Josh Harder has simply failed the people of this district, along with every other American, by supporting Biden’s disastrous economic policies and radical agenda. Together, Harder and Biden have signaled to struggling families that they care more about advancing wokeness than ensuring you can make ends meet or sleep safely at night.

The good news is **Harder is one of the most vulnerable Democrat incumbents in the entire nation in 2024** , and with your support, Kevin will be the one who will defeat him, flip this seat, and restore leadership to CA-9.

[**Your contribution now at the start of Kevin’s campaign will play a vital role in building the momentum he needs to win this race and make it to Congress**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2bf81912b73d4053abff9c73fda481fe&_e=0McmMYzeKSjx1cqBHTewIDM89YWRU5onHscR9bTu7OziVnsqsuya2rMkYtds6ZF_jip1bFceIHsWevCUCmH-jQC3QsSFLJlX4JnQew8nTO3u300zTOVA54t57Rjpbeyo7NOZA6PAqxRMEn2c-cAfxANJEnaDHJs6sg2LGWKqaYk3cqKePnvyKrY1SjQ1OjD9iVNUwX_dbvWo_d6HFrry_AxCGe1XhREdQm5hwFL8pfJb1jRy0YusLJo1ly2amjBr0CF5lTQJideNG2DIZsRAcA8MkeQIFteU6-hIWdEH0e9cBhKjkOSw93WYYb2XChNvJE9N-ng8Id2FKUmoti0DC1IcE45Of_puaPsn3fqj3g2ZaKSZoxpL_MaheiBPmnkhpoDYkDuGmi4hE4JNjg82qg%3D%3D), where he will champion our shared values of faith, family, country, and community.

| **Meet Kevin Lincoln
**
My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.

name: Deadline Approaching via Allred for TX
subject: defeating Ted Cruz is too important for us to come up short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, this race is simply too important for us to come up short. Ted Cruz is beatable, but we can’t fall short in July. So please, split a donation of $15 before midnight between my campaign and Serve America to help us flip TX blue! → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
FIRST , Colin Allred launched his campaign and shattered Texas fundraising records on day one!
THEN , experts at Inside Elections and the Cook Political Report upgraded our chances of flipping this seat, shifting Texas from a Solid Republican seat to a BATTLEGROUND .
NOW, a brand-new poll shows Colin is just 5 points behind Ted Cruz, and 14% of voters are still undecided!
It's crystal clear: Ted Cruz is the most vulnerable Republican senator, and we've got a real chance of flipping this seat – which would all but guarantee Democrats hold onto our critical Senate majority. Peter,

I was honored to be joined by Secretary of Transportation Pete Buttigieg at the Port Orchard Waterfront to discuss the progress we're making to secure crucial investments for our region.

Together, we secured a $9.4 million federal grant to replace the 48-year-old Port of Bremerton Breakwater!

**[Investing in our infrastructure is about more than a dollar amount — it's about investing in progress, our community, and economic opportunity. To sign on in support of this project, will you add your name now as a community endorser?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66840651/417738921/1223705591?ms=em23_230721_PBB_fnd_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em23_230721_PBB_fnd_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em23_230721_PBB_fnd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230721_PBB_fnd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=vpGj6h8FjWYgNjkTTcdhLsTeiguRTsHL6Mir4LE2zz7/jvWewxVUf9jc+Q5yISjeCNtX9J3YL1FNG21XJrnrnklaWjQR0LfpPgo4LH85Jhv7oFELOfLJFvI2YVgwjys/flvXlBWPQVsWv6Y0YJLIsQJnPBwrTmSirVv0tRqi+Tk=&refcode2=d5a6388b-ea27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDVhNjM4OGItZWEyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WcV8E9bn42F2RK0onJF49WZFsNmWk_VwsIlU6FJ6rso=&emci=169c6b6c-d227-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=d5a6388b-ea27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=3595835)**

Peter, the Port Orchard Marina is more than just a picturesque waterfront; it serves as a lifeline for our local economy, contributing a staggering **$10 million** annually.

But, the marina has been under threat due to the deteriorating condition of the existing breakwater. This crucial structure is now well beyond its intended lifespan and is currently damaged, placing the marina and surrounding areas at risk.

I could not be more proud to see this crucial investment secured, which will facilitate a **complete** replacement of the aging breakwater. It will also ensure that the marina is able to operate safely and efficiently for years to come.

**[By rebuilding our region's infrastructure, we can put people to work now and lay the foundation for economic growth over the long haul. Please join me and Secretary Buttigieg by signing on as a community endorser of this project.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66840652/417738922/1223705591?ms=em23_230721_PBB_fnd_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em23_230721_PBB_fnd_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em23_230721_PBB_fnd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230721_PBB_fnd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=vpGj6h8FjWYgNjkTTcdhLsTeiguRTsHL6Mir4LE2zz7/jvWewxVUf9jc+Q5yISjeCNtX9J3YL1FNG21XJrnrnklaWjQR0LfpPgo4LH85Jhv7oFELOfLJFvI2YVgwjys/flvXlBWPQVsWv6Y0YJLIsQJnPBwrTmSirVv0tRqi+Tk=&refcode2=d5a6388b-ea27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDVhNjM4OGItZWEyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WcV8E9bn42F2RK0onJF49WZFsNmWk_VwsIlU6FJ6rso=&emci=169c6b6c-d227-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=d5a6388b-ea27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=3595835)**

Peter, we’re saying this again because it’s critical that our team knows exactly what we’re up against – Mississippi’s current Attorney General isn’t just dangerous to our state, but to our entire country.

After ensuring that the federal right to abortion was ended, Mississippi’s AG is tripling down on her crusade against reproductive freedom. Most recently, she’s started using taxpayer dollars attempting to access folks’ private medical records to criminalize doctors and patients alike.

Peter, Mississippi has some of the highest rates of poverty in the nation. And instead of fighting to expand affordable healthcare access or prosecuting state officials who have stolen millions in taxpayer dollars meant for families in need, our AG’s priorities lie in attacking our rights and curbing our freedoms inside Mississippi and out.

Our families can’t wait any longer for change, Peter, and it’s up to us to put an end to our current AG’s assaults on Mississippians. [That means we need every person reading this email to chip in $5, $25, or whatever they can right now – can we count on you to step up and join us today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66840669/417738989/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_230721FMR_l2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWY5NmM1YjMtZWEyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sx1n2dmGASsXlJj2M7Nl7e0oU5_hrV6bc7nvTGCwyzY=)

clean_body: Mississippi’s AG is tripling down on her crusade against reproductive freedom in every zip code = | Greta Kemp Martin is running for Mississippi Attorney general against a dangerous, anti-choice opponent who led the charge to overturn Roe v. Wade , wants access to your private medical records, and continues to attack birth control access in every zip code. = = Peter, we’re saying this again because it’s critical that our team knows exactly what we’re up against – Mississippi’s current Attorney General isn’t just dangerous to our state, but to our entire country. After ensuring that the federal right to abortion was ended, Mississippi’s AG is tripling down on her crusade against reproductive freedom. Most recently, she’s started using taxpayer dollars attempting to access folks’ private medical records to criminalize doctors and patients alike. Peter, Mississippi has some of the highest rates of poverty in the nation. And instead of fighting to expand affordable healthcare access or prosecuting state officials who have stolen millions in taxpayer dollars meant for families in need, our AG’s priorities lie in attacking our rights and curbing our freedoms inside Mississippi and out. Our families can’t wait any longer for change, Peter, and it’s up to us to put an end to our current AG’s assaults on Mississippians. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = We can’t do this without you, Team Greta Greta Kemp Martin was born, raised, and educated in Mississippi. | | Peter, just when we thought things couldn’t get WORSE we found out none other than Kevin McCarthy is getting involved in the Alabama maps.

The Speaker of the House has been calling his GOP-friends in the state legislature asking them to support the map where the **Black population in the 2nd district is only 38.31% — which is pretty clearly NOT a majority... _like what the Supreme Court mandated_.**

The truth of it: National Republicans are scared. They know that they aren’t going to be able to suppress Black votes anymore, and if they can’t suppress votes, they’re at risk of losing their majority in the House.

[**We’re not backing down anytime soon, Peter. We need to DOUBLE DOWN on our efforts to mobilize voters in Black communities or we risk losing it all. _Begin Forwarded Message:_
Peter, have you been watching what’s happening in Alabama?
**BAD NEWS:** Alabama’s GOP majority redrew their maps and designed them to SILENCE Black voters.

**GOOD NEWS:** The Supreme Court ruled that the maps violated the _Voting Rights Ac_ _t_ and ordered them to be redrawn with a second majority-Black congressional district.

name: Zak Malamed
subject: I am running for Congress against George Santos
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is the most consequential congressional race this election cycle
#
**Hi, I am Zak Malamed — the Democrat running against George Santos.**
This email is going to be a little different than the others you receive because this race is _actually_ going to decide whether or not Democrats win back the House.
**To differentiate myself from the incumbent, I will also tell you the truth upfront:** I want your support ([you can donate here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230721?refcode=em20230721&amount=5&refcode2=328_8507_mzRcp2&akid=328%2E8507%2EmzRcp2)). Before you decide to contribute, though, you deserve to hear a little about me:
I am a third-generation resident of the district and attended Great Neck Public Schools from K-12. From an early age, my family instilled three principles in me: service, struggle, and sacrifice. My grandmother immigrated to New York to pursue the American dream. Both sets of grandparents struggled and sacrificed to provide opportunities for their kids. My father worked in the garment industry before it collapsed and he had to start over. My mother was an educator who turned into a caretaker when some of her closest friends fell ill to cancer, all while dealing with her own chronic health issues. These are the people who have taught me everything — how to work hard, to care for others, and to give back to the community that gave to you. I have spent the last four years defeating MAGA extremists across the country in some of the most competitive districts and states with my organization, The Next 50. Now, I am stepping up to run myself and defeat George Santos so we can restore integrity and pride in our district.
---
Winning this race is not just about unseating George Santos and restoring dignity to the office. As I mentioned earlier, the path to the House majority runs directly through this district. We know Kevin McCarthy and national Republicans will not give up without a fight.
We fully expect them to spend millions of dollars more than this district has ever received to hold on to this seat. **And that is why I need you****.**
[**Will you play a critical role in our campaign by chipping in to help me unseat George Santos?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230721?refcode=em20230721&amount=5&refcode2=328_8507_mzRcp2&akid=328%2E8507%2EmzRcp2)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230721?refcode=em20230721&amount=5&refcode2=328_8507_mzRcp2&akid=328%2E8507%2EmzRcp2)**
**New York’s 3rd is not the same district it was when I was growing up.** Home prices and rents are up. Local businesses struggle with inflation. Our neighbors feel more transience than security. Folks are rightfully angry and scared about the change.
It is that frustration and fear that carried George Santos — and MAGA Republicans like him — to victory across Queens and Long Island, as well as the rest of the country. But their extreme MAGA agenda is not the answer.
I have not given up on our government’s ability to adapt to the needs of a new generation — and meet the challenges of the moment. In Congress, I will be a Representative who prioritizes whatever work it takes to build **a politics of hope** , because I know exactly what it is like when fear takes hold.
**I am running because I want to give back to the community that gave so much to me and my family.** We can win because I know what it takes to run a competitive campaign and defeat MAGA extremists. I have done it in districts all across this country — and **I am the only candidate in the race who has experience defeating the MAGA madness.**
[**But we can only pull this off if we have strong grassroots support from the very start. If you believe in our campaign to unseat George Santos and flip this seat for Democrats, please chip in what you can now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230721?refcode=em20230721&amount=5&refcode2=328_8507_mzRcp2&akid=328%2E8507%2EmzRcp2)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230721?refcode=em20230721&amount=5&refcode2=328_8507_mzRcp2&akid=328%2E8507%2EmzRcp2)**
It means so much to me to have your support. I promise to fight hard to win this campaign for all of us.
With gratitude,
Zak Malamed
Candidate for NY-03
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230721?refcode=em20230721&amount=5&refcode2=328_8507_mzRcp2&akid=328%2E8507%2EmzRcp2)
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=328%2E8507%2EmzRcp2)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.zakforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=328%2E8507%2EmzRcp2)

To give by check:
Zak for Congress
PO Box 220421
Great Neck, NY 11022
Email us: [info@e.zakforcongress.com](mailto:info@e.zakforcongress.com)
PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: I can’t run this campaign without your input
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Team, I'm listening.
Hi team, this grassroots campaign isn’t just about me. It’s about this district; it’s about fighting for what’s right, and most importantly, **it’s about you.**

I’m running to serve the interests of working people, not big campaign donors. But to do that, I need to know what issues are at the top of your mind. In a perfect world, I’d be able to talk to each and every voter about the issues they care most about, but that’s just not possible. So, I’m reaching out the best way I know how: by coming to your inbox and asking what’s on your mind.

[**Will you take a quick minute to fill out our Summer 2023 Issues Survey? I'd love to hear your perspective on the issues you want me to focus on in Congress—whether it’s health care, our environment, reproductive rights, and anything else. I’m listening.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66841000/417740188/238343455?ms=em23_230721_Survey_esrv_gq_act___MJ_ettx&refcode=em23_230721_Survey_esrv_gq_act___MJ_ettx&source=em23_230721_Survey_esrv_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230721_Survey_esrv_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mondaire-jones&contactdata=HuN8ZPioX/TXice4JNsvCfEoljX1TWrLs7dHf2DrR4vOetplzhZUIxdggrvKikcM/FScJBvgFkInJoMYomrjDQDt/xYZC6L2eCHutdF0w08=&refcode2=ad0d1582-eb27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDBkMTU4Mi1lYjI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b5m0QQmxqv_KTerLEBfdOV3RjfnIcmNLd6FepIg6gI4=&emci=9adfc5d4-d727-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=ad0d1582-eb27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=24719896)

—Mondaire

Team — When we saw this, we were at a loss for words.
"Arizona Republican refers to Black Americans as 'colored people' in House floor debate"
“My amendment has nothing to do with whether or not colored people or Black people or anybody can serve,” said Crane, who is in his first term. “It has nothing to do with any of that stuff.”
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-crane [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-crane]
via Arizona's Family, KTVK 3TV and KPHO CBS 5
While speaking in support of an amendment to the National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA) to limit efforts to diversify our armed forces, Crane referred to Black servicemembers as “colored people,” and in an instant transported the Congressional floor back to 1963. Friend, we can unseat bigots like Eli in 2024, but it’ll take investment TODAY to mobilize communities in every corner of Arizona.
Will you pitch in $15 monthly starting today through Election Day to help fight against bigotry, take back the House, and re-elect President Joe Biden? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-crane?recurring=true&amount=15]

PITCH IN ANOTHER AMOUNT MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-crane?recurring=true]
In 2022, the GOP used their deep pockets to flip Arizona’s 2nd District and elect Eli, and since then he’s walked in lockstep with MAGA Republicans to enact their extremist and partisan agenda. This racist blunder is only the latest in a long list of despicable actions we’ve had to endure during his tenure.
If we can mobilize 25,000 more voters in Arizona’s 2nd District in 2024, we can flip it back to blue and take back the House. But we’ll need your help today to get there. Can we count on you to pitch in $15 monthly to help us flip this District blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-crane?recurring=true&amount=15]
Thanks, team, we appreciate your support.
Arizona Dems

subject: Startling Revelations Await! 🚀
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress** [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=59f506d2575e444dbc5c204845101c7c&_e=5MxvHdso2Kz6ZMscbFHl52AFwugIu4hbwbanBdk4fFcTcp4CrDiGClvAHow34QN0GpaHU4BMFKJmxJ6sYV_5m89-tRAat7gsVC9-D6wYZUF9tg5NoX8mfLOxySNciQrsBEg2FRd0nLN7zu34fAqrDPpgubrZSNLZ25wpC7IJlty4HNBfEjWA_yxpNbT218US7soI90mv0zORzkuMK6DhnEEVt88fW1NkIiipdSz-U3YfMhJ1QPmkbY2lRPvAfGNWmjZ5UG7DgtgnOuFA-qshdA6dgLwfNi5GGWTegAltsx39Cq0I8OLFZtLAUCtR6wVO3w1D8pQIUTg24ZQG2m08qQ%3D%3D)
---
| | |
---
| | **The Truth Is Landing 🛸**
---
---
| | I reckon you might feel like you've heard enough of this topic, but believe me, we're _finally_ on the cusp of discovering the dadgum truth about unidentified aerial phenomena (UAPs) or, as I like to call them, unidentified flying objects (UFOs). As you may know, the House Oversight Committee, led by yours truly and my esteemed colleague Rep. Anna Paulina Luna, will hold a [groundbreaking hearing](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=59f506d2575e444dbc5c204845101c7c&_e=5MxvHdso2Kz6ZMscbFHl56Juf6FSQiktzR_GRa9gSlEGsNLorybd9y_bp4-JqZS_0o1ZzOle34v6p3WZS699TBjzkgkVhPkQQI-NvgsJrP8PyC22ai1h7vM4MQH0bPnkAVs0WscST0scBLgACR57sJDNcKDWK-vgCnKrd3r54lKZJCEH_me3mFNTeii8FBy0AmzYbIMJ5MW1fZYOexf6U7DnsnEydTdOpIjh19xujFglVfVnz274IuFkKCc-3VbJl0LHp_MexF2nDX2YkrPvDUhjV1PY1JieLabnVVufkQo%3D) on UAPs next week. This hearing will be [unlike any other.](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=59f506d2575e444dbc5c204845101c7c&_e=5MxvHdso2Kz6ZMscbFHl58z2SzRddvc1NHbbJbfxN14R1v_RiYVCnJCeL9CwF7ey7unBCKvSnsHAXhyDQ6rAJfPA2dNdrGXpF7g_-I33Lgn2C6TyvtUJwwX9U2Fs8bLm3zhTto_1xhI-HmcZ2dCW3S1B4qKkM46KJ5pA8b7aamrbZ02g-YlU7wgRkUDEO_p6W-SF4nkLgtLkwYPBzfZ6d7ohs4lNUG1PNSppiU6wCLZL7mnhIJyX_CLPyTiAm-tnMXkHB-MCzhVOW3RlRfnSlHxh9gD16FDSR9KXO0M6ZiE%3D) We've gathered witnesses who will speak honestly about their experiences, giving the public a chance to understand this realm's mystery better. Of course, we've faced major pushback from those who prefer to keep this hush-hush. We even paid [a visit to a Florida Air Force base](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=59f506d2575e444dbc5c204845101c7c&_e=5MxvHdso2Kz6ZMscbFHl5zrFxUUJnhxY8kH26iiYQEB8yf82bX4gRh7e7HMT78SNGw5xeNQxywapGLWhmA0-CqG9zCh4aRkauEJecB_McQaI5_FkZKh2-F7mEKqN69S_cNzJQAaj1bHqZ4p5CykdcRbrbtXx02Q777WcDKATX4bFrsKulmpVcXymjFYrC090NVbAAy9Dr_UL8HCRmeJ5GgX7EjAwi0hVwGBcPSiKdjSt_S8MtA-rYESEAxy3i-v1OJQPJHxepEbgZ209XoRSXHhrjD2DkSGNqVUrWWsJeL4%3D) to talk to pilots who had UAP sightings, only to have the Pentagon try to throw us off. But if you know me, you know that isn’t going to stop me from fighting for the facts. That’s why I encourage you to mark your calendars for July 26 to hear testimony from Air Force veteran David Grusch and former Navy commander David Fravor, among others. name: Ro Khanna
subject: I need your help to send this progressive fighter to Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

I'm writing to ask for your support for a progressive champion in a race that I believe is the most important progressive pickup opportunity of the year.

Aaron Regunberg is a longtime community organizer, state legislator, and climate lawyer who has spent his career fighting for Medicare for All, taking on Big Oil, and standing up for working people. He's running in a special Congressional election in Rhode Island this September.

Will you join me in making a contribution to support his campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aaron-regunberg-split]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aaron-regunberg-split]

Because this is a special election, the results of this race are going to set the tone for the coming year. A big progressive win here will give us momentum as we head into 2024 and work to elect Democrats who are willing to stand up to corporate power. And Aaron Regunberg is the progressive champion in this race.

As a state legislator, Aaron led the passage of paid sick days, raised wages, created new renewable energy programs, reformed solitary confinement, and began the fight to pass state-level single-payer legislation. And as a longtime climate activist and lawyer, he helped block the construction of fossil fuel power plants and supported court cases to hold companies like Exxon and Chevron accountable for their decades of climate fraud and deception. He's exactly the kind of fighter we need more of in Congress.

That's why I'm all in on this race. And I'm asking you to join me. Will you split a contribution today between our campaigns to help make sure Aaron gets elected this September? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aaron-regunberg-split]

$3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aaron-regunberg-split?amount=3] $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aaron-regunberg-split?amount=10]
$25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aaron-regunberg-split?amount=25] $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aaron-regunberg-split?amount=50]
$100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aaron-regunberg-split?amount=100] $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aaron-regunberg-split?amount=250]
Or, Donate Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aaron-regunberg-split]

This is how we build our movement. Thank you for all you do.

Gratefully yours,
Ro

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aaron-regunberg-split]

https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com] https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA [https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA] https://twitter.com/RoKhanna [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna] info@rokhanna.com [info@rokhanna.com]

Ro for Congress

Santa Clara, CA 95051

name: Add your name (via Left Action)
subject: Trump and his lawyers are trying to push his trial date beyond the election. Sign to demand "no more delays!"
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Add your name: No more delays in the Trump documents trial!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td3dd2bb4-05f9-4969-ac48-fc13262c66c3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T345a559e-03d7-4249-a706-7081c1c15e43/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Judge Aileen Cannon has set a date of May 20th, 2024 for the Trump documents trial to begin. This is more than 5 months later than the mid-December 2023 date requested by the special counsel, which is outrageous, given the importance of this trial. Worse yet, the schedule includes a range of preliminary steps that could give Trump and his lawyers the ability to further delay this beyond the 2024 election. [**Add your name, and join us in demanding "No more delays in the Trump documents trial!"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a40d9b7-da18-4f51-9c74-ee2fab8309f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Trump and his lawyers are trying to push the trial back beyond the election, so that if Trump wins, he can pardon himself, and avoid punishment altogether for his crimes. We can't let that happen. Send a message to Judge Cannon, and demand that the Trump trial take place as soon as possible. Then spread the word, and help us build support. **Public pressure makes a difference, and may well have kept the judge from pushing out the start date beyond 2024 already. W****e need to ratchet it up as much as possible.** [**Add your name, and join us in demanding "No more delays in the Trump documents trial!"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta2c4505d-263b-4d95-ba89-3e88055a9eff/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---

name: Asa Hutchinson
subject: Trump encourages this type of juvenile behavior...
body:
Help us bring decency back to America!

| | | | | [](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/9QFz4ADfEXPuWAmkbykEnQ~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRmnUkMP0UgYzQ1NGYyMTY4NDkzNzRlNzQ5YTkwZmRhZjIxNmMzZWFE2Wh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vYXNhLWZvci1hbWVyaWNhLWluYy9oZWxwLWFzYS1icmluZy1iYWNrLWRlY2VuY3k_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1lbWFpbG9jdG9wdXMmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249SGVscCUyMEJyaW5nJTIwRGVjZW5jeSUyMEJhY2slMjB0byUyMEFtZXJpY2ElMjAtJTIwQXNhJTIwMjAyNCUyMEhvdXNlJTIwRmlsZSUyME5vbm9wZW5lcnNXBXNwY2V1QgpktwzEumT39PSMUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABT7w~~)
---
| | Friend,

**What happened to decency in our country?** What happened to respect for different points of view? You may have seen that last weekend at the Turning Point Conference, while the students tried to listen, I was booed by the adult crowd of Pro-Trump supporters.

They acted like an out-of-control mob and wanted to shut down my speech before I could even offer my vision to bring out the best in America. **When Republicans act like this we are no better than radical liberal Democrats who protest conservative speaking at Universities.**

A real leader would push back on his supporters to at least act with dignity and respect but **Trump vocally encourages this type of outrageous behavior. **

If you think we need to bring decency back to our country, [**support our campaign for President with a contribution**.](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/9QFz4ADfEXPuWAmkbykEnQ~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRmnUkMP0UgYzQ1NGYyMTY4NDkzNzRlNzQ5YTkwZmRhZjIxNmMzZWFE2Wh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vYXNhLWZvci1hbWVyaWNhLWluYy9oZWxwLWFzYS1icmluZy1iYWNrLWRlY2VuY3k_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1lbWFpbG9jdG9wdXMmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249SGVscCUyMEJyaW5nJTIwRGVjZW5jeSUyMEJhY2slMjB0byUyMEFtZXJpY2ElMjAtJTIwQXNhJTIwMjAyNCUyMEhvdXNlJTIwRmlsZSUyME5vbm9wZW5lcnNXBXNwY2V1QgpktwzEumT39PSMUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABT7w~~) America deserves a real leader who will stand up to Trump's juvenvile behavior.

Our campaign still needs more individual donors to make the debate stage. Please contribute any amount right now and help us bring back decency to America!

[_**Donate $25 **_**_right now!_**](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/9QFz4ADfEXPuWAmkbykEnQ~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRmnUkMP0UgYzQ1NGYyMTY4NDkzNzRlNzQ5YTkwZmRhZjIxNmMzZWFE2Wh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vYXNhLWZvci1hbWVyaWNhLWluYy9oZWxwLWFzYS1icmluZy1iYWNrLWRlY2VuY3k_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1lbWFpbG9jdG9wdXMmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249SGVscCUyMEJyaW5nJTIwRGVjZW5jeSUyMEJhY2slMjB0byUyMEFtZXJpY2ElMjAtJTIwQXNhJTIwMjAyNCUyMEhvdXNlJTIwRmlsZSUyME5vbm9wZW5lcnNXBXNwY2V1QgpktwzEumT39PSMUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABT7w~~)

clean_body: Help us bring decency back to America! | | | | | ~~ | | Friend, What happened to decency in our country? What happened to respect for different points of view? You may have seen that last weekend at the Turning Point Conference, while the students tried to listen, I was booed by the adult crowd of Pro-Trump supporters. They acted like an out-of-control mob and wanted to shut down my speech before I could even offer my vision to bring out the best in America. When Republicans act like this we are no better than radical liberal Democrats who protest conservative speaking at Universities. A real leader would push back on his supporters to at least act with dignity and respect but Trump vocally encourages this type of outrageous behavior. If you think we need to bring decency back to our country, ~~ America deserves a real leader who will stand up to Trump's juvenvile behavior. Our campaign still needs more individual donors to make the debate stage. Please contribute any amount right now and help us bring back decency to America! ~~ ~~ | ~~ "Help Bring Back Decency to America!" Thank you for your support! I know that together we can bring back decency to America. Warmest Regards, Asa Hutchinson | ~~ "DONATE $10" | ~~ "DONATE $25" | ~~ "DONATE ANY AMOUNT" | ~ "Shop for Official Team Asa for America Merchandise" | | ~~ | ~ | | ~~ | ~ ---|---|---|---|--- ~~ ~~ 3511 SE J Street #311, Bentonville, Arkansas, 72712, United States of America ~~

| Mitch McConnell and Republicans are busy recruiting wealthy candidates to take on Tammy.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=649%2E35263%2EiA7k9g)
This race is shaping up to be Tammy’s most competitive one yet, Peter — so here’s a look at what we’re up against. **FIRST:** Anti-abortion Republican Eric Hovde floated that he would be willing to drop **_$20 million_** of his own personal fortune to defeat Tammy. **THEN:** We learned that another wealthy self-funder is considering jumping into this race to run against Tammy _(just what the GOP wants — someone with deep pockets to make up for what their extreme agenda lacks in grassroots support)._ **NOW:** While Mitch McConnell and Republicans are busy recruiting wealthy candidates to take on Tammy and other Senate Democrats, we're counting on grassroots donors like you to fight back. * * *
Peter - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Peter, are you with me?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=cddcf5a281bc42758a1cd3bd7dc04b01&_e=DpL3S5FJYZskQA90q5qIromuaiTM0bh2nH-XnTYS6mg1yCz9GBLk_m22XBjtE8GKb61ddl2aym0kIPOTF6bjIlqCqn_JxN-b3FqvliT26WLzYZdtf6PIDhH5krhds93CTPt1kteInbciC89vEYgdUf9qU3kuQxWqu6j40sw3Nk3emt_yeho-hPoxWbrsIevAj8IqeciuNynzEBDt6Dcj_qMiL4aSgi8niT6j5AftcLU_6w-omnZGU3249YRUM-Grb1Rd9hANPs2x30jxLZQzLOrRYc_pJaHcATJNWmzVRRJplUgI8hOyFB_Ll9O6CQFCjuPUeF5wfU1Dcre4YMQoF7CtvbUH9pDABcR8p3qOhPUNGBc-Xhg6hQsTnOeAMTWy1rwsNjrClHEcqWPEA_fBpw%3D%3D)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=cddcf5a281bc42758a1cd3bd7dc04b01&_e=DpL3S5FJYZskQA90q5qIromuaiTM0bh2nH-XnTYS6mg1yCz9GBLk_m22XBjtE8GKb61ddl2aym0kIPOTF6bjIlqCqn_JxN-b3FqvliT26WLzYZdtf6PIDhH5krhds93CTPt1kteInbciC89vEYgdUf9qU3kuQxWqu6j40sw3Nk3emt_yeho-hPoxWbrsIevAj8IqeciuNynzEBDt6Dcj_qMiL4aSgi8niT6j5AftcLU_6w-omnZGU3249YRUM-GrU5eMoO7Y7ShT-cHNxOeRkmJle189o6AI3Y3hNB6mw1raikpdcLcOeBLbfA2ldCzu9KJTeFdeJylOe40He5PgYKjQbxEewBE3vS3zhW7bHBsqm3I9lSO33qBUcL21FVht2Z3k84Uw10GrAG7fUqn5ww%3D%3D)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=cddcf5a281bc42758a1cd3bd7dc04b01&_e=DpL3S5FJYZskQA90q5qIromuaiTM0bh2nH-XnTYS6mg1yCz9GBLk_m22XBjtE8GKb61ddl2aym0kIPOTF6bjIlqCqn_JxN-b3FqvliT26WLzYZdtf6PIDhH5krhds93CTPt1kteInbciC89vEYgdUf9qU3kuQxWqu6j40sw3Nk3emt_yeho-hPoxWbrsIevAj8IqeciuNynzEBDt6Dcj_qMiL4aSgi8niT6j5AftcLU_6w-omnZGU3249YRUM-GrbX1AvYI_HITThPEvY9bKvkXDa1u8wROTS8Qr86V-9pZBQqiHmqnR-61_znXjic_EyuALsL_03okueX7AyQv2TYo0TzaqtS1n_NXexAKMniXnE0BGKEfTRKk1mEu4Tyup4O04f4P40Y0695-emkF9hw%3D%3D)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling. | | BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND Vivek Ramaswamy - 12% Ron DeSantis - 12% Peter - people are waking up. People are hungry for a cause. People want to hear COLD HARD TRUTHS. People are ready for a REVOLUTION. I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina. But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington. I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU. With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement. I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today. But this gives me hope for our future. We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. That's what makes America itself. name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: 2,000 backpacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Help us get the school year started off right for kids in our community.
#
Last year, we gave out 1,015 backpacks to kids in our community who didn’t have one as they headed back to school. **This year, we want to double that number.**
[Will you chip in $8 today to help us send 2,000 students to school with a new backpack and school supplies this year?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230721-backpacks.55lCeA&refcode=em20230721-4675-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4675%2E2526796%2EYzCGg7)
**[Contribute🎒✏️📗](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230721-backpacks.55lCeA&refcode=em20230721-4675-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4675%2E2526796%2EYzCGg7)**
****
This is Alexandria’s fifth back-to-school drive, and in that time we’ve teamed up with NYC public housing developments, community organizations, houses of worship, food pantries and local elected officials to **give thousands of kids a strong start to the school year with pencils, pens, crayons, erasers, notebooks, rulers, and a backpack.**
Many of the organizations we partner with to distribute school supplies — such as Make The Road NY, the Street Vendors Project, and NICE — focus on uplifting our most vulnerable communities, including immigrants new to the U.S.
We’ve run the numbers, and $8 - $10 means a child without school supplies can start the year with their head held high.
[Can you chip in today to help us make that happen?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230721-backpacks.55lCeA&refcode=em20230721-4675-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4675%2E2526796%2EYzCGg7)
**[Help us start the school year off right →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230721-backpacks.55lCeA&refcode=em20230721-4675-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4675%2E2526796%2EYzCGg7)**
With deepest thanks,
Team AOC
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/20349?t=23&akid=4675%2E2526796%2EYzCGg7)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230721-backpacks?refcode=em20230721-4675-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=24&refcode2=4675_2526796_YzCGg7&akid=4675%2E2526796%2EYzCGg7)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230721-4675-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=25&akid=4675%2E2526796%2EYzCGg7)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=4675%2E2526796%2EYzCGg7) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=4675%2E2526796%2EYzCGg7) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=4675%2E2526796%2EYzCGg7)
---|---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ba51264c64c445e4ae66109624c8927e&_e=-dB-cXGDJ3T-pUqq6ne3AjInUix37aSnL87XBi2f4aSVmpZzwfhH-nmC3MxlDAxcf1bEV7Uj3f3FLe6y_Mcq256Rh7iVF67WZsaTzs3OoovuDqhsOyLwVpig_CdYv2UhSEggR_Cy0avwnh1nSiNJxFJiVqbIx7sRDjJsVjUaKpqlmY3S8lIL_oQU1KY9d4ooOkGBqOc5Dznuty1cXzW83_-hgbYZkDkTBkMWXj4ZZHo1WzMlhiIQMKtm30qy5tbuHbrLLWoMi7_-_9k5AEJGXw%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ba51264c64c445e4ae66109624c8927e&_e=-dB-cXGDJ3T-pUqq6ne3AjInUix37aSnL87XBi2f4aSVmpZzwfhH-nmC3MxlDAxcf1bEV7Uj3f3FLe6y_Mcq256Rh7iVF67WZsaTzs3OoovuDqhsOyLwVpig_CdYv2UhnMqSO6VMDNcuKajUTiW2ta1CxpXJNFvbHEnt0fBsUP5w5LoOsiCVSnBqxqh3irnxGHjpYp7b7rk2LShrBv6D0t7jhlGipPyS0_W_gHjzWwhE4ZEz71KwvOTgYyjHyayHTds-iwD5y-FZk98oHLEj1Q%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ba51264c64c445e4ae66109624c8927e&_e=-dB-cXGDJ3T-pUqq6ne3AjInUix37aSnL87XBi2f4aSVmpZzwfhH-nmC3MxlDAxcf1bEV7Uj3f3FLe6y_Mcq256Rh7iVF67WZsaTzs3OoovuDqhsOyLwVpig_CdYv2UhqEyujgy3FjTbV6nhC9DKUSlSxuQWX3W2-xciywo_M2G4527f_R5gL1Fvc2iLfmOzHMj0vYiShjN960rjKOAfxtdu-aH_33v3KYIDFt9p___UDLBOtNcg3LoiC7aR3Z1wK8bww8Tf4Gn6aWC5zsCimA%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ba51264c64c445e4ae66109624c8927e&_e=-dB-cXGDJ3T-pUqq6ne3AjInUix37aSnL87XBi2f4aSVmpZzwfhH-nmC3MxlDAxcf1bEV7Uj3f3FLe6y_Mcq256Rh7iVF67WZsaTzs3OoovuDqhsOyLwVpig_CdYv2UhMBz1j7pSUidJsZNqGgWCdBwiGdJuFjZYhbSSt662NCw6PCc8BiwVg-4j06iV6M5TnE7SwpPgGZ_FyNOoZurLHLFMw1uBe3LtkkqX9CdHPxqT1EIX2afzZsNyLQCd3aaafoLQU01OPfHjv2jULXEzmA%3D%3D)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ba51264c64c445e4ae66109624c8927e&_e=-dB-cXGDJ3T-pUqq6ne3AjInUix37aSnL87XBi2f4aSVmpZzwfhH-nmC3MxlDAxcf1bEV7Uj3f3FLe6y_Mcq256Rh7iVF67WZsaTzs3OoovuDqhsOyLwVpig_CdYv2Uh7pYewOjuNIli77bo1fzkwemVPeL0SNXGfiHTqqjuH0JplMx3D_Tw75pKBSvm4RxOgBH-QNL8HX4I3Fgmp6FqGBb3QNRqHNf1NprAvi_LIjvhulXXQVf3VjoEyi4BxE-ZagsOCQAvXQ6hv5JRnWzsUg%3D%3D)

clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

One of the biggest challenges we’re facing right now is a workforce shortage. Pennsylvania’s minimum wage is lower than dozens of other states, so we can’t compete when other states offer to pay workers more.
And Pennsylvania’s workers should have to travel out of state to make a decent wage to support their families.
That’s why Josh Shapiro is fighting to finally give Pennsylvania’s workers a raise and increase the minimum wage to $15 an hour, and Derek, we hope you’ll join us.

subject: Can you spare $3.50 for gas?

body:
At more than 113,000 square miles, I have a lot of ground to cover as I work to meet every Republican that I can
[Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=82423956c4b74665a6ece5dffb19068d&_t=MgdXFnEE_padXbPhnftv9RaKBIthGeYKi4x1N9ORhf8Rbe6XNBidWZdG40CaZCL3Tpj2tO_PY7TGKc35-AlwVWGmMrtkzaTxnW9G6avpSe8%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=82423956c4b74665a6ece5dffb19068d&_t=MgdXFnEE_padXbPhnftv9RaKBIthGeYKi4x1N9ORhf8Rbe6XNBidWZdG40CaZCL3Tpj2tO_PY7TGKc35-AlwVWGmMrtkzaTxnW9G6avpSe8%3D)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=82423956c4b74665a6ece5dffb19068d&_e=ePVvG35lcoi7aIxBobmsSIeyqdJDhDghKXgAcjVZxMAvgWYFjwm6dcFmvNHsieqUTuspab8uIU2V-DsxCiINSdy43nt9RW098kkYNGRYcqWt6JGl5EoAPb_c4l7UlcWeC1qJpGY6M5FsztR9wJq4OBaNofCyC3Cei8twIWNm6F5H_ZtbjB8i50-FJgLbiqmMlNWshWX5FZ-oXQc0p3r0NeaGhCAiHZJtGF3REqTrWrHuHf3i0Z2DrYVqX_q3T_juZuNXRvVuYGUosZBaHVr-1II718SA7sX224HM441gptjNNwx2Vw40pPiIxVpIKI21Y2LaHhIYlyXLGQ6vXaihfHtjROh1Kh-p-eKlOj_KvzGQMiAEiNB3d7SzVTCugUOA5PuYsUe2jWKe2zjaSt4O5g%3D%3D)
|

Peter,

As the Sheriff in Pinal county, I found the best way to understand the needs of my community is to be actively involved and interacting with the people I serve.

While I am well-known in my home of Pinal County, **Arizona's significant size, encompassing over 113,000 square miles and a population of more than 7.2 million people,** requires a concerted effort to connect with potential voters.

With such a vast territory and nearly 4.9 million potential voters, it's clear that **I have a substantial task ahead of me** , but the people of Arizona deserve the opportunity to understand exactly who they are sending to represent them in Washington.

**Arizona Deserves Better**
1. Our border is still out of control and needs to be secured

2. Families are suffering from inflation, significantly impacting the cost of living

3. Our elected officials need to be held accountable for policies good and bad

However, connecting with these potential voters, as I have found, doesn't come cheap**;** and given that I drive a Ford F-350, my campaign is spending a lot of money on gas. It's absolutely worth the incurred expense, **with that said, each time I fill up it costs my campaign more than $120!**

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=82423956c4b74665a6ece5dffb19068d&_e=ePVvG35lcoi7aIxBobmsSIeyqdJDhDghKXgAcjVZxMAvgWYFjwm6dcFmvNHsieqUTuspab8uIU2V-DsxCiINSdy43nt9RW098kkYNGRYcqWt6JGl5EoAPb_c4l7UlcWeC1qJpGY6M5FsztR9wJq4OBaNofCyC3Cei8twIWNm6F5H_ZtbjB8i50-FJgLbiqmMlNWshWX5FZ-oXQc0p3r0NeaGhCAiHZJtGF3REqTrWrHuHf3i0Z2DrYVqX_q3T_juMiJKtHC22jBknoJm9q_JaGf8oIXD9GgSqPy-ndzHsTo8dJNiFYDr4q08wHULYS7MDAyphbUG8cjsB95SL2148nU2nsOI-If1jSXT_qrvDb1Les_68yw9NmAlHpAP0o8BDODkjyyFH35UXX_gtQa_ng%3D%3D)
Given that I go through a tank of gas a day, **driving around the state contacting voters costs more than $3,700 per month.** **

The average cost for a regular gallon of gas still costs $3.79, ranking Arizona in the 10 most expensive State averages. This is unacceptable and Arizona deserves better!**

I never assume anyone’s ability to make a financial contribution, but if you are able to contribute, even a modest amount, it would be immensely appreciated. **[For instance, a donation as small as $3.50, just about the average cost of a gallon of gas in Arizona, would make a difference.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=82423956c4b74665a6ece5dffb19068d&_e=ePVvG35lcoi7aIxBobmsSIeyqdJDhDghKXgAcjVZxMAvgWYFjwm6dcFmvNHsieqUTuspab8uIU2V-DsxCiINSdy43nt9RW098kkYNGRYcqWt6JGl5EoAPb_c4l7UlcWeC1qJpGY6M5FsztR9wJq4OBaNofCyC3Cei8twIWNm6F5H_ZtbjB8i50-FJgLbiqmMlNWshWX5FZ-oXQc0p3r0NeaGhCAiHZJtGF3REqTrWrHuHf3i0Z2DrYVqX_q3T_ju3W_Ur-5Z-pHHMxaGTGiZReW0M3zkHo70X05R6IUzHshPJHkXArV4t9zEXxyNOOUU0a0aLQm_dHs-FwpW6i9UWyo69Cnn03VTNYV19raPIeReWPABDGkqPmfoIJe-KenS_NollqBsKlLEJtQdcmTt7A%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=82423956c4b74665a6ece5dffb19068d&_e=ePVvG35lcoi7aIxBobmsSIeyqdJDhDghKXgAcjVZxMAvgWYFjwm6dcFmvNHsieqUTuspab8uIU2V-DsxCiINSdy43nt9RW098kkYNGRYcqWt6JGl5EoAPb_c4l7UlcWeC1qJpGY6M5FsztR9wJq4OBaNofCyC3Cei8twIWNm6F5H_ZtbjB8i50-FJgLbiqmMlNWshWX5FZ-oXQc0p3r0NeaGhCAiHZJtGF3REqTrWrHuHf3i0Z2DrYVqX_q3T_jukU8ByShKBMoPeO_zzzikhQ2vhPzJ0FAKSjm2Ir48FJ17QD3cvlOIc1J2zNuzteNGrGCvugdSeYJjn7bO_PxUi2OOGcBPCdfhLUvJjysibVOaEN6jOaVI4UvURft3mMrygWeIY0JPiUhNzzJ00UDDxw%3D%3D) Alternatively, a contribution of **[$7.50](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=82423956c4b74665a6ece5dffb19068d&_e=ePVvG35lcoi7aIxBobmsSIeyqdJDhDghKXgAcjVZxMAvgWYFjwm6dcFmvNHsieqUTuspab8uIU2V-DsxCiINSdy43nt9RW098kkYNGRYcqWt6JGl5EoAPb_c4l7UlcWeC1qJpGY6M5FsztR9wJq4OBaNofCyC3Cei8twIWNm6F5H_ZtbjB8i50-FJgLbiqmMlNWshWX5FZ-oXQc0p3r0NeaGhCAiHZJtGF3REqTrWrHuHf3i0Z2DrYVqX_q3T_juoPl_FkqXNS78SHDLKI7-3cmnCKVeqmzrW2qy-ls-WAJWMId8T1Y7OQM2ttT7MhCAgHnQX3dKYsyQ0ZZCrMXkamY5RAG_0-z9M-aYwtRP_VvwAPYVLNDmgx0zkmikdoMOVz5dZ6mcfGsLUDTRPoJT7A%3D%3D)** would buy me two gallons, and a gift of **[$120](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=82423956c4b74665a6ece5dffb19068d&_e=ePVvG35lcoi7aIxBobmsSIeyqdJDhDghKXgAcjVZxMAvgWYFjwm6dcFmvNHsieqUTuspab8uIU2V-DsxCiINSdy43nt9RW098kkYNGRYcqWt6JGl5EoAPb_c4l7UlcWeC1qJpGY6M5FsztR9wJq4OBaNofCyC3Cei8twIWNm6F5H_ZtbjB8i50-FJgLbiqmMlNWshWX5FZ-oXQc0p3r0NeaGhCAiHZJtGF3REqTrWrHuHf3i0Z2DrYVqX_q3T_ju3fU_O_JIBVqbWoRId_QmD0_-x_1waGELi15GuzDfoJF7mzrFTeF9K_lKaKEd0cgKycYh74rreRxkbe-OoHenfXoJENwQgObsvUkhtAyHu9egJRFPefMJT2ZCpvyzZqNO6w5CVmYo3dnbKkIGamAqnA%3D%3D)** would cover the expenses of a full tank

Any contribution you're able to make would be of great assistance.

[**BUY US A GALLON OF GAS

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.
