clean_body: At more than 113,000 square miles, I have a lot of ground to cover as I work to meet every Republican that I can | | Peter, As the Sheriff in Pinal county, I found the best way to understand the needs of my community is to be actively involved and interacting with the people I serve. While I am well-known in my home of Pinal County, Arizona's significant size, encompassing over 113,000 square miles and a population of more than 7.2 million people, requires a concerted effort to connect with potential voters. With such a vast territory and nearly 4.9 million potential voters, it's clear that I have a substantial task ahead of me , but the people of Arizona deserve the opportunity to understand exactly who they are sending to represent them in Washington. Arizona Deserves Better 1. Our border is still out of control and needs to be secured 2. Families are suffering from inflation, significantly impacting the cost of living 3. Our elected officials need to be held accountable for policies good and bad However, connecting with these potential voters, as I have found, doesn't come cheap; and given that I drive a Ford F-350, my campaign is spending a lot of money on gas. It's absolutely worth the incurred expense, with that said, each time I fill up it costs my campaign more than $120! Given that I go through a tank of gas a day, driving around the state contacting voters costs more than $3,700 per month. The average cost for a regular gallon of gas still costs $3.79, ranking Arizona in the 10 most expensive State averages. This is unacceptable and Arizona deserves better! I never assume anyone’s ability to make a financial contribution, but if you are able to contribute, even a modest amount, it would be immensely appreciated. Alternatively, a contribution of would buy me two gallons, and a gift of would cover the expenses of a full tank Any contribution you're able to make would be of great assistance. Your support in helping us expand our outreach and to connect with voters would be invaluable. Together, we can make a positive impact and strengthen our campaign. Thank you for your consideration, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity. Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. | Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

That’s why we can’t afford to lose our Democratic Senate Majority — or risk a GOP-led House and Senate following through on the disastrous policies that Republican state legislatures and governors have started. I’m committed to keeping New Mexico and our majority in Democratic hands so we can stop these extreme policies in their tracks and build on all our progress — from defending individual rights to protecting our lands and waters. **But I can’t do it alone.** **[So, here’s that ask I promised: Will you chip in any amount you can afford today toward my re-election campaign's end-of-month goal? ---
Peter, I've always loved to read.
As a kid, I spent my summers in the library, where I could escape the oppressive heat of Brooklyn and instead spend hours wandering through stacks of well-worn books until I found exactly the right one.
It was in books like _Simple Justice_ _** **_ that I learned about the fight for progress and began to see myself as someone capable of not only continuing the fight, but of instituting lasting change.
**Peter, I am the woman I am today because of the books I've read along the way – but tragically, far-right lawmakers across the nation have chosen books as the next battleground for their culture war**. And, through paranoid attacks on "critical race theory," attempts to defund libraries, and even outright book bans, these lawmakers are pushing forward their agenda alarmingly fast.
**The speed at which the GOP is banning the very books that shaped who I am and helped me realize my full potential is both disheartening and dangerous – and we must do everything we can to stop them.**
**Peter, I've always been committed to the fight for progress, but this time, the attack on books feels _personal_. That's why I'm fighting to STOP these bans on books, but I need to know if you're in this fight with me. So please, help me get 5,000 responses to my poll by midnight:**
| | **Do you think states should be able to BAN books?**
---

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zaq56ufkndjsl9kr7a54e7hf4klus72qpfedip1g_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjjmepr6cdh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrkr8s9vb3nescpjubmb1acpe7s7hf3a5agjtl5g_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjjmepr6cdh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkktt94cm1dhvn09p7dvlidco9bcohkjo4079568_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjjmepr6cdh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zueeqv2n0ii396a63vn5p2lr6kqkfn63v2duk6d8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjjmepr6cdh2bs)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsd5dh46t4405fjoaduo8ja7ngvmgg7k9f99k7k0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjjmepr6cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpsgib08kuv3nrkcf4sp34dcemv22u85tfsh095o_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjjmepr6cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zifmuie4barkdtulinff27qsuihfbbukcrttsup8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjjmepr6cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsbuiiqkkgh61ci75co950o14a2ggu1f32e7mpho_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjjmepr6cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztadicblmpcqrdet6s805e7dicvrolvkkfdlmo38_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjjmepr6cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgmaavd3uekqi79a2i00ebkco3qo8v38csuhnslg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjjmepr6cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeag2plmug62p98tc5aqd60fotpl8rjt5jjj3o1o_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjjmepr6cdh2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8or4fkqfejuneso7p1mn72gl17b6d34t4hr6gcg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjjmepr6cdh2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoloth0fj7uc55d61gecsv70nv5tja9ma3c8u0lo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjjmepr6cdh2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zumjn8u9groatqom5aqc3du6b2kcmb8s52ig3jko_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjjmepr6cdh2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeitsao4164ucivq9vlcaicsae9l4n44m4mf4hlo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sjjmepr6cdh2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

GOP Presidential

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

subject: Rep. Garcia voted to raise his own salary:
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66843950/417751030/1224595648?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGNkZWRjYS1mMzI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SZZikzcMNRygSK9KkXL5dcov7JqHA7RcTl20wML3xb4=)
No wonder people don’t trust politicians, Peter.

Last week, Republicans on the House Appropriations Committee – _including CA-27 Rep. Mike Garcia_ – voted for a bill that would slash funding for senior citizens and law enforcement agencies, _while raising their own Congressional salaries by $8,000 per year._
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66843952/417751031/-1766409733?refcode=em-7.21.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGNkZWRjYS1mMzI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SZZikzcMNRygSK9KkXL5dcov7JqHA7RcTl20wML3xb4=)
Most people can’t simply take a vote to raise their own salaries. And their vote was especially selfish: critical programs like Medicare need funding more than our representatives need a raise. _But Mike Garcia disagreed._

**That’s why we need to flip this seat blue by electing George Whitesides – a problem-solver and an innovator, not a pay-me-first politician.**

[**Will you chip in grassroots contribution to George’s campaign today? This race is a toss-up, so any amount will make an impact – but $3 would give us a big boost.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66843953/417751032/-1766409733?refcode=em-7.21.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGNkZWRjYS1mMzI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SZZikzcMNRygSK9KkXL5dcov7JqHA7RcTl20wML3xb4=)

clean_body: | = No wonder people don’t trust politicians, Peter. Last week, Republicans on the House Appropriations Committee – including CA-27 Rep. Mike Garcia – voted for a bill that would slash funding for senior citizens and law enforcement agencies, while raising their own Congressional salaries by $8,000 per year. = Most people can’t simply take a vote to raise their own salaries. And their vote was especially selfish: critical programs like Medicare need funding more than our representatives need a raise. But Mike Garcia disagreed. Friend,

It’s been an eventful couple of weeks on the road, so I wanted to take a moment to talk a bit more about the type of campaign we're running.

In case you’ve missed it, we officially kicked off in-person events. We’ve traveled across the district from Fountain Hills to Scottsdale. One notable stop was with my friend Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes. We met with voters, and I got the opportunity to talk about our campaign to flip AZ-01.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66844424/417752507/-898110066?refcode=em-7.21.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2Y0ZmViMjItZjUyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=myGenLK5pVyFcArZihJufON1NFVNFXxjJcKRWSEwWnE=)
Events like these are crucial to connect with constituents and ensure we are addressing the challenges our community faces. I want to hear from voters directly. I want to know what your challenges are - your biggest worries. What are your priorities?

This is what being in office should be about. And look, friend, we may not always agree, but you will always know where I stand.

**Your support helps make all of this possible.[If you can, please consider chipping in $5, $20, or whatever you can to my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66844425/417752508/-898110066?refcode=em-7.21.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2Y0ZmViMjItZjUyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=myGenLK5pVyFcArZihJufON1NFVNFXxjJcKRWSEwWnE=)**

Marlene

subject: Become A Founding Member
body:
Of The Next Great Conservative Grassroots Campaign | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0b6cc995063b/become-a-founding-member?e=36b5d8efc6)
---
| |
---
| |
#
, If you’re receiving this, that should mean you’ve shown yourself to be a bold patriotic American ready for change in Congress. I am, too. I’m tired of Congress writing laws for us that don’t apply to them. I’m tired of Congress not passing legislation that helps the average American instead of special interests. I’m tired of Congress sending billions of our tax dollars overseas when we could better use that money here, because it's YOUR money! There is a famous quote that says, “The only thing necessary for the triumph of evil is for good men to do nothing.” It is time for the silent majority to speak up, to own that we are unapologetically American, and ready to stand for what we believe in. If you’re with me, I would be proud to have you as a Founding Member of Team Stovall.

With donations of $10 or more, we will send you this Founding Member bumper sticker. Publicly reject the establishment corruption and the “conservative enough” status quo. I am fighting for the future of Arizona and for You!
* Lower taxes
* School choice
* Stronger borders
* Conservative Christian values

But, if you are satisfied with the status quo then please ignore this email and carry on with your day. If you want a better future for yourself, your family, and our country, then I know I can count on you.
---

body:
Friend As a retired Master Sergeant from the United States Air Force, I have had the privilege of serving my country and witnessing firsthand the impact of effective leadership. I used to vote Republican, until I cam across candidates like this. Now, I put the character and integrity above party loyalty. Many politicians tend to overlook the needs of small towns and rural areas, leaving us feeling neglected and disconnected. But when I watched him speak at the library, that perception was shattered. I urge you to consider supporting him at the polls in 2024 and right now with a generous contribution, if you’re able. He will be an exceptional leader who will prioritize the needs of small towns and rural areas like ours.

| | Friend, I am writing to enthusiastically endorse Dr. Bob Lorinser as a Congressional candidate for our district, and ask you to [join me in my support.](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/2eObvlGZG/c?w=xRTpImhATld4RW5bWJuWb1K_qgygzjiSj0qjfnr4_fc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JsYWlyYm9iIiwiciI6IjQ0M2ZlNWQ0LThhODctNDdjZi1hN2JhLWM4NWM2MDFlMDAwNiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9) As a retired Master Sergeant from the United States Air Force, I have had the privilege of serving my country and witnessing firsthand the impact of effective leadership. Dr. Bob embodies the qualities we need in a representative who will prioritize the concerns and interests of small towns and rural areas like Crystal Falls.
---
| | [](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/2eObvlGZG/c?w=esIsol1tMe4P8cPGAGr4ZKGNWGNc80T0HTm4rgWgoCY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudm90ZWRyYm9iLmNvbS9zby8yZU9idmxHWkc_bGFuZ3VhZ2VUYWc9ZW4iLCJyIjoiNDRiZTg4MzYtNGVhMS00MzQzLWIwZjItN2NmNzgyODE3YWQ0IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0)
---
| | A Candidate Who Truly Listens and Understands
Putting Our Community First Many politicians tend to overlook the needs of small towns and rural areas, leaving us feeling neglected and disconnected. However, my first encounter with Dr. Bob Lorinser at the Crystal Falls Library shattered this perception.
His thoughtful words and genuine concern for our community indicated that he had meticulously considered our unique challenges and had everyone's best interests at heart.
"Dr. Bob’s policies are spot on." Policies That Align With Our Values Dr. Bob's policies resonated deeply with me and many others in our district. He recognizes the importance of supporting the ideas that are specific to our area. It is refreshing to have a candidate who genuinely understands the issues faced by our community and is committed to addressing them effectively.
A Leader with an Unwavering Commitment to Service
Beyond his policies, it is [Dr. Bob's character that truly sets him apart.](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/2eObvlGZG/c?w=JTaOe5h2V3dO-BJ9CxjFNKrYoiH2iDVxC7JM0kSK3WM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JsYWlyYm9iIiwiciI6ImE0ZGE2ZTM1LTkyOWQtNDNhZi05NGJlLTIzOTQxYWQyYWI1OSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9) As someone who has dedicated my life to serving my country, I value integrity and a deep sense of service.
Dr. Bob's extensive experience as a family physician across the Upper Peninsula — including here in Crystal Falls — coupled with his foreign service, demonstrates his unwavering commitment to serving others.
Having personally experienced the challenges of combat, I find solace in knowing that Dr. Bob understands and empathizes with the struggles faced by veterans.
A Candidate Who Embodies Core Values Dr. Bob's embodiment of the core values of the Air Force — integrity, service before self, and excellence — further solidifies my endorsement. These values are crucial for effective leadership, especially in Congress.
For most of my early adult life, I voted for Republicans. Having shifted my focus from party affiliation to the character of the individual, I firmly believe that Dr. Bob's commitment to integrity and service will bring much-needed change to Washington. Friend, I am confident that Dr. Bob Lorinser is the ideal candidate to represent our district in Congress. His dedication to our community, understanding of our unique challenges, and alignment with our values make him the clear choice.
I urge you to consider supporting Dr. Bob at the polls in 2024 and [right now with a generous contribution](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/2eObvlGZG/c?w=JTaOe5h2V3dO-BJ9CxjFNKrYoiH2iDVxC7JM0kSK3WM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JsYWlyYm9iIiwiciI6ImE0ZGE2ZTM1LTkyOWQtNDNhZi05NGJlLTIzOTQxYWQyYWI1OSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9), if you’re able. He will be an exceptional leader who will prioritize the needs of small towns and rural areas like ours. Warm regards, Blair AndersonRet. Master Sergeant, US Air Force Any mention or depiction of service does not imply an endorsement from the United States Air Force, the State Department, or the Department of Defense.
---

body:

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66844607/417753373/-1310813206?refcode=mw_em_230721_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWM3M2Y0NC1mNjI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9UPmarVjoPX7kK2pWeJ_H1dUrYr1bCgftXC7bcE99oo=) Well, Derek, it looks like the GOP is on the offensive, launching attack ads in 12 districts that are considered key to controlling the House of Delegates in November. **_[Can you rush a $12 donation now to help me fight back and keep these districts under Democratic control?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66844608/417753374/-1310813206?refcode=mw_em_230721_1&amount=12&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWM3M2Y0NC1mNjI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9UPmarVjoPX7kK2pWeJ_H1dUrYr1bCgftXC7bcE99oo=)_** July has been full speed ahead for the GOP in Virginia – not only did they release these attack ads in crucial battleground districts, but they also launched a new web portal encouraging Republicans to vote early in the election this fall. Their efforts should not be taken lightly. We have to stand with Virginia Democrats and make sure they have the resources they need to win. **_[Contribute anything you can today to help Democrats win these 12 districts and turn Virginia blue>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66844609/417753375/-1310813206?refcode=mw_em_230721_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWM3M2Y0NC1mNjI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9UPmarVjoPX7kK2pWeJ_H1dUrYr1bCgftXC7bcE99oo=)_** Your contributions play a big role in my work to support Democrats across the Commonwealth. Because of your generosity, I can travel to battleground districts the GOP is targeting – like Richmond and Hampton Roads – to campaign with candidates, canvas and talk to voters, and make sure every person has a plan to vote in November. Fighting back against this onslaught of GOP attacks is a huge group effort, and I’m thankful you’re on my team. Thank you, Mark ********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66844610/417753376/-1310813206?refcode=mw_em_230721_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWM3M2Y0NC1mNjI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9UPmarVjoPX7kK2pWeJ_H1dUrYr1bCgftXC7bcE99oo=)********

name: Jon Tester
subject: I hate to bother you, but this is important
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Peter, you know I hate to bother you, so I’ll keep this quick.**
This past month was incredibly busy for Team Tester. From public fundraising deadlines to a new Mitch McConnell recruit jumping in the race to run against me, we’re at a vital turning point.
**That’s why I need your support now more than ever in this campaign.**
The coming months will be critical. We need the resources to respond to any incoming attacks from opponents and national Republicans like Mitch McConnell. McConnell is desperate to buy this Senate seat in Montana, so they’re pulling out all the stops—including recruiting a millionaire self-funder to run against me.
**[**Can I count on you to split $10, $25, or whatever you can today between me and Bob Casey to help fuel our movement to help keep me in the Senate fighting to protect the Montana way of life?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230721-1?refcode=em20230721-1&refcode2=337_552475_EBSCry&akid=337%2E552475%2EEBSCry)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230721-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230721-1&refcode2=337_552475_EBSCry&akid=337%2E552475%2EEBSCry)**
Thanks for stepping up today. When we win this race, it will be because of folks like you.
Jon

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=337%2E552475%2EEBSCry)

Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

body:

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=79f3b2df131e4ab2af3c27065430a59b&_e=J_jBpDIeoGhr4JRS9pZrAxDSC46WId07gBBo1cH8TkndyQaaIxiC-2V6EgGHz1kxcYq5A8JfZlvfuHiVcyN8e4jMeF-d-hvwITbLv_6PPkzz9ztn-gtTvh-xpXX1Ywn03oAD8nSJoIXBwiu9zg8SAHR_V7JGubx5akH398v6mCnyc1j11VnSFYu1rfuED10wErMvRLjC13Ah6GqXTKbKcPk6gCBCE6fhrUFTKEjjmpil89LJ2nzkg0swdgGVz7tuNcyc-dTB8Pbhx1QJjtsgaHxSMpncke_8w6BrJYH1vWKHEKkoA3fA4jgUuw66nm_Q93KJ84AucXeR1OL3MhPI5FzhVATB6_02E8_h3miHBV1y5JDg4O8WQ8obzoqGxFcrX9cLohIIUclMdTLC7JHhrg%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve always known that I was meant to live a life of service, but I could never have imagined that perhaps **the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate.**

[**Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=79f3b2df131e4ab2af3c27065430a59b&_e=J_jBpDIeoGhr4JRS9pZrAxDSC46WId07gBBo1cH8TkndyQaaIxiC-2V6EgGHz1kxcYq5A8JfZlvfuHiVcyN8e4jMeF-d-hvwITbLv_6PPkzz9ztn-gtTvh-xpXX1Ywn03oAD8nSJoIXBwiu9zg8SAHR_V7JGubx5akH398v6mCnyc1j11VnSFYu1rfuED10wErMvRLjC13Ah6GqXTKbKcPk6gCBCE6fhrUFTKEjjmpil89LJ2nzkg0swdgGVz7tuI5FcUqNbEFn3RdQE9j_2N7tAQLo2ypOXstD5A49pL9U7m7hpz9LdCogo-FNjSr1AYyJ8XKCJIcWkBruKoLGwTJ4tQHvR7NYsFQlRHcWw8ANljZEAqAlPo68pnDASfXljpwRvwIo1HHlJ5IYCy3dVyA%3D%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=79f3b2df131e4ab2af3c27065430a59b&_e=J_jBpDIeoGhr4JRS9pZrAxDSC46WId07gBBo1cH8TkndyQaaIxiC-2V6EgGHz1kxcYq5A8JfZlvfuHiVcyN8e4jMeF-d-hvwITbLv_6PPkzz9ztn-gtTvh-xpXX1Ywn03oAD8nSJoIXBwiu9zg8SAHR_V7JGubx5akH398v6mCnyc1j11VnSFYu1rfuED10wErMvRLjC13Ah6GqXTKbKcPk6gCBCE6fhrUFTKEjjmpil89LJ2nzkg0swdgGVz7tuVK0lOU9sGJc0xx7ntCPvCkIo2QL0clh-3Vuf72boMpvHooyLUTWmImQrs_NRGYhSDTxq4WS5E3VVtZZv-b4OSIhCJtYIkfsQRvCwKhPFDW4t6OiuW_FvKElYWTwsSnrEcFdZG2QKXi9zd9V2RwL_ag%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will back my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that **anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it.**

**I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read.**

In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis.

Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. **When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you.**

I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. _And believe me, there are some tales._

**I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism.** I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why [**I am determined to take on the anti-American, radical Left in Washington as Montana’s next U.S. Senator.**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=79f3b2df131e4ab2af3c27065430a59b&_e=J_jBpDIeoGhr4JRS9pZrAxDSC46WId07gBBo1cH8TkndyQaaIxiC-2V6EgGHz1kxcYq5A8JfZlvfuHiVcyN8e4jMeF-d-hvwITbLv_6PPkzz9ztn-gtTvh-xpXX1Ywn03oAD8nSJoIXBwiu9zg8SAHR_V7JGubx5akH398v6mCnyc1j11VnSFYu1rfuED10wErMvRLjC13Ah6GqXTKbKcPk6gCBCE6fhrUFTKEjjmpil89LJ2nzkg0swdgGVz7tuTGi9zx48QRuqH3Y40l-hYLZllvebP1IDAAblscT8Qgrmj-VPgdZ4jexX26tW30q7RtxjhoH1XXuctsXtBQdj7DQ-HMrA52KsCjOlxwKYc_lLJvGyWZSsXNoSXuV_TWcCh6STnDtgpcmbYhSB6hGakw%3D%3D)

Peter,

As the Sheriff in Pinal county, I found the best way to understand the needs of my community is to be actively involved and interacting with the people I serve.

While I am well-known in my home of Pinal County, **Arizona's significant size, encompassing over 113,000 square miles and a population of more than 7.2 million people,** requires a concerted effort to connect with potential voters.

With such a vast territory and nearly 4.9 million potential voters, it's clear that **I have a substantial task ahead of me** , but the people of Arizona deserve the opportunity to understand exactly who they are sending to represent them in Washington.

**Arizona Deserves Better**
1. Our border is still out of control and needs to be secured

2. Families are suffering from inflation, significantly impacting the cost of living

3. Our elected officials need to be held accountable for policies good and bad

However, connecting with these potential voters, as I have found, doesn't come cheap**;** and given that I drive a Ford F-350, my campaign is spending a lot of money on gas. It's absolutely worth the incurred expense, **with that said, each time I fill up it costs my campaign more than $120!**

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=04f1c18d4a0b4da68471335fed42cf4e&_e=AreNZYr094PW0fv0oVz-0WHBVIMAHaAbaMb2WXrcOPYJgGIUJtKI2V86IDUDJ72yg6C0yzE-dfdU38JkdlSwWDHLUiAymllveUKCfgZbzSpUF7gBbtfAFcknJpwoUrUmwJewcj0drXf8UWJBwur3Ofd05TcfJN3gygajZbljlRl_ZBVYEu0017ZSR400idowlyqNNh0rYMwhxTE7wU4WHm4RmaTfDeywVmIxRTQF3i_6lDazMuL6YbpN75ue_kxidok14Hu8GTTaEhvQjwq_kN6QAfPEdBz-Qy5isB44KuuAsAQxvDmIW0y8oSmsubGAa-t3qgrnoWUbGLpp7sqloM5k7nn9R10_OKD_5vVr9Xy1dp07WdH72XNwGT8PmYYW-1cCwpsaGdcHoKmXEvPErw%3D%3D)
Given that I go through a tank of gas a day, **driving around the state contacting voters costs more than $3,700 per month.** **

The average cost for a regular gallon of gas still costs $3.79, ranking Arizona in the 10 most expensive State averages. This is unacceptable and Arizona deserves better!**

I never assume anyone’s ability to make a financial contribution, but if you are able to contribute, even a modest amount, it would be immensely appreciated. **[For instance, a donation as small as $3.50, just about the average cost of a gallon of gas in Arizona, would make a difference.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=04f1c18d4a0b4da68471335fed42cf4e&_e=AreNZYr094PW0fv0oVz-0WHBVIMAHaAbaMb2WXrcOPYJgGIUJtKI2V86IDUDJ72yg6C0yzE-dfdU38JkdlSwWDHLUiAymllveUKCfgZbzSpUF7gBbtfAFcknJpwoUrUmwJewcj0drXf8UWJBwur3Ofd05TcfJN3gygajZbljlRl_ZBVYEu0017ZSR400idowlyqNNh0rYMwhxTE7wU4WHm4RmaTfDeywVmIxRTQF3i_6lDazMuL6YbpN75ue_kxiGRFTNdUNxHxWx5P8vi2-TxQUk8C5DfFPXQfVexR_rYV2KwWNBCFOO4cyy_NTc9bjVNWofxC-0KGz0y3zKz0JMaNjuB5NQfH86ah-TuySNwEM4MNDowE0t9QLkwuAqa_HbbXNsPT-fHJVAWTuXu3RVA%3D%3D)**

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

Let's be clear: I'm Jewish. \--------------------------------------------------------------------------- [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66845000/417754613/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODNiNGM0OC1mNzI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X4JdtXmgnRXVbfx3a1lYtJb30W4jvqmWcyc-afa3o4k=&emci=53d03f15-4527-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=083b4c48-f727-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

The National Republican Congressional Committee just issued a press release calling me a “rabid antisemite.”

**Let's be clear: I'm Jewish.**

My great-grandparents and grandparents left Europe at the turn of the 20th Century because of antisemitism, pogroms, and economic struggles.

It's absurd and offensive to label me and other Jewish members of the Democratic Party anti-Semitic bigots. **Frankly, it is especially sickening that the attack comes from today's Republican Party, which panders to white nationalists.**

This attack comes from the same Republican Party that has repeatedly used anti-Semitic tropes against me during past elections.

Several members of this same Republican Party have spread anti-Semitic conspiracy theories and even attended white nationalist conferences.

Republican congressmen in my office building have taken down the POW-MIA flag to fly the “An Appeal to Heaven” pine tree flag, a Revolutionary War flag which in recent years has become a symbol for Christian nationalism and Christian Dominionism. It was one of the flags waved by rioters on January 6 in front of the Capitol.

**[National Republicans will say anything to attack me – no matter how absurd... or hypocritical. Chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to help me keep WA-08 blue and fight back against the NRCC's offensive attacks>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66845001/417754614/146394198?refcode=em23_230721_nrccrr_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230721_nrccrr_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=083b4c48-f727-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODNiNGM0OC1mNzI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X4JdtXmgnRXVbfx3a1lYtJb30W4jvqmWcyc-afa3o4k=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [EXPRESS DONATE $5→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66845002/417754615/146394198?refcode=em23_230721_nrccrr_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230721_nrccrr_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=083b4c48-f727-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&noskip=true&express_lane=true&amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODNiNGM0OC1mNzI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X4JdtXmgnRXVbfx3a1lYtJb30W4jvqmWcyc-afa3o4k=)

It has never been more important to elect Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot, and I couldn't be more excited to be joining this team.

Take our survey now »** **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66845018/417754689/-413746320?sourceid=1051511&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzMzOTU0MS1mNzI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4tvsCyT_gjud0Uckuoouf3HiIZYQDKHI8owr49f2Egs=&emci=73c2953b-f727-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=bc339541-f727-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=5177934)**
_Survey prepared for . Deadline: 11:59 PM._ Peter, as a key member of our pro-choice community, I know you understand the stakes of this election cycle. Control of the House, Senate, White House, and dozens of state legislatures is up for grabs. Republicans will stop at nothing to advance their extreme, anti-abortion agenda. **And our most fundamental right,_the freedom to make decisions about our own bodies_ , is on the ballot.**

**I'm eager to learn what is top-of-mind for our supporters, so I want to hear directly from you, Peter. Will you take our 60-second Priorities Survey before midnight and let us know what matters most to you in the upcoming election cycle?** **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66845019/417754690/-413746320?sourceid=1051511&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzMzOTU0MS1mNzI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4tvsCyT_gjud0Uckuoouf3HiIZYQDKHI8owr49f2Egs=&emci=73c2953b-f727-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=bc339541-f727-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=5177934)**
_Survey prepared for . Deadline: 11:59 PM._ Thank you for sharing your thoughts. I look forward to reviewing your response with our team! **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66845020/417754691/-413746320?sourceid=1051511&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzMzOTU0MS1mNzI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4tvsCyT_gjud0Uckuoouf3HiIZYQDKHI8owr49f2Egs=&emci=73c2953b-f727-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=bc339541-f727-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=5177934)** Christen

Will you take our 60-second Priorities Survey before midnight and let us know what matters most to you in the upcoming election cycle? Survey prepared for . Deadline: 11:59 PM. name: Jacqueline Coleman
subject: It's official: I'm running with Andy again!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Now that I've officially filed to run alongside Andy, we need your support to ensure we can keep working to make progress for Kentucky. Peter — I have some exciting news I'd like to share with you.

**Earlier this week, I officially filed my paperwork to run alongside Andy for re-election!** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66845768/417757635/950424521?refcode=em23_230721_filing_fnd_gq_act___jc_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230721_filing_fnd_gq_act___jc_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=462173ca-f827-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjIxNzNjYS1mODI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ito08sCfF0vlOIqGsMJ9VtsWrtbGPIooKPdDmiZ6g7o=)

Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. **** _Vice President Kamala Harris Visits Indianapolis_ Vice President Kamala Harris [visited Indianapolis](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66845807/417757755/989362360?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzY1ZmMxMS1mOTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ZOl0Q-okFVBNiybi6D4if2RXjG1F584nNki47ZrgyI=&emci=36dabe1e-eb27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=2765fc11-f927-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=4925535) Thursday to speak to the National Convention for the Delta Sigma Theta sorority. Vice President Harris has led the fight for women’s rights and is pushing back against Republican attacks on the right to choose, including here in Indiana. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66845808/417757758/266303759?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzY1ZmMxMS1mOTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ZOl0Q-okFVBNiybi6D4if2RXjG1F584nNki47ZrgyI=&emci=36dabe1e-eb27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=2765fc11-f927-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66845809/417757762/266303759?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzY1ZmMxMS1mOTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ZOl0Q-okFVBNiybi6D4if2RXjG1F584nNki47ZrgyI=&emci=36dabe1e-eb27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=2765fc11-f927-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=4925535) She focused [part of her speech](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66845810/417757769/-1864942597?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzY1ZmMxMS1mOTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ZOl0Q-okFVBNiybi6D4if2RXjG1F584nNki47ZrgyI=&emci=36dabe1e-eb27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=2765fc11-f927-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=4925535) on the overly partisan decisions coming out of the Supreme Court, including for taking away the right to choose for Hoosiers. Indiana Democrats will keep fighting so that every woman in our state has the right to choose. ** ** _Todd Rokita Wants the Personal Medical Records of Hoosier Women Seeking Care Out of State_ Attorney General Todd Rokita doesn’t respect the privacy rights of Hoosier women making their own medical decisions. This week, [he signed onto a lawsuit](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66845811/417757777/-1642876666?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzY1ZmMxMS1mOTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ZOl0Q-okFVBNiybi6D4if2RXjG1F584nNki47ZrgyI=&emci=36dabe1e-eb27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=2765fc11-f927-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=4925535) with 18 other state attorneys general to have access to the records of women who travel out of state for care. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66845812/417757784/1648332378?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzY1ZmMxMS1mOTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ZOl0Q-okFVBNiybi6D4if2RXjG1F584nNki47ZrgyI=&emci=36dabe1e-eb27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=2765fc11-f927-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66845813/417757791/1648332378?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzY1ZmMxMS1mOTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ZOl0Q-okFVBNiybi6D4if2RXjG1F584nNki47ZrgyI=&emci=36dabe1e-eb27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=2765fc11-f927-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=4925535) Rokita and Indiana Republicans have no respect for Hoosiers’ right to privacy. We can replace him next November with an AG that does. ** ** _Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66845814/417757795/-921750303?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzY1ZmMxMS1mOTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ZOl0Q-okFVBNiybi6D4if2RXjG1F584nNki47ZrgyI=&emci=36dabe1e-eb27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=2765fc11-f927-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=4925535)**[Share Rep. Frank Mrvan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66845815/417757802/-558212279?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzY1ZmMxMS1mOTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ZOl0Q-okFVBNiybi6D4if2RXjG1F584nNki47ZrgyI=&emci=36dabe1e-eb27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=2765fc11-f927-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=4925535) When our veterans come home, they often come home with PTSD, various disabilities, and mental health issues such as anxiety and depression. Rep. Frank Mrvan, who serves on the House Veterans' Affairs Subcommittee on Oversight and Investigations, is trying to ensure that they have the support they need to make life stateside livable again. The proposed [Acquisition Review Board Act](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66845816/417757810/-1087222247?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzY1ZmMxMS1mOTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ZOl0Q-okFVBNiybi6D4if2RXjG1F584nNki47ZrgyI=&emci=36dabe1e-eb27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=2765fc11-f927-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=4925535) will create a formal structure for the review and approval of large scale acquisition programs within the Department of Veterans Affairs, such as electronic health record modernization, financial management, and supply chain modernization. _**Opportunities with Democratic Campaigns**_ _**2023 Tom Henry for Mayor Campaign**_**\- Field Organizer Position** — The Tom Henry for Mayor Campaign is hiring Field Organizers to build a robust field team in Fort Wayne, Indiana, in 2023. We are looking for passionate, hardworking individuals who are committed to helping re-elect Mayor Henry in November. ** ** Field Organizers will be responsible for various tasks focused on community engagement and capacity building. Organizers should be high energy, outgoing, enthusiastic, and dedicated to re-electing Democratic Mayor Tom Henry. Candidates with experience building coalitions among diverse groups of people and experience recruiting and retaining volunteers are preferred. Field deputies report directly to the Field Director. The Tom Henry for Mayor Campaign is an equal opportunity employer and is dedicated to the achievement of equality of opportunity for all its employees and applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, marital status, age, national origin or disability. Those interested in applying should send their resume to [info@tomhenryformayor.org](mailto:info@tomhenryformayor.org). **_Jennifer McCormick For Governor_ — Call Time Manager/Scheduler. About the Role:** We are seeking a highly motivated and organized individual to join our team as the Call Time Manager and Scheduler for the Jennifer McCormick for Governor campaign. In this important role, you will be responsible for overseeing and managing our Call Time program, reporting directly to the Finance Director. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** Vice President Kamala Harris Visits Indianapolis Vice President Kamala Harris Thursday to speak to the National Convention for the Delta Sigma Theta sorority. Vice President Harris has led the fight for women’s rights and is pushing back against Republican attacks on the right to choose, including here in Indiana. She focused on the overly partisan decisions coming out of the Supreme Court, including for taking away the right to choose for Hoosiers. Indiana Democrats will keep fighting so that every woman in our state has the right to choose. Todd Rokita Wants the Personal Medical Records of Hoosier Women Seeking Care Out of State Attorney General Todd Rokita doesn’t respect the privacy rights of Hoosier women making their own medical decisions. This week, with 18 other state attorneys general to have access to the records of women who travel out of state for care. Rokita and Indiana Republicans have no respect for Hoosiers’ right to privacy. We can replace him next November with an AG that does. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. When our veterans come home, they often come home with PTSD, various disabilities, and mental health issues such as anxiety and depression. Rep. Frank Mrvan, who serves on the House Veterans' Affairs Subcommittee on Oversight and Investigations, is trying to ensure that they have the support they need to make life stateside livable again. The proposed will create a formal structure for the review and approval of large scale acquisition programs within the Department of Veterans Affairs, such as electronic health record modernization, financial management, and supply chain modernization. The plan dictates that the committee meets during major points in the acquisition process to ensure all requirements are being met. ** Get Involved! Opportunities to Volunteer Near You! Municipal campaign season is heating up, and campaigns around the state are needing help! Find an event near you and get involved to help ! This in-person training will focus on setting local campaigns up for success this 2023 municipal cycle by thoroughly covering the topics of field and data. Register by . As you prepare, NDTC will equip you to get closer to that victory on Election Day. Register by . Tuesday, Aug. 8: 1-2 p.m. ET: So You Want to Run for Office: Asian American & Pacific Islander (AAPI) Edition with Public Wise: In the United States, only 0.9% of elected leaders identify as Asian American & Pacific Islander (AAPI). Hello fellow passenger! Thanks for reading **The Flyover**. **Quick introduction:** My name is Cole and I’m the CEO of **The Flyover.** I’m responsible for landing **The Flyover** safely and accurately in your inbox every weekday morning. I hope you’ve enjoyed our daily newsletter over the past few weeks! **Quick question:** How am I doing? We're excited to have over 170,000 loyal readers of **The Flyover** , and today I’m reaching out to a special few for feedback on our performance. **And I picked you!** We do our best to make **The Flyover** great, but we're always striving to be better. Would you take a minute and tell me:
* What you like about **The Flyover**?

* How I can improve?

* If there's anything you would change?
This journey isn’t possible without **YOU** – and that’s why I want to hear from you. Or maybe you think that it’s perfect and needs no changes. 😄 **Either way – I’d like to hear your opinion!** [**How Are We Doing?**](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover) Shoot me an email using the **button above** , or at [editor@jointheflyover.com](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover). **I hope** you enjoy **The Flyover** , and I can’t wait to hear your thoughts!
Thanks for flying with us, Cole✈️ **P.S.** If you don't have time to write (I'm sure you're busy), can you click one of the links below and tell me if you like **The Flyover**? Donald J. Trump July 21st, 2023
**Bedminster, NJ —** In an Agenda47 policy video, President Donald J. Trump pledged to end the scourge of human trafficking and defend the dignity of human life.
“I will urge Congress to ensure that anyone caught trafficking children across our border receives the death penalty immediately,” President Trump said.
As President, Donald J. Trump took historic action to combat human trafficking and will reinstate his successful policies once he returns to the White House.
“Under my leadership, we did more than any administration in history to combat human trafficking and to end modern day slavery,” President Trump said. “In one of my first acts in office, I signed an executive order targeting transnational criminal organizations that traffic and exploit innocent people. I signed the Frederick Douglass Trafficking Victims Prevention and Protection Reauthorization Act, authorizing $430 million to fight sex and labor trafficking.”

in Texas, Florida, and Arizona theaters. The film which is being distributed by Angel Studios, was produced by Mexican filmmaker Eduardo Verástegui and stars Jim Caviezel.
Verástegui who was previously appointed a member of President Trump’s Advisory Commission on Hispanic Prosperity and who has continuously advocated for a strong and vital bilateral relationship between the U.S. and Mexico, emphasized the importance of coming together as a society to address this pernicious evil and eradicate child trafficking.
The film is based on the true story of federal agent Tim Ballard’s mission to save children from child sex traffickers in Colombia.
On Thursday morning, Caviezel and Verástegui appeared on Fox & Friends to highlight the film’s success and President Trump’s impressive screening at Bedminster.
In the interview, Caviezel called President Trump “the new Moses” and said, “he's got to be in there because he's going to go after the traffickers.”
[](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j81q6zAYRJ_m8y5BGut3ocXNNV40ULpLt6okJ2rk2kQKIW9fXEq3c4bDjJ_XkqenI30g4JJjJYD6fwQcxeH9VR1Px2GnziexG5QUj43iPwHtuaa_6q9ln2afy5bqoYtOYuKsS44rY61SQqK7OJjJ8BCYDhEimohJS44QZR-s51BddmDomQbnlmmYvbLRSOZT9EF4eEmCxVSvyxSXL1_iZ7vd53Uflrkr7tLaWn82jYSxPXJr6bYxwvjiw_VtqctHToEw1ubbvRJGrgwY08wKo2GtNsZQP1bqB7Du5uL6yKXkqjQJdt4Obr7vAAAA__9zvFpR)
**TRANSCRIPT**
I was thrilled to host a screening at Bedminster of the important new film, _Sound of Freedom_ about the power of faith in overcoming evil and in particular, the evil of child trafficking. Big problem. We had it down to the lowest number in many years, just four years ago, and now it's gone through the roof. Even though the fake news media has tried to ignore it.
_Sound of Freedom_ has been a national sensation and a colossal success at the box office, really big numbers, everyone should see it. This is a very important film and very important movie and it's a very important documentary all wrapped up in one. It's really about an issue that has to be discussed.
Under my leadership, we did more than any administration in history to combat human trafficking and to end modern day slavery. In one of my first acts in office, I signed an executive order targeting transnational criminal organizations that traffic and exploit innocent people. I signed the Frederick Douglass Trafficking Victims Prevention and Protection Reauthorization Act, authorizing $430 million to fight sex and labor trafficking.
I signed legislation to crack down on foreign countries who are not meeting standards for eliminating trafficking, of which there are many. I also signed into law the abolish Human Trafficking Act, which strengthened programs supporting survivors and provided more resources for ending modern slavery.
We do have modern slavery, if you can believe it. Additionally, I created the first ever White House position focused solely on combating human trafficking and perhaps most importantly, we created the most secure border in US history by far, dealing a major blow to the cartels and traffickers. We built hundreds of miles of wall. We renovated hundreds of miles of wall. We never had anything like it, and then I got Mexico free of charge, to give us 28,000 soldiers to protect us from people coming into our country illegally.
When I'm back in the White House, I will immediately end the Biden border nightmare that traffickers are using to exploit vulnerable women and children. We will fully secure the border. I will wage war on the cartels just as I destroyed the ISIS caliphate, 100% gone, 100% destroyed. They'll come back now because we have a weak administration.
I will use Title 42 to end the child trafficking crisis by returning all trafficked children to their families in their home countries and without delay, and I will urge Congress to ensure that anyone caught trafficking children across our border receives the death penalty immediately and that includes also for women, because women as you know are number one in trafficking. Children are actually number two.
I want to thank Eduardo, Jim, Tim Ballard, and everyone else involved in this film for their incredible efforts and their great genius. Together, we will end the scourge of human trafficking, and we will defend the dignity of human life.
Thank you very much.

body:
Food Insecurity in MI01
Friend,
Child food insecurity rates in our district are alarming. We need action from federal, state, and local authorities, but our current representative is busy prioritizing tax cuts to the ultra wealthy.
I want us to image what we could accomplish with better leadership...
CONTRIBUTE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jackbergman]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jackbergman [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jackbergman]
It is heartbreaking to see that there are high rates of child food insecurity and inconsistent access to enough food in my Congressional District.
Federal, state, and local government must take action to address this issue. The lack of livable wages, expensive housing and medical care, and food deserts are all contributing factors.
It's crucial to address the root causes rather than just the symptoms.
Among Michigan's 83 counties, the 1st Congressional District has 15 of the top 22 counties with food insecurity higher than one in every seven children.
I am deeply concerned that my opponent, Jack Bergman, may vote for cuts to social programs, including food for our children, in order to support his tax cuts for the wealthy.
I wish my opponent lived in the district so he could see the pain and suffering that I am witnessing. The health and welfare of our children should be a national priority. It deserves a Congressman's immediate attention. We need a leader to take action and advocate for us.
Imagine a better path forward...
Imagine having a Congressman who lives here to understand the need, someone leading on the ground, in the field, among citizens, working shoulder to shoulder with local and state officials, actually showing up to solve problems.
I've experienced food insecurity as a child, and I'm running for Congress to be the leader I needed growing up.
A generous contribution [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jackbergman] from you can help make that happen.
Thank you for your consideration,
-Dr. Bob

clean_body: Food Insecurity in MI01 Friend, Child food insecurity rates in our district are alarming. We need action from federal, state, and local authorities, but our current representative is busy prioritizing tax cuts to the ultra wealthy. I want us to image what we could accomplish with better leadership... CONTRIBUTE NOW [] [] It is heartbreaking to see that there are high rates of child food insecurity and inconsistent access to enough food in my Congressional District. Federal, state, and local government must take action to address this issue. The lack of livable wages, expensive housing and medical care, and food deserts are all contributing factors. It's crucial to address the root causes rather than just the symptoms. Among Michigan's 83 counties, the 1st Congressional District has 15 of the top 22 counties with food insecurity higher than one in every seven children. I am deeply concerned that my opponent, Jack Bergman, may vote for cuts to social programs, including food for our children, in order to support his tax cuts for the wealthy. I wish my opponent lived in the district so he could see the pain and suffering that I am witnessing. The health and welfare of our children should be a national priority. It deserves a Congressman's immediate attention. We need a leader to take action and advocate for us. Imagine a better path forward... Imagine having a Congressman who lives here to understand the need, someone leading on the ground, in the field, among citizens, working shoulder to shoulder with local and state officials, actually showing up to solve problems. I've experienced food insecurity as a child, and I'm running for Congress to be the leader I needed growing up. A generous contribution [] from you can help make that happen. Thank you for your consideration, -Dr. Bob [] if you've saved your payment information with Act Blue Express, your donation will process immediately. CONTRIBUTE $10 [] CONTRIBUTE $25 [] CONTRIBUTE $50 [] MORE [] Or send a check to: "Friends of Dr. Bob" PO Box 936 Marquette, MI 49855

name: Michael Bennet
subject: What freedom to self-govern means
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_072123_Voting_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_072123_Voting_act]
Friend –
In pursuit of a more just society, I believe all Americans should have access to four critical freedoms: freedom to learn, freedom to rise, freedom from violence, and freedom to self-govern.
Today, I want to talk a little bit more about that last one.
Our government is meant to be by the people, for the people. But we can’t truly govern ourselves until we’ve addressed how voter suppression, gerrymandering, dark money, and partisanship have poisoned our democracy.
In the Senate, I’m fighting to pass the Freedom to Vote Act to do just that.
This bill would help ensure free and fair elections across the country. It would ban partisan gerrymandering, limit the influence of dark money in political races, and make voting safer and more accessible.
You can become a citizen co-sponsor of the Freedom to Vote Act by adding your name here >> [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_072123_freedomtovoteact]
By protecting and strengthening our democracy now, we can ensure that the United States remains strong for generations to come.
Will you join the coalition of Americans fighting to protect our freedom to vote by signing on now? It only takes a minute to help defend our democracy. [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_072123_freedomtovoteact]
Thank you for your support.
More to come,
Michael

Denver, CO 80201
United States

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7a7aa138fd8142239742801e2d4c267b&_e=VxrJ88sCvhsaQTJYoHJud_IBcHcJGCcOcOS2pFetrEGtZ6gwpsnyjWV3vxIc-siSjMKzxPLTigMzfC-t7k_dVc8fX_OpoP8gGaiwd1O2bq_vkyxPEJTJvsY2hGO4kOV5mMyz8Msiu4PTIXWldwByPEhKJBWaXz4rWvyjpheeGeJMyVig3TAXiaUQtQlUtTuQnX8GkuQKIzo9AMDC-Js4rwGDtbo2ZuWPxyNhcXrxpoRTQRdlf5saqMVi7UPIbHBODuuSRoAnHqCflh-5FO3bMMOUBfsoq-wYlednu5X90u-P1s2Sk62BNFpOOwqeWGlI3PpButB48qvLXmYcFw2SoqcmopPCze-qRcEA7ODy2m6M6el_k8U42XXnSRSyKMmwqg75UkfpAHiuZPR4ILPbSA%3D%3D)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7a7aa138fd8142239742801e2d4c267b&_e=VxrJ88sCvhsaQTJYoHJud_IBcHcJGCcOcOS2pFetrEGtZ6gwpsnyjWV3vxIc-siSjMKzxPLTigMzfC-t7k_dVc8fX_OpoP8gGaiwd1O2bq_vkyxPEJTJvsY2hGO4kOV5mMyz8Msiu4PTIXWldwByPEhKJBWaXz4rWvyjpheeGeJMyVig3TAXiaUQtQlUtTuQnX8GkuQKIzo9AMDC-Js4rwGDtbo2ZuWPxyNhcXrxpoRTQRdlf5saqMVi7UPIbHBODdIZ-UPAXvOFmqfDK3Iq8E8jtyEdfOKk7JKVEYLiVH7mSVJSjkA3wSJDEI5eOCQo4xkh5w2uoP9m01HmSid2I0OgjOwpZHhU1kH8x4JVpbbq7_awQWH1HKdilRGvMq5t4jNlz_sdzlD8OWScqw4GJQ%3D%3D)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7a7aa138fd8142239742801e2d4c267b&_e=VxrJ88sCvhsaQTJYoHJud_IBcHcJGCcOcOS2pFetrEGtZ6gwpsnyjWV3vxIc-siSjMKzxPLTigMzfC-t7k_dVc8fX_OpoP8gGaiwd1O2bq_vkyxPEJTJvsY2hGO4kOV5mMyz8Msiu4PTIXWldwByPEhKJBWaXz4rWvyjpheeGeJMyVig3TAXiaUQtQlUtTuQnX8GkuQKIzo9AMDC-Js4rwGDtbo2ZuWPxyNhcXrxpoRTQRdlf5saqMVi7UPIbHBOi8GdKMqWON2M5Wj7aC7mkOZR4LxCMLFER6EO_npl9obDM9ja7aB6OjTE3DfN6YO3yEItc5JN8BrB9-UeVgg5JjFIvidMaTVTsRgRfdspOWfTcXMKXY7Y5p2LuEs9LrX4iMcu2wSamCc2IMcUSMn9ww%3D%3D)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7a7aa138fd8142239742801e2d4c267b&_e=VxrJ88sCvhsaQTJYoHJud_IBcHcJGCcOcOS2pFetrEGtZ6gwpsnyjWV3vxIc-siSjMKzxPLTigMzfC-t7k_dVc8fX_OpoP8gGaiwd1O2bq_vkyxPEJTJvsY2hGO4kOV5mMyz8Msiu4PTIXWldwByPEhKJBWaXz4rWvyjpheeGeJMyVig3TAXiaUQtQlUtTuQnX8GkuQKIzo9AMDC-Js4rwGDtbo2ZuWPxyNhcXrxpoRTQRdlf5saqMVi7UPIbHBOeRYvIGpKdf--apVKhqUICRj9AgPQjiHURXpAs3bgUyhCTXGYwKCjJXGwjDPWsA7MrnDK-tP-lFDZwRhYsXg0fxcjfCDKpV5UKwloCrlrysI_3YxQN8gesUjpVWD5_VJSYKe2CIZNCZFDZVtYXyB5gg%3D%3D)

---
**FIRST:**
In 2022, the fight for the House of Representatives was _so close_ that Republicans only won the majority by just five seats. According to _The Hill_ , **“A few thousand votes could have swung control.”**

**BUT THEN:**
Last month, the Supreme Court struck Alabama’s congressional maps for violating the Voting Rights Act by illegally diluting the power of Black votes.

**SO NOW:**
Alabama must draw new, fair maps before the next election – and ongoing challenges in states like Arkansas, Georgia, and Texas could lead to even _more_ gerrymanders being struck down.

**AND ACCORDING TO _FIVETHIRTYEIGHT_ ,**
**“[T]his decision could be the difference between Republican and Democratic control of the House.”

[_Team, our fight for fair maps could make all the difference in 2024. Will you donate now to support the NDRC’s democracy-saving work nationwide?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66846326/417759602/1153222191?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230721_FR_7P_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4ZTA4Y2UxLWZhMjctZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=i4QxeitgzVYpSyjkJ-FftLV5pQlesCxCxY_gVQauEvw=)**

body:
Jacky Rosen urgently needs your help.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66846585/417760441/-220169546?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230720-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0M2JhMjQyLWZiMjctZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=p2EbmBbMX3qi9ZAV7zXSxNENXy2LzSGVJA_kiw3NzaE=)

We’ve got a BIG problem in Nevada, Peter.

Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate just launched his campaign to defeat Sen. Jacky Rosen – and according to analysts at FiveThirtyEight, this race is likely to decide Senate control.

**The GOP is going ALL IN on Jacky as a top target for defeat. I just got word that she needs to raise $3,487 by midnight to keep her reelection campaign on track to fight back against the GOP’s attacks – but she’s nowhere near close.**

[**_So I’ve got to ask you, Peter: Will you rush $5 or more right now – split between Jacky’s campaign and Fight for Progress – to make sure Jacky wins Nevada’s battleground race and defends our Democratic Senate majority?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66846588/417760443/-220169546?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230720-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0M2JhMjQyLWZiMjctZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=p2EbmBbMX3qi9ZAV7zXSxNENXy2LzSGVJA_kiw3NzaE=)

Look, I’ll give it to you straight: Democrats barely won Nevada’s Senate race last year. After McConnell and his cronies flooded the race with over $55 million, his extremist candidate came within 7,928 votes of flipping that seat red – which is less than a single percentage point.

**Now, Jacky’s race is shaping up to be neck and neck, too. With _The Washington Post_ calling her one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot this election AND a recent poll showing her already TWO POINTS DOWN, it’s going to be a tough race to win**. Unless folks like you come through with the grassroots support Jacky needs to pull ahead, Democrats will likely lose Nevada AND the Senate. Facts are facts. [**_That’s why I’m urgently asking you to rush a split donation of $5 or more right now to make sure Jacky can keep both Nevada and the Senate blue._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66846590/417760446/-220169546?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230720-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0M2JhMjQyLWZiMjctZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=p2EbmBbMX3qi9ZAV7zXSxNENXy2LzSGVJA_kiw3NzaE=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | [CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66846592/417760448/-220169546?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230720-1-EM&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0M2JhMjQyLWZiMjctZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=p2EbmBbMX3qi9ZAV7zXSxNENXy2LzSGVJA_kiw3NzaE=)

clean_body: Jacky Rosen urgently needs your help. | = We’ve got a BIG problem in Nevada, Peter. Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate just launched his campaign to defeat Sen. Jacky Rosen – and according to analysts at FiveThirtyEight, this race is likely to decide Senate control. The GOP is going ALL IN on Jacky as a top target for defeat. I just got word that she needs to raise $3,487 by midnight to keep her reelection campaign on track to fight back against the GOP’s attacks – but she’s nowhere near close. = Look, I’ll give it to you straight: Democrats barely won Nevada’s Senate race last year. After McConnell and his cronies flooded the race with over $55 million, his extremist candidate came within 7,928 votes of flipping that seat red – which is less than a single percentage point. Now, Jacky’s race is shaping up to be neck and neck, too. With The Washington Post calling her one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot this election AND a recent poll showing her already TWO POINTS DOWN, it’s going to be a tough race to win. Unless folks like you come through with the grassroots support Jacky needs to pull ahead, Democrats will likely lose Nevada AND the Senate. Facts are facts. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for stepping up. Let’s win this. subject: Mark wants to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Mark Mullet
body:
| | Mark reached out to you about an issue facing all Washingtonians: public safety and rising crime rates in our state.

Mark has focused on public safety as a State Senator and he wants to know if you agree that public safety should be a top priority for our next governor.

[Read his note below, then click here to let him know what you think.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66847320/417763084/-241193925?source=MM_EM_FR_30DO_230721_1_2&refcode2=da5d8fa9-fd27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&contactdata=fct3+m3Ur27xUnpe7rros9rQTv3DvldJtU7rzMkI0mDhV+jYPEm/QWPD8rmrALtn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTVkOGZhOS1mZDI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vD2opN3hOzY6UfGyLR_Q7rsqIdtttSp6Tg3ETvWp5xw=&emci=be957f41-3d27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=da5d8fa9-fd27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=45626167)

* * *
**_Mark’s Original Message:_**

Washington should be a place where everyone feels safe and people want to raise their families. That’s why we need new leadership and fresh perspectives when it comes to public safety.

My top priority as governor will be to work with our cities and counties to ensure the safety of all Washingtonians.

clean_body: | | Mark reached out to you about an issue facing all Washingtonians: public safety and rising crime rates in our state. Mark has focused on public safety as a State Senator and he wants to know if you agree that public safety should be a top priority for our next governor. Mark’s Original Message: Washington should be a place where everyone feels safe and people want to raise their families. That’s why we need new leadership and fresh perspectives when it comes to public safety. My top priority as governor will be to work with our cities and counties to ensure the safety of all Washingtonians. | | | I’m proud of my track record of supporting gun responsibility measures in the State Senate, from enhanced background checks, ten-day waiting periods, and an assault weapons ban. I’ve worked closely with first responders to make sure they have the tools they need to keep communities safe. Yet, the annual Crime in Washington report released this month showed that while crime has decreased in other parts of the country, it has continued to rise here in Washington. I promise to prioritize safe streets and neighborhoods to ensure that our state leads the way in public safety and protecting our families, including ensuring our first responders have the tools necessary to safely serve our communities. | | Thank you for sharing your thoughts with me, Mark | Mark Mullet is running for Governor to make Washington safe, affordable and prosperous. | | ---|---|--- | = Paid for by Elect Mark Mullet Mullet for Governor (D) PO Box 2072 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States
