---
Peter, [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=0fbff983a6e2483b8c78f9923272d810&_e=F3ASDeVouTYCf4sLwu6sq-6tgHzpY1AJlmiVrTqciVIDxF-F09kLKajC081QSTpo71-r9Hac0-0waGLLt_z4kR-nrn0i1zdKbn4gjo8A7tE1Pfry-u2tyMPV42a0IUtL3s7UHkEhi1Ug2DxlS5BnoBjkNn39ZI98k-vr_1b6cDzG0aDp22v4ZR1wdAubjolF_XGLYfF2EBCjBUN12XArVk9ggAR6Irs1F8nMYVKutyhXiK0CaWQeE_T-cRrDRli1GqAqMQb3YUrY_bxTvcSDLJedZyK_pbSAlzt4CTyT-D87r1bUbSGzbIvjmfsGXNIi8N4sfnoliKibijSOSFKNpBIORwpTJHCGJY5Kd89nKXxlxWXaBHpcdXd-lnicC41hNcv4K-HAKrbbzp8h7KTyiQ%3D%3D) The Pentagon claims to have made a **$6.2 BILLION** accounting error in weapons sent to Ukraine.

That’s **$6.2 BILLION** in taxpayer dollars that the Pentagon messed up.

**Here’s the truth: The Biden White House is trying to bypass Congress to spend additional money on Ukraine instead of prioritizing interests within our own borders.**

Enough is enough. This out-of-control spending must stop, and we MUST demand accountability from both the Pentagon and Ukraine.

[**Join us today to demand accountability and stop wasting our tax dollars!**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=0fbff983a6e2483b8c78f9923272d810&_e=F3ASDeVouTYCf4sLwu6sq-6tgHzpY1AJlmiVrTqciVIDxF-F09kLKajC081QSTpo71-r9Hac0-0waGLLt_z4kR-nrn0i1zdKbn4gjo8A7tE1Pfry-u2tyMPV42a0IUtL3s7UHkEhi1Ug2DxlS5BnoBjkNn39ZI98k-vr_1b6cDzG0aDp22v4ZR1wdAubjolF_XGLYfF2EBCjBUN12XArVk9ggAR6Irs1F8nMYVKutyhXiK0CaWQeE_T-cRrDRli1RiaKUak-78Ht4OZ8iEWCM3qStKHkULY8SQofFUM9Id2wuoUDbS34qCQ4HFbpqc21fZAMhhPbwL1vjA8fJP1ICTi7CdyMOMv5fR7hXnj590XgVdjtvxNvqjDbUpETootRduMV1MqjT4FyOyac3mXNpw%3D%3D)
---
[**DEMAND ACCOUNTABILITY**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=0fbff983a6e2483b8c78f9923272d810&_e=F3ASDeVouTYCf4sLwu6sq-6tgHzpY1AJlmiVrTqciVIDxF-F09kLKajC081QSTpo71-r9Hac0-0waGLLt_z4kR-nrn0i1zdKbn4gjo8A7tE1Pfry-u2tyMPV42a0IUtL3s7UHkEhi1Ug2DxlS5BnoBjkNn39ZI98k-vr_1b6cDzG0aDp22v4ZR1wdAubjolF_XGLYfF2EBCjBUN12XArVk9ggAR6Irs1F8nMYVKutyhXiK0CaWQeE_T-cRrDRli1TQlSM5eX0mOpbvhPmEthSUUgSgQKUOjmSS9YDDeZAPCycjzQNmBtqHdCTJqkWdB02fGolisLSg_GHjWJ6BOm_CdHnhd1JDcB9KgG8le_CiRZ6T6LC_4nDKfIzTCeVTj1ntWCzBnirNUbek6o2KAaig%3D%3D)
---
For too long, we’ve been blindly shoveling money into a war that is thousands of miles away.

_All while at home, our border is wide open, criminals are roaming the streets, and the Chinese Communist Party is buying up land in our backyards._

**But Joe Biden won’t take action on _any_ of that, so instead, he’s spending his time and (limited) energy on Ukraine. **

Americans deserve leaders that answer to America, not foreign leaders.

[**Join us today and STOP out-of-control spending in Ukraine!**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=0fbff983a6e2483b8c78f9923272d810&_e=F3ASDeVouTYCf4sLwu6sq-6tgHzpY1AJlmiVrTqciVIDxF-F09kLKajC081QSTpo71-r9Hac0-0waGLLt_z4kR-nrn0i1zdKbn4gjo8A7tE1Pfry-u2tyMPV42a0IUtL3s7UHkEhi1Ug2DxlS5BnoBjkNn39ZI98k-vr_1b6cDzG0aDp22v4ZR1wdAubjolF_XGLYfF2EBCjBUN12XArVk9ggAR6Irs1F8nMYVKutyhXiK0CaWQeE_T-cRrDRli1tKLcJK08eIAqBUYibBYycEZ9z_PPHnXDxMmUE0ENLd6cnGibO0EWGHyKxxZQdIC96BSsJZEL0n0_6mLY_CIC8CLOvu948uyxpJSesw9jLL0LU1D3BDQ7Vd7XqDs3VioWCBoBjzt-JC0Nv-oW93cWzA%3D%3D)

body:

---
## More Indictments....
---
As you know the Department of _NO_ Justice has been weaponized to interfere with the upcoming 2024 election. **President Donald Trump** is fighting against corruption that our nation has never seen before. With more indictments looming, it is _imperative_ that we pray for **President Trump** and **America**. This Sunday evening at 7pm EST, I want to invite you to join me for a [Pastors For Trump National Prayer Call](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=319961.148.1.716f46b34909ebb533b5894ae358da12). Guests include **General Michael Flynn** , **Roger Stone** and others. Exclusive insights will be shared, Q&A will take place and most importantly we will have thousands of Americans at the same time praying together. You can join by visiting: [www.pastors4trump.com/prayercall](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=319961.149.1.890b83979a417c9af9e7605933006862), [Facebook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=319961.150.1.a22e5c052ecf5ed11660a66823a7ab87), [Youtube](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=319961.151.1.ebc5175450c1c94d9a84eb72a6543fd4) or [Twitter](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=319961.152.1.ab8b921b018d7becde6f6e107d504171). Join us to pray for President Trump and our nation. I also want thank our Partners for their continued support in the efforts of [Pastors For Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=319961.153.1.cba58439b15fda04fc72a8d9e1c35763) which is making such a splash that the Luciferian Left is on full attack mode every single day. I want to ask you to partner with [Pastors For Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=319961.154.1.c82ff0d1897a72064f91d30f153f5ea1) as we prepare for the upcoming 2024 Election. Here is how you can partner with us: -**Share the recorded Prayer Call** of [Pastor's For Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=319961.155.1.7b51ffbd32d8f68c024c50657fb7f9c1) w/President Trump to friends: [https://youtu.be/zmiV_YxFPOE ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=319961.156.1.d151ba5124c5d6ae442fa01abc06c7e6) -**Make a donation to**[Pastors For Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=319961.157.1.41795b9cc20b161d34ff55b9efae9d2b) of $5, $10 or more so that we can reach more Pastors across the country: [https://www.pastors4trump.com/ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=319961.158.1.567fb4dad188d2b4223571d27bf0d6ba) God Bless America Thank you,

## Two BROKE Preachers Going To Church...
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=319961.167.1.ff8351f2694c1132bbbf0355128a2126)
---
At [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=319961.168.1.6103b0586f2bb02ebe5219bc002e0981) OKC & Tulsa, we are in a series each WKND over the [Book of Acts](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=319961.169.1.5caa085e44baa5bccaf66617a06ff241): _verse by verse_.
This past WKND, we opened up **Acts 3** which is a story of two broke preachers (Peter & John) going to church and on their way encountering a man who lame from birth asking for money.
I took a different approach to this classic biblical story and I think you will be intrigued by the angel of this sermon.
Watch [Acts Pt.12](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=319961.170.1.8d4348a7f5a882f96bb6c6f3557d3277) here: [https://youtube.com/live/ThM7my6KqHU?feature=share ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=319961.171.1.cda25334c1c5cbb3ecaa95b1e34f69a1)
| | [ Acts Pt. 12 - Two Broke Preachers Going To Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=319961.172.1.590d7d095d11e128ccc6b8d13bec3bde)
---
---
## Why Are American Churches Struggling?
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=319961.173.1.ace7c40e32db9483e0cf7494679fc255)
---
**American Churches** were once _booming_ like many _boom towns_ in our nation's history.
Unfortunately, the trend now for many American Churches is not the boom town experience but more like a _ghost town_...
Did you know that twelve churches per day in America **close down**? Church attendance is at an **all time low**. In 1972 around 92%of Americans identified as Christian, whereas in 2020 that number dropped to 64%.
**Why is American Christianity struggling?**
Two Sundays ago, at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=319961.174.1.fb5f900cb2196a39c4c69dc92598316b) OKC & Tulsa, I addressed that question and how a church can **BOOM**.
We have seen the **BOOM** experience at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=319961.175.1.84e7cec4768d720ba329b35c23e9e5f2) in all categories: reach, influence, attendance & finances.
There are **four primary reasons** that [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=319961.176.1.0d2ba33635fc275de1da139ea880eb13) has boomed and they are found in **Acts 2:42**.
This message will bless you and your local church!
Watch here: [https://www.youtube.com/live/YCcVTz88FMo?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=319961.177.1.c1e3239dcc470966dfbb7524d7ea7ca7)
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=319961.178.1.259e73e8029b314dcc063ebe36b5e09e)
---

## When It's OK To Disobey
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=319961.179.1.88a4aa6295f05ab3525180e0c1b66f6d)
---
Is there a time when it is OK to disobey civil authoirty as a Christian?

subject: A View from the Campaign Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d3aafd18c8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Busy! Busy! Busy!
This week, I had the privilege of crisscrossing Indiana, meeting with individuals & families, collecting petition signatures, and attending county fairs. This week's travels took me from Brown County to Owen County to Knox County to Hendricks County to Delaware County (say that ten times fast). I love talking to fairgoers and Hoosiers, hearing about ideas and figuring out solutions to issues affecting everyday life.
Late last week, I was blessed with yet another record-breaking fundraiser! It means the world to me earning your support, trust, and vote of confidence. Are you interested in attending a fundraiser this summer or fall? Read on!
Thank you again for your help in sharing my message and vision for the future of our great State!

** Brown County
Republican Women's Club Breakfast
------------------------------------------------------------
Brown County Republican Women's Club Breakfast

** ICYMI: I was honored to receive the following endorsements this week...
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d3aafd18c8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"Indiana has the rare opportunity to elect a Governor who knows how government should work and how it impacts families in all 92 counties. Among the candidates for Governor, only Lt. Gov. Crouch has a distinguished career at all levels. As a three-term county commissioner, I have worked with Lt. Gov. Crouch as she has wisely bolstered counties' best interests in economic development, quality of life, public and mental health, while protecting our precious right to govern at the local level. Suzanne will be a dynamic leader for us all."
Commissioner Mary Ann Butters, Wayne County

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d3aafd18c8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"I have complete faith in Suzanne’s ability to lead Indiana. She has vast knowledge on the needs of Hoosiers from being in county and state government. She knows what to do to lead Indiana into the future. As a small County Sheriff, I fully support Suzanne to be our next Governor."
Sheriff Dan Mawhorr, Adams County

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d3aafd18c8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"As a second-term Sheriff and lifelong Republican, I proudly endorse Lt. Gov. Crouch for Governor. Her unwavering support for mental health treatment funding and law enforcement makes her the ideal choice. Suzanne's dedication to expanding treatment facilities for mental illness and substance abuse will benefit every Indiana community. Her consistent support for our public service professionals further reinforces why she deserves your vote. I encourage everyone to cast their vote for Suzanne Crouch for Governor."
Sheriff Tony Skinner, Delaware County

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d3aafd18c8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"As Lieutenant Governor, Suzanne Crouch has consistently demonstrated effective leadership and possesses a unique understanding of local government and financial matters. Her responsiveness and proactive approach have been instrumental in advancing various projects in Hamilton County efficiently. Her unwavering dedication has made her an invaluable ally, and she remains committed to equipping her local partners with the essential resources to deliver top-notch services. It is with great honor that we endorse her as the next Governor of Indiana."
Commissioners Mark Heirbrandt, Christine Altman, & Steve Dillinger, Hamilton County

** Save the Date!
------------------------------------------------------------
https://mcusercontent.com/db6332b918877c0167cdddb48/files/3f465566-bc26-b24a-e538-7485d8cbc339/Crouch_List_of_2023_Fundraising_Events_as_of_7.20.23.pdf?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d3aafd18c8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

name: T. Wilson
subject: Jordan amplifies conspiracies with RFK, Jr.
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66847631/417763991/1649708063?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ0MDE1MWYtZmYyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=y8O2omLmOdjZxHzQPukmGaQUI0FBLO_d_nS3GhORmcQ=)
---
| | Friend, You may have seen headlines recently that Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.—a prominent anti-vaccine conspiracy theorist and anti-LGBTQ bigot—was invited to testify in the U.S. House by none other than Jim Jordan.

The supposed topic of this hearing, happening right now, is about “government censorship”; but in keeping with Jordan’s subversive, hyperpartisan abuse of power in his role as Judiciary Committee Chairman, RFK, Jr. is being given a platform to “harm” Democrats and throw red meat to the deranged MAGA base.

The Weaponization of the Federal Government Subcommittee is a bogus, partisan platform created by Jim Jordan to promote himself, support Donald Trump, and amplify anti-American conspiracy theorists who seek relentlessly to tear people in this country apart. Today, Jim Jordan doubled down on the conspiracy circus by validating RFK, Jr.’s baseless claim that baseball Hall of Famer Hank Aaron died due to receiving a COVID vaccine.
---
---
Hank Aaron was 86 years old when he died. **And a medical examination found zero evidence that the vaccine would have, or could have, caused his death.** RFK, Jr. and Jim Jordan repeat this false, debunked claim because they know that millions of Trump followers and right wing conspiracy theorists believe it, and they think it will help them politically. We cannot stand by and allow Jordan to spread dangerous disinformation and amplify an anti-vaxx conspiracy theorist who is dead set on helping elect Donald Trump back to the White House. **We need your help to elect a pro-science democrat like myself and make sure that the voters of Jim Jordan’s district know that his harmful theatrics have no basis in fact **—[**Can you chip in $25 or more to our campaign and help stop Jim Jordan from tearing our country apart?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66847634/417763992/1060996616?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ0MDE1MWYtZmYyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=y8O2omLmOdjZxHzQPukmGaQUI0FBLO_d_nS3GhORmcQ=&emci=15ffdbb3-fa27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=bd40151f-ff27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=10450908)

Kennedy, Jr.—a prominent anti-vaccine conspiracy theorist and anti-LGBTQ bigot—was invited to testify in the U.S. House by none other than Jim Jordan. The supposed topic of this hearing, happening right now, is about “government censorship”; but in keeping with Jordan’s subversive, hyperpartisan abuse of power in his role as Judiciary Committee Chairman, RFK, Jr. is being given a platform to “harm” Democrats and throw red meat to the deranged MAGA base. The Weaponization of the Federal Government Subcommittee is a bogus, partisan platform created by Jim Jordan to promote himself, support Donald Trump, and amplify anti-American conspiracy theorists who seek relentlessly to tear people in this country apart. Today, Jim Jordan doubled down on the conspiracy circus by validating RFK, Jr.’s baseless claim that baseball Hall of Famer Hank Aaron died due to receiving a COVID vaccine. Hank Aaron was 86 years old when he died. And a medical examination found zero evidence that the vaccine would have, or could have, caused his death. RFK, Jr. and Jim Jordan repeat this false, debunked claim because they know that millions of Trump followers and right wing conspiracy theorists believe it, and they think it will help them politically. body:
Is this what it’s come to? Rather than allowing a federal reinvestigation, MAGA Republicans are just going to pass off sensitive information to a known Trumped-up dogmatist to sift through?
| [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18841?t=6&akid=1914%2E564421%2EWG3wDf) **Friend, I 'm speechless. **

Speaker Kevin McCarthy granted conspiracy peddling political pundit Tucker Carlson exclusive access to _more than 40,000 hours_ of security footage from inside the Capitol during the Jan. 6 insurrection.

Is this what it's come to? Rather than allowing a federal reinvestigation, MAGA Republicans are just going to pass off sensitive information to a known Trumped-up dogmatist to sift through?

**Friend, this goes beyond what any of us could have even predicted.**

Giving zealots like Tucker Carlson free reign to create and foster conspiracies is not only unprecedented, but completely dangerous. This just goes to show how far McCarthy will go to pander to election deniers, literal _insurrectionists._

McCarthy, my colleagues, and I all have a duty to find the truth about who was there, who incited the insurrectionists, and how we can make sure that our democracy never again faces that same threat.

This latest stunt has only emboldened me even more to demand truth and justice, not whatever is filtered through the mouths of conspiracy theorists.

We have to do everything we can to defeat them. Luckily, we have momentum, but we have to keep it up because the race for the majority is neck-and-neck, and every dollar counts. name: Team Cori
subject: Cori’s birthday is today, the 100th anniversary of the Equal Rights Amendment.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Cori Bush is leading the movement in Congress to cement the 28th Amendment in the Constitution and protect our fundamental rights. | |
---
Peter, **Today is Cori Bush’s birthday, and it marks exactly 100 years since activists unveiled the Equal Rights Amendment to affirm gender equality in the Constitution.** Black, queer, and trans women have been instrumental in ratifying the Equal Rights Amendment in 38 states. **Now Rep. Cori Bush is leading the movement in Congress to cement the 28th Amendment in the Constitution and protect our fundamental rights.** As Cori said, 100 years is too long to wait for equality. We need equal standing under the law now. As with all of her work, Cori’s advocacy for gender equality centers the people on the margins -- including Black and brown women, LGBTQ+ people, and people seeking abortion care. [**Can you donate $47 today to celebrate Cori Bush’s 47th birthday, or $100 to mark a century in the movement to affirm gender equality in the Constitution? Anything you can chip in makes a difference in our advocacy for equal rights.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zgaVUhIEuD--M-I1icYvqohIjWYd4pP4TA7WVwkS0aqzezwQMsz0ixyLmz8MhI_8NbbPjxIxwNUaQRBmTXjEI7tvGP5iknX3bcFYvgObHgJjalNLwjT6Q5rEVJUxsiJ3Udt4FmmwxtxDO2Ypn4Elig5np3ni8ubjfhVN2WzB28cNNzdEO-bHxMyJRWuNuuAWgHfxubuR7GIl3EKdocnk5cSe7vDGGvg1tSJfSzDsRymilBgPK6NurTHOWP7JLRXcuo_pO5cdK_n7g8aKNu6FiFaeW29kaC17iI2SsDwMn-JEDxC2R3VFO_vSs27KJCfk7kOtwCwMS_42Q9d0dqYpPF2vv3DgpkhzvvFyHBXH-D6A/3y2/WwBGo1UWQlipi6a8KjxXiw/h0/L9G3e_wyEyUCFQu9JfUaZ_kgBT86q5CK_n37ZE2AnrI) **[DONATE TODAY](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zgaVUhIEuD--M-I1icYvqohIjWYd4pP4TA7WVwkS0aq1o9Dew69tO9k02oLIAto7ZD7d3lvMPoKXWec17TNt3v8nHE3MhxRdzqQ_wj5j_70zUTZbcIrK3mrMt9ZIRcnV3aMeecwoKR5dd55oq-h7htwyc24tWXwvvmvihwQ6M6WzRCuklKZ00Fm2KhdB5c5oRZycBmSTI1Bv5RkJjcBydKDX0Y1MrEqSDba7yZ5vuH3iAt8NZiqmrVSwHBkLG-wOYeTqYAufKdfb-tPOCNqxIRjqZIZEe4zU1N4kb52-0FINnD7awUfXTP9hgwJZPMJpN2VQe41dv_iy7555IVRbOUIDV8DNrEJ4OHfEhQjhn6Vg/3y2/WwBGo1UWQlipi6a8KjxXiw/h1/g2wjsTD6PwTKsgsyOV_FPd8c2ape0vTRVMtCcvK8GrY) ** Constitutional amendments -- like the Equal Rights Amendment -- are more long-lasting and powerful than legislation, which can shift depending on who’s in power. We’re seeing how fast laws can change in just one year: Cori’s constituents in Missouri live in a state that has banned abortions and banned lifesaving gender-affirming care for minors as well as incarcerated adults and Medicaid patients. People who can afford it are forced to travel hundreds of miles for necessary healthcare. **This is a moment of crisis, with attacks across the country on our fundamental rights to make decisions about our own bodies.** But when we work together, we are powerful beyond belief. clean_body: Cori Bush is leading the movement in Congress to cement the 28th Amendment in the Constitution and protect our fundamental rights. | | Peter, Today is Cori Bush’s birthday, and it marks exactly 100 years since activists unveiled the Equal Rights Amendment to affirm gender equality in the Constitution. Black, queer, and trans women have been instrumental in ratifying the Equal Rights Amendment in 38 states. Now Rep. Cori Bush is leading the movement in Congress to cement the 28th Amendment in the Constitution and protect our fundamental rights. As Cori said, 100 years is too long to wait for equality. We need equal standing under the law now. As with all of her work, Cori’s advocacy for gender equality centers the people on the margins -- including Black and brown women, LGBTQ+ people, and people seeking abortion care. Constitutional amendments -- like the Equal Rights Amendment -- are more long-lasting and powerful than legislation, which can shift depending on who’s in power. We’re seeing how fast laws can change in just one year: Cori’s constituents in Missouri live in a state that has banned abortions and banned lifesaving gender-affirming care for minors as well as incarcerated adults and Medicaid patients. People who can afford it are forced to travel hundreds of miles for necessary healthcare. This is a moment of crisis, with attacks across the country on our fundamental rights to make decisions about our own bodies. But when we work together, we are powerful beyond belief. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you. name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Time to hold Supreme Court justices to a strict code of ethics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Friend,

Our country’s judicial branch is facing a crisis of legitimacy. Public trust in the Supreme Court is at an all-time low – not just because of extremist conservative legislating from the bench, but also because of reports of egregious corruption from some of the justices this year.

Justice Clarence Thomas’ offenses may be the most glaring of all. First, Justice Thomas refused to recuse himself from cases regarding the Jan. 6 hearings – even though his wife, Ginni, was reportedly plotting to keep Trump in office. Then, it was revealed that Thomas has accepted luxury gifts and travel, home purchases, and private school tuition from a notorious right-wing Republican donor – for decades.

The Supreme Court as an institution and a branch of government is only as strong as its members’ integrity. Being independent doesn't mean the Court is above the law, and there is absolutely no reason all Supreme Court justices shouldn’t be held to the same ethical standards as lower court judges, other public servants, or any American worker.

That’s why I just joined every Democrat on the Senate Judiciary Committee in voting to advance legislation calling for an enforceable ethics code and increased transparency on the Supreme Court. Restoring the Court’s integrity and holding all justices accountable shouldn’t be a partisan issue – but every Republican on the committee voted against the bill, and many used today’s hearing to distract the public from the right-wing justices’ ethical lapses rather than attack the problem of corruption on the Court head on.

If we’re going to have any hope of restoring trust in our nation’s highest court, I need supporters like you to add your voice to this critical fight for transparency and accountability, friend. Can I count on you to sign my petition now?

ADD YOUR NAME: Will you click here to DEMAND Supreme Court justices be held accountable to a strict code of ethics?
https://petitions.signforgood.com/2023-blumenthal-SCOTUS-ethics?code=jtk1342-su-text&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2F2023-blumenthal-priorities%3Fcode%3Djtk1342-su-text

Every day we fail to take action on this critical issue public confidence in the Court, and our entire judicial branch, is further eroded. The health of our democracy is on the line, and I thank you for doing your part by demanding action today.

Sincerely,

Dick

--------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/p3FPDNcG3USxiOP5q9s2qQ2?unsubscribedata=PlOdzgayT9gRhGWHMxe%2BqaiebpethkxNMsaBcRNRGReUWJ4MPzMLhy53ZvUB972ilz8cOG40r8nq7xKJBPkSRgOErPbaF5cAvwRqbwYOXn9EhS5i4TE4jUmEY2ms1ujWoLzWYP7KQBt56usueuzoJTQYTNNWyKyBUSV9eGo1hno6Ww3P6EbC0Q816m%2BMjc8Wam0cVgDo49buB3udlxBAL8wJy983PnuUilXVBpDPisZYiuhpsI43cRGAnLWRplYZwSZRuG7Qo7bVbX5cGgE1pqeJ3Zy%2F8J7IBrT%2BuddZ4rVqDePl%2Bb%2BqP%2FkE%2ByPIt2waqvsg9a1%2FHXYngcaAJBx%2FHFoZx3i%2BihHWbeZAoWaCvOQG4pJ4bZ2IWyeM1d922EpXJSeBko88EZVLMYdTikzPvi4mN%2BpOyVN6JtI8RgJGjx8uW1MLAVqAnHV0dpKyo9BL

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Why don’t Democrats run against incumbents more often?
body:
Moving politics in the direction of the working class requires the working class.
#
Peter,
One big reason why the Left doesn’t bring primary challenges as frequently as Republicans do is because conservative primary challenges have billionaires behind them — and progressive primary challenges do not.
Moving politics in the direction of the working class requires the working class.
[**Peter, will you support our movement for transformative change — from Medicare for All to democratizing fundraising power in politics — and help fight back against status quo politics by splitting a $3 contribution today between Justice Democrats and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136112?refcode=em20230721-30003&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=30003%2E1203867%2EVhKK8r)
**[Donate $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136112?refcode=em20230721-30003&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=30003%2E1203867%2EVhKK8r)**
Alexandria campaigned on expanding Medicare in order to make prescriptions more affordable. Now, Medicare has the power to negotiate prescription drugs — and insulin is capped at $35/ month. She believes in tackling the climate crisis head on, even when members of her own party have called her ‘extreme’ for authoring the Green New Deal.
It was clear from the start that Status Quo Politicians never wanted Alexandria in Congress. In fact, they called her election win a “fluke.” It’s why a Moderate Democrat mounted a $3 million primary challenge, and why Republicans spent over $10 million trying to unseat her in 2020.
But Alexandria continues to do what she was elected to do:**demand better.**
[**Will you split a $3 contribution today between Alexandria and Justice Democrats to show you stand with Alexandria and support pushing the Democratic Party forward?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136112?refcode=em20230721-30003&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=30003%2E1203867%2EVhKK8r)
**[Donate $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136112?refcode=em20230721-30003&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=40&akid=30003%2E1203867%2EVhKK8r)**
Our sincerest thanks,
Team AOC
Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=41&akid=30003%2E1203867%2EVhKK8r) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=42&akid=30003%2E1203867%2EVhKK8r) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230721-30003-footer&t=43&refcode2=30003_1203867_VhKK8r&akid=30003%2E1203867%2EVhKK8r)**

My constituents have always been my primary focus in Congress – not dark money groups or corporate PACs. I take great pride in saying that I’ve protected my seat since 2018, completely independent of any corporate PAC funding.

**But the truth is, it makes fundraising a little more difficult because I have to send emails like this to my grassroots supporters asking for money.**

****Friend, This week, the House of Representatives passed a resolution denying Israel’s racist apartheid and reaffirming unconditional support of the Israeli government despite its increasing human rights abuses. With Israel’s government escalating violence against Palestinians, this is a dangerous move at a time when we must urgently hold Israel’s leaders accountable. **For too long, Congress has been complicit in funding apartheid. But we’re building a movement of progressives who understand the crisis that Palestinians are facing, and who don’t look away.** **Rep. Summer Lee was among the few Democrats to vote NO on this week’s resolution** , saying: _“We are not true allies if we cannot push our partners to uphold basic human rights & democratic values. I cannot vote for unconditional support of any nation-state.” _ **Summer Lee is standing up for human rights for all people, without exception. This takes political courage, especially as a freshman Member of Congress who faced $4 million in attacks from AIPAC’s network of PACs when running for Congress last year.** [**Can you split a donation today between my and Rep. Summer Lee’s re-election campaigns? clean_body: The House passed a resolution denying Israeli government racist apartheid. | | | **Friend, This week, the House of Representatives passed a resolution denying Israel’s racist apartheid and reaffirming unconditional support of the Israeli government despite its increasing human rights abuses. With Israel’s government escalating violence against Palestinians, this is a dangerous move at a time when we must urgently hold Israel’s leaders accountable. For too long, Congress has been complicit in funding apartheid. But we’re building a movement of progressives who understand the crisis that Palestinians are facing, and who don’t look away. Rep. Summer Lee was among the few Democrats to vote NO on this week’s resolution , saying: “We are not true allies if we cannot push our partners to uphold basic human rights & democratic values. I cannot vote for unconditional support of any nation-state.” Summer Lee is standing up for human rights for all people, without exception. This takes political courage, especially as a freshman Member of Congress who faced $4 million in attacks from AIPAC’s network of PACs when running for Congress last year. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Summer Lee and Rashida Tlaib | | | | | | | | | | For her vote this week, Summer was targeted by GOP leaders and a Republican running in her congressional district. Democratic leaders also denounce women of color who dare to speak the truth about Israel’s human rights abuses. We need to keep Rep. Summer Lee in Congress and have her back as she faces attacks for staying true to our progressive values. Like me, she ran for Congress after having spent years fighting for justice in her community as a grassroots organizer and state legislator. Now that she’s in office, Summer is prioritizing the needs of the people over corporate greed, fighting for environmental and racial justice. Together, we’re taking on oppression in our communities and around the world. We will keep standing up for marginalized people, including Palestinians. In solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

subject: Affordable energy makes the economy work smoothly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Greg Wheeler]( "Paid for by Vote Greg Wheeler")
body:
Where do you stand | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e118e9ffffcf/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-6141345?e=d6699466fe)
---
| | [ ](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=685fa2c306&e=d6699466fe)
---
| Peter,
---
| | Since the 2000’s Democrats like Al Gore have turned our energy infrastructure into a political item. Gone are the days where we made decisions based on what is best for this country. I believe that a pragmatic and balanced approach is what's truly needed for our nation and something we must return to. We can protect our environment while safeguarding our economy and energy independence.

There's no denying that nuclear energy is one of the most efficient power sources available. Yet, its potential remains largely untapped, primarily due to misplaced apprehensions and policy hindrances. As your representative, I will dispel these fears and champion nuclear energy as a key part of our energy portfolio.

There's a difference between being anti-pollution and being anti-progress. Blanket regulations, abrupt changes, and lofty goals have serious economic repercussions if not implemented thoughtfully. It's crucial to strike a balance - setting achievable targets that serve the interests of the ordinary American.
---
| [ ](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=b87a9fdb4b&e=d6699466fe)
---
| Despite a majority of voters expressing concern about federal interference in decisions about personal vehicle choices, these voices are often dismissed in favor of special interests.

As your representative, I pledge to honor your sentiments and uphold the principles that our Constitutional Republic was built on. It's time we broke away from the monopolizing influence of the DC Lobbying Cartel and focused instead on what's best for the American people. When I talk with Ohioans, they make their opinion loud and clear:
**THEY WANT THEIR ENERGY CHEAP**
But I can't do it alone. [**I ask that you consider donating today so I can make that message Washington loud and clear!**](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=d83c0f8661&e=d6699466fe)

name: Team Magaziner
subject: Sign Seth’s birthday card!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress

* * *
We’re asking because this November, Louisianans might have to choose between Shawn and an extreme MAGA Republican endorsed by Trump himself — one sure to put special interests before the people of our state.
But unlike Trump’s pick for governor, Peter, Shawn Wilson WILL fight for working Louisianans at every turn. With 25 years of experience as a public servant under governors from both parties, Shawn knows the value of building bridges to progress. But before he can start tackling our state’s toughest obstacles as governor, _he needs to win this race._
**That’s why we need to know where we stand at every moment, so we’re asking now: If the election for governor were today, would you vote for Shawn?**
[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66850133/417774632/877175486?refcode=ea.3c030e0f-0628-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.3c030e0f-0628-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2MwMzBlMGYtMDYyOC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RhRDFD9PXTeTOTEu49yzxrEanR7DfesptqZKLHI0jRc=&emci=6291fc1a-fb27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=3c030e0f-0628-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=13775345) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66850134/417774633/877175486?refcode=ea.3c030e0f-0628-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.3c030e0f-0628-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2MwMzBlMGYtMDYyOC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RhRDFD9PXTeTOTEu49yzxrEanR7DfesptqZKLHI0jRc=&emci=6291fc1a-fb27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=3c030e0f-0628-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=13775345)

clean_body: We need 100 more responses from 71115 by midnight!! We have just one question, Peter: If the election for governor of Louisiana were today, would you be voting for Shawn Wilson? | | ---|--- We’re asking because this November, Louisianans might have to choose between Shawn and an extreme MAGA Republican endorsed by Trump himself — one sure to put special interests before the people of our state. But unlike Trump’s pick for governor, Peter, Shawn Wilson WILL fight for working Louisianans at every turn. With 25 years of experience as a public servant under governors from both parties, Shawn knows the value of building bridges to progress. But before he can start tackling our state’s toughest obstacles as governor, he needs to win this race. That’s why we need to know where we stand at every moment, so we’re asking now: If the election for governor were today, would you vote for Shawn? | ---|--- Thanks for taking our flash poll, Wilson HQ = =** | PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA Wilson for Louisiana P.O. subject: X-Files… Aliens?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/maherforcongress/senate-bill-14-killed-12761698?e=1722d05e10)
---
| | [ ](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=44d1d2b52a&e=1722d05e10)
---
| |
July 21, 2023

Friend,

Congress is set to hold hearings examining whether or not the US government has been withholding information about foreign or [extraterrestrial aircraft](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=f870046663&e=1722d05e10). _**I'll watch like everyone to see what comes out, but the greater point to me is ensuring that we have transparency in our government.**_

>From weather balloons to[ who left cocaine in the White House](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=748b6cd461&e=1722d05e10), the American people deserve to be told the straight story. And to be honest, that isn't what they are getting from the Biden Administration.

We need transparency and elected leaders who don't hide their behaviors or the facts behind some privilege. As a military veteran, I expect our leaders and our nation to be held to a higher standard, and that's what I want to bring to Congress.

[If government transparency is important to you, and you want someone who will fight for that in Congress, help me get there with a donation today of $20.](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=ee74d1f777&e=1722d05e10)
---

---
| Thank you so much for your continued support. Together we will make a difference in the future of our nation.

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| **Michael Maher**
Businessman | Veteran | Republican for Congress
---

---
| _**Background** : Michael Maher is a former FBI Special Agent and US Navy Veteran who was raised in the Central Valley. Michael and his wife, Ann, are raising their young family in Fresno County, and he owns and operates an aviation business. Michael was the 2022 nominee for California's 21st Congressional District._

name: Lexi Schiff
subject: Why I’m setting up a monthly recurring gift!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=3074%2E5257348%2ELCYG1Y ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Hi Derek —
It’s Adam’s daughter, Lexi.

I’ve always been a big fan of my dad’s, as seen in this adorable picture
of me as a kid.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230721_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=3074%2E5257348%2ELCYG1Y ]Photo of young Lexi Schiff hugging a TV with her dad, Adam Schiff, on the
screen

And I’m so proud of my dad for running for the U.S. Senate. He has stood
strong against all the attacks MAGA Republicans have thrown his way, like
Kevin McCarthy kicking him off the Intel Committee or last month’s censure
vote. And he hasn’t let it get in the way of his efforts to protect our
democracy and make a difference in people’s lives.

But truthfully,
Derek, there are so many
attacks that come his way sometimes it’s hard to keep up!

You probably know because he’s said it before, but the help he gets from
these emails allows him to build a strong operation that can respond to
all the false attacks. But did you know there is one extra important thing
you can do to help him out?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2342?c0=july2023_abs_em.tj5OUF&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230721_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=3074%2E5257348%2ELCYG1Y ]You can join me in setting up a monthly recurring contribution to my
dad’s campaign for the U.S. Senate!

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2342?c0=july2023_abs_em.tj5OUF&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230721_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=3074%2E5257348%2ELCYG1Y ]MAKE A MONTHLY GIFT

These emails help raise the resources to fend off the crazy attacks and
build a strong campaign. And recurring contributions allow my dad to plan
in advance (which we both love to do) because he knows what resources he
can count on not just now, but down the line too.

It could be $25 or even $3, every little bit added up makes a HUGE
difference.

Derek, I
know as well as you do that the attacks against my dad are only going to
ramp up as this campaign moves forward. Trump and his MAGA cronies love to
attack my dad on social media and talk about him on cable news (they’re
~obsessed~).

But my dad stays strong against the hate and the MAGA extremists trying to
slow down his Senate campaign. It’s not easy for him to stand up to these
constant attacks though, especially since he’s not taking a dime of
corporate PAC money, which is why I’m asking:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2342?c0=july2023_abs_em.tj5OUF&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230721_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=3074%2E5257348%2ELCYG1Y ]To show my dad that you’re with him in his fight to protect our
democracy and make it to the Senate, can you please start a monthly
recurring contribution to his campaign today?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
monthly recurring donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2343?c0=july2023_abs_em.H73Pol&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230721_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=3074%2E5257348%2ELCYG1Y ]DONATE $3 MONTHLY

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2344?c0=july2023_abs_em.F8_whB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230721_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=3074%2E5257348%2ELCYG1Y ]DONATE $10 MONTHLY

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2358?c0=july2023_abs_em.qDFP3-&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230721_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=3074%2E5257348%2ELCYG1Y ]DONATE $25 MONTHLY

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2346?c0=july2023_abs_em.edcJhb&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230721_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=3074%2E5257348%2ELCYG1Y ]DONATE $50 MONTHLY

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2359?c0=july2023_abs_em.4YjcDs&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230721_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=3074%2E5257348%2ELCYG1Y ]DONATE $100 MONTHLY

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2342?c0=july2023_abs_em.tj5OUF&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230721_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=3074%2E5257348%2ELCYG1Y ]ANOTHER MONTHLY AMOUNT

Thank you again for your support! It means so much to me, to my dad, to my
mom, and to everyone on Team Schiff 🙂

xx Lexi

P.S. Since you made it all the way through reading this email, here's
another fab pic of me and my dad! I think he should bring back those
sunglasses, let me know what you think.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230721_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=3074%2E5257348%2ELCYG1Y ]Photo of young Lexi Schiff with her dad, Adam. Both are wearing fun, stylish
sunglasses.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230721_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1015&akid=3074%2E5257348%2ELCYG1Y ]DONATE ONCE

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=3074%2E5257348%2ELCYG1Y ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=3074%2E5257348%2ELCYG1Y ]Privacy Policy

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3074%2E5257348%2ELCYG1Y

body:
It truly means so much to Joe, Kamala, and all of us here on the campaign to have you in the fight to move our country forward. | | |
---
Peter -- We promise to keep this brief since it’s Friday afternoon and we wouldn’t blame you if you’re eager to get your weekend started. Our campaign is rapidly growing -- we’re opening a new HQ in Wilmington, assembling a talented team, and getting ads up on the air to spotlight Joe and Kamala’s record. clean_body: It truly means so much to Joe, Kamala, and all of us here on the campaign to have you in the fight to move our country forward. | | | Peter -- We promise to keep this brief since it’s Friday afternoon and we wouldn’t blame you if you’re eager to get your weekend started. Our campaign is rapidly growing -- we’re opening a new HQ in Wilmington, assembling a talented team, and getting ads up on the air to spotlight Joe and Kamala’s record. But building a campaign with the strength to win this election will take the the support of grassroots donors across the country. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you for being a part of this team. It truly means so much to Joe, Kamala, and all of us here on the campaign to have you in the fight to move our country forward. Have a great weekend. \-- Team Biden-Harris

name: Team Becca
subject: Why we need your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont
body:
A few reasons:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66850391/417775445/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjlmOGY0My0wNzI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BFCdnFiamqKW0IRcrWCODTGcpm2dcXCDkgrZuWniqSM=&emci=2a7f9c75-f927-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=369f8f43-0728-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=43402272) | Peter, we wanted to share with you a few reasons why we really need your [_**help to catch up on our summer fundraising.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66850392/417775446/-1054670423?refcode=E3450-20230721-SummerFundraising-SL-Other&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjlmOGY0My0wNzI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BFCdnFiamqKW0IRcrWCODTGcpm2dcXCDkgrZuWniqSM=)
1. As a mom, teacher, member of the Budget and Judiciary committees, and one of only 11 openly LGBTQ+ members of the House, Becca's voice is critical. Your contributions help us **protect and amplify Becca’s voice in Congress.**

2. Becca has gone toe to toe with MAGA Republicans and allies, including calling them out for ridiculous attacks on trans youth, and she has received attacks — but your contributions help us **fight back against the far-right!**

3. We’re gearing up for a competitive primary here in Vermont, and grassroots contributions will be **key to re-electing Becca next year.**

[_**Peter, it’s crucial we catch up on our summer fundraising goals, and we can’t do it without your help. Click here to rush a contribution >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66850393/417775447/-1054670423?refcode=E3450-20230721-SummerFundraising-SL-Other&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjlmOGY0My0wNzI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BFCdnFiamqKW0IRcrWCODTGcpm2dcXCDkgrZuWniqSM=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66850394/417775448/-1054670423?express_lane=true&refcode=E3450-20230721-SummerFundraising-EG-Other&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjlmOGY0My0wNzI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BFCdnFiamqKW0IRcrWCODTGcpm2dcXCDkgrZuWniqSM=)** | **[$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66850395/417775449/-1054670423?express_lane=true&refcode=E3450-20230721-SummerFundraising-EG-Other&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjlmOGY0My0wNzI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BFCdnFiamqKW0IRcrWCODTGcpm2dcXCDkgrZuWniqSM=)**

name: Cornel West 24
subject: Cornel West Stands with UPS Workers - Unyielding Solidarity with Teamster Rank and File!
body:
Together, we will continue to fight for workers' rights

| | | [ ](https://www.cornelwest24.org/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=072123_ups_solidarity&n=1)
---
Peter - I write to you with unwavering passion and dedication in the heart of the fight for truth and justice. The path to creating unions and demanding fair pay has become challenging for workers in America, with Republicans and Democrats siding with greed and corporate profit. But in these trying times, I stand in solidarity with the rank-and-file Teamsters at UPS, who courageously demand a fair contract and just wages. It is truly outrageous that while UPS CEO, Carol Tomé, received an astounding $54.5 million in just two and a half years, the hardworking employees responsible for a $13 billion profit last year are offered mere 50-cent raises. Many of these dedicated workers have witnessed pay cuts of up to $6 an hour due to so-called "Market Rate Adjustments" being taken away. This insulting wage offer and the company's attempts to revoke existing language on cost-of-living allowances threaten to plummet the workers' living standards over the proposed five-year contract period. Such injustice cannot be tolerated. When railroad workers faced adversity last year, President Biden and the Democrat-controlled Congress let them down by depriving them of their right to strike and forcing them to work without meeting their demands for sick days. That's precisely why I stand as an independent candidate, resolute in my belief that workers have the right to join unions and withhold their labor to fight for safe conditions, reasonable hours, paid leave, healthcare, pensions, and a living wage. The courageous workers bargained in good faith in stark contrast to their greedy bosses. We must recognize the grossly unfair pay and benefits for part-time workers, who comprise over half of UPS's workforce. Should UPS fail to deliver a fair contract for these workers by the end of this month, the possibility of a strike looms, and I unequivocally stand by their struggle for justice. Together, we will continue to fight for workers' rights and advocate for a brighter, more equitable future. With deep passion and unyielding solidarity, Cornel West [](https://www.cornelwest24.org/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=072123_ups_solidarity&n=2)[https://www.cornelwest24.org/](https://www.cornelwest24.org/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=072123_ups_solidarity&n=3)
---
| [](https://www.cornelwest24.org/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=072123_ups_solidarity&n=4 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.cornelwest24.org/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=072123_ups_solidarity&n=4)
---
Cornel West for President · PO Box 796711, Dallas, TX 75379, United States
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com · [Unsubscribe](https://www.cornelwest24.org/unsubscribe?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=072123_ups_solidarity&n=5) Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.cornelwest24.org/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=072123_ups_solidarity&n=6). Build the Future.

name: Seth Moulton
subject: Share This Email to Save Lives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/74758/images/SM4Clogo.png]Dear friends,
It’s been one year since the 988 mental health lifeline officially went live nationwide, and I’m proud to report that it’s exceeding expectations and saving lives. I wrote the bill that created 988, alongside a Republican veteran from Utah, because Americans deserve improved mental health care access. The results after just one year show that 988 works, and that it needs even more resources to grow and improve.
Please share this message with your friends and family, so that more people know they can dial 988 to get help in a mental health crisis. [https://988lifeline.org/]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/74758/images/tweet.png]
Since launching, 988 has received close to 5 million calls, texts, and messages. Those calls are received by operators in 200+ independent crisis centers, including 6 in Massachusetts. There’s been a 75% drop in wait time, with the answer rate increasing from the low teens to over 90%. And the volume of text messages sent to 988 increased 1,000%. Here in Massachusetts, about 180 calls were answered per day.
Behind those statistics are real lives being saved.
Each year in America, 1 in 5 adults and 1 in 6 children experience mental illness, and suicide is currently our second leading cause of death for youth. In 2021, we lost someone to suicide every 11 minutes.
We’re talking about mental health more now – and more people are getting help because they simply know to dial 988. Just as we all know to call 911 if our house is on fire, we will soon all know to call 988 if we or our loved ones are in a mental health crisis.
But to get there, we need to spread the word. The first year has been a success, but there is work left to do so that every American knows this number: 988. Help me spread the word by having conversations with your friends and family, forwarding this email, and posting on social media.
988 suicide and crisis lifeline marks 1-year anniversary (VIDEO) [https://abcnews.go.com/ThisWeek/video/988-suicide-crisis-lifeline-marks-1-year-anniversary-101323034]
We need great staff and volunteers at the call centers so that we can expand 988 services. If you’re interested, find more information here [https://www.mass.gov/info-details/988-job-and-volunteer-opportunities] .
All the best,
Seth Moulton

clean_body: [ friends, It’s been one year since the 988 mental health lifeline officially went live nationwide, and I’m proud to report that it’s exceeding expectations and saving lives. I wrote the bill that created 988, alongside a Republican veteran from Utah, because Americans deserve improved mental health care access. The results after just one year show that 988 works, and that it needs even more resources to grow and improve. Please share this message with your friends and family, so that more people know they can dial 988 to get help in a mental health crisis. [] [] Since launching, 988 has received close to 5 million calls, texts, and messages. Those calls are received by operators in 200+ independent crisis centers, including 6 in Massachusetts. There’s been a 75% drop in wait time, with the answer rate increasing from the low teens to over 90%. And the volume of text messages sent to 988 increased 1,000%. Here in Massachusetts, about 180 calls were answered per day. Behind those statistics are real lives being saved. Each year in America, 1 in 5 adults and 1 in 6 children experience mental illness, and suicide is currently our second leading cause of death for youth. In 2021, we lost someone to suicide every 11 minutes. We’re talking about mental health more now – and more people are getting help because they simply know to dial 988. Just as we all know to call 911 if our house is on fire, we will soon all know to call 988 if we or our loved ones are in a mental health crisis. But to get there, we need to spread the word. The first year has been a success, but there is work left to do so that every American knows this number: 988. Help me spread the word by having conversations with your friends and family, forwarding this email, and posting on social media. 988 suicide and crisis lifeline marks 1-year anniversary (VIDEO) [] We need great staff and volunteers at the call centers so that we can expand 988 services. If you’re interested, find more information here [] . All the best, Seth Moulton If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . As you know from the flurry of emails and text messages late last month, the end of June marked our quarterly deadline.

We are required by the FEC to publicly disclose what we’ve raised in the past three months. And we’ve certainly been busy over the last quarter!

We’ve added _thousands_ of supporters on our team, including organizations like EMILYs List, sitting Members of Congress such as Rep. Linda Sánchez and Rep. Lois Frankel, and people like you.

We ended the quarter raising more money than any other Democrat in the race. And here’s something I’m proud of: **According to this quarter’s report, we received 25% more in grassroots contributions than any other candidate in the field.**

This means a lot to me. **When I started this campaign to keep CA-47 blue, this is exactly the type of support I wanted -- everyday people chipping in what they can, when they can.** We ended with a large fundraising total, but nothing means more to me than the thousands of small dollar donors that joined our team.

Because that’s how we’re going to win next November, Peter. It’s going to take the support of _all of us_ to beat the National Republican machine and their corporate PAC money.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Carmen=20Goers?=
subject: I’m not just “concerned” about Jayapal’s anti-Semitic remarks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carmen for Congress]( "Paid for by Carmen for Congress")
body:
I condemn them. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/25042bdc5921/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-in-the-8th-congressional-district-13562655?e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=6ee3349583&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | Peter,
---
| Why are Democrat lawmakers incapable of calling out their colleagues for bad behavior?

When Pramila Jayapal called Israel a ‘racist state’ and the Radical Left “Squad” of lawmakers boycotted Israeli President Isaac Herzog’s address to a joint session of Congress, my incumbent opponent shared _[“I am concerned about recent comments”](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=31c9fcfa75&e=0e51d1e991)_.

Each member of Congress represents approximately 761,179 Americans – and when they make anti-semitic remarks that can apply to an entire ethnic population of Jewish Americans and a foreign ally – concern should give rise to action!
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=ba53abbb12&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| I condemn Pramila Jayapal’s anti-semetic remarks and believe every member of Congress – Democrat and Republican – should as well. We’ve seen this behavior from her and her colleagues in The Squad, and it’s clear that they’ve been enabled to escalate their anti-semitic hatred unchecked.

Peter, no national leader should feel emboldened to use their position as a podium to air their racial prejudice against a people or a nation. Given license to do so sets a precedent that it’s okay to endanger different ethnicities within the American population and our relationship with historical allies!

_**For that reason, I also believe that Pramila Jayapal should be censured for her remarks**_. [**Join me in calling on Congress to censure Jayapal to stop enabling her outright anti-semtic actions:**](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=5ae1a7e03f&e=0e51d1e991)

clean_body: I condemn them. | | | | | | | Peter, | Why are Democrat lawmakers incapable of calling out their colleagues for bad behavior? When Pramila Jayapal called Israel a ‘racist state’ and the Radical Left “Squad” of lawmakers boycotted Israeli President Isaac Herzog’s address to a joint session of Congress, my incumbent opponent shared . Each member of Congress represents approximately 761,179 Americans – and when they make anti-semitic remarks that can apply to an entire ethnic population of Jewish Americans and a foreign ally – concern should give rise to action! | | I condemn Pramila Jayapal’s anti-semetic remarks and believe every member of Congress – Democrat and Republican – should as well. We’ve seen this behavior from her and her colleagues in The Squad, and it’s clear that they’ve been enabled to escalate their anti-semitic hatred unchecked. Peter, no national leader should feel emboldened to use their position as a podium to air their racial prejudice against a people or a nation. Given license to do so sets a precedent that it’s okay to endanger different ethnicities within the American population and our relationship with historical allies! For that reason, I also believe that Pramila Jayapal should be censured for her remarks. | "ADD YOUR NAME »" | For Washington, | | Carmen Goers Candidate for U.S. Congress, WA-8 | | | | | | | | | | | | "Paid for by Carmen for Congress" | | Copyright © 2023 Carmen for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Don’t let the EPA approve bee-killing neonics for another 15 years
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1889592?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Vulnerable bees are dying out rapidly; we must STOP neonic pesticides from sending critical pollinators to EXTINCTION.** [**Take action now! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1889593?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) Imagine walking into the grocery store to see the shelves nearly bare, particularly the produce section where we buy many of our most nutritious foods. _**That’s the grim reality of a world without pollinators, Friend.**_ We rely on bees and other insect pollinators for **1 in 3 bites of food we eat** , including veggies, fruits, and nuts. But pesticide companies are ignoring public demands to prioritize pollinators and public health above corporate profits. Instead, these greedy corporations continue to push sales of neonics — the most widely used insecticides in the world. These harmful chemicals are largely responsible for pushing bees and other endangered pollinators _**closer to EXTINCTION every day.**_ _**And now, the EPA could approve these toxic chemicals for another 15 years!**_ , if we don’t act fast to _**STOP THE INSECT APOCALYPSE**_ and _**PROTECT BEES**_ from toxic neonics, we could soon face devastating consequences to our entire ecosystem. [**Our pollinators and our planet cannot afford another moment of inaction, so please step up and take action before it’s too late! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1889594?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1889595?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Over the last 20 years alone, we’ve already seen a **drastic decline** in bee populations including __**87%**__ of the Rusty-Patched Bumblebee, __**89%**__ of the American Bumblebee, and __**93%**__ of the Western Bumblebee.
**Make no mistake, Friend** : Fragile bee populations could be completely _**WIPED OUT**_ if the EPA decides to approve bee-killing neonics for**another 15 years.**
In fact, the EPA itself has even cited __“devastating consequences to our ecosystems, particularly pollinators”__ associated with the widespread use of neonics. _**And yet the agency has refused to hold Big Ag companies accountable for these toxic pesticides!**_
The EU has already banned the worst neonics, and some U.S. states have even taken action to limit the use of these harmful chemicals. But without bold action at the federal level, vulnerable pollinators stand little chance of survival. We need **4,922 more environmentalists like you** to speak up by **11:59 P.M. TONIGHT** if we’re going to send a powerful message to the EPA. [**Can we count on you to step up right now and DEMAND that the EPA ban bee-killing neonics immediately? ADD YOUR NAME NOW >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1889596?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1889595?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Friends of the Earth**
|

Peter,

We’re nearing another monthly deadline, and we want to update you quickly on where we are with our fundraising.

Last month, your support helped us hit our monthly goal, but we are falling significantly short in July. We know the summer months are typically a slow time to build campaign momentum.

But Peter, we don’t take your support for granted.

Your donations help us pay campaign staff, organize community events, and give Valerie the resources to continue fighting for critical issues like reproductive justice, voting rights, and public school funding. With Republicans ramping up their efforts to attack these issues, we need to keep up the pace. body:
As Republican policies seek to push the Latino vote to the sideline, I will fight to ensure Latinos have a seat at the table.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66851201/417777991/2074316475?refcode=BLU-SAN-20230721-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTIzNGNjZS0wOTI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qLEWUr8YxDIBUNu6a51eRVsS_m2d2zg8gQoXaSxBLBs=)

| Quick update Peter,

We have ten days until our July deadline, and we want to make sure we’re in a good spot. Contributions from grassroots supporters like you can make or break a campaign. And in such a pivotal year, we want to ensure your donations are well worth the investment.

As the chair of BOLD PAC, the campaign arm of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus, I stand ready to elect Latino progressives who will fight back against regressive Republican policies and expand voting rights.

This isn’t a position I take for granted. Growing up in a working-class Latino family, access to the ballot was something we had to work to obtain. As Republican policies seek to push the Latino vote to the sideline, I will fight to ensure Latinos have a seat at the table.

[_**I can’t do it without you, Peter. So, before our July fundraising deadline, will you support my campaign with a $1 contribution?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66851203/417777993/919917611?refcode=BLU-SAN-20230721-1-EM&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTIzNGNjZS0wOTI4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qLEWUr8YxDIBUNu6a51eRVsS_m2d2zg8gQoXaSxBLBs=)

clean_body: As Republican policies seek to push the Latino vote to the sideline, I will fight to ensure Latinos have a seat at the table. | = | Quick update Peter, We have ten days until our July deadline, and we want to make sure we’re in a good spot. Contributions from grassroots supporters like you can make or break a campaign. And in such a pivotal year, we want to ensure your donations are well worth the investment. As the chair of BOLD PAC, the campaign arm of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus, I stand ready to elect Latino progressives who will fight back against regressive Republican policies and expand voting rights. This isn’t a position I take for granted. Growing up in a working-class Latino family, access to the ballot was something we had to work to obtain. As Republican policies seek to push the Latino vote to the sideline, I will fight to ensure Latinos have a seat at the table. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = I don’t take your support for granted, Peter. Thank you, Linda * | | = Paid for by Stand with Sanchez Stand with Sánchez P.O. subject: A once-in-a-generation opportunity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66851718/417779561/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmZkNTM2NzktMGIyOC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=L3iSZNErJ6ue_ONNChCH31x0jnob_NAMeZElPDlYO-g=) Friend,

You’ve heard this from us before – in 2024, CA-30 will have the chance to elect a new representative for the first time in over _twenty years_. With a rare opportunity like this, we have to make sure we elect the best possible leader to fight for our community in Congress.

Here’s how we know that Laura is that leader:

**→ She’s the most viable progressive woman in the race for CA-30.** With reproductive rights facing the biggest threat they’ve seen in decades, women’s voices in government are more important than ever.

**→ She has the experience to hit the ground running.** Between her service in the State Assembly and as Mayor of Glendale, Laura has tangible experience passing meaningful legislation on issues like reproductive rights, affordable housing, and addressing climate change. She’s uniquely qualified to hit the ground running on day one.

**→ She won’t take a cent of corporate PAC money.** By refusing all contributions from corporate PACs, Laura is leading with integrity and ensuring that she’ll only ever be accountable to you and your families, not special interests.

**[CA-30 deserves a leader like Laura, but she can’t win without a groundswell of grassroots support. Can we count on you to chip in now to take advantage of this incredible opportunity?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66851719/417779562/-1241314520?refcode=em-7.21.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmZkNTM2NzktMGIyOC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=L3iSZNErJ6ue_ONNChCH31x0jnob_NAMeZElPDlYO-g=)**

clean_body: | = Friend, You’ve heard this from us before – in 2024, CA-30 will have the chance to elect a new representative for the first time in over twenty years. With a rare opportunity like this, we have to make sure we elect the best possible leader to fight for our community in Congress. Here’s how we know that Laura is that leader: → She’s the most viable progressive woman in the race for CA-30. With reproductive rights facing the biggest threat they’ve seen in decades, women’s voices in government are more important than ever. → She has the experience to hit the ground running. Between her service in the State Assembly and as Mayor of Glendale, Laura has tangible experience passing meaningful legislation on issues like reproductive rights, affordable housing, and addressing climate change. She’s uniquely qualified to hit the ground running on day one. → She won’t take a cent of corporate PAC money. By refusing all contributions from corporate PACs, Laura is leading with integrity and ensuring that she’ll only ever be accountable to you and your families, not special interests. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thanks for being with us! \-- Laura Friedman HQ | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! Fellow American,

As the Sheriff in Pinal county, I found the best way to understand the needs of my community is to be actively involved and interacting with the people I serve.

While I am well-known in my home of Pinal County, **Arizona's significant size, encompassing over 113,000 square miles and a population of more than 7.2 million people,** requires a concerted effort to connect with potential voters.

With such a vast territory and nearly 4.9 million potential voters, it's clear that **I have a substantial task ahead of me** , but the people of Arizona deserve the opportunity to understand exactly who they are sending to represent them in Washington.

**Arizona Deserves Better**
1. Our border is still out of control and needs to be secured

2. Families are suffering from inflation, significantly impacting the cost of living

3. Our elected officials need to be held accountable for policies good and bad

However, connecting with these potential voters, as I have found, doesn't come cheap**;** and given that I drive a Ford F-350, my campaign is spending a lot of money on gas. It's absolutely worth the incurred expense, **with that said, each time I fill up it costs my campaign more than $120!**

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=178168af684b4985a674078e9212498e&_e=KJ-mv7iGAexbQREQ1Rwvuh-viYTZ60mleoC1_nCjB3TJYaE1I1ViPn7JsMptlXqOXULXmyv-wOsnqLy_PFKkOgecgkZkBWUZsCqmc33YoxDtrsmP41dPOyRZGGpgLSx09vxKEtSvcxERGY0M-mQMDZMX0Hnp_8AQ2RPbEq5O6ca42nVArf1tlQiOGLKwrO9sqxfDDBNq_zI1G5-qREJfkmfIxLFqa8ovLA86pDHIdj7Wcc23-wt-6n5Py4vFPMo3WEzJiGz8oWjURnhmos_jlkSRJBOMD-CDj-H2Pt0rRji6-JEO0k_cB8R93_doRfUEpqfo9HRNbF8D4OF21PR6zSXcXNkL0O1humCzNv3nRy2Scr4F3I3PeLJvQcKRStSMrRX3XAtfuoM3oYXKOVMjcg%3D%3D)
Given that I go through a tank of gas a day, **driving around the state contacting voters costs more than $3,700 per month.** **

The average cost for a regular gallon of gas still costs $3.79, ranking Arizona in the 10 most expensive State averages. This is unacceptable and Arizona deserves better!**

I never assume anyone’s ability to make a financial contribution, but if you are able to contribute, even a modest amount, it would be immensely appreciated. **[For instance, a donation as small as $3.50, just about the average cost of a gallon of gas in Arizona, would make a difference.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=178168af684b4985a674078e9212498e&_e=KJ-mv7iGAexbQREQ1Rwvuh-viYTZ60mleoC1_nCjB3TJYaE1I1ViPn7JsMptlXqOXULXmyv-wOsnqLy_PFKkOgecgkZkBWUZsCqmc33YoxDtrsmP41dPOyRZGGpgLSx09vxKEtSvcxERGY0M-mQMDZMX0Hnp_8AQ2RPbEq5O6ca42nVArf1tlQiOGLKwrO9sqxfDDBNq_zI1G5-qREJfkmfIxLFqa8ovLA86pDHIdj7Wcc23-wt-6n5Py4vFPMo3_YvVSPcl6yQIMsHTVkN5NVxwZpNbcxfqjlRtvbANcs9vXIZe-TbPG0OOT_JbHPtCPEtTSoAUUYCA4EoLoohnxtlWCVWF2J31krPL8z-pPBYygJwnX8xS4IThKO_OUdcYDAd7fwcumCv-I24JwpbqHw%3D%3D)**

Any contribution you're able to make would be of great assistance.

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.
