clean_body: At more than 113,000 square miles, I have a lot of ground to cover as I work to meet every Republican that I can | | Fellow American, As the Sheriff in Pinal county, I found the best way to understand the needs of my community is to be actively involved and interacting with the people I serve. While I am well-known in my home of Pinal County, Arizona's significant size, encompassing over 113,000 square miles and a population of more than 7.2 million people, requires a concerted effort to connect with potential voters. With such a vast territory and nearly 4.9 million potential voters, it's clear that I have a substantial task ahead of me , but the people of Arizona deserve the opportunity to understand exactly who they are sending to represent them in Washington. Arizona Deserves Better 1. Our border is still out of control and needs to be secured 2. Families are suffering from inflation, significantly impacting the cost of living 3. Our elected officials need to be held accountable for policies good and bad However, connecting with these potential voters, as I have found, doesn't come cheap; and given that I drive a Ford F-350, my campaign is spending a lot of money on gas. It's absolutely worth the incurred expense, with that said, each time I fill up it costs my campaign more than $120! Given that I go through a tank of gas a day, driving around the state contacting voters costs more than $3,700 per month. The average cost for a regular gallon of gas still costs $3.79, ranking Arizona in the 10 most expensive State averages. This is unacceptable and Arizona deserves better! I never assume anyone’s ability to make a financial contribution, but if you are able to contribute, even a modest amount, it would be immensely appreciated. Alternatively, a contribution of would buy me two gallons, and a gift of would cover the expenses of a full tank Any contribution you're able to make would be of great assistance. Your support in helping us expand our outreach and to connect with voters would be invaluable. Together, we can make a positive impact and strengthen our campaign. Thank you for your consideration, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. They’ve said it was okay to discriminate against LGBTQ+ Americans, rolled back student loan forgiveness and more.

These rulings are a reminder of just how conservative the Supreme Court has become and a couple of judges' recent actions have raised serious ethical questions.

ProPublica first reported that Justice Clarence Thomas has for years accepted trips from GOP mega donor and developer Harlan Crow, including on his private jet and superyacht, without disclosing them on financial disclosures as federal law requires.

And ProPublica also reported that Justice Samuel Alito failed to disclose that he had enjoyed an all-expenses-paid, high-end fishing trip to Alaska, complete with private jet travel, courtesy of hedge fund titan Paul Singer, a major Republican donor, who has been involved in 10 appeals to the Supreme Court.

These secret gifts could all too easily have a bearing on his decisions in the court, leading to major corruption in the highest court in the land, which is why we want to know:

**Should Justices on the Supreme Court be held to the same ethical requirements as members of Congress?**

| | Friend,

---
With a THIRD unjust indictment now looming, it’s important to ask exactly what Crooked Joe and his corrupt DOJ _really_ hope to achieve by dragging me through these endless witch hunts.

---
Make no mistake, their nefarious intentions go far beyond trying to force me to shut down our 2024 campaign.

---
**From the “Boxes Hoax” _alone_ , these crooks are hoping to throw me in JAIL for LIFE.**

---
**But even for an energetic guy like me, the outrageous threat of 400 YEARS in prison isn’t _just_ meant to keep me off the ballot – it’s meant to INTIMIDATE _YOU_ ... **

---
_**...to send you a message that if you stand up to the Left’s Marxist agenda, then _YOU_ too could be made an example of.**_

---
But what Crooked Joe and his Deep State thugs believed would be the ultimate shakedown of our America First Movement, has only STRENGTHENED our resolve.

---
And with each passing attack, witch hunt, and indictment, our beautiful movement continues to stand tall.

---
Because __WE__ will NEVER SURRENDER our country!

---
We will stare down this tyranny, we will never flinch, and _together_ , we will SAVE AMERICA.

---
**So, with yet another unjust indictment looming, will YOU stand with me once more and help peacefully DEFEND our movement when it matters most?**

---

clean_body: They’re trying to send a message... to YOU.| | | | | Friend, With a THIRD unjust indictment now looming, it’s important to ask exactly what Crooked Joe and his corrupt DOJ really hope to achieve by dragging me through these endless witch hunts. Make no mistake, their nefarious intentions go far beyond trying to force me to shut down our 2024 campaign. From the “Boxes Hoax” alone , these crooks are hoping to throw me in JAIL for LIFE. But even for an energetic guy like me, the outrageous threat of 400 YEARS in prison isn’t just meant to keep me off the ballot – it’s meant to INTIMIDATE YOU ... ...to send you a message that if you stand up to the Left’s Marxist agenda, then YOU too could be made an example of. But what Crooked Joe and his Deep State thugs believed would be the ultimate shakedown of our America First Movement, has only STRENGTHENED our resolve. And with each passing attack, witch hunt, and indictment, our beautiful movement continues to stand tall. Because WE will NEVER SURRENDER our country! We will stare down this tyranny, we will never flinch, and together , we will SAVE AMERICA. So, with yet another unjust indictment looming, will YOU stand with me once more and help peacefully DEFEND our movement when it matters most? - | | Thank you, Donald J. clean_body: TN state law requires a special election to be held for these vacancies, so Reps. Jones and Pearson will have to face ANOTHER election. | | | | | FIRST: GOP lawmakers expelled two Democrats from the Tennessee House for participating in protests calling for gun safety legislation. THEN: The Nashville Metro Council and the Shelby County Board of Commissioners voted to reappoint Reps. Jones and Pearson to the TN House. BUT NOW: Tennessee state law requires a special election to be held for these vacancies, so Reps. Jones and Pearson will have to face ANOTHER election after their GOP-led, anti-democratic expulsion. And these special elections won’t be easy – the Tennessee GOP hasn’t backed down at all from their anti-democratic attacks. So it’s critical that we mobilize now to give state Democrats the resources they need to defeat their Republican opponents in special elections like these and across the country. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Special elections represent critical opportunities to stand up to the GOP’s extremism – every Democratic win proves the strength of this people-powered movement to elect state Democrats. I know we have strong grassroots support in you, and together we can fight for a cleaner and greener future by replacing fossil fuel allies with climate champions at every level of government.

clean_body: When we combine our grassroots strength, our impact is amplified as we fight back against Big Oil. | | Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. I’m reaching out to let you know what we’re up against: The fossil fuel industry is spending millions of dollars in races across the country to make sure their political allies stay in office as they continue to burn planet-warming fossil fuels. I know we have strong grassroots support in you, and together we can fight for a cleaner and greener future by replacing fossil fuel allies with climate champions at every level of government. = | = No amount is too small. When we combine our grassroots strength, our impact is amplified as we fight back against Big Oil. What was that quote again, Peter? _“Sure Fred Astaire was great, but don’t forget that Ginger Rogers did everything he did...backwards and in high heels.”_ Women running for office face all the same challenges as men — while ALSO having to fight twice as hard to be heard, respected, and supported. That's why we're here. We support progressive women running up and down the ballot. Candidates who aren't getting the support they need from establishment groups, but who have the guts and vision to make a real difference in government. clean_body: | = What was that quote again, Peter? “Sure Fred Astaire was great, but don’t forget that Ginger Rogers did everything he did...backwards and in high heels.” Women running for office face all the same challenges as men — while ALSO having to fight twice as hard to be heard, respected, and supported. That's why we're here. We support progressive women running up and down the ballot. Candidates who aren't getting the support they need from establishment groups, but who have the guts and vision to make a real difference in government. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you! — HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Team Franz
subject: Our race has shifted!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz (D)

Top political experts are saying the race for Washington's Governor is in play.

We can’t take our race for granted. _**Dave Reichert has a strong record winning the toughest races, and Republicans are going to spend big here.**_

**We also know Hilary is the best candidate to beat him.**

Hilary has what it takes to garner support across the state. She's been on the front lines in every county in Washington for more than seven years as Commissioner of Public Lands. But to ensure she's ready to take on Reichert and the GOP, she needs your help. name: Will Hurd
subject: Discussing AI In New Hampshire
body:
What You May Have Missed
---
| | | | | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
|
---
| _Welcome to The Brief! Common sense takes on current events, national security, and technology and the latest campaign info. It’s designed to make you smarter in less than 5 minutes! If you were forwarded this message, you can get_[ _The Brief here_](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SwqjWE9AVSrhUQO3Hke6ErDEjay4/1o7Gf3RzTjN_) _._
---
| Dear Friends, In the world of international politics, the game of chess continues to evolve. This time, it's not about military might or economic sanctions, but technology.
The recent NATO summit that discussed Ukraine was almost a disaster because they failed to give explicit guidance of how or when Ukraine could join, but a take I shared on socials got some people thinking.
When I was a kid, I never thought I would be involved at the cutting edge of technology, let alone speaking somewhere that 67 years ago set the stage for one of the most important technologies in human history.
Here are 3 things that haven’t gotten proper attention since we last talked.
---
| | [](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SwqjWE9AVvCPgqmPNfoMIgb3iKg8/9qxag3L9ch-W)
---
---
| | | | |
### 1\. CHINESE CYBER ESPIONAGE: ANOTHER FRONT IN DIPLOMACY
---

|
---
| U.S. Secretary of State Antony Blinken shakes hands with China's Director of the Office of the Central Foreign Affairs Commission Wang Yi at the Diaoyutai State Guesthouse in Beijing, China, June 19, 2023. **Big Picture:** A Chinese [hacking operation breached US government email systems ](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SwqjWE9AWNX7tHAlTaycMVysh4OC/IKV314KwwDmC)giving the Chinese government insights about US thinking heading into Secretary of State Antony Blinken’s trip to Beijing in June.
**Why it Matters** : The hack, discovered by the State Department around the time of Blinken’s visit, underlines the complexities of modern diplomacy. It's a stark reminder that in this digital age, information is power, and those who control it have the upper hand.
* This is not just an espionage issue. By 2025, it’s predicted the global economy will lose $10.5 trillion because of cybercrime.

**The State of Play:** This incident is another example of how our adversaries, especially the Chinese Government, aren't concerned with any negative repercussions from their actions.
* Chinese-linked hackers deployed the most zero-day vulnerabilities in 2022. A zero-day is the most sophisticated kind of cyber attack. China is growing in sophistication and willingness to deploy cyber attacks.

**Go Deeper:** The Biden Administrations hasn’t figured out how to administer consequences to the Chinese antics. At a minimum we need our allies to join us in a collective response.
* Read more about [Why Cybersecurity is Important](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SwqjWE9AWprq5hZ7ZW8sQLMhfo6G/dmsd9Un3qbY2).

---

| | | | |
### 2\. WE WON'T START WORLD WAR III
---

|
---
| **The 1 Big Idea:** We created an international order that has benefited us – not defending it will hurt us.
**Why This Matters:** Nobody wants the Ukraine conflict to become a forever war. The way to prevent this from happening is making sure the Ukrainains have all the equipment and tools to win the war quickly.
* At the cost of merely 5% of U.S. Defense spending and without any American casualties, Ukraine is effectively dismantling the Russian army.

**Bottom-line:** If you want perspectives like this on the Republican Presidential debate stage, help me get 40,000 individual donors by Aug 23. The maximum a person can give me for the entire primary campaign is $3,300, but any amount matters.
* [Click here](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SwqjWE9AXICYI7xTfRJ8UAkWeXoK/hrpHDD4DTSx7) to help us talk to more people and qualify for the debate stage. Even donating $1 helps!

---

| | | | |
### 3\. 67 YEARS LATER
---

|
---
| Photo: Aerial image of Dartmouth College in Hanover, NH **Big Picture:** Yesterday, July 20th, I was back in New Hampshire visiting the Rockefeller Center at Dartmouth University speaking at their "Path to the Presidency'' forum. The discussion was focused on a range of topics, but mostly on AI.
* Dartmouth College is important to AI because it was the site of the Dartmouth Workshop in 1956, where the term "artificial intelligence" was first used. The workshop brought together a group of researchers from different fields to discuss the possibility of creating machines that could think like humans.

**Bottom Line:** I announced some of the things I would be doing on Day One when it comes to Artificial Intelligence. You can [watch yesterday's livestream here](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SwqjWE9AXkXGUYLplMTOY08LdHWO/A5ndanqYc2R8).
---

| Thanks for subscribing and reading all the way to the end, I really appreciate you.
If you have 30 seconds, I need your help to double the number of our subscribers to The Brief. Please forward this to two friends that you think would enjoy or benefit from it.
God bless America and don’t forget to donate today! Thank you!

Will Hurd
---

| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: FW: FEAR
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
As I told Sean Hannity at my town hall...

As I told Sean Hannity at my town hall...
| | Friend,
---
After I was unjustly indicted by Crooked Joe's corrupt DOJ in June as a completely innocent man, I sent you an email letting you know what these witch hunts are REALLY all about...
**_... FEAR. _**
The fear that if you stand in the way of the Left's Marxist agenda, then YOU could be INDICTED, ARRESTED, or IMPRISONED for _LIFE_ for your beliefs.
The fear that if you give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, then YOU could be made their public enemy #1.
And the fear that if you vote for the ONLY candidate who will put you FIRST, then YOU could be their next target.
Just the other night at my town hall with Sean Hannity, he asked me how I remain "unbothered" despite the never-ending witch hunts.
But the truth is, they _do_ bother me - _not because I 'm worried about my own fate, **but because of what it means for YOU and the incredible sold-out audience of patriots at my town hall. **_
Make no mistake, the radical Democrats see the polls, they see we are CRUSHING not just our Republican primary opponents, but Biden as well by tremendous numbers.
And so they think that by burying me in never-ending witch hunts, indictments, and even arrests, that they will intimidate YOU out of casting a vote to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN.
_But what these thugs will never understand is that our movement is nothing like the cowardly RINOs or the special interest sell-outs ... _

clean_body: As I told Sean Hannity at my town hall... As I told Sean Hannity at my town hall... | | Friend, After I was unjustly indicted by Crooked Joe's corrupt DOJ in June as a completely innocent man, I sent you an email letting you know what these witch hunts are REALLY all about... ... FEAR. The fear that if you stand in the way of the Left's Marxist agenda, then YOU could be INDICTED, ARRESTED, or IMPRISONED for LIFE for your beliefs. The fear that if you give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, then YOU could be made their public enemy #1. And the fear that if you vote for the ONLY candidate who will put you FIRST, then YOU could be their next target. Just the other night at my town hall with Sean Hannity, he asked me how I remain "unbothered" despite the never-ending witch hunts. But the truth is, they do bother me - not because I 'm worried about my own fate, but because of what it means for YOU and the incredible sold-out audience of patriots at my town hall. Make no mistake, the radical Democrats see the polls, they see we are CRUSHING not just our Republican primary opponents, but Biden as well by tremendous numbers. And so they think that by burying me in never-ending witch hunts, indictments, and even arrests, that they will intimidate YOU out of casting a vote to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. But what these thugs will never understand is that our movement is nothing like the cowardly RINOs or the special interest sell-outs ... ... No, OUR MAGA Movement is more than 74 MILLION freedom-loving patriots who REFUSE to even flinch in the face of tyranny! Which is why at this pivotal moment for our nation - and with a THIRD unjust indictment now looming - I ask that you help me PROVE just how UNBREAKABLE we truly are. | | Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Fri, Jun 9, 2023 Subject: re: My Indictment To: </cdn-cgi/l/email-protection> | Friend, Let me make something abundantly clear... What the radical Left and the Deep State are doing - this backwards INDICTMENT - is not about truth or justice. It 's about FEAR. The fear that if you stand in the way of their Marxist agenda, then YOU could be INDICTED, ARRESTED, or IMPRISONED for your beliefs. The fear that if you give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, then YOU could be made their public enemy #1. Because the America we once knew and loved is now gone. It has been transformed into a Third World tin-pot dictatorship where the Democrats have gained complete control through the weaponization of our justice system. But even during these darkest times, my resolve to save America does not waiver. I will never give up, and I will never end this campaign. Because YOU - the countless patriots who refuse to even flinch in the face of tyranny - are my hope, my courage, and my strength to NEVER SURRENDER our country to the radical Left. And that UNBREAKABLE resolve is something these sick and twisted radicals will never understand. Which is why despite all their vicious attacks, their lies, and their witch hunts, I only grow that much more confident that we WILL win back the White House and SAVE our country in 2024! | | Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. ## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

And trust us, this is one ad you want to see! | | | | | | Thank you, Tell It Like It Is PAC | Why Chris Christie: Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. name: Tim Holbert, American Veterans Center
subject: Help me teach our children the bravery of WWII veterans
body:
Our schools used to teach every child about D-Day. Among the thousands of heroes of the longest day were the 12 soldiers who received the Medal of Honor for their courage and valor... but that’s no longer the case. WAs our Greatest Generation has passed, we have failed to teach our children the legacy of service, honor, and sacrifice of the men who fought their way into Hitler’s Fortress Europe.| | | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=a240c31501dc49988a11a60033000ef5&_t=vu9aOsekzKM6dppXUZZUzfirW2DzlcxQgMA1_lurlA7OpPlbwgNhRupgXoYhYZLXHeyI54cX77Mx30jrHv9UqLExydUh7mEaqf9lnlOJHq0%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=a240c31501dc49988a11a60033000ef5&_t=vu9aOsekzKM6dppXUZZUzfirW2DzlcxQgMA1_lurlA7OpPlbwgNhRupgXoYhYZLXHeyI54cX77Mx30jrHv9UqLExydUh7mEaqf9lnlOJHq0%3D)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a240c31501dc49988a11a60033000ef5&_e=MagHitqGI16L285ZaD8AqzlnZk0O0wDNjiJu8WT2ISYbOjC-93GEnkxE2rzlcwPqJnyuyF772dM68Xdcd54Rlc2hzaM0dvS1u1NSCYJCMl0h_z_j5WJeWcTRQkeqwI4oplxmkjYPblCusNbjFWm53WK_qQiHLEtF31gQGUQHRrGtADwvDurWfqDzhrbI0TD0wNsmSQO1-6DKIMN6HQa_2Uih5-0wxgANco4HPQsWNwQV5A7FeccR46zdR_SQIckdDr8JpoP136Cs6zq3uO46EZI_u1IPxRGRE38Tom8KzP5lIHBBjkxKMgmb6tT2knoX)
---
Peter, Our schools used to teach every child about D-Day. Among the thousands of heroes of the longest day were the 12 soldiers who received the Medal of Honor for their courage and valor... but that’s no longer the case. WAs our Greatest Generation has passed, we have failed to teach our children the legacy of service, honor, and sacrifice of the men who fought their way into Hitler’s Fortress Europe. In a recent poll of High School Seniors:
* 72% Didn’t know we fought Hitler during World War II.
* 87% Didn’t know we entered WWII because of the attacks on Pearl Harbor.
* 60% Didn’t know which countries we fought in WWII
* 13% Thought General Dwight Eisenhower was a general from the Civil War

Peter, American kids are not being taught our nation’s history. According to ‘The Nation’s Report Card,’ America’s high schoolers’ proficiency in U.S. History and Civics is at its lowest level in nearly 30 years. They know little of the immense courage our troops displayed fighting for their freedoms in the Second World War, and they know little of the heroes who gave their life in service to our country. In fact, most Americans these days know next to nothing about World War II and the millions of young soldiers who put their lives on the line to serve their country in the war, let alone in Korea or Vietnam. To help educate young Americans about the selfless, patriotic, and courageous heroes in WWII, the American Veterans Center created a limited-edition booklet — **_A Mighty Endeavor: Operation Overlord through the Eyes of D-Day’s Greatest Heroes._** [**For the next 24 hours, I’m holding a copy of this brand new, one-of-a-kind booklet for you, Peter. With your gift of any amount today, a copy of _A Mighty Endeavor_ will be yours to share with family and friends. **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a240c31501dc49988a11a60033000ef5&_e=MagHitqGI16L285ZaD8AqzlnZk0O0wDNjiJu8WT2ISYbOjC-93GEnkxE2rzlcwPqJnyuyF772dM68Xdcd54Rlc2hzaM0dvS1u1NSCYJCMl0h_z_j5WJeWcTRQkeqwI4oplxmkjYPblCusNbjFWm53WK_qQiHLEtF31gQGUQHRrEGTpLEfOuUcaKrwfYi_Yzjxn68uhNEDdL0oVCB9WCXLDJz1e7Fh1rCCmbhLfnrn_OBdjrVZ37Uq7pljgPNIjcfdLX2-IrNbAFuPdhfXpX2An4doJTzJGwUG2jTrzO-G7eFsH6_tIrRh8rpC2NhZDIk)
---
[Claim your copy of **_A Mighty Endeavor_**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a240c31501dc49988a11a60033000ef5&_e=MagHitqGI16L285ZaD8AqzlnZk0O0wDNjiJu8WT2ISYbOjC-93GEnkxE2rzlcwPqJnyuyF772dM68Xdcd54Rlc2hzaM0dvS1u1NSCYJCMl0h_z_j5WJeWcTRQkeqwI4oplxmkjYPblCusNbjFWm53WK_qQiHLEtF31gQGUQHRrGf9bNSuSlK3GmTwZrD1ipPZDBPAlvuarVWiVVWLfq9bLuD1b6s3qeLZzuQTFpoaPnASE_MgRW-rrApyCwWpdF9roC6aoRLDctZwIITLXe_e-nAa7D9J-aL3is2guUYVQocFsCqNkZkb9hh4qYCROXj)
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a240c31501dc49988a11a60033000ef5&_e=MagHitqGI16L285ZaD8AqzlnZk0O0wDNjiJu8WT2ISYbOjC-93GEnkxE2rzlcwPqJnyuyF772dM68Xdcd54Rlc2hzaM0dvS1u1NSCYJCMl0h_z_j5WJeWcTRQkeqwI4oplxmkjYPblCusNbjFWm53WK_qQiHLEtF31gQGUQHRrF41g4_hZO-OWF6TRSmqrD1CmjGBxSYHLDivhi8gYhp4qww-zVKQ9ShOtZOvumh0eRjKibvbLDWSA_YvrUs-xDMV4PLD5anW87Tn7eSWf547yod8UZZN8ZMJZIV8_kwOWvQ5zSmzOm9Z182z9c2Lydr)
---
Every one of the 156,000 men who stormed the beaches of Normandy on that bloodyday is a hero in my book. It took real guts to run head-first into a hailstorm of bullets and mortar rounds. We all hope nobody ever needs to experience something like it again. But it is essential we remember, and learn. The AVC is devoted to preserving their history, so that today’s young Americans – and those in generations to come – can learn from the heroes you and I grew up idolizing. The 12 heroes who received the Medal of Honor showed so much courage and valor in the invasion of Normandy, that they were individually chosen to receive our nation’s highest honor. All Americans should read the stories and know of these heroes who have been all but forgotten. The [**American Veterans Center is committed to bringing the legacy of the greatest generation to the latest generation, and with your gift today, we can preserve the legacy of America’s World War II veterans.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a240c31501dc49988a11a60033000ef5&_e=MagHitqGI16L285ZaD8AqzlnZk0O0wDNjiJu8WT2ISYbOjC-93GEnkxE2rzlcwPqJnyuyF772dM68Xdcd54Rlc2hzaM0dvS1u1NSCYJCMl0h_z_j5WJeWcTRQkeqwI4oplxmkjYPblCusNbjFWm53WK_qQiHLEtF31gQGUQHRrHIPwf4vrjiorxs2qC0cVdbhDwe951TjB79bx80J3HApXe01QjTQN30vNHW8Grc1DmylRmRqTzuUnc8g25WLFPGCcmZKbmI0yJbNCv10QnQRg3UPtKUr3BKB2GgOPZXEvXKBmYm_omk68vFbt1zC2Dd) As a token of my thanks for your support, I’ll send you a limited-edition copy of **_A Mighty Endeavor_**. When you receive it, I have just one request; please share it with a loved one. Show them these stories and talk about how important their legacy is to our history. But, please let me know in the next 24 hours if you’re claiming your copy! It is my hope that you’ll share this booklet with your children, grandchildren, and neighbors and tell them all about D-Day.
---
[Claim your copy of **_A Mighty Endeavor_**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a240c31501dc49988a11a60033000ef5&_e=MagHitqGI16L285ZaD8AqzlnZk0O0wDNjiJu8WT2ISYbOjC-93GEnkxE2rzlcwPqJnyuyF772dM68Xdcd54Rlc2hzaM0dvS1u1NSCYJCMl0h_z_j5WJeWcTRQkeqwI4oplxmkjYPblCusNbjFWm53WK_qQiHLEtF31gQGUQHRrEK0FOk3oMOwZ98lHVc7pAfZg6-sU0gVScIUvw4WF0KicPBjA_xPxlBZDOmRze7vXZOkne_iyDTc-Grreqed4fibq6XjhGI_Hcn2W-aUd6kN0JisebuQ_XnVxHIvQ5hj74YuQ9QMA-zsCXNJEYVm1ew)
---
Peter, we must share the TRUTH about American WWII veterans with America’s youth – we cannot fail them any longer. We must educate our nation’s children with messages of the D-Day heroes who were up against a battle-hardened enemy, whose very actions preserved the freedoms we enjoy today. [**Please support American Veterans Center’s mission to fight the historical ignorance plaguing today’s culture and teach America’s young people what real service meant during WWII.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a240c31501dc49988a11a60033000ef5&_e=MagHitqGI16L285ZaD8AqzlnZk0O0wDNjiJu8WT2ISYbOjC-93GEnkxE2rzlcwPqJnyuyF772dM68Xdcd54Rlc2hzaM0dvS1u1NSCYJCMl0h_z_j5WJeWcTRQkeqwI4oplxmkjYPblCusNbjFWm53WK_qQiHLEtF31gQGUQHRrEImzKTUAZMdhljE9D6eQ-fErT9FmUgrTcXJ1g98tyXUDRuIzAW_E7ewak3Ixnkr6yKMYqGT-eVO7PGDKnWp86d_0mpwpt-TThiSA9auJZVq39fJrM1-A1fDYNnJLwQY7z8H8XtqDh4kUj3RQYBHhwu) Whether you can afford to donate $15, $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or any other amount — I’ll send along your copy of **_A Mighty Endeavor: Operation Overlord through the Eyes of D-Day’s Greatest Heroes_** as a “thank you” for your support of our bravest Americans. Thank you and God bless,
---
Tim HolbertAmerican Veterans Center
---
[**Support American Veterans Center**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a240c31501dc49988a11a60033000ef5&_e=MagHitqGI16L285ZaD8AqzlnZk0O0wDNjiJu8WT2ISYbOjC-93GEnkxE2rzlcwPqJnyuyF772dM68Xdcd54Rlc2hzaM0dvS1u1NSCYJCMl0h_z_j5WJeWcTRQkeqwI4oplxmkjYPblCusNbjFWm53WK_qQiHLEtF31gQGUQHRrGqsb7joazicsTANeht6K-tynucNXsjgtEaa8A3SAZRtoRjgjb98iEO0imYop5uOyWIXto7JSlDjDrbXRo6pCbcc61Lqt8LsgRMgMLgnfNUqYI16JOxNhu8Hi11UZwNBLh50_xP9a_csyBz6oqSqm_Q)

subject: Could you complete this crucial survey for me?

body:

body:
Reaching voters is costly, which is why I'm asking if you can spare $3.50 for a gallon of gas today.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=053f11917e5e4d1e989e5aa5fab20284&_t=44bGuzwKKyFJmW7hB9kIzfnvKAbxPkxu2KDlFrX7TSUA9Vb2JzgGKw9whXNFKuifc1RTErcZnjl5IwI0VyZEzD5Q7pKRQAqy8e31OXH83HI%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=053f11917e5e4d1e989e5aa5fab20284&_t=44bGuzwKKyFJmW7hB9kIzfnvKAbxPkxu2KDlFrX7TSUA9Vb2JzgGKw9whXNFKuifc1RTErcZnjl5IwI0VyZEzD5Q7pKRQAqy8e31OXH83HI%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=053f11917e5e4d1e989e5aa5fab20284&_e=75NO-B52urRgHIgaN5zf37RM8Lxlk6q3rznM3seYmMfU8HdyL8-Tos_FWNUF_MLnAgXLygJH5jKNXzInaB_kknvT84xWpQB3f0G2nY0NXOsjj1wHrttXgF_OHKWeCpGg-yt17W7qnEXgL3GV4e14TOJz_dILy7rAhALd8R_A5azNkRWxDsr9xrGUG2Nkc5avJd4Qm0APqbZk87aRlCi7KAjITkyueeE0uQT4JIjpicSydUpg5IhqsgV4MHT33Ouuf7hGPR9DSsdmls3ghLXMRkwbKsKRE4rpvC37blB6E2LzL8zEuS0Wbo83g_xxl3Yk3TIxVlTaOWt7-xs8qFejlaohWIl8waMDMm2wdu8DkRJ_WpdjF2YMXd5nTHVE5UzHT_Al9cddpTrPM78sp8diRA%3D%3D)
|

Fellow American,

As the Sheriff in Pinal county, I found the best way to understand the needs of my community is to be actively involved and interacting with the people I serve.

While I am well-known in my home of Pinal County, **Arizona's significant size, encompassing over 113,000 square miles and a population of more than 7.2 million people,** requires a concerted effort to connect with potential voters.

With such a vast territory and nearly 4.9 million potential voters, it's clear that **I have a substantial task ahead of me** , but the people of Arizona deserve the opportunity to understand exactly who they are sending to represent them in Washington.

**Arizona Deserves Better**
1. Our border is still out of control and needs to be secured

2. Families are suffering from inflation, significantly impacting the cost of living

3. Our elected officials need to be held accountable for policies good and bad

However, connecting with these potential voters, as I have found, doesn't come cheap**;** and given that I drive a Ford F-350, my campaign is spending a lot of money on gas. It's absolutely worth the incurred expense, **with that said, each time I fill up it costs my campaign more than $120!**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=053f11917e5e4d1e989e5aa5fab20284&_e=75NO-B52urRgHIgaN5zf37RM8Lxlk6q3rznM3seYmMfU8HdyL8-Tos_FWNUF_MLnAgXLygJH5jKNXzInaB_kknvT84xWpQB3f0G2nY0NXOsjj1wHrttXgF_OHKWeCpGg-yt17W7qnEXgL3GV4e14TOJz_dILy7rAhALd8R_A5azNkRWxDsr9xrGUG2Nkc5avJd4Qm0APqbZk87aRlCi7KAjITkyueeE0uQT4JIjpicSydUpg5IhqsgV4MHT33OuuDLsbhv5LV1gERgHXzrmMCJiof9pHWQFdYFcVb7zpEQ1AR5Hiitd_1WYqcbWNPlW89Cgf1rLR5Ui7tA9_mU8My1R5oGlJqrxTRcduV2kK0hlh9YoswpA-9ER6dfXnEwcvww-vJFHdyLRxlO0EqHVOAg%3D%3D)
Given that I go through a tank of gas a day, **driving around the state contacting voters costs more than $3,700 per month.** **

The average cost for a regular gallon of gas still costs $3.79, ranking Arizona in the 10 most expensive State averages. This is unacceptable and Arizona deserves better!**

I never assume anyone’s ability to make a financial contribution, but if you are able to contribute, even a modest amount, it would be immensely appreciated. **[For instance, a donation as small as $3.50, just about the average cost of a gallon of gas in Arizona, would make a difference.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=053f11917e5e4d1e989e5aa5fab20284&_e=75NO-B52urRgHIgaN5zf37RM8Lxlk6q3rznM3seYmMfU8HdyL8-Tos_FWNUF_MLnAgXLygJH5jKNXzInaB_kknvT84xWpQB3f0G2nY0NXOsjj1wHrttXgF_OHKWeCpGg-yt17W7qnEXgL3GV4e14TOJz_dILy7rAhALd8R_A5azNkRWxDsr9xrGUG2Nkc5avJd4Qm0APqbZk87aRlCi7KAjITkyueeE0uQT4JIjpicSydUpg5IhqsgV4MHT33OuuXF69fTu45-oBbK6nJIekvLNhjTkaGCTsiSgjCya8GM4CRwCmhD5hJ1Xk4G8OT3ugjcU182kqJZo-P797M_zIMwILHaKCTiFfXjfSyYpxzSOhHLHG0U__W3ojXYVKCK6rXU5LAeP3yjibchmXpfvoPA%3D%3D)**

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

clean_body: Reaching voters is costly, which is why I'm asking if you can spare $3.50 for a gallon of gas today. | | Fellow American, As the Sheriff in Pinal county, I found the best way to understand the needs of my community is to be actively involved and interacting with the people I serve. While I am well-known in my home of Pinal County, Arizona's significant size, encompassing over 113,000 square miles and a population of more than 7.2 million people, requires a concerted effort to connect with potential voters. With such a vast territory and nearly 4.9 million potential voters, it's clear that I have a substantial task ahead of me , but the people of Arizona deserve the opportunity to understand exactly who they are sending to represent them in Washington. Arizona Deserves Better 1. Our border is still out of control and needs to be secured 2. Families are suffering from inflation, significantly impacting the cost of living 3. Our elected officials need to be held accountable for policies good and bad However, connecting with these potential voters, as I have found, doesn't come cheap; and given that I drive a Ford F-350, my campaign is spending a lot of money on gas. It's absolutely worth the incurred expense, with that said, each time I fill up it costs my campaign more than $120! Given that I go through a tank of gas a day, driving around the state contacting voters costs more than $3,700 per month. The average cost for a regular gallon of gas still costs $3.79, ranking Arizona in the 10 most expensive State averages. This is unacceptable and Arizona deserves better! I never assume anyone’s ability to make a financial contribution, but if you are able to contribute, even a modest amount, it would be immensely appreciated. Alternatively, a contribution of would buy me two gallons, and a gift of would cover the expenses of a full tank Any contribution you're able to make would be of great assistance. Your support in helping us expand our outreach and to connect with voters would be invaluable. Together, we can make a positive impact and strengthen our campaign. Thank you for your consideration, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity. Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. | Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

name: Diane Morgan, Our Rev Mobilization Coordinator
subject: Our next battleground: Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

We have a concrete plan of action to leverage progressive power heading into 2024 - when progressives will be a key voting bloc that can’t be ignored.

As a long-time organizer, I’ve been at the forefront of critical fights and felt the thrill of winning big as well as the heartbreak of missed opportunities. That’s why I wanted to personally reach out today about our mission in this moment.

Many people are understandably feeling frustrated and betrayed by politicians, but we cannot lose strength and solidarity — especially when we have a clear path to victory on critical issues that raise the standard of living for working-class Americans.

Will you invest in our deep organizing now by becoming a MOVEMENT BUILDER and help us sustain our fight during the next 6 months?
https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8848?t=1008&akid=4480%2E5885482%2EaTmWnj

Organizing for transformative change isn’t easy - and it requires financial resources to recruit and train good organizers to mobilize the grassroots to keep fighting the corporate class.

As we get ready for 2024, your recurring donation - whether it’s just $5 or $10 a month - is a meaningful investment that will sustain our work in all of these areas:

Cancel Student Debt - Joe Biden made a promise, and we’re not going to allow the right-wing Supreme Court to get the last word on the issue. That’s why we’re ramping up pressure on the President to deliver for 45 million student debtors and their families in 2024. This week, our members shared their powerful stories with Rep. Ro Khanna at the Our Revolution Town Hall, and we’re organizing our members to testify at an important student debt hearing at the Department of Education on Tuesday.
Your monthly donation helps our organizers do the work of making sure these brave advocates are heard at this turning point when student debt relief hangs in the balance.

Raise the Wage - Our Revolution is partnering with One Fair Wage to put a $20+ MINIMUM WAGE on the ballot in critical swing states like OH and AZ in 2024. Not only will this motivate our voters to the polls, but it will mean millions of people getting a long overdue pay raise so they no longer have to choose between rent and groceries.
End Fossil Fuels - The climate fight is heating up right now as Manchin, Sinema, and the GOP prepare to double down on fossil fuel drilling in upcoming must-pass bills this fall. Right now, we’re teaming up with our allies at Greenpeace and Friends of the Earth to make sure progressives in Congress have enough votes to block Big Oil.
End Medical Debt & Big Pharma Price Gouging - Bernie is leveraging his power as HELP Chair in the Senate to block nominees in exchange for lower drug prices, and our members are organizing on the outside to stop medical debt by taking on price-gouging hospitals and predatory debt collectors. We can win this.
We are tackling each of these issues strategically and aggressively because these are the issues that matter most to our membership base - and Democrats cannot afford to fail in this moment. Help us win these fights with a recurring donation of $5 or $10 a month — any amount helps!

We have a concrete plan to win on these issues, and we have the people on our side. We just need the resources to mobilize our grassroots movement into action and execute on our strategy.
https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8848?t=1009&akid=4480%2E5885482%2EaTmWnj

We are more powerful than we realize, and the ruling class would love nothing more than for us to back down now. Let’s show them the power of our movement.
https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8848?t=1010&akid=4480%2E5885482%2EaTmWnj

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230721_FR_oh_0_3MO_dianemorgan_na_na_ohturnout&t=1001&akid=4480%2E5885482%2EaTmWnj ]Support Our Revolution →

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=4480%2E5885482%2EaTmWnj ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1003&akid=4480%2E5885482%2EaTmWnj ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1004&akid=4480%2E5885482%2EaTmWnj ][IMG]

Our Revolution is a national grassroots network of local groups dedicated
to organizing a political revolution powerful enough to challenge the
structural forces that threaten our survival as a society. From city halls
to the halls of Congress, our movement is fighting to win progressive
issue fights, elect progressive champions, transform the Democratic party
and get big money out of politics. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230721_FR_oh_0_3MO_dianemorgan_na_na_ohturnout&t=1005&akid=4480%2E5885482%2EaTmWnj ]Help us achieve these goals by
donating today.

Join our movement by [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1006&akid=4480%2E5885482%2EaTmWnj ]following us on Facebook and [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/738?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230721_FR_oh_0_3MO_dianemorgan_na_na_ohturnout&t=1007&akid=4480%2E5885482%2EaTmWnj ]signing up here.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=4480%2E5885482%2EaTmWnj

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Nobody should be left behind.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
John's empathy is what led him to public service, and this team has shown the same spirit.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20230721-8473-header&t=1&akid=8473%2E434096%2EM1VGfj)
Derek, from day one, our team has been centered on the idea that no person or no community should be left behind.
**That's why John got into public service: Empathy.** And, as John has bravely been open about his recovery from his stroke and his treatment for depression, we've seen that empathy shine right back at John, Gisele, his family, and our team, from thousands of people in Pennsylvania and around the country. So many people have seen themselves -- or their loved ones -- in what John has been through.
Now John's on the cover of TIME magazine, opening up about his journey over the last year. **[If you haven't had the chance to read it yet, you should really check out the article here.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49723?t=2&akid=8473%2E434096%2EM1VGfj)**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49723?t=3&akid=8473%2E434096%2EM1VGfj)
The whole time John was getting the help he needed, the #1 topic of calls to the Senate office were well-wishes. **It means the world to us that the team we've built has this level of empathy for people they might not even know.** 💛
That spirit is why we on Team Fetterman go to work every day to support John and keep him standing up for PA in the Senate. It informs the policies we talked about on the campaign trail and now fight for in the halls of Congress. And you're part of this team too -- whether **[you make grassroots contributions to help our campaign work](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230721-1?refcode=em20230721-8473&refcode2=8473_434096_M1VGfj&akid=8473%2E434096%2EM1VGfj)** , or made one of those calls to John's office, or just read emails like this one, we're glad you're here.
Together,
Team Fetterman
P.S. Emails like these are one of the main ways we can keep up our work year-round. **[If you're able to make a contribution today, it'd be a huge help-- thank you!!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230721-1?refcode=em20230721-8473&refcode2=8473_434096_M1VGfj&akid=8473%2E434096%2EM1VGfj)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230721-1?refcode=em20230721-8473&refcode2=8473_434096_M1VGfj&akid=8473%2E434096%2EM1VGfj)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
---|---|---
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=4&akid=8473%2E434096%2EM1VGfj)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=8473%2E434096%2EM1VGfj)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

subject: Republican Leaders Only
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Unfortunately, there aren’t many that we call Republican Leaders today. Can we still count on you, Fellow American? | [**OFFICIAL MESSAGE FOR Fellow American**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=42a7d72440594509b81da2d69c0508c2&_e=MKdK8w6M6-xRQi6K0yejI-sY3h18YEml3kRJz-vbOfxaCCrJUf5mXIAeaJ26_iyGmsHJDGNogmx_Q2yAzXm7r1JbFI4kjF5h6eLifnPVOCKvwBZ0nOfReR2jecWr3asMXcfz5G1xMOB8mNcN2TCMsJYNvvpSqEQbEitG-uvrIvBeDCMvn3YSrM5rgQH7qJm4bIZaFhehX_8i2GND2txRcgEKQHG09_E21b71Q8f3JoUCvNxtKSthC_FBgue72lP4S31SQ4MAkDuZCELQ7wzxo6CHWYs2HrreCL6XpzjD1A8GKXVoVS44gZKK168y0IPdY-012WUJLzUN8F0pGcvZ0VfjINrZ0N0sdZqRrM-BKwpmTRSA4U3X12w-4rbtgBig3JYWwWHCDsq4yPjs0u7KtMuPuRCV4ISFSp27Bk9-g1G2g62cVs2a0opDjhkYBz3ykVRK5LXKFa7giM54R2IquQitk31BPSMYF9POBhwc2Tmf9zHJRR7VH7NtCIFAljPb)
How did this happen, Fellow American? To lead Republican candidates to victory in the future, we must understand our history. This is your **ONE TIME** survey to let us know your thoughts.

The results of your survey will be analyzed and used to help us secure VICTORY in 2023 and beyond, but your input is **MISSING.**

**_REPUBLICAN LEADER RESPONSE_
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Chrissy
subject: July updates from my office
body:
A NOTE FROM CHRISSY: I’m hoping you and your loved ones are staying safe and comfortable through the hottest days on record this month. Things have been heating up (I couldn’t resist) in Washington, DC and I want to share what I and my team have been up to.

Protecting Women in Uniform and our National Security: As you may know, I serve on the Armed Services Committee which passes a law every year directing programs and funding to maintain our national security. After SCOTUS overturned Roe, President Biden announced the military would pay for the travel costs for any woman in uniform needing reproductive care not available in the state where the military sent her. Earlier this month, Republicans inserted language into this bill to overturn the President’s order. As one of only a handful of female veterans in Congress, I am outraged and horrified by the impact this will have on women’s health, our ability to attract and retain women to our all-volunteer force, and consequently, our readiness to face threats to our national security. I am leading the fight to make sure this doesn’t become law.

Fighting for Our Planet: Democrats are often at the forefront of environmental policy and climate action (yay us!) but we can’t do it alone. We need our Republican neighbors, friends, and here in Congress, colleagues to make lasting change that saves our planet. I’m so pleased to share that I, along with a Republican member from New York, have rebuilt and just relaunched the Bipartisan Climate Solutions Caucus. For the first time in years, the Caucus has an equal number of Democrats and Republicans. Now let’s get to work!

Holding my 74th Town Hall: Gun Violence Prevention. President Biden signed the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act into law last year and, as the first major gun violence prevention legislation in decades, we stopped for a moment to celebrate. But with over 400 mass shootings this year alone, we all know there is still more work to be done. So much more. To address this, I held a telephone town hall that brought together activists, survivors, sportsmen (and women!), and elected officials.

Fighting for Women and Girls: The UNFPA Funding Act. Recently, I reintroduced my UNFPA Funding Act which ensures that the United States contributes to the UN Population Fund (UNFPA). UNFPA makes the world a safer place for women and girls by offering access to contraceptives, maternal and newborn care, and critical education services. It also fights to end gender-based violence and harmful practices like child marriage. As we struggle to protect reproductive freedom here in the US, I won’t stop fighting for the rights of women everywhere.

Thank you for staying engaged and involved in this important work. It’s meant so much to hear your thoughts and ideas over the past month regarding these tough, personal issues. They inform and power the work I do every day. While we’ve already accomplished so much, I know we’ll have more victories ahead. I’ll be in touch soon, and I’m hoping you have a wonderful summer. There’s work to be done. -Chrissy

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/houlahan-digital?refcode=jtk846-ot-text&amounts=5,25,50,100,250

Chrissy is proud to be your voice in Congress and is committed to fighting for the values that matter in our community. But a divided Congress means there will be challenges ahead. We must all work together to have any chance of creating a better future that works for everyone. So we're counting on the support of people like you to keep Chrissy's momentum going throughout the year. Can we count on you to join us and donate whatever you can spare right now? Thank you for your support and for believing in our vision for a better future.

--------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/5A7dcVDqPECR0EWykGJMlQ2?unsubscribedata=X21YYNlnF7ZQ%2F6pmp40I%2BDc0gqrdmT8eN5mZsm5Hymb%2FBqdFefUP2K0hq%2FJp5vJHsoLcyMY94jdBBrAMWoDXiXV4Dcb8TzA%2B10EGnifA4vJku0HN62ulLMWbFQb7NXQadGpmMJqCczioJGMzwhgbOtGtVe7ahQrMdVD8FW1woDEVmj2umknqEGdnxWfTF%2BBeXmYoyfdduGqKXbrHMdWiCjWnvp7F1Vxpd5tUAcARpdabAFugpMux%2BSQZll%2BPZdV3pnV2CcT9kokUc1CNe8DzDW33v0gGkRUlmzVcpY9Ff%2F8erfe1bg%2FacUWrUb9B7X9H9%2F5TFLXZuwaeibsfrMw9zYulnrKfdAy3M0z0UWHN00DBoTHXPZAeie6dExKm5rOtCle%2F6eX2kVjeBl4rzkNMRTzNV9fKrktbunZ4ryeZxFZqiH2YQzAV02MJt44Kik1R

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: The Censorship Circus
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Yesterday, I testified at a Congressional committee about censorship and the weaponization of federal agencies.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_censorship_circus_non_dona&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, Yesterday, I testified at a Congressional committee about censorship and the weaponization of federal agencies. [**Here is my video comment on the hearing.**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-hearing?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_censorship_circus_non_dona&n=2) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-hearing?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_censorship_circus_non_dona&n=3) Many of the committee members treated me fairly and with dignity. Others – members of my own party – descended into baseless smears and insults. These tactics are precisely how censorship works. An individual is associated with something loathsome — anti-Semitism, racism, extremism, etc. Having been deemed untouchable, they are targeted for deplatforming. Ranking Democratic committee member Debbie Wasserman Schultz attempted this right off the bat, motioning to move my testimony to a closed-door, secret “executive session” so the American public would not have a chance to hear me. Her argument, basically, was that my views are so hateful and disgusting that to entertain them in public is tantamount to inciting violence. Of course, this was all grandstanding. I doubt any committee member actually believes I am as diabolical as they tried to paint me. This kind of tactic, though, is tearing our nation apart. The question is, “Will these tactics work?” And the answer is, “That is up to the public.” And especially, it is up to you. The tactics work when people shy away from the smear target. They backfire when people are so fed up with the divisiveness and incivility that they redouble their support. **Peter — Let’s show them that their tactics DON’T work. [Send my campaign a donation right now. We will show them emphatically that this kind of propaganda does not work.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_censorship_circus_non_dona&n=4)** **As I said yesterday in my testimony** : “A government that can censor its critics has license for every atrocity. It is the beginning of totalitarianism. There’s never been a time in history when we look back, and the guys who were censoring people were the good guys.” They’re getting desperate. **Our movement to restore our freedoms is gaining momentum. Let’s make it unstoppable.** | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_censorship_circus_non_dona&n=5 "Donate") [Donate](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_censorship_circus_non_dona&n=5)
---
Sincerely,
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.[](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_censorship_circus_non_dona&n=6)[](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_censorship_circus_non_dona&n=7)[](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_censorship_circus_non_dona&n=8)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_censorship_circus_non_dona&n=9)[https://www.kennedy24.com/](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_censorship_circus_non_dona&n=10)
[Donate today](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_censorship_circus_non_dona&n=11) to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: My story.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
Please read.

|
---
[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=478a95f5cb7b494d826de4b741772e7d&_e=__ddQr_sRRvPAjofsn7w0DlAclFqM3FKiDWuCJUXLrJXvhaDUndp43ZuM-mc9PFbSa0Aaxctj6m-17SGjV2jGXkF6U3VyFFToI7aI1E3PwLSi5LaVO9cjdzbmSKjJtJdqCJgGBL0a-d1AIF5SLI4f9H3NZDGPhBRfsQ-eWqbxpKtQsGz7TIK_Mx7kthoEIpSdzU_x2R0eMk8BGpC1p6WOYw0_3mbfp9W6s49gFeEifA287Bret-YhXRYE9ZAWApXO5CJqZ8RjCISySwKRhjRyX-MBpl3X6JmnAXRQGpXud_BrFuPQcOaDQMYZX5wAMrdoBXgAXu9p7-taOGwOFjp1h9kozdV1T-bGGXMNnB7hjQ%3D)

Friend,

I wanted to take a few minutes today to tell you a little bit about myself, my life story, and what's never going to change.

**__My Upbringing__**
I was raised in Zachary, Louisiana where I was taught the values I live by today by my mother and father. Those same values that I fight for each and every single day to protect. Values like hard work, dedication, and putting God and family first in everything.

[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=478a95f5cb7b494d826de4b741772e7d&_e=__ddQr_sRRvPAjofsn7w0DlAclFqM3FKiDWuCJUXLrJXvhaDUndp43ZuM-mc9PFbSa0Aaxctj6m-17SGjV2jGXkF6U3VyFFToI7aI1E3PwLSi5LaVO9cjdzbmSKjJtJdqCJgGBL0a-d1AIF5SLI4f9H3NZDGPhBRfsQ-eWqbxpKtQsGz7TIK_Mx7kthoEIpSdzU_x2R0eMk8BGpC1p6WOQd8WEciyJE0ALJ8yJcSnnSS3nA6sJNzLDCMecFVCOOsaVM7zyEkAREN0x6-S9thJ7mPbmFkLtzQAm_rdxn-xY1n9Rt0n_npXfRqYL6s9qcFYpBe3jWN0AtqpnVgWry8d6QAnneV59SQ_IRUEaFfhJE%3D)
After high school, I attended Vanderbilt University, graduated, and then went on to receive my law degree at the University of Virginia. I tell you that so you know that I know a little more about law than the average pink-haired woker would like you to believe.

**__So, what 'd I do after college?__**
I was elected to five terms as State Treasurer where I managed the state's $10.6 billion investment portfolios. I also oversaw local and state bond issues and returned millions of dollars in unclaimed property each year. Before I was Treasurer, I served as Secretary of the Department of Revenue, Special Counsel to Governor Roemer, and Secretary of Governor Roemer's Cabinet.

[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=478a95f5cb7b494d826de4b741772e7d&_e=__ddQr_sRRvPAjofsn7w0DlAclFqM3FKiDWuCJUXLrJXvhaDUndp43ZuM-mc9PFbSa0Aaxctj6m-17SGjV2jGXkF6U3VyFFToI7aI1E3PwLSi5LaVO9cjdzbmSKjJtJdqCJgGBL0a-d1AIF5SLI4f9H3NZDGPhBRfsQ-eWqbxpKtQsGz7TIK_Mx7kthoEIpSdzU_x2R0eMk8BGpC1p6WOcJwoRlFHLTBwqHu1SG9r34KLddds5SIje5fgwxpdqUTM2n3w4uariGtCfndip42Hc05D570wkvGALJCWRTGTeTdbEnLNmRpgainh7wUTCtTtddNMk-Or9Gi79uoWfv0hK47L32sZaXDOYalHeSvS0s%3D)
Then, I got my biggest call. **The call to help the people of Louisiana and America.**

**_Time as U.S. Senator of Louisiana_**
I was elected to the U.S. Senate in 2016 after being endorsed by none other than President Donald J. Trump. I serve on the Appropriations, Banking, Housing and Urban Affairs, Budget, Judiciary, and Small Business and Entrepreneurship committees in the U.S. Senate. I serve as the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Energy and Water Development for the Appropriations Committee, the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Federal Courts for the Judiciary Committee, and the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Economic Policy for the Banking Committee.

[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=478a95f5cb7b494d826de4b741772e7d&_e=__ddQr_sRRvPAjofsn7w0DlAclFqM3FKiDWuCJUXLrJXvhaDUndp43ZuM-mc9PFbSa0Aaxctj6m-17SGjV2jGXkF6U3VyFFToI7aI1E3PwLSi5LaVO9cjdzbmSKjJtJdqCJgGBL0a-d1AIF5SLI4f9H3NZDGPhBRfsQ-eWqbxpKtQsGz7TIK_Mx7kthoEIpSdzU_x2R0eMk8BGpC1p6WOdJrb5lsCHQ4dk87QSRrdsXIHnMNFuJ_36dBTt9M_BReOXnvDUorTob9cjYpYlNY85TSqpNQ-ZN9ctUxIBemIas48w9r7HTWX-NmVPH_Shb0--VWm3i5W_gWukKLEwOgQdNhQi8OoVCnHHi4RdyLaXc%3D)
Every day for me is a new challenge, another day to serve the people of Louisiana, and another day to fight for our conservative values. You see, I'm always going to be **100% PRO-LIFE, PRO-GUN****,** and **PRO-FREEDOM**. That's not going to change regardless of what the Neo-Socialist Left throws at me and you can write that down and take it home to mama.

**I 'm going to fight for your rights, your freedoms, and for a better future for our children. **

That won't change, I'd rather drink weedkiller than let the Socialist Left Agenda poison this country that we know and love so much.

**[So, now that I've given you my story in a nutshell, I'm going to humbly ask for your support. I need you to rush whatever you're able below to make sure I have the resources necessary to fight for you and defend our nation.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=478a95f5cb7b494d826de4b741772e7d&_e=__ddQr_sRRvPAjofsn7w0DlAclFqM3FKiDWuCJUXLrJXvhaDUndp43ZuM-mc9PFbSa0Aaxctj6m-17SGjV2jGXkF6U3VyFFToI7aI1E3PwLSi5LaVO9cjdzbmSKjJtJdqCJgGBL0a-d1AIF5SLI4f9H3NZDGPhBRfsQ-eWqbxpKtQsGz7TIK_Mx7kthoEIpSdzU_x2R0eMk8BGpC1p6WOYbyAIkogOCYF-3gxnTjU60kXXkXhUkcq1cBpWFOhojFJiHRBPDjYB9v9RSXJWd2l2TPFYNMinKJthsykLv2z7pnOEPw7fq0StWoELoO1GfWUtzggTGSSrfBe7dGeDskl0r1TOzEhDoPJ9KOdNHEk2A%3D)** | [**DONATE $500**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=478a95f5cb7b494d826de4b741772e7d&_e=__ddQr_sRRvPAjofsn7w0DlAclFqM3FKiDWuCJUXLrJXvhaDUndp43ZuM-mc9PFbSa0Aaxctj6m-17SGjV2jGXkF6U3VyFFToI7aI1E3PwLSi5LaVO9cjdzbmSKjJtJdqCJgGBL0a-d1AIF5SLI4f9H3NZDGPhBRfsQ-eWqbxpKtQsGz7TIK_Mx7kthoEIpSGokZ6myRTmS0XPrLpBQgST5Gc5pLL02uIUGtTdL3vfdmtGhRMtfONfLAhzoyJyuTXojgszbMhPwV1_Y-055KL34fi8MALUmkWJazg7xJu_t4jz46p3shL7QK_lsoCV6Fpzld6wfeasN8KXGlzup5hWsAI4NUrO2y14k2pkaO-1g%3D)

clean_body: Help us make the Freedom To Vote Act a reality, again! | Team, we hope you're feeling as fired up as we are because we've got an urgent mission on our hands! Powerful forces threaten our democracy’s foundation, and we need your help to protect it! The Freedom to Vote Act is our golden ticket to fortifying our democracy and safeguarding our democratic values against those who wish to undermine them. Picture this: free and fair elections where every voice matters, where gerrymandering is history, and where power resides with the people -- that's what the Freedom to Vote Act is all about! Your insights will help us tailor our efforts and fight even harder for the values we cherish. Plus, it's an excellent opportunity for us to get to know you better -- it's a win-win! Rally your friends and family to join the cause! Spread the word about the survey, and let's make our voices echo far and wide! 📢🗣️ \-- Ramona Morales All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. name: CPT Sam Brown
subject: Taking a stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown
body:
Politicians today are too scared to take action. I’m not. | | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8ed7c0fcfbb546cba4e497cc1eec2123&_e=sFJccExhNazTZONpKDY9bFwk4GjoaT2yb_0jBinuUe7ntDQOqByV2d6pq8h6IOHrLG3wbBps9cFaSfu8LkLSst_0Xz_GWHg5t0be-NTyDfnIMdqbQbp4ecCqTK8AUvw8hv_n1-OC8FLvRJGsNZZNNFpCJrCksfAVre_gIRZKeHnGCC22nq--ea2gbd-vmaKl2Ghg3jsCZ6S7gikzttr7OCuQWcRga501O5dc_lW7pKWyZ5SHSfhnHKBYoBtCxhOyWACuNk1hNEfYV8w_CGY_p4VRGtp9xxrWJ4nj_mpDHuflAzB-5zeZbjr7si_RETTYEH-V9ypZ2L5QRA8Z3mCDsf8uqEmv3pLP16mFvxSTR9oklPhuZGFSHuQvwNus77SLCCfDvvNVUWJGndpe5Gj8Gy7DjjWBoq-DBfFq1cflb5Oq3JbUomtjfIHBo-iIdF3j)
---
| | I shouldn't be alive, Friend. When I was serving in Afghanistan, a roadside bomb blew up under the gas tank of my vehicle. I burned alive for what felt like an eternity as I came to terms with my mortality.
---
[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8ed7c0fcfbb546cba4e497cc1eec2123&_e=sFJccExhNazTZONpKDY9bFwk4GjoaT2yb_0jBinuUe7ntDQOqByV2d6pq8h6IOHrLG3wbBps9cFaSfu8LkLSst_0Xz_GWHg5t0be-NTyDfnIMdqbQbp4ecCqTK8AUvw8hv_n1-OC8FLvRJGsNZZNNFpCJrCksfAVre_gIRZKeHnGCC22nq--ea2gbd-vmaKl2Ghg3jsCZ6S7gikzttr7OCuQWcRga501O5dc_lW7pKWyZ5SHSfhnHKBYoBtCxhOyWACuNk1hNEfYV8w_CGY_p681G5tT_Qb6fQqpb6_jTc9gnsRYulgf4092BZ7meZM3348DwrQT1HWKWRuKhYKw21H-29amz5gq2cVIjilfRH2A8_sNcMOXe_yLRCAGjgjmep5Gc9mtL7wBsUvFPpPcYnDrGNrR4Xx3Ieh87zCT4oNbyp4RCrG7A-rfkRLn8tGz)
---
I thought it would be the end of me, but by the grace of God, I survived. I got a second chance at life, and there's no way I'm going to waste it by only looking out for myself. [**That 's why I'm running for the U.S. Senate in Nevada**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8ed7c0fcfbb546cba4e497cc1eec2123&_e=sFJccExhNazTZONpKDY9bFwk4GjoaT2yb_0jBinuUe7ntDQOqByV2d6pq8h6IOHrLG3wbBps9cFaSfu8LkLSst_0Xz_GWHg5t0be-NTyDfnIMdqbQbp4ecCqTK8AUvw8hv_n1-OC8FLvRJGsNZZNNFpCJrCksfAVre_gIRZKeHnGCC22nq--ea2gbd-vmaKl2Ghg3jsCZ6S7gikzttr7OCuQWcRga501O5dc_lW7pKWyZ5SHSfhnHKBYoBtCxhOyWACuNk1hNEfYV8w_CGY_pw6mtOVFfa5TD0CDcfYqaKWh9xtobjio2Z9a1y7QmJI6mM7qZEn7uuY68t14wqW5LimgK75NHi6aZsB0G9V2plB7xJAcxjJhxaNHcessb_dP5wU3WDb0UhjYxn1nxeWcL1To8bhvs3ROl2TEBlML4p84iRI1ykWt42Ow1LfEIdtu) -- not because it's easy. But because the reason I'm still alive today _is to serve_. Our nation is in crisis and our so-called "leaders" have gone AWOL. With an economy in shambles, unprecedented threats from our adversaries, a wide open border, and D.C. politicians like NV Sen. Jacky Rosen failing to tackle our challenges head on, our nation is on a collision course with total disaster. **Too often, politicians only work to serve themselves while forgetting about the people they swore to serve. They see a challenge and they run the other way.** Well, Friend, I've survived my fair share of challenges, and I'm willing to take this one head on -- because even though I'm no longer on active duty, I haven't given up on my commitment to service. Our country, our state, and our people deserve a Senator who's proven that they'll put everything on the line for America, just as I have. That's why I want to deploy to Washington D.C. for a new mission with the same goal: [**Serving our great country.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8ed7c0fcfbb546cba4e497cc1eec2123&_e=sFJccExhNazTZONpKDY9bFwk4GjoaT2yb_0jBinuUe7ntDQOqByV2d6pq8h6IOHrLG3wbBps9cFaSfu8LkLSst_0Xz_GWHg5t0be-NTyDfnIMdqbQbp4ecCqTK8AUvw8hv_n1-OC8FLvRJGsNZZNNFpCJrCksfAVre_gIRZKeHnGCC22nq--ea2gbd-vmaKl2Ghg3jsCZ6S7gikzttr7OCuQWcRga501O5dc_lW7pKWyZ5SHSfhnHKBYoBtCxhOyWACuNk1hNEfYV8w_CGY_p1ZCfRFxv_viMroFMIavyV-uKDZOZMx-_1H_iBu6PtwaDv5v6XCG8kPPulheq9vJ0Bg5-n1AV14azcYOQVLK-M-ZXUVFqiAU8it0F9EIGDp6ryfg7tImqdxG2Mr8uIGhbB-UJ488Uyb4NhAnvaOWXU2NOVt0gNRU60yevUTqXdIn) Friend, can I count on you to have my back on my next mission? [**Chip in ANY AMOUNT >>**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8ed7c0fcfbb546cba4e497cc1eec2123&_e=sFJccExhNazTZONpKDY9bFwk4GjoaT2yb_0jBinuUe7ntDQOqByV2d6pq8h6IOHrLG3wbBps9cFaSfu8LkLSst_0Xz_GWHg5t0be-NTyDfnIMdqbQbp4ecCqTK8AUvw8hv_n1-OC8FLvRJGsNZZNNFpCJrCksfAVre_gIRZKeHnGCC22nq--ea2gbd-vmaKl2Ghg3jsCZ6S7gikzttr7OCuQWcRga501O5dc_lW7pKWyZ5SHSfhnHKBYoBtCxhOyWACuNk1hNEfYV8w_CGY_p6_h_yHu3TmIin3QI0R2hBfUa0mb9vPsPxEavffek1ktOTYPFu294pr8NYCd4DvMDRJU0qxwvKC7t0O8xGFj65NoH_Bq74sYraCxDtbbLw4pPDKRTJWZt6cOt76PkujOXZ23oK_rKXQNy_mc4y8S3N2JoScOnocbgg8chRSNZ86M) This is our country and our fight. I won't back down. Duty First,
---
[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8ed7c0fcfbb546cba4e497cc1eec2123&_e=sFJccExhNazTZONpKDY9bFwk4GjoaT2yb_0jBinuUe7ntDQOqByV2d6pq8h6IOHrLG3wbBps9cFaSfu8LkLSst_0Xz_GWHg5t0be-NTyDfnIMdqbQbp4ecCqTK8AUvw8hv_n1-OC8FLvRJGsNZZNNFpCJrCksfAVre_gIRZKeHnGCC22nq--ea2gbd-vmaKl2Ghg3jsCZ6S7gikzttr7OCuQWcRga501O5dc_lW7pKWyZ5SHSfhnHKBYoBtCxhOyWACuNk1hNEfYV8w_CGY_p44gT_GeyE1BFrizX3YsWUOKwz8VrVfhpMZdfn_LEkzeKvYm_08i9Yg4pMSypLh6STgp-LdoPuywqV0lJ1iE-aZTxXrE_kE4h_pk7NyC0G_O_uGVWZzAFDg4LR1Rk7wnFmiLE5JpDfWa1Du3aOofXzUE435DI25g3Ml54GhE-jGO)

name: Lateefah Simon HQ
subject: Our race is heating up 🔥and we need your help to fight back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
Now is the time to call on our movement and show up and show out in front of our opponents.
I wanted to make sure that you saw this critical update.
**In case you missed it, one of Lateefah’s opponents is gaining some serious traction****—** rolling out a slate of endorsements that earned him a mention in _Politico’s_ Playbook.
[**If that’s all you need to hear, help us immediately by contributing anything you can right now.**](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/141?t=1&akid=65%2E1163%2ElVBFWG)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230721?amount=5&refcode=em20230721&refcode2=65_1163_lVBFWG&akid=65%2E1163%2ElVBFWG)**
If you have a little more time, take a look at what we sent over yesterday – the stakes are high and we want you to know where we’re at.
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Lateefah [info@e.lateefahsimon.com]
Date: July 20
Subject: POLITICO: “Lateefah Simon is facing serious competition”
_
[****](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/141?t=2&akid=65%2E1163%2ElVBFWG)
**We had to reach out.****
**
One of Lateefah’s most formidable opponents is gaining traction. Check out the slew of endorsements he rolled out yesterday:
[](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/141?t=3&akid=65%2E1163%2ElVBFWG)
We’re incredibly proud of all of the support we’ve received from our community, but this early outpouring of support didn’t blind us to the fact that**this race was going to be a tough one.**
**[HELP US FIGHT BACK »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230721?amount=5&refcode=em20230721&refcode2=65_1163_lVBFWG&akid=65%2E1163%2ElVBFWG)**
Lateefah — fighter that she is — is well prepared to face the changing dynamics of this race, win, and be a voice for her community in Congress. But there’s no denying that she needs our support today. [**And if that’s all you need to hear****, we’re asking you to rush a contribution of $5 to team Lateefah right now.**](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/141?t=4&akid=65%2E1163%2ElVBFWG)
We hope this news will compel you to act now — to step up so that this team can keep fighting to send an experienced progressive who is committed to representing ALL the communities of the East Bay to Congress.
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230721?amount=5&refcode=em20230721&refcode2=65_1163_lVBFWG&akid=65%2E1163%2ElVBFWG)**
We’re really glad you’re part of this movement.
Together,
Team Lateefah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-wrapper?refcode=em20230721&t=5&refcode2=65_1163_lVBFWG&akid=65%2E1163%2ElVBFWG)**

Lateefah for Congress

Oakland, CA, 94612

name: Ritchie
subject: I’m going to be extremely candid:

He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress.
