Peter,

I’ve always known that I was meant to live a life of service, but I could never have imagined that perhaps **the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate.**

[**Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=82bfcd777b5144faa1f5445e9e52b5cf&_e=PPUl4CLgY9L8kQ6SVQWpypy6F1cbaCInE8hUYBImf5oCybNYMNsCIGLVUeEa3kBxn353P6bXp5rGTAjWn5URzkwVAdc0oy4hjQQR1UwRf8CxgJgSuCWJLSd6iZLD8NzYHQLUVoqC1hs2g7tRSkg5a1So88oCszWW3W1ArW2qmZe3xzR4Aw5G10yUCFOn9pvhTUEjJINWJqfoejeMWJMs22jHRpLKyoUFPMhxq9nAADdKbX7wxWzjWcZNqVmmGg-0JxAuUglb20VPfXnRbboQ6BjygIVIFSv8z-xCpnLdfZDQRMR496eb_j-5tWlzP6Gt-NTbcAlvPn-zIVzRJFWxSbEDMH7OQEJhQw_BQ22pNZasDhkuWmz3A5L0yN_BIOM7EN-RMXZ2ElxxHdVzyuyPAeCkigY9UYc43ltVD19hn30%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=82bfcd777b5144faa1f5445e9e52b5cf&_e=PPUl4CLgY9L8kQ6SVQWpypy6F1cbaCInE8hUYBImf5oCybNYMNsCIGLVUeEa3kBxn353P6bXp5rGTAjWn5URzkwVAdc0oy4hjQQR1UwRf8CxgJgSuCWJLSd6iZLD8NzYHQLUVoqC1hs2g7tRSkg5a1So88oCszWW3W1ArW2qmZe3xzR4Aw5G10yUCFOn9pvhTUEjJINWJqfoejeMWJMs22jHRpLKyoUFPMhxq9nAADdKbX7wxWzjWcZNqVmmGg-0Uc8K9GHw5ADq2UeQB3n_mjll69K3PWzLCtpZqV56KbEZ_R2caet7BigSv-VC_wP-I7usO1WLhI3BSvKx_ah8_91WTBV-beOzTZAd2Fr-3j7-w1BJgGr1z7KtQ9vx0L1BqIKcBPefgqoLp8c9IH4bGTMPbz9TfUjE5ujHlYNH7JQ%3D)

Peter, I am under no illusions that you will back my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that **anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it.**

**I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read.**

In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis.

Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. **When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you.**

I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. _And believe me, there are some tales._

**I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism.** I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why [**I am determined to take on the anti-American, radical Left in Washington as Montana’s next U.S. Senator.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=82bfcd777b5144faa1f5445e9e52b5cf&_e=PPUl4CLgY9L8kQ6SVQWpypy6F1cbaCInE8hUYBImf5oCybNYMNsCIGLVUeEa3kBxn353P6bXp5rGTAjWn5URzkwVAdc0oy4hjQQR1UwRf8CxgJgSuCWJLSd6iZLD8NzYHQLUVoqC1hs2g7tRSkg5a1So88oCszWW3W1ArW2qmZe3xzR4Aw5G10yUCFOn9pvhTUEjJINWJqfoejeMWJMs22jHRpLKyoUFPMhxq9nAADdKbX7wxWzjWcZNqVmmGg-065_qqo1YWphKVYmuFGCjnGBkBw75IWA9Nhx5g1T3OzTjFT2IyjkiMOs7_cCisnseiIzE4g5n_Bn_3bmaXKm24b983fRwsT05BqhDGJvOjhaklRk0QFmG43ERuiMiemFDks5wXjzrmkPa3q0naKPdCe_A-i4hXAaqXYD5kP3UAAs%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=82bfcd777b5144faa1f5445e9e52b5cf&_e=PPUl4CLgY9L8kQ6SVQWpypy6F1cbaCInE8hUYBImf5oCybNYMNsCIGLVUeEa3kBxn353P6bXp5rGTAjWn5URzkwVAdc0oy4hjQQR1UwRf8CxgJgSuCWJLSd6iZLD8NzYHQLUVoqC1hs2g7tRSkg5a1So88oCszWW3W1ArW2qmZe3xzR4Aw5G10yUCFOn9pvhTUEjJINWJqfoejeMWJMs22jHRpLKyoUFPMhxq9nAADdKbX7wxWzjWcZNqVmmGg-0yfA8D82MmURcQrwjqxEzsMUMPRw7dJeoVuRFxSyKGOQASeAfBTRDsjOABSnlCsjd-0ssJJm7GDIK-UGVArcAJAIIGDMTOHRAC9cAnuxn96I9z5FLJYK2Ye2QQelu8zh4hE72wLKId0XbjO7ejSeXqlgy8Ayekq4YIRDnfJcq2fs%3D)

Our homeland is in danger. Not from overseas terrorists but Washington’s radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream.

**The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security.**

**The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the Senate in 2024, and our path to the Majority runs through this race in Montana.**

[**We need a proven warrior to take back this Senate seat and take on the Democrats in Washington, Peter. I hope hearing my story proves I am the man for the job.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=82bfcd777b5144faa1f5445e9e52b5cf&_e=PPUl4CLgY9L8kQ6SVQWpypy6F1cbaCInE8hUYBImf5oCybNYMNsCIGLVUeEa3kBxn353P6bXp5rGTAjWn5URzkwVAdc0oy4hjQQR1UwRf8CxgJgSuCWJLSd6iZLD8NzYHQLUVoqC1hs2g7tRSkg5a1So88oCszWW3W1ArW2qmZe3xzR4Aw5G10yUCFOn9pvhTUEjJINWJqfoejeMWJMs22jHRpLKyoUFPMhxq9nAADdKbX7wxWzjWcZNqVmmGg-0MEl3sZt5txBF5PsK8ZEYNlktWli1J7ctMnymC0_BBLvw3FKV-flVnSe3zA9KZw8tBNYhWVYOK_cFvQkpDvfK4-Z1mmVwR9XHEScMSXj3o7UVW_XPQiyM-dpnbzbj0qKRKMCqzFe4yYD9-ZjDKy6-8Rt1Jlq782LwgoE0KfNTMWA%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=82bfcd777b5144faa1f5445e9e52b5cf&_e=PPUl4CLgY9L8kQ6SVQWpypy6F1cbaCInE8hUYBImf5oCybNYMNsCIGLVUeEa3kBxn353P6bXp5rGTAjWn5URzkwVAdc0oy4hjQQR1UwRf8CxgJgSuCWJLSd6iZLD8NzYHQLUVoqC1hs2g7tRSkg5a1So88oCszWW3W1ArW2qmZe3xzR4Aw5G10yUCFOn9pvhTUEjJINWJqfoejeMWJMs22jHRpLKyoUFPMhxq9nAADdKbX7wxWzjWcZNqVmmGg-0WcCnmpFcUh6Og_7MvSSeyVKya4EAP5hV412SHvu9yqLyiUP9Hc1b4hZ3qevGdjm1YTsvRlpgpchLBeCX8rlW_2SCLjd5p5PQQnqcZjDUmab7a1aU0_0hStxLkCrf7FtUP-F-Z4cgcApE28TDkFRjnTNKLx-3-8aMrzKybH70kJA%3D)

Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, **I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list.** The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election.

_***If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play.***_

This is my most critical mission to date, and [**I am counting on you to enlist in the fight, Peter.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=82bfcd777b5144faa1f5445e9e52b5cf&_e=PPUl4CLgY9L8kQ6SVQWpypy6F1cbaCInE8hUYBImf5oCybNYMNsCIGLVUeEa3kBxn353P6bXp5rGTAjWn5URzkwVAdc0oy4hjQQR1UwRf8CxgJgSuCWJLSd6iZLD8NzYHQLUVoqC1hs2g7tRSkg5a1So88oCszWW3W1ArW2qmZe3xzR4Aw5G10yUCFOn9pvhTUEjJINWJqfoejeMWJMs22jHRpLKyoUFPMhxq9nAADdKbX7wxWzjWcZNqVmmGg-0Y-qPR8S0I3onMuZC7MYuyKyVEMQioUitb8PHnwV2inb5M3U9bnZbSoDJTL0jRN_8m8bqRbIqJlftMxPs-hqsiY7jL_8UPbyI2rhFgSt3myMR1diBqWLTQOTEwzgeUNHI_z1tqr6YjAoxTQPpxi0_7yd-2rpYndspJfGrvgR9JC4%3D)

Thank you,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL

clean_body: I could never have imagined that perhaps the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate. | | Peter, I’ve always known that I was meant to live a life of service, but I could never have imagined that perhaps the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate. Peter, I am under no illusions that you will back my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it. I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read. In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis. Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you. I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. And believe me, there are some tales. I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why Our homeland is in danger. Not from overseas terrorists but Washington’s radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream. The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the Senate in 2024, and our path to the Majority runs through this race in Montana. Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list. The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election. *If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play. This is my most critical mission to date, and Thank you, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. | | You see, it happened in a split second, Friend -- when a roadside bomb detonated under the gas tank of my vehicle in Afghanistan. My body was instantly engulfed in flames. The pain was unimaginable. I thought my life was surely coming to an end, and I wondered how long it would be before I drew my last breath. But when one of my soldiers extinguished the flames on my body, I knew God had bigger plans for me.

name: Dr. Shawn Wilson for Governor
subject: Building on the momentum
body:
image of ... [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/swlogo2.png]
TEAM WILSON WEEKLY UPDATES
Peter,
This week finance reports for April to July were released and Team Wilson showed significant growth as we head towards qualifying next month. The most recent polls also show that I’m gaining on the Republican frontrunner , with just a couple percentage points separating the two of us.
I’m proud that our finance report boasted strong support from everyday Louisianans , with 76% of our donations coming in small dollar contributions of $250 or less . Our campaign leads Jeff Landry by double-digit percentage points in this regard. We're powered by everyday Louisianans like you and proud to be a truly grassroots campaign!

CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sw-web]
In response to Tuesday’s veto-override of a bill that will ban necessary healthcare for our transgender youth I released the following statement:
Today’s decision does not mark victory for Louisiana and is understandably painful. When we are divided as Louisianans we all lose. The medical impacts of this decision are well documented from the American Academy of Pediatrics and the American Medical Association and I believe Governor John Bel Edwards took the right position on a bill that has been ruled unconstitutional in several states.
However, it’s now time to turn our focus to making Louisiana better and spreading the message that Louisiana has an option in this race to unify us.
These unnecessary culture wars distract from the real issues facing our state like education, public safety and economic opportunity. As Governor, my time and energy will be spent building bridges to a stronger Louisiana with a vibrant economy that provides opportunity for every man, woman and child.
HIGHLIGHTS FROM THE CAMPAIGN TRAIL
Lake Charles
A big thank you to The Cox Firm , Meyer & Associates , RFR Enterprises , and the dozens of supporters who came to our event in Lake Charles last week.
I'm grateful to have support from every corner of Louisiana. I know that with us all working together to advance commonsense improvements to education, public safety, and infrastructure, we can create a brighter future for us all.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/My%20project-1%20-%202023-07-20T091552.795.png]
While in Lake Charles I had the chance to stop and visit with the Calcasieu Council on Aging .
I was happy to hear the funding for their new facility was approved by FEMA . The over 7,000 seniors served by the COA deserve that!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/My%20project-1%20-%202023-07-20T093406.289.png]
New Orleans
Earlier this week at the New Orleans Regional Black Chamber of Commerce luncheon, I had the chance to network with and gain valuable insight from some of Louisiana’s top business leaders.
Let’s move Louisiana forward by linking small business development and community investment.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/My%20project-1%20-%202023-07-20T094408.733.png]
I loved seeing Scouts at Dillard University ! Being a Scoutmaster developed key skills that are still central to my leadership style: integrity, compassion, and perseverance.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/My%20project-1%20-%202023-07-20T094727.053.png]
Thank you to New Orleans City Councilmember Freddie King III and family for hosting a meet and greet in Algiers - my home turf!
I was glad to see New Orleans City Councilmember Eugene Green come by as well! I’m so appreciative of everyone who turned out. Our campaign is about reaching people where they are and building all of us up together.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/My%20project-1%20-%202023-07-20T100110.343.png]
On Thursday, I participated in a gubernatorial forum with four other candidates hosted by the Community Provider Association .
My focus was on ensuring accessibility, collaboration, and prioritization for the disabled community and their families.
I am committed to eliminating the waiting list with increased waivers to cover needed services.
As Governor, my primary goal for Louisianians with disabilities and their families is to create an inclusive and supportive environment that empowers them to lead fulfilling lives with dignity.
Better accessibility, employment opportunities, education, and affordable healthcare, while also dismantling any existing barriers that prevent full participation in society.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/My%20project-1%20-%202023-07-21T110411.423.png]
Terrebonne/Lafourche Parish
We had a great turnout at the Terrebonne / Lafourche Parish Democratic Meet & Greet . It was standing room-only and attracted all parties! It was wonderful to see a large presence of the Young Democrats of Louisiana and statewide candidates Dustin Granger & Gwen Collins-Greenup !
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/My%20project-1%20-%202023-07-20T095400.177.png]
Madison Parish
The best part of running for Governor is seeing things you least expect, things that make us the most amazing state to live in. I was in Madison Parish for a morning visit in Tallulah and just saw the largest snapping turtle that doubles as a duck blind or a fishing spot.
Nothing beats Louisiana's creativity and innovation. From farming to fishing and manufacturing to making sausage, our people are our greatest resources!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/My%20project-1%20-%202023-07-20T100356.038.png]
Bastrop
I had a wonderful time at the meet and greet in Bastrop. There was plenty of useful discussion about crime, education, and economic development in rural Louisiana. They understand and embrace my commitment to this region of the state.
I was grateful to speak with their leaders, including Mayor Betty Alford-Olive who indicated that my platform and ideas are closely aligned with what her priorities are as Mayor.
It was also a pleasure to see Former Bastrop Mayor Henry Cotton , Morehouse Parish Sheriff Mike Tubbs and Morehouse Parish Police Jury President Terry Matthews .
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/My%20project-1%20-%202023-07-20T100911.968.png]
On the Road Again
Monday was a long, but productive day. It started with a coffee visit in Tallulah with Charlie Butler, the Madison Parish School Superintendent . We talked about teacher pay, retention, and certification, the importance of the MFP, Career Training, and the critical role parents play in student performance. Economic development and affordable housing are critical to his system's success. In a Wilson administration, I will work to leverage opportunities to focus on rural development.
East Carroll Sheriff Wydette Williams gave me a great tour of Lake Providence , a community I have been visiting since 1998. We discussed rural development with education leaders, the Port Director, and the Hospital Administrator. My positions on Medicaid and Multimodal Infrastructure have been right since Day One of this campaign. I lead to benefit ALL of Louisiana.
While in Lake Providence , I visited with Mayor Bobby Amacker and property manager Ranata Johnson , who gave me a tour of the impressive quality affordable housing available in Lake Providence. This is another successful Louisiana Housing Corporation development. We need more of this to grow rural communities.
Here’s some little-known Louisiana trivia. We have our very own Transylvania in Louisiana. Across the street from this iconic water tower I first viewed in 1998 is a now abandoned schoolhouse we should save...Can you guess what the school mascot was?
I concluded the evening in LaSalle Parish . Thank you to Pastor Chauncey Hardy , School Board member Melvin Worthington and Police Juror Casey Jones for joining me. Rural Louisiana is on the rise, and I will be an ally to all at the Capitol.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/My%20project-1%20-%202023-07-20T101506.759.png]
GIVING PRAISE
Covington
The Third District Bogue Chitto General Missionary Baptist Association's 48th annual Congress was a “who’s who” event with attendees including Pastor SC Dixon and National Baptist Convention President Samuel Tolber t.
The President and moderator Rev. Michael Otkins, Sr. outlined their storied history, which helped shape the faith community. I was honored to have the opportunity to speak.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/My%20project-1%20-%202023-07-20T094051.586.png]
ENDORSEMENTS
Natchez Mayor Patsy Ward Hoover
"It is time that Louisiana does what's best for its future and elect Dr. Shawn Wilson as the next Governor," said Natchez Mayor Hoover . "Dr. Wilson puts the people of Louisiana first every time. His dedication to strengthening and developing a quality education system will help not just out educational outcomes, but also bolster the economy and improve public safety."
https://www.wilsonforla.com/sen-cleo-fields-endorses-shawn-wilson-for-governor [https://www.wilsonforla.com/sen-cleo-fields-endorses-shawn-wilson-for-governor]
UPCOMING EVENTS
Baton Rouge
Let's get it going, Baton Rouge!
Join me for the GRAND OPENING of my Baton Rouge office at 700 North 10th Street next Tuesday, July 25th, from noon to 2 pm .
I am ready to be the next Governor of Louisiana and help move us forward. It's our time, Louisiana.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/Shawn%20Wilson%20%20Baton%20Rouge%20Grand%20Opening-High-Quality%20%282%29.jpg]
To learn more about my candidacy visit wilsonforla.com [wilsonforla.com] .
With hope,
Shawn Wilson

The most recent polls also show that I’m gaining on the Republican frontrunner , with just a couple percentage points separating the two of us. I’m proud that our finance report boasted strong support from everyday Louisianans , with 76% of our donations coming in small dollar contributions of $250 or less . Our campaign leads Jeff Landry by double-digit percentage points in this regard. We're powered by everyday Louisianans like you and proud to be a truly grassroots campaign!
